Category:Users who are Rebels at Heart
RPlog:16 ABY Imperial Gala: Awards
summary: At the Imperial Day awards ceremony in the Grand Ballroom of the Imperial Museum on Coruscant, Marshal Krieg Inrokana hosts the presentation of decorations to members of Task Force Inquisitor. Flight Officer Liza Molokai, Squadron Leader Alex Dante, ISB Sgt Dreven Mercurio, and a stormtrooper are individually decorated, and Inrokana himself receives medals for service during the Corellian Corruption Scandal and Kreldin's betrayal. Admiral Jal'Dana Rall delivers an inspirational closing speech about the ideal of the Imperial soldier, after which guests mingle; the civilian Lokus charms (and is rebuffed by) Rall while Krieg quietly slips away with his guest 'Jeni' Winters.

title: RPlog:16 ABY Imperial Gala: Ball
summary: On the final night of Imperial Day festivities, guests gather for a formal dance in the Grand Ballroom of the Imperial Museum on Coruscant. Marshal Krieg coaxes the reluctant swoop racer 'Jeni' Winters onto the dance floor for a slow dance before they retire to the balcony, while Liza Molokai and ISB Agent Dreven Mercurio share an awkward conversation about his interrogation work. CPO Xy'lear Dagnmith meets and flirts with CSA representative Inaya Macklebee at the buffet, and Alex Dante circulates with her date Malif Tal-Tahn. The evening is punctuated by the arrival of Imperial Grand Vizier Vassily Korolov with his Royal Guard, who takes the head table.

title: RPlog:16 ABY Imperial Gala: Celebration
summary: The opening reception of the Imperial Day Gala fills the newly reopened Imperial Museum on Coruscant as Imperial officers, dignitaries, and press arrive. INN reporter Sharidan Hrackniss interviews Squadron Leader Alex Dante of Razor Squadron on camera, while Marshal Krieg escorts his guest 'Jeni' Winters and shields her from the holo-cams. Hidden among the crowd are infiltrators: Sullustan agent Ikihsa Enb'Zik posing as businessman Fiub Giun to observe certain individuals, and New Republic Marine Wrista Ipex disguised as her geneticist cousin Dariza, who is befriended (and gently watched) by ISB Agent Dorian Navtilos. Director Fleming arrives noting he had destroyed a malfunctioning re-education facility, and the crowd is summoned upstairs to the ballroom for the main ceremony.

title: RPlog:21st of Selona Action
summary: A chance encounter between Imperial and Republic starfighter patrols near Corellia escalates into a major fleet engagement between the New Republic cruiser Rapier and the Imperial Star Destroyer Inquisitor. Han Solo arrives in the Millennium Falcon and lends his guns to the Republic, while a damaged Horansi recon ship crewed by Chakuro, Snal'Fashtalli, and Gienah tries to flee to the planet and is targeted by an Imperial boarding party. After heavy missile damage cripples the Inquisitor's command tower, the Empire orders a withdrawal and the Republic claims the field, towing the scout ship to safety.

title: RPlog:35 ISY Competition: Banger vs Black Butterfly
summary: In the final regular match of the Empire's 35 ISY Ace of Aces fighter competition aboard the HIMS Inquisitor, Marshal Krieg 'Banger' Inrokana faces the highly evasive Sarai 'Black Butterfly' Litve in virtual TIE simulators. Sarai proves extraordinarily difficult to hit, dodging nearly all of Banger's fire, though she lands only a single shot of her own. Banger eventually breaks through her evasions, scoring the decisive hits to win and concluding his run in the regular competition.

title: RPlog:35 ISY Competition: Banger vs Chance
summary: In his third match of the Empire's 35 ISY Ace of Aces competition aboard the HIMS Inquisitor, Marshal Krieg 'Banger' Inrokana duels his own trainee Alex 'Chance' Dante in virtual TIE simulators. Dante fights with characteristically aggressive, in-your-face tactics, repeatedly trading blows and even attempting a game of chicken. After a back-and-forth contest that comes down to the final exchanges, Banger lures her into overcommitting and scores the final hits to win.

title: RPlog:35 ISY Competition: Banger vs Slush
summary: In an Ace of Aces match of the Empire's 35 ISY competition aboard the HIMS Inquisitor, Marshal Krieg 'Banger' Inrokana faces the younger pilot Liza 'Slush' Molokai in virtual TIE simulators, with stormtrooper Paulus Lazrus among the spectators. Expected to be a quick blowout, the underdog Slush surprises the crowd by getting the early drop on Banger and repeatedly trading hits, at one point even pulling ahead on the readouts. Banger eventually mirrors her own aggressive ramming tactics, lands the decisive blows, and wins a hard-fought, much-talked-about match.

title: RPlog:35 ISY Competition: Black Butterfly vs Slush
summary: In a virtual simulator dogfight aboard the HIMS Inquisitor as part of the 35 ISY 'Ace of Aces' competition, two Imperial squadron mates duel. Sarai 'Black Butterfly' Litve faces her boss Liza 'Slush' Molokai in TIE Interceptors, trading laser fire across many passes. Liza repeatedly out-pilots and lands hits on Sarai until Sarai's console locks down, giving Liza the victory; the two part on good terms with Liza praising Sarai's flying.

title: RPlog:35 ISY Competition: Chance vs Slush
summary: Aboard the Star Destroyer Inquisitor, Imperial pilots Wing Commander Alex 'Chance' Dante and Flight Officer Liza 'Slush' Molokai face off in a one-on-one dogfighting competition (the Ace of Space / 35 ISY contest). The two trade laser fire through repeated passes, with Dante's superior piloting steadily wearing down Molokai's interceptor. Molokai's hull is finally reduced to zero, conceding the duel, and the two exchange congratulations and praise for a hard-fought match.

title: RPlog:35 ISY Competition: Vapor vs Banger
summary: In the opening engagement of the Empire's 35 ISY Ace of Aces competition aboard the HIMS Inquisitor, Admiral Jal'Dana 'Vapor' Rall duels Marshal Krieg 'Banger' Inrokana in virtual TIE simulators. The two evenly matched Imperial aces fight a record-long, grueling contest marked by extended periods of no hits as each anticipates the other's moves. Vapor draws first blood, but Banger gradually wears her down, scoring critical hits and ultimately winning the exhausting battle; the two exchange mutual respect afterward.

title: RPlog:35 ISY Competition: Vapor vs Slush
summary: Continuing the 35 ISY Ace of Aces tourney in the Inquisitor's simulators, underdog Liza 'Slush' Molokai duels the veteran Admiral Jal'Dana 'Vapor' Rall in a TIE-versus-TIE dogfight. The two pilots trade hit-for-hit and miss-for-miss through a long, crowd-pleasing engagement watched by spectators including Krieg and Lazrus. Vapor's deliberate, experienced style ultimately prevails when a heroic shot disables Liza's fighter, dropping Liza's record to 0-3, though Rall praises her skill and offers to fly on her wing.

title: RPlog:A Bad Start with Ozzle
summary: Imperial officer Tsaran Joir confronts the Dark Jedi Ozzle Olumpari in Fountain Square in Plaxton City on Caspar, opening with a tense battle of wills over their shared connection to Ambassador Morganna. After trading veiled insults and asserting dominance, Joir reveals that Morganna (Ambassador Tazecks) and a Sarian child were shot by a gunman earlier that day. Ozzle, unaware of the attack, presses for details as Joir offers information rather than rumor in a display of mutual respect.

title: RPlog:A Battle Lost
summary: In an office at the Imperial Embassy on Caspar, Vice Director Tsaran Joir interrogates the bounty hunter/mercenary Normack Gastrov, brought in by Taggor, over goods taken from the Empire at Tatooine and the whereabouts of Lorn Rhys. The two engage in a chess-like negotiation, with Normack demanding immunity, compensation, and safe passage in exchange for information. Joir agrees, handing over a credit chip and legal waiver, then begins firing pointed questions about who attacked the ship and orchestrated the Plaxton Square fight.

title: RPlog:A Bit Of A Situation
summary: At the seedy Smuggler's Dig cantina in Coronet City on Corellia, CorSec Colonel Twila Virda is goaded by the pirate captain Jalek Helion, who mocks her boyfriend Gren and provokes her into throwing a punch. Jalek subdues, cuffs, and holds Twila at gunpoint while the bar erupts into betting and chaos; pirate Talia and bureaucrat Pyat dar Kuat look on. The Sith Tyler Damion enters, ignites his lightsaber, frees Twila from the cuffs with the Force, and forces Jalek to back down as a full brawl breaks out around them.

title: RPlog:A Blast from the Past
summary: On Palanhi, Paul Nighman wakes in a hotel lobby and recognizes a scruffy youth, Shenner Veery, whom he follows to a reunion with Jessalyn Valios. Shenner, enraged that Paul abandoned her on Tatooine after a drunken incident, punches him in the jaw. Paul later explains he mistook her for a woman he once loved during a drunken stupor; the two reach a truce, and Paul resolves to leave the planet.

title: RPlog:A Bombing, How Quaint
summary: Eighteen hours after a bomb killed five and injured a dozen at a campaign office on Coronet City's Row, Johanna brings Chana and Leo to the cordoned-off blast site to look for clues. They debate competing theories: terrorism, an inside job, or a bombing meant to cover up forensic evidence, noting the device matches bombs used in a recent Chandrila art heist. Chana uses her R2 unit to scan the debris and spots an object of interest just as the scene ends.

title: RPlog:A Budding Rivalry
summary: During a cleanup operation after the Abyssal Ruins raid, Ai'kani Za'netra and her companion Silvin Katrar investigate gang violence in Coruscant's undercity and discover Tyy'sun Eson and the Wookiee Shoburhynn disposing of bodies at the hideout. Tyy'sun confronts the intruders, warning Ai'kani never to come uninvited again, while both sides' companions tense for a fight. Ai'kani refuses to back down, declaring herself a protector of the undercity's people and vowing to stand in Tyy'sun's way, before withdrawing in a tense but bloodless standoff that hints at a deeper Force connection between her and Tyy'sun.

title: RPlog:A Business Proposition on Kichnar
summary: Simone Drake (using the alias Elysia Jaxom) visits the Blue Nebula Cantina on Kichnar Orbital Station to pitch placing a holographic combat game in the establishment to earn money for herself and Tyler McBride. Talon Karrde, owner of the nearby Keepon Casino, overhears her pitch and sends her a flashy advertising datacard to get her attention. Karrde and his associate Ariana Millikin draw Piper to their table and negotiate her bringing the game to test at the casino's upcoming opening. Despite friction between Piper and Ariana, they part on business terms with plans to meet again when the machine arrives.

title: RPlog:A Call for Aid
summary: Aboard the Audacity near Mon Calamari, New Republic officer Rasi Praddhan Cen meets with Jedi Ikihsa Enb'Zik and Caspian Democratic Union Commander Lynae Cassius to request aid as an Imperial attack on the system looms. Rasi formally asks the Jedi Order for assistance and tasks Enb'Zik with a 36-hour covert reconnaissance of the Kessel Redoubt to confirm it is an Imperial staging ground. He asks the neutral Caspian Union for access to their SONG sensor network and fleet deployments, while Lynae offers tactical advice on fighting the expendable, replaceable Imperial forces.

title: RPlog:A Capital Duel and Assault
summary: Vigilance Security Corporation, contracted alongside New Republic forces, ambushes an Imperial supply convoy guarded by a Nebulon-B frigate, a TIE squadron, and five freighters. Aboard the Marauder Corvette Eternal Vigilance, Twila Virda directs a relentless capital-ship duel against the Nebulon while Gren Delede leads Hornet interceptors and Rebecca Varn's Ghost X-wings escort Y-wings disabling freighters. Imperial pilot Krieg Inrokana, with Alex Dante's Razor Squadron, defends the convoy; Krieg outduels Delede, who crash-lands with a broken arm, and damages Rebecca's fighter. The Imperials lose some TIEs and a freighter but extract most of the convoy, retreating into hyperspace.

title: RPlog:A Caspian House Warming Party
summary: Several days after Lyr Dunwell's death, Jessalyn Valios and Di'an Cecht host a dinner party at their riverside cottage on Caspar. The grief-stricken doctor Avalyshaar Dusten leaves midway through the evening, eventually departing with Grei. Lotus Blackpool, pregnant with Lyr's child, then collapses from stress; Piper fetches a nurse who scans her and determines the collapse was stress-induced atop a prior illness. The nurse urges a hospital exam due to slightly concerning readings about the baby, and Lotus is persuaded to rest at the cottage while the guests depart.

title: RPlog:A Casual Encounter with Han Solo
summary: While walking her unruly dog Duke on a residential avenue in Capital City on Etti IV, Piper (Simone Drake) crosses paths with Han Solo. The dog repeatedly breaks free and bounds over to Han, who pats it tolerantly and jokes it should be named 'Trouble.' Piper and Han exchange casual small talk about the local shops and his being just passing through before he merges into the crowd and departs. A brief, light-hearted character encounter.

title: RPlog:A Chance Dance
summary: On a routine deep-space border patrol, New Republic pilot Raxis L'ygr in Ghost 3 intercepts an unidentified Z-95 Headhunter he believes is a mercenary taking scans. The pilot bluffs a courier-run cover story, then opens fire and jams his comms. After a dogfight in which her smaller fighter outmaneuvers his X-wing, she disables his ship and reveals herself as Admiral Jal'Dana Rall before escaping into hyperspace.

title: RPlog:A Chat In The Park
summary: In Hypolita Park on Theseus Station, Twi'lek officer Twila Virda seeks out the grizzled, detoxing doctor Xar'on Tanner for a heartfelt conversation about her marriage to Gren Delede and the anger and trauma she carries. Speaking largely in Ryl, Xar'on shares hard-won wisdom about hope, living in the present, and not letting past pain (including her torture and the bloodworm) run her life. The talk becomes a fatherly bonding moment, with Twila resolving to commit to her marriage and embracing Xar'on as a father figure.

title: RPlog:A Chip and a Chair is All You Need
summary: At a weapons-merchant convention aboard the starship casino Empress of the Stars (Admiral Piett), Admiral Lynae Cassius and Darth Malus (Lorn Rhys) observe the crowd from an upper balcony. A novice holojournalist, Nara Rhen, approaches for an interview and inadvertently angers Malus by referring to him as disabled. CSA figure Malif Tal-Tahn joins the group, and the conversation turns to a philosophical debate on whether prolonged galactic peace causes stagnation. Malus and Malif arrange to meet later on Athaniss while Nara is given advice on journalism and networking.

title: RPlog:A Churban Reunion of Sorts
summary: At Club Infinity atop Plaxton City on Caspar, Simone Drake (Piper) joins a table with Jessalyn Valios, her husband Di'anCecht, the Horansi cub Kuxli, and the artist Kendell. When Caspian pilot Doron Rtufo arrives speaking the rare Churban language, Piper reveals she too is Churban, leading to a tense exchange about Churban identity. The scene ends with Piper recognizing Rtufo as the brother of a woman named Dannan, just as a player disconnect cut the scene short. Jessalyn, who is pregnant, leaves early feeling unwell.

title: RPlog:A Cunning Plan
summary: In the Coral Gardens on Mon Calamari, Paul Nighman plays guitar while observing General Beaubos 'Skeezix' Calhoun, Gabrielle Calhoun, and the oddly perceptive boy Kian. Worried that Shenner is considering joining the army as a rash reaction to their emotional fallout, Paul follows the General and asks him to steer Shenner toward Yavin with Jessalyn instead of the Marine Corps. Skeezix is noncommittal and somewhat annoyed, promising only to talk to Shenner and 'do whatever's wisest,' leaving Paul doubtful his plan will succeed.

title: RPlog:A Dark Secret
summary: At the Sandbar cantina in Plaxton City on Caspar, Jedi Jessalyn Valios and her apprentice Orson Tighe encounter a heavily intoxicated Bazil McKenzie. Orson confesses to Jessalyn that he previously tortured Bazil in the woods at a base, a deed he regrets, framing Bazil as his 'dirty little secret.' The drunken Bazil is incoherent, falls off his stool, and leers at Jessalyn before stumbling out, claiming he is 'dying.' Orson and Jessalyn reach an understanding that he needs to set boundaries with Bazil, while Malus follows Bazil out to question him about an intercepted transmission.

title: RPlog:A Deal with the Devil
summary: Aboard the Refrain of Anshalar, the blind Jedi Aurejin brings Jessalyn Valios (who has lost her connection to the Force from Simon Sezirok's Sith ritual) to the white prison cell of the captive Emperor Bacharan Valak. Aurejin offers Valak a covert release in exchange for information on how to restore Jessalyn's powers, disabling the security cameras to negotiate. Valak demands to be transported with Jessalyn and his man Rellik to a forbidden library of Palpatine to perform the restoration, and Aurejin agrees over Jessalyn's objections. Afterward, in the turbolift, Aurejin embraces Jessalyn, confesses regret over his wasted Jedi life, then secretly drugs her unconscious.

title: RPlog:A Debt is Incurred
summary: At the Imperial Embassy on Caspar, Tsaran Joir spots Venus Darkstar, the former Empress and now Caspian prime minister he once guarded, arriving bruised after being assaulted. Joir tenderly questions her and learns the attacker was Claudio Van Eyre, a business associate who now owes him a debt; he vows the man will not hurt her again. They retreat to the conference chamber to reminisce, rekindling an intimate, protective bond strained by Venus's past alliances.

title: RPlog:A Decision
summary: Disgraced former Imperial Antoine Dareus is summoned aboard Darth Malign's (Tyler Damion) Star Destroyer Predator at Nar Shaddaa, where the previous captain's corpse is being dragged off the bridge. Malign and Dareus discuss the tense situation in the Hutt sector, Luke Skywalker's presence, and Axel's planned bombing of the Maffi compound on Ord Mantell, which Skywalker warned of. Malign offers Dareus the command of the vessel and a return to the service of the Sith, telling him to consider the offer.

title: RPlog:A Deserted Star Destroyer
summary: Returning to the I2SD Predator expecting an Imperial crew, recovering pilot Seifer Wolf instead finds the ship eerily empty of Imperial personnel and is confronted by Axel Vichten, self-proclaimed Lord Commander of the Sith Fleet. Axel reveals the Predator now belongs to a secret order serving the Emperor directly, not the Imperial Navy, and that Wolf was brought there by Darth Malign. After probing Wolf's service history and his loyalty to the late Danik Kreldin, Axel escorts him to the med bay for bacta treatment and a cybernetic eye implant, hinting Wolf may be recruited as a fighter pilot pending Malign's approval.

title: RPlog:A Done Deal
summary: On a Nar Shaddaa landing platform, smuggler captain Jaspar Andromidas of Andromidas Galaxy Logistics is approached by the Twi'lek Karawn'Rai, a contact sent by their mutual associate Torin. Karawn pitches himself and two ex-military companions as competent, reliable crew with experience in smuggling spice, piloting, medical work, and droids/tech. Jaspar agrees to hire all three, promising a first job within the week and directing Karawn to his usual haunts on the moon.

title: RPlog:A Drink to Disaster
summary: Smuggler Captain Jaspar Andromidas docks the Hirakiis at New Alderaan and is greeted by Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard, a New Republic business contact, who treats him to a tour of Belleau-a-Lir's city life. Over drinks at the Port of Paradise resort bar, they bond over a satirical Aldus Thel action figure and discuss their working relationship. The evening is shattered by a breaking newscast showing pirates led by Shiari Vane attacking the first relief shipment bound for Caspar; an enraged Ambrosia crushes her glass and bloodies her hand, then rushes off to make calls.

title: RPlog:A Duel With the Cadet
summary: Cadet Rebecca Varn coaxes a sour-faced Lieutenant Raxis L'ygr into taking her X-Wing up for a training dogfight over Ord Mantell. They duel in painted-shield training mode, and Raxis wins after accidentally leaving his comm on and distracting Rebecca with an offhand joke about being asked to become a stripper. Afterward they retire to the Cat's Claw cantina for drinks, where Raxis shares the cautionary tale of Flight Officer Corbet's capture, before the marine Gene Malentean arrives to buy Rebecca a drink.

title: RPlog:A Fallen Comrade
summary: On a deep-space patrol, Ghost Squadron pilots Raxis 'Raptor' L'ygr and Lance 'Wildman' Corbet detect a damaged Imperial cruiser, the HIMS Reaper, hiding behind a moon and defended by a single elite TIE Mark II pilot, Seifer 'Wolf' Wolf. Wolf engages and quickly disables Lance's X-Wing (Ghost Six), then damages Raxis's craft. Ordered to get word home, Raxis jumps to hyperspace to report while Lance is captured, and the Reaper escapes into hyperspace with its new prisoner.

title: RPlog:A Fateful Return
summary: After delivering weapons, noble Gustaf Heram meets pilot Kalna (Brin Harper) on Ord Mantell and brings her to his occupied homeworld of Vandelhelm. Kalna expertly pilots their ship through a dangerous asteroid belt and lands undetected, evading an Imperial starfighter, then meets Gustaf's son Baral. Gustaf gives her a speeder tour of the city, pointing out the Imperial government headquarters, the communications center, and the Vandelhelm Cooperation Syndicate (VCS) HQ, then briefs her on a three-pronged assault to destroy the VCS using a planted inside man.

title: RPlog:A Fickle Crowd
summary: On blockaded Caspar, a growing crowd of mostly young Human and Sarian protestors gathers on the New Republic Embassy lawn in Plaxton, holding populist 'Caspar for Caspians' and anti-war placards. Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard emerges to address them, arguing the Imperial blockade is meant to turn Caspians against their own government and that the Empire will not leave even if the Republic does. The crowd remains hostile, chanting 'New Republic out,' and Ambrosia plants her own colorful 'Caspar is Proud, Keep Her Free' sign before retreating indoors.

title: RPlog:A Fight with Kyyel
summary: In the observation lounge of the NRSD Defiant, Jessalyn Valios and Kyyel Marrak join General Drax Rendolen for drinks and discuss a recent intruder and the captive Emperor Valak. The elder Jedi Aurejin arrives and confronts Kyyel over Mailyn Raines, just as Rendolen reveals that the Sith Simon Sezirok is alive, having been broken out by the woman Kyyel had freed on Tatooine. Enraged, Aurejin punishes Kyyel as a lesson, igniting a lightsaber and cutting his sword and his thigh; Kyyel briefly retaliates in fury before being disarmed. A horrified Jessalyn declares she wants nothing to do with the Jedi Order if this is its way, and the duel ends with Aurejin sparing Kyyel.

title: RPlog:A Forgotten 'Star'
summary: At a crowded pre-tournament party hosted by StarShield in the Black Krayt Swoop Arena on Caspar, numerous patrons mingle while swoop racers like Troy, Naldo, Selektah, and Ment boast about the upcoming grand race. StarShield CEO Rabid (Matthew Fox) confronts Senator Ozzle Olumpari over his unwelcome presence, prompting prime minister Venus Darkstar to intervene diplomatically. Imperial Director Tsaran Joir recognizes Venus as the former Empress he once guarded and approaches her, while Master Sergeant Webb shadows the encounter.

title: RPlog:A Friendly Drink
summary: In the Cat's Claw Cantina on New Alderaan, defected Imperial doctor Lynae Cassius enters under New Republic guard, prompting Ghost Squadron pilot Kesander Beysarus to draw his blaster on her before being talked down. After the pilots and others disperse, Ghost Squadron leader Kyrin Sh'vani sits with the captive Lynae for a long, surprisingly empathetic conversation in which both reveal themselves as exiles. They discuss Lynae's treason against the new Emperor, her life-debt to Brandis Finian, the rumored survival of Grand Admiral Kreldin, and the futility of the war before Kyrin is called away on duty.

title: RPlog:A Furball and a Firebrand
summary: In the Cat's Claw Cantina on Nar Shaddaa, pirate captain Salty Jack (Jaqen H'gar) and his squib cook Grizz/Cookey play sabacc when an Ewok named Munch wanders in scavenging for food. After a tense moment, Jack befriends Munch with candy and impulsively adds him to the crew. The brash gun-slinger Sharktooth Sally barges in and also joins, and first mate Barnacle Bill (Billious Qarrack) arrives shopping for a replacement ship after their Freedom Fish was destroyed; finding only junk affordable, the motley crew comes together while waiting on a New Republic deal.

title: RPlog:A Gathering of Shadows
summary: At the Meltdown Cafe on Nar Shaddaa, smuggler captain Jaspar Andromidas formally onboards his new crew: the Twi'lek Karawn'Rai, the chemist Torin Marr, and the Quarren slicer Korlen. Over drinks, Jaspar lays out how Andromidas Galaxy Logistics operates, explaining that most work stays 'above the level' but occasionally requires masking contraband like glitterstim and ryll-spice as medical cargo. The crew discuss their specialties, bunks aboard the Hirakiis, avoiding Imperial checkpoints, and Jaspar's rules, ending optimistic about the partnership.

title: RPlog:A Gentleman's Disagreement
summary: NRI agent Drax Rendolen is drinking in the Cat's Claw Cantina on New Alderaan (Ord Mantell) when Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard and smuggler Jaspar Andromidas join him. His NRI handler Ivar arrives with armed agents to forcibly retrieve Drax over a flagged medical scan and a bounty, but Drax takes Ambrosia hostage at gunpoint, uses her as a shield to reach the rear exit, then releases her and escapes down the alley. The agents recapture Ambrosia, warn her to inform on Drax if he contacts her, and the scene ends with Ambrosia and Jaspar shaken but alive.

title: RPlog:A Gift of Spice
summary: At the crowded Sandbar/Smuggler's Den cantina on Caspar, smuggler Axel Vichten parties amid a haze of high-grade Andris spice with a group of women and his armed bodyguard. The pirate Jalek Wessiri arrives bearing a datacylinder of premium spice as a gift from Tyy'sun Eson, head of the Twi'lek Maffi crime syndicate, along with an invitation to discuss business at Eson's beachside property on Etti IV. Axel, feigning ignorance of Eson, agrees to a meeting on neutral ground at his own convenience, and his bodyguard secretly records the conversation for later use.

title: RPlog:A Hunter Finds His Prey
summary: At the Imperial Embassy lobby on Caspar, the bounty hunter Taggor Bren informs Vice Director Tsaran Joir that he has captured the mercenary Normack Gastrov, who awaits on his ship believing he will receive immunity for his knowledge of the 'Lorn Affair.' Joir is pleased and notes he may have other plans for Gastrov. Taggor privately probes Joir about the mysterious circumstances surrounding the Moff, and Joir, citing 'need to know,' reveals only that the Empire wants Lorn Rhys back now.

title: RPlog:A Killer Reunion
summary: In the SandBar on Caspar, Director Tsaran Joir joins his Chief Diplomatic Officer Chantinelle Thistleborn when a cloaked, scarred figure approaches and reveals herself as Ambassador Morganna Tazecks, supposedly on vacation. Morganna passes Joir an encrypted datapad from the hunter Taggor concerning their 'missing goods,' which she claims can be located on Caspar. Joir is unsettled by how much Morganna now knows and by her changed, predatory demeanor, recognizing she has become a dangerous and unpredictable factor before she departs.

title: RPlog:A Lady Displeases Her Lord
summary: At the tail end of Admiral Adlerson's retirement party in the lounge of Orbital Station Guardian, Director Tsaran Joir, Lord Minister Drocal Arconen, CIO Morganna Tazecks, and pilot Azya McTavish engage in tense Imperial power-play conversation. Morganna's blunt, individualistic remarks provoke Drocal, who publicly rebukes her for insolence and demands she learn her place; she retreats to cool off, snarling past Lieutenant Jolan Kaerf. Joir and Drocal then withdraw to the private Senior Officer's Tier to discuss the fate of Moff Lorn Rhys and the High Command.

title: RPlog:A Late Night at the Hangar
summary: Hours after Ghost Squadron returns from a patrol that turned into a pirate attack on the Audacity, Lieutenant Raxis L'ygr is found hiding off-duty in a repair hangar on Ord Mantell. Cadet Rebecca Varn arrives to fix a malfunctioning comm radio in Ghost Nine that keeps slipping frequencies. The two banter and bicker, Raxis tells her the story of how he hunted a nexu and earned his tooth necklace, and he hands her a replacement part to finish the repair before she heads off to bed.

title: RPlog:A Leak
summary: Aboard the Nebulon-B frigate Price of Pleasure, CSA operative Zeak Oppenhiemer secretly briefs New Republic Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard and NRI agent Drax Rendolen on a covert Imperial slaving operation. Lord Aldus Thel is using Oppenhiemer as a middle man to buy Wookiee slaves from rebellious Trandoshan clans, funneling them via a Falleen major-domo on Nar Shaddaa toward a secret Imperial mining/construction project. The agents agree to expose and disrupt the pipeline while keeping Oppenhiemer's name out of all official reports, debating whether to intercept the first slave shipment or let one through to track the worksite.

title: RPlog:A Legal Matter
summary: Nicholas Chang, the newly appointed CSA legal attache, visits the Imperial Embassy on Caspar and is received by Director Tsaran Joir and Chief Diplomatic Officer Chantinelle Thistleborn. Chang requests up-to-date copies of Imperial Law and Procedure to keep CSA records current and avoid friction between the allied governments, offering a datadisk of CSA documentation in exchange. Joir agrees, directing Chang to retrieve Imperial law books from a diplomatic staffer and to route questions through Thistleborn.

title: RPlog:A Lesson Set in Stones
summary: Aboard the freighter White Ghost, Simon Sezirok continues training his two Force-sensitive initiates, Mira and Markus, in his Selas Brotherhood tradition. Mira demonstrates she has learned to make small rocks roll using the True Source, while Markus shows he can sense and point to the direction a rock will move. Simon begins explaining that what they call the True Source is known elsewhere as the Force, setting up a deeper lesson about its dangers.

title: RPlog:A Lesson Set in Stones, Part II
summary: Continuing the lesson aboard the White Ghost, Simon Sezirok teaches Mira and Markus the deeper philosophy of the True Source, explaining that every living being carries a precious piece of it but that Force-sensitives like them and the Jedi are dangerously connected and prone to corruption. He likens this to the Jedi concept of the Dark Side and stresses respect for their power. Markus is called away by the cockpit and Mira, tired, asks whether Simon will truly guide them before retiring for the night.

title: RPlog:A Little Respect
summary: After a failed meeting with Talon Karrde on Asteroid Kappa, the Sith Simon Sezirok takes Jessalyn Valios on a shopping trip through the asteroid's market to win her favor and apologize for past wrongs. They browse clothing shops, settling on practical spacer's wear rather than an expensive gown, while Orson Tighe and Drew Carvallo remain aboard the ship discussing keeping a low profile. As they shop, Simon and Jessalyn debate their conflicting beliefs about the soul: Simon's Selas faith holds that touching another's soul is a grave sin, while Jessalyn argues the Jedi can heal through such intimacy. They agree to disagree and return to the ship.

title: RPlog:A Lone Marine Demolition Team
summary: During the battle for Coruscant, Republic Marine 2nd Lt. Vengan Draelis is fired from a torpedo tube in a one-man breaching pod that embeds itself in the side of the Imperial Star Destroyer Domination. He plants demolition charges on the secondary and primary reactors, fights through stormtroopers using grenades and ventilation ducts, and coordinates with a black corvette and Marine boarding teams assaulting the command tower. After setting the final timers, he commandeers an escape pod and launches clear just as his charges detonate, destroying the Star Destroyer.

title: RPlog:A Meeting at Roark's House
summary: Simone Drake (Piper) is summoned to Xegid Roark's home on Etti IV after a New Republic ship attacked CSA forces over the captured Han Solo. Roark, bruised from a Wookiee assault during a failed parley with the New Republic, plans to arrest Chewbacca, secure the Falcon, and decoy the Republic away from Solo. He offers Piper the position of Prex of the Corporate Sector Authority, which she accepts. Imperial Lt. Colonel Russel then arrives to coordinate Imperial assistance, urging Solo's transfer and offering to assault Republic ships, though Roark insists on a legal trial.

title: RPlog:A Meeting with Dillon in Cafe Abbatoir
summary: VicePrex Simone Drake (Piper) meets CSA Executive Officer Sean Dillon at Cafe Abattoir on Etti IV to discuss the conduct of his young aide Kuxli, who fled his Espo guards on Caspar while consorting with enemies of the Authority. Dillon explains Kuxli is an orphan he took in and promises to discipline him. Piper also reports that Chewbacca has returned to Etti IV and confronted her, prompting Dillon to leave abruptly and angrily to deal with the Wookiee.

title: RPlog:A Meeting with Fate
summary: In the Bonadan spaceport, Jedi Jessalyn Valios is approached by a woman calling herself Clarise, a fortune-teller who claims to have recently seen the missing Luke Skywalker and offers to show Jessalyn a New Republic pin he supposedly gave her. Lured into a deserted mechanized factory, Jessalyn is ambushed when Clarise ignites a lightsaber and attacks, revealing herself as a dark-side servant of Lord Valak. A prolonged, acrobatic lightsaber and Force duel rages across the factory's catwalks and conveyor lines, ending with Jessalyn's leg broken and her head slammed into the floor, knocked unconscious and captured to be delivered to Lord Valak.

title: RPlog:A Meeting with Paro
summary: Aboard the Imperial Star Destroyer Tormentor, the Sith Simon Sezirok meets ISB Director Brigadier General Vorn Paro to demand the release of the condemned prisoner Mailyn Raines, whom Simon intends to use as bait to lure the Jedi. Paro, a master manipulator, agrees to grant amnesty and release Mailyn into Simon's custody. In exchange he secures Simon's agreement to a collaborative working relationship feeding intelligence to the Imperial Security Bureau.

title: RPlog:A Meeting with Sabbath on Etti IV
summary: Prex Simone Drake (Piper) is sent by Sean Dillon to meet Imperial figure Sabbathius Osbourne in the Imperial Embassy conference chamber on Etti IV in Dillon's place. Sabbath presses for Han Solo to be transferred to the ISD Vanguard for safekeeping and trial, arguing the CSA cannot keep his location secret. Piper firmly maintains the CSA will hold Solo under its own security for trial, and Sabbath says he will take the matter up directly with Dillon. The meeting ends with Piper agreeing to find out when Dillon will be available.

title: RPlog:A Meeting with the Minister of State
summary: New Republic Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard meets with Caspian Minister of State Cordelia Nivhya at the NR Embassy in Plaxton City, Caspar, unable to secure an audience with the Presav. They spar diplomatically over the Empire's threat to hold the Caspian Democratic Union responsible for Caspian arms manufacturers supplying the New Republic. Cordelia presses Ambrosia on whether the Republic would actually commit forces to defend Caspar against an Imperial invasion, while Ambrosia urges the CDU to prepare its defenses and resist Imperial pressure. Ambrosia offers to combat Imperial propaganda with truth, even citing her own past as Imperial 'livestock' as an example.

title: RPlog:A Morning at the Cafe
summary: Rodian arms-dealer executive Gimel Daleth and his bodyguard Sinter take an outdoor table at a Plaxton cafe on Caspar, where Daleth's intimidating reputation clears patrons away. He strikes up a conversation with Hydra Squadron pilot Asli Nayana, teaching her to read Rodian antennae expressions and pitching his Merr-Sonn weapons, before NR Commander Adam Shadow (secretly recording via his droid R3-K7) joins. When a clumsy newcomer named Shintu spills hot caf on Asli, Daleth draws a hold-out blaster on him; CDC officer Sh'par Tarashabi and his Horansi mate K'tyyri defuse the standoff, check Daleth's weapons permits, and disarm the pistol before leaving.

title: RPlog:A Most Unusual Jawa
summary: Aboard an Imperial pleasure vessel, scarred trader Morganna Tazecks chats warily with Captain Troy McTavish and Imperial Ensign Cole. After they leave, a strange, smelly Jawa-like droid hunter named Da'Shi (Rughr) approaches Morganna, communicating in halting Basic. Through a drawn-out conversation he reveals he is hunting a blue-and-white and a gold droid once owned by a yellow-haired man with a 'funny green stick' whom Morganna realizes is Luke Skywalker, a Rebel.

title: RPlog:A N'kosi Meets a Chief
summary: Naval officer Rasi Praddhan Cen arranges a meeting in which the Horansi refugee K'tyyri Tarashabi, former N'kosi of Mutanda, pleads her world's case before New Republic Chief of State Leia Organa Solo and Mon Calamari Senator Tokoga. K'tyyri's cubs are sent off with Chewbacca and C-3PO while she recounts Mutanda's losing war against the CSA, Empire, and Griffon Alliance and her people's capture and exile. Leia and Tokoga agree to send an envoy to Mutanda and offer diplomatic quarters, while making clear Republic membership is not a condition of aid. K'tyyri agrees to guide and advise them and to rally loyal Fiefs.

title: RPlog:A New Ally
summary: Disguised as 'Annalise' with cropped silver hair after her fall to the dark side, the exiled Jessalyn Valios wanders Plaxton City on Caspar and crosses paths with Kyyel Marrak, a Corellian who pauses to watch the sunrise. Despite her wariness and refusal to reveal anything, Kyyel repeatedly and sincerely offers to help her, recognizing in her words the despair of an exile like himself. Overwhelmed by his compassion and her painful memories, Annalise breaks down, rejects his help, and flees into the crowd, leaving the saddened Kyyel behind.

title: RPlog:A New Beginning
summary: Arriving on Nar Shaddaa, the tattooed ex-Cloud City Air Defense Guard Esmeraldas 'Ezzi' Esfera approaches smuggler Jaspar Andromidas at his freighter the Hirakiis looking for a drink and work. Over drinks at the Meltdown Cafe, she demonstrates deep engineering knowledge and Jaspar hires her as ship engineer, stressing his business stays mostly on the level. He then gives her a tour of the Hirakiis, where she impresses him by diagnosing the ship's dated systems and suggesting upgrades before turning in for the night.

title: RPlog:A New Lightsaber
summary: At Talon Karrde's base on Myrkr, Jessalyn Valios reveals her newly built lightsaber to the group while Orson, Drew and Simon Sezirok discuss leaving Karrde's organization and recruiting Orson as a trusted pilot. Jessalyn and Simon begin a friendly sparring match in her quarters, her lightsaber against his Force-energized rosewood staff. When one of Myrkr's Force-suppression bubbles suddenly shifts and cuts off the Force mid-strike, Jessalyn cannot stop her blow and accidentally slashes Simon across the chest. She tends his wound with medicine, and as the Force returns she works to drain his pain into herself.

title: RPlog:A New Mission
summary: Days after the Chandrilan Massacre, Imperial captain Danik Kreldin meets Warlord Darth Malign secretly on a Chandrila lakeshore. Malign, while mildly cautioning Kreldin about prudence, gives him a covert new assignment: transfer to COMPForce and spy on High Lord Korolov, whose loyalty Malign distrusts. Malign hands Kreldin a white medallion serving as both his symbol and a secret communicator, ending Kreldin's exclusive naval career and making him the Warlord's personal agent.

title: RPlog:A New Moon Rises
summary: Aboard the luxury cruise liner Angry Rancor over Gastus IV, a third Death Star commanded by Emperor Valak appears with Star Destroyer escort and destroys the planet Gastus, sending the ship fleeing in an emergency hyperjump to Caspar. Trapped aboard, Sith Moff Morganna Tazecks attempts to flee with hostage Sam'viel but is confronted by Luke Skywalker in a lightsaber duel. Luke overpowers and subdues Morganna, dislocating her shoulder and putting her to sleep. New Republic personnel (Bazil, Arands, Altair, Lando, Kelvis) quarantine the ship and evacuate the captured Sith to the NRSC Deliverance.

title: RPlog:A New Team
summary: In an underground briefing room on Mon Calamari, a Marine Colonel and Navy Lt-Commander Rasi Praddhan Cen brief a newly assembled joint Marines-NRI unit for the duration of the Mon Calamari campaign. The team, including medic Galatea Demor, is tasked with infiltrating the Imperial/QSP-controlled city of Morjanssik to gather intelligence and sabotage power, shields, and grids ahead of a liberation offensive. Galatea, an ISB deserter, raises concerns about exit strategy and disguise; Rasi explains they will use captured Imperial uniforms, tapped enemy comms, and a sewer escape route.

title: RPlog:A New Venture
summary: Bored with life in the Corporate Sector, Simone Drake (Piper) goes undercover as a woman named 'Elysia' in the Free-Flight Dance Dome on Etti IV, where the anti-gravity floor and an acrobatic gum-blowing child named Kian provide a backdrop. She strikes up a flirtatious conversation with freighter captain Tyler McBride, posing as someone desperate to leave the sector. McBride offers her passage offworld and the two agree to meet again in two hours aboard his ship to talk privately, particularly about the CSA's notices to turn in all Wookiees.

title: RPlog:A Night Away From Home
summary: Paul Nighman, on vacation on Palanhi, wanders through the Grand Palanhi Hotel and out to the starport, where he becomes infatuated with a red-haired woman named Alora. At the docking bay he meets Jessalyn Valios, who is guarding Luke Skywalker's borrowed ship Black Dragon. Alora reveals herself to be a Dark-side Force user, Force-chokes Paul into unconsciousness when he insults her, and ultimately spares him. Alora tells Jessalyn she needs to meet with Luke and Leia and departs, leaving a recovered Paul to deduce that Jessalyn is hopelessly in love with Luke.

title: RPlog:A Night Out On Coruscant
summary: On Coruscant, NR Marine Colonel Sabrina Rheatis unexpectedly reunites with Jedi-in-training and doctor Brandis Finian in a hospital, where he is recovering from the loss of a hand and a cybernetic graft after a failed rescue on Selene. The day before her transfer to Calamari, they go to dinner at a seafood restaurant, share a kiss, and grow close. Sabrina invites him back to help her pack and asks him to stay; they spend the night together before she must leave for her new post.

title: RPlog:A Pirate's Trap
summary: After Gren Delede's personal Centurion crash-lands aboard the CSAV Litigator piloted by his terrified astromech SH0RTY, a holorecording reveals Gren was captured by the White Death pirates on a desert world surrounded by remote-operated bomb-ships. Colonel Twila Virda leads a joint CorSec and ESPO rescue force aboard an assault shuttle, which is shot down by an anti-starfighter battery on landing. The survivors fight through a pirate camp into a mountain bunker, free a tortured and one-eyed Gren, and shut down the bomb-ship transmitters so the Litigator task force can arrive and bombard the camp. The pirate leader escapes after wounding Twila, vowing the White Death will return.

title: RPlog:A Place in the Universe
summary: At the Spacebarn on Nar Shaddaa, Johanna seeks out Chana (Chanera Thorn), who is doing odd jobs overhauling blasters, and offers her a job crewing her freight-hauling operation. They negotiate terms, with Chana agreeing to fly fighter escort against pirates for 500 credits a week, ten times her current pay. Chana sets firm conditions, refusing to be used to oppress others or to fire on Jedi, and the two strike a deal, with Johanna privately keeping secrets of her own.

title: RPlog:A Plan Unveiled
summary: In the dark Sith meditation chamber aboard the Star Destroyer Predator above the dead world Cochran, Darth Malign (Tyler Damion) convenes his loyal followers Antoine Dareus, Axel Vichten, and the infiltrator Gillian Lasel. Malign reveals his plan to build a hidden subterranean droid factory on Cochran to raise a Sith army, giving Dareus two weeks to prepare the facility. The group debates defenses, repairs to Axel's damaged Interdictor Noquella's Embrace, and the need to steal a space station to service the fleet.

title: RPlog:A Plea from Orson
summary: In the cleared area before the main house at Karrde's base on Myrkr, Orson Tighe finds Jessalyn Valios resting and they discuss the planet's mysterious Force-suppression and his struggle to believe in the Force. Orson confides that he met a woman named Eva Sargent on Tatooine who described being chased by a man resembling Cort Stasus over a strange cube she believed could kill millions, and who lost her memory in the resulting crash. He asks Jessalyn to help Eva, suspecting Sith involvement, and Jessalyn agrees to find her on Caspar. Orson leaves Jessalyn a small wildflower, and she senses an important alliance has been born.

title: RPlog:A Political Move
summary: On Ord Mantell, NR Navy Captain Rasi Praddhan Cen escorts Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard and her daughter Gabi aboard a confiscated smuggler's shuttle for relocation to Caspar. During the in-flight debriefing, Rasi explains the Empire intends to accuse the Caspian Union of secretly arming the Republic in order to seize the Union's territory. Ambrosia's mission is to bolster Caspian resolve through diplomacy and propaganda, but she refuses to use the exaggerated intelligence Rasi offers, insisting on truth-only messaging, and discusses the Sarian people's culture and her own past as a former slave.

title: RPlog:A Prex is Chosen
summary: The Corporate Sector Authority's Direx board convenes for its biggest meeting of the year, where a new Prex is chosen by random drawing, welcoming the new Amalgamated Waste CEO Qwynt, a Toydarian carried in by a Twi'lek dressed as Justice. Imperial Warlord Darth Venger attends as the Emperor's emissary with his pilot-bodyguard Alex Dante and officer Rainer Maximilian, while CEOs Miranda Jabs and Smitherbodkins jockey for position. The ExO draws Qwynt's name as the surprising new Prex, who promptly calls a recess; Venger orders a holo-message sent to Emperor Vadim about the election.

title: RPlog:A Prudent Request
summary: On Caspar, in the wake of a deadly bombing attack during an election, Moff Elana Tracer meets the wounded Crestian Tarasar, the presumptive incoming Caspian Presav, at a swoop garage on Marin Mountain. She asks his help relocating her younger children Ashton and Longinus from the University on Kalla to schools on Caspar. The conversation expands into Caspian politics, the desire to expel the CSA from Kichnar and reclaim shipyards, and a frank assessment of Tyler Damion's nature as both a hardened, alchemically altered Sith leader and a pragmatic family man. Tracer resolves to report honestly to Damion, and Crestian agrees to arrange the children's transfers to Noques Rasala.

title: RPlog:A Purpose for Us All
summary: In Chianar Plaza on New Alderaan, Shael Winters and Rasi Praddhan Cen encounter the defected Imperial doctor Lynae Cassius again and press her about why she has left the Empire. Marine lieutenant Vengan Draelis reveals he is quietly watching her, and Sullustan Ikihsa Enb'Zik joins to engage Lynae in a philosophical debate about governance, fear versus love, and how to end war. Lynae delivers an impassioned argument that the purpose of a soldier is not to die and that war could be slain by mass refusal to fight, words that strike Enb'Zik through the Force. They part civilly with Enb'Zik warning her she has been recognized.

title: RPlog:A Random Visit?
summary: Rasi Praddhan Cen, a New Republic intelligence officer, and Flight Cadet Tarin Pellegar dock at the Angry Rancor cruiseliner over Ord Mantell to question Inanna Jordain about Imperial guests she has hosted. Inanna confirms she has hosted Task Force Inquisitor members, including the Marshal, and reluctantly shares that the Task Force discussed offering assistance to Dac (Mon Calamari) during the developing crisis. Rasi gathers what intelligence she can offer and the soldiers debate whether the Empire is preparing a major offensive.

title: RPlog:A Ray of Hope
summary: Disguised as a beggar on Tatooine, the injured Paul Nighman seeks out his old contact, the Horansi tinkerer Xanthe, to commission special undetectable infrared lenses for a plan to break into Ullo the Hutt's palace and rescue Ylsa. Xanthe agrees, asking only the retrieval as payment and promising the lenses in three days. She bathes, grooms, warns him of Ullo's danger, and gives Paul a massage while coaching him to mentally rehearse his infiltration plan.

title: RPlog:A Request for Assistance
summary: Lord Geophreigh Smitherbodkins IV visits Miranda Jabs, the soon-to-be ExO of the CSA Direx board, to deliver a promised shipment of sedatives for her restive FoxTech workers amid the chaos following ex-Prex Qwynt's flight. He reveals he has acquired the Corellian Engineering Corporation and intends to retake a Direx seat. He confides his true ambition: a sovereign, independent Corellia free of both the Empire and the New Republic, and Jabs cautiously agrees to support him.

title: RPlog:A Reunion
summary: At the Imperial Embassy on Caspar, Tsaran Joir unexpectedly encounters Venus Darkstar, the former Empress (Juliet) he once guarded and for whom he betrayed his Emperor. With her scheduled meeting with Chantinelle cancelled, Venus invites Joir to her Prime Minister's office in the People's Hall. There, away from formality, the long-suppressed bond between former guard and ward breaks through as Venus weeps and the two share a heartfelt embrace.

title: RPlog:A Revelation
summary: IGNews presenter Loy Marin returns Smitherbodkins's holo-call and the two fence verbally over the CSA power struggle. Smitherbodkins plays him CSA security footage showing ex-Prex Qwynt kicking him through a hole in the boardroom wall, framing Qwynt as a murderer. He then offers Loy an exclusive: the announcement, in three days, that he has acquired the Corellian Engineering Corporation, while hinting he will take a side in the Corellian conflict.

title: RPlog:A Second Attack
summary: While wandering New Alderaan on Ord Mantell, the freed prisoner Gustaf Heram is seized by a hulking thug from the Vandelhelm Cooperation Syndicate wielding a thermal detonator and demanding return of stolen money. A group of bystanders, including Ranma Hoshiakarui, Lynae Cassius-Mahon, Brin Harper (Kalna), and Foerga, intervene; Ranma slashes the thug's hand to disable the detonator and the kidnapper's getaway speeder is destroyed. After the would-be kidnapper is subdued, Gustaf reveals he stole three million credits from the crime syndicate to buy weapons to free his homeworld Vandelhelm from Imperial occupation, and the group offers to connect him with Senator Al'Dira and arms contacts.

title: RPlog:A Second Chance with Jal'Dana (Part 1)
summary: In a dimly lit ready room on the Ord Mantell military base, Lieutenant Raxis L'ygr and Captain Kesander 'Sandman' Beysarus brief Ghost Squadron and supporting units before an escort mission. Ghost Squadron is assigned to protect the Heavy Corvette Audacity on a patrol through a sector with recent pirate activity, with flight assignments given to Banshee, Spectre, and Ghoul flights, while Falcon Squadron handles recon and Dagger Squadron runs torpedo drills. The pilots, including the Quarren Lyrik Welkar, receive their data and are dismissed to prepare.

title: RPlog:A Second Chance with Jal'Dana (Part 2)
summary: While escorting the corvette Audacity along the Imperial-Republic border, Ghost Squadron is ambushed by an Imperial TIE force led by Commander Seifer 'Wolf' Wolf and including Admiral Jal'Dana 'Vapor' Rall in a distinctive white TIE. A furious furball erupts as Raxis 'Raptor' L'ygr, Kesander 'Sandman' Beysarus, and the Dug pilot Shovadu trade fire with Wolf, Rall, and her wingman Boomer (Korolov). Raxis recognizes Rall and is ordered to disable her, even firing a proton torpedo, but when the Star Destroyer Vindictive arrives the Imperials regroup and withdraw, ending the engagement as a draw with no Imperial losses.

title: RPlog:A Shot Not Taken
summary: In a torrential rainstorm in Plaxton City on Caspar, Simon Sezirok carries the unconscious Ernest Pallando over his shoulder to Fountain Square and dumps him on a bench, then hands Mailyn Raines a blaster power pack and tells her this is as far as he will take them. Sensing danger, Simon realizes Mailyn has reassembled the blaster and could shoot him in the back; he turns and challenges her to do it, demanding to know whether she means to collect the Imperial bounty on his head. Mailyn cannot bring herself to fire, dropping the weapon and collapsing in tears. Simon spares her, tells her to get rid of the weapon before it destroys her, and walks away.

title: RPlog:A Sith Interrogation
summary: Captured NR Marine Colonel Sabrina Rheatis languishes in a cell in the spice mines of Kessel after being taken on Corellia by Lord Astor's forces. The Sith Warlord Darth Malign arrives with guards to interrogate her, laying out torture implements and gloating that the New Republic has shattered into a scattered Rebellion. The Sith Sinestra Ataraxis observes from the shadows as the interrogation begins with Malign demanding Sabrina's name.

title: RPlog:A Smuggler Walks Into a Bar (Part 1)
summary: On the lowest levels of Nar Shaddaa, down-on-his-luck free-trader Jaspar Andromidas drowns his sorrows in the Beggar's Cove cantina before approaching pirate captain Shiari Vane for help. His ship has been impounded with hidden contraband aboard, and he offers the cargo to Vane in exchange for recovering the vessel. Vane agrees but warns she will keep the ship, and possibly sell him, if the loot isn't worth it, and insists he come along in case it's a trap.

title: RPlog:A Smuggler Walks Into a Bar (Part 2)
summary: Vane brings in the Twi'lek mechanic Ka'una La to help raid an Imperial starship impound outside Drev'starn City on Bothawui and recover Jaspar's ship. The team cuts the impound's power with charges, knocking out the laser towers, and storms the fence under sniper cover. A firefight erupts with Imperial guards when Jaspar's engines fail to start, until Ka'una repairs them and the crew lifts off, only to find TIE interceptors closing in.

title: RPlog:A Smuggler Walks Into a Bar (Part 3)
summary: Aboard the escaping freighter, Jaspar, Vane, and Ka'una fight off two pursuing TIE interceptors, with Ka'una scoring a lucky hit that downs one and Vane's gunnery finishing the engagement. They jam comms, run evasive maneuvers, and jump to lightspeed out of Imperial space. Jaspar pays Vane the contraband cargo as promised, and the three discuss a future working relationship and ship repairs.

title: RPlog:A Statement
summary: IGNews presenter Loy Marin visits Lord Geophreigh Smitherbodkins IV in a CSA Port Security cell after a boardroom brawl with the newly elected Prex, a Toydarian who lies snoring in an adjacent cell. Smitherbodkins initially deflects Loy's leading questions, but after Loy presses him for an 'angle,' he goes on the record denouncing the new Prex as incompetent and unstable. He declares his intent to call an emergency Direx board vote of no confidence and remove Amalgamated Waste Corporations as a CSA company.

title: RPlog:A Strange Visitor
summary: Giles Vermillion, a self-described friend of Xegid Roark, arrives at Simone Drake's house on Etti IV after luring her dog Duke with food, and demands to be let inside. Through the door intercom Piper refuses repeatedly, citing security concerns, and informs him that Roark was kidnapped by a Wookiee and taken offworld by the New Republic. Vermillion grows increasingly crude and flirtatious until Piper orders him off her stoop, and he departs. The cleric-like character Chantinelle briefly passes by and feeds Duke treats.

title: RPlog:A Subtle Exchange
summary: On Nar Shaddaa, pirate captain Nastaran Zohreh arranges an introduction through the Ithorian black marketeer Tredo to meet the well-connected infochant Rixt in Tredo's Botanical Garden. Over Ithorian liquor and Corellian whisky, they negotiate a fence-and-information arrangement: Rixt will tip off Nastaran's crew about lucrative targets in exchange for a cut, while acting as fence for rarities. Nastaran also commissions Rixt to discreetly identify a mysterious man named Elias she suspects is Black Sun, and Rixt reveals he has his own target near Tatooine he wants delayed.

title: RPlog:A Talk in the Park
summary: Relaxing on a bench in Fountain Square in Plaxton City on Caspar, Jessalyn Valios and Orson Tighe decompress after recent events, joking about surfing and visiting beaches across the galaxy. Orson reveals he must return to Karrde's base for a meeting in a few days, hinting at the strain in his relationship with Karrde, and they share affection and quietly discuss helping the mind-damaged Eva Sargent, whose condition Jessalyn fears was caused by Valak. Drew Carvallo joins them at the fountain, exchanges meaningful looks with Orson, and Orson suggests the group discuss their plans together.

title: RPlog:A Test of Steel
summary: Darth Malign and his stormtroopers storm Chalmun's Cantina in Mos Eisley, and Malign begins slaughtering patrons with his lightsaber to provoke a massive brawl. His Jedi sister Johanna Siri te Danaan arrives seeking revenge and duels him with a saber and the Force across the wrecked bar. Meanwhile Barrien Thrask and Grand Moff Scaven Marx fight a sword duel (aided by Gavin Shai), Kyo and Tyler McBride blast an escape hole, and Kyo tackles her ex-husband Gavin. Thrask ultimately cuts down Scaven, Malign Force-disarms Johanna and escapes with his troops, and Thrask drags Kyo out of the cantina.

title: RPlog:A Trip to Tatooine
summary: Orson Tighe brings his Jedi instructor Jessalyn Valios to the wreckage of Talon Karrde's businesses on Tatooine, destroyed by the Empire, to survey the loss and recover salvage. Amid the ruins, including the dented head of his droid TooSock, Orson and Jessalyn confront their feelings for each other. They finally share a deeply Force-connected kiss and agree to stop running from each other, only to be interrupted by Drew Carvallo before deciding to depart for Caspar.

title: RPlog:A Valiant Rescue on Nar Shaddaa
summary: Amid a hostile takeover of Nar Shaddaa, Doctor Xar'on Tanner, under orders from Colonel Delede, searches for and finds Captain Violet Allure beaten and unconscious in a weapons shop after an interrogation. The haggard, ailing doctor treats her head wounds and guides the disoriented, Basic-forgetting captain through the war-torn streets to a makeshift CSA field hospital guarded by ESPO troops. He tends her in the clinic, sends word to Delede to arrange extraction, and the two eventually drift off to rest as she recovers.

title: RPlog:A Valuable Pawn
summary: Inside Emperor Bacharan Valak's trophy hall on Ord Trasi, the rogue Dark Jedi Cort Stasus (Etrigan), accompanied by Simon Sezirok and his apprentice Mira, breaks Jessalyn Valios out of a two-year stasis prison intending to use her as leverage against Skywalker. The Emperor's Hand Lara Grayson confronts them, and Cort kills her doppelganger before dueling and ultimately knocking the real Lara out a shattered wall to her apparent death. A guardian Krayt dragon then attacks; Simon and Cort fight it off, Cort blinds it with the Force, and the wounded group escapes with the comatose Jessalyn toward Cort's ship.

title: RPlog:A Vision of Hope
summary: Deck Officer Javin Mitali, still mourning a technician's death, summons Jedi Master Luke Skywalker to a military hangar on Coruscant to examine the wreckage of the starfighter Ghost 4. Mitali points out that the cockpit area is suspiciously intact and theorizes the missing pilot Kyrin Sh'vani ejected and had her droid fly the ship home. Luke uses the Force to read the ship's history and confirms that Sh'vani was alive when she ejected, but cannot trace her further without a personal item. Energized by the discovery, Luke departs to consult one of his students.

title: RPlog:A Visit from Drocal Arconen
summary: Imperial Ambassador Morganna Tazecks, accompanied by her tense aide Bourne, enters the embassy conference chamber to find Minister of Imperial Commerce Drocal Arconen waiting. Drocal sternly corrects Morganna's lack of deference, then enlists her help establishing Imperial commercial ventures in the Caspar sector and points her toward Casparian advisor Venus Darkstar. He delivers an enraged tirade about killing 'the Pretender' who usurped Palpatine's throne, finding unexpected kinship in Morganna's understanding of his hatred, and demands she later share her own history.

title: RPlog:A Visit from Lando
summary: Lando Calrissian arrives unexpectedly aboard the Lady Luck at the remote landing pad on Yavin 4 to visit Jessalyn Valios, charming her before revealing his real concern. After meeting Karrde's operative Drew Carvallo, Lando questions Jessalyn about how she became involved with Talon Karrde, recounting his own distrust of the smuggler chief. He urges her to keep a close watch on Karrde, offers his help anytime, and makes an awkward but heartfelt exit.

title: RPlog:A Visit from a Friend
summary: A large Sarian man named Armstrong comes to Simone Drake's home on Etti IV bearing a message from Commander Doron Rtufo, having identified Piper as a fellow Churban. Acting as a 'neurapathric' vessel, Armstrong enters a trance and relays Rtufo's voice asking after the whereabouts of Dannan and offering valuable information he hopes will undermine Corporate Space. Piper listens and arranges to speak with Armstrong further at a later time.

title: RPlog:A Visit to Dreven
summary: Sabbathius Osbourne brings his hostage/companion Simone Drake (Piper) to Dreven aboard the shuttle Crazy Diamond, where they are met by IntSec Director Drocal Arconen and Agent Ramsey. Drocal interrogates Sabbath in a hidden interrogation chamber, deeply skeptical of his claim to serve the Emperor and seeking the purpose of his return to Imperial space. Sabbath asserts he acts on the Emperor's will and demands to see Grand Moff Ariak Caldny, even threatening Drocal when the Director gestures toward harming Piper. Drocal ultimately relents, agreeing to let Sabbath meet Caldny the following evening.

title: RPlog:A Walk Amongst the Plant Life
summary: In the Silvergrass Arboretum of Silver Station, the Quarren pirate-doctor Blulurbgloblurb Druze, freshly docked in his ship Vicissitude, is caught sneaking moisture from the auto-misters when he encounters Presav Crestian Tarasar. The two make small talk about Atsvara's recent birthday party and Druze's ambitions in the starship repair-and-upgrade community. Crestian recounts the station's history as his independent shadowport and how he kept a low profile after Darth Malign's disappearance and the collapse of the New Sith Order. Druze offers his services as a doctor and engineer before continuing his tour.

title: RPlog:A Walk in the Park
summary: On New Alderaan (Ord Mantell), Sabrina Rheatis walks through a misty park with her cousin Leia Organa Solo to discuss the future of Serenella, a young pregnant woman whose unborn child's father is Malign's apprentice. Sabrina asks Leia to consider giving Serenella a position on her entertainment committee so mother and child can remain safely near the Jedi temple, shortening the Sith's reach. Leia agrees the child should stay protected but insists on speaking with Serenella herself before deciding, cautioning that the young woman must make her own informed choice.

title: RPlog:A Wolf's New Den
summary: Aboard the Audacity, Lieutenant Raxis L'ygr attempts to interrogate the captured Imperial pilot Commander Seifer Wolf, offering him a cigarette and speaking pilot-to-pilot. Wolf is defiant and snide, claiming he knows nothing as a mere killer. Flight Officer Lance Corbet, who was previously captured by Wolf, watches from behind the glass and storms in enraged; Raxis is forced to physically restrain Lance and threaten to pull rank as the interrogation collapses into a confrontation.

title: RPlog:A member of the Rebel Alliance and a Traitor
summary: Captured New Republic ambassador to Caspar, Ambrosia Delgard, undergoes brutal psychological and physical interrogation aboard the Imperial Star Destroyer Nemesis. After 48 hours of alternating sensory deprivation and overload, a staged mock execution by hanging, and repeated baton blows to her wounded knees by stormtroopers, an ISB Lieutenant Commander methodically extracts her name and occupation while denying her water. The agent insists she is a spy and terrorist who corrupted Caspar's government, declares the Republic has abandoned both her and Caspar, then drinks her water in front of her and orders her returned to her cell.

title: RPlog:A merry ride
summary: On Etti IV, the Verpine slicer Murdock takes remote control of corporate gentleman Geophreigh Smitherbodkins' luxury speeder to deliver a threatening 'message' on behalf of Mr. Qwynt, locking the doors and sending the vehicle careening through traffic. When Murdock's slicing code shorts out the speeder's systems, he talks a terrified Smitherbodkins through rewiring a panel to escape, while the pilot k'Halat pulls alongside and helps him leap into her speeder moments before his own explodes. Safe but furious, Smitherbodkins immediately comms CSA Security to retaliate against Qwynt.

title: RPlog:Abandoned Sith Factory
summary: The NRCV Audacity descends into a massive volcanic crevasse on the ruined planet Cochran to investigate an abandoned New Sith Order factory ten kilometers below the surface. Luke Skywalker, Wrista Ipex, and the Marines under Vengan Draelis breach the facility, finding a vast droid-manufacturing plant largely stripped but with salvageable droid parts and armor. Hidden automated defense turrets ambush the team, wounding Marines, and the firefight destabilizes the surrounding magma, forcing a hasty evacuation back to the ship as lava breaks through the walls.

title: RPlog:Academic Pursuits
summary: Having flown to Corellia with Jessalyn, Paul Nighman visits the University of Coronet to discreetly locate records of the Yavin expedition while avoiding his estranged father, a professor there. In the courtyard he unexpectedly reunites with the Horansi scholar Sinjon Teague, who had been searching for Paul to buy a book on Ithor. The two catch up at length about Jessalyn, Jedi, books, and Paul's lost ship, with Sinjon offering money that Paul declines, and they make plans for dinner.

title: RPlog:Accepting Help
summary: In a forest clearing on Caspar, the now silver-haired and emotionally shattered Jessalyn Valios seeks out the Jedi-curious Kyyel Marrak, who had previously offered to help her. Kyyel gently presses through her cold exterior, recalling the Jedi Code his late mother taught him and insisting that he trusts her despite her warnings that she is dangerous and corrupted. Though Jessalyn refuses to answer his questions about the Jedi, she considers his offer to fly her offworld and escape Simon, accepting a contact frequency before slipping away.

title: RPlog:Across the Force
summary: While recovering from a shoulder wound, Orson Tighe slips into a deep meditative state and reaches across the galaxy through the Force to the desperately lost Jessalyn Valios, who is hiding in the sewers with Simon after the events on the Dimlyn Titan. Jessalyn, convinced her corruption by the Dark Side has made her unfit to return to the Jedi, repeatedly tells Orson to leave her alone and fulfill his own destiny. A childhood memory surfaces of five-year-old Jessalyn being left behind on Yavin by Dr. Xavier Nighman, underscoring her abandonment. Orson is reeled back to his body aboard the Uwannabuyim, whispering that he would not leave her there.

title: RPlog:Addressing the OS Paladin
summary: Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard, newly appointed aide to the New Republic Chief of State, delivers a morale-boosting speech to assembled pilots and crew in a hangar bay aboard the OS Paladin following recent losses to the Empire during the Dacan plague. Cadet Jamta Kisac interrupts, pressing her to expedite the reactivation of Rogue Squadron and even offering himself as interim commander. The recovering pilot Naota and General Nandaba rebuke him for insubordination, and Captain Mora Rodriguez orders Kisac to file a report on respecting orders before dismissing the assembly.

title: RPlog:Admissions
summary: Aboard the luxury liner Angry Rancor, Markus Lisardis explores the Wampa Lounge and encounters Simon Sezirok, sparking a philosophical conversation about the True Source. Simon reveals to Markus that he is a Selas ('Unborn'), one cursed by his people for being connected to the True Source, and tells Markus that he too can touch the True Source like a Jedi. Simon recounts the violent history of the Selas and the Jedi who taught them honor, and speculates about why the Jedi were destroyed by Darth Vader and the Empire. Markus resists the idea that the connection is inherently evil, and the two part with much to think about ahead of an anticipated meeting with Luke Skywalker.

title: RPlog:Aftermath of the Crashlanding
summary: After crash-landing a ship into the Imperial Embassy in Plaxton City, Simon Sezirok and Mira Isaria flee through the chaotic crowds of Fountain Square on Caspar while emergency crews and Caspian military respond. The Rodian bounty hunter Detjin spots and stalks the pair, while CDU Sub-Lieutenant Renovo Shadowlin coordinates military and police to arrest the two fugitives wanted for illegally entering Caspian space and demolishing the embassy. Simon senses he is being hunted, draws his lightstaff, and uses the True Source to inflict pain on a Shistavanen as a diversion to escape pursuit. He and Mira slip toward the cover of Mira's old alley as the crashed ship threatens to topple and the manhunt intensifies.

title: RPlog:Aggressive Negotiations
summary: Caspian Minister of State Cordelia Nivhya hosts informal talks at the People's Hall on Caspar between Imperial Duke Aldus Thel and New Republic Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard over the Imperial blockade starving Caspar. Thel demands the CDU submit its customs to ISB supervision over smuggled weapons allegedly bound for the Rebellion, while Delgard denies Republic involvement. Cordelia then reveals a shock: seized 'aid' shipments bearing the Imperial crest contained weapons and spy devices, accusing the Empire of fomenting civil war. She demands the blockade end and impartial arbitration, leaving Thel to grudgingly agree to relay the terms to the Emperor.

title: RPlog:Aggressive Negotiations with Luke Skywalker
summary: Crime lord Tyy'sun Eson holds captured Jedi Padawan Ai'kani and her friend Alistair aboard his freighter Trader's Envy and opens holo-negotiations with Jedi Master Luke Skywalker. Tyy'sun offers to return Ai'kani, Alistair, and a child named Yejide in exchange for Jedi holocrons, training materials, and a lightsaber from the Basilica archives. Luke uses the Force to rock the ship from a great distance, unsettling Tyy'sun, but ultimately agrees to the exchange, to be made on Trandosha. Tyy'sun jumps to hyperspace as the deal concludes, claiming Yejide as his daughter.

title: RPlog:Ai'kani's Knighting Ceremony
summary: Aboard the Refrain of Anshalar, the Jedi Order gathers in secrecy for two ceremonies. Luke Skywalker dubs Ai'kani Za'netra a Jedi Knight in a candlelit ritual echoing the Old Republic, with the assembled Knights forming a circle of ignited lightsabers. He then inducts the Sullustan Ikihsa Enb'Zik as a Padawan learner after Enb'Zik affirms his oath, ending with celebration and a reunion with his Horansi wife Snarl.

title: RPlog:Aido Or
summary: While flying a repulsorlift skiff over the forests of Myrkr, Jessalyn Valios feels a Force compulsion and lands so she and her student Orson Tighe can investigate. They discover Aido Or, a sentient four-meter tree-creature that has waited four hundred years for a Jedi to arrive. The tree prophesies that the Jedi will rise again, gives Jessalyn a seed cone to plant on other worlds, warns the Dark Side will demand payment, then uproots itself and departs into the forest.

title: RPlog:Alcoholic Interlude
summary: Jaspar Andromidas drowns his sorrows at the Meltdown Cafe on Nar Shaddaa after a Wookiee stole the woman he was pursuing. The black-clad Tritus Vaticus tracks him down and chastises him for getting captured by the Empire and for his drunken self-pity. Tritus reveals he has already brokered an ISB deal to wipe Jaspar's criminal records and is returning his vessel to Tatooine, then formally takes Jaspar on as an employee who must clear all side jobs through him.

title: RPlog:All About Eva
summary: Jessalyn Valios and Orson Tighe meet executive Eva Sargent at her FLS office in Plaxton City, then relocate to a private conference room at the Plaxton Grand to examine the Sith tampering in Sargent's mind. Jessalyn uses the Force to probe Eva's memories of fleeing with a Jedi artifact (a cube) and discovers that Emperor Bacharan Valak, not Cort Stasus, implanted something in her mind. Drained and shaken, Jessalyn breaks off the attempt, deciding she needs Luke Skywalker's help before continuing, and they reunite with Orson outside where they encounter Elana Tracer and Daana Roon.

title: RPlog:All the Baron's Men
summary: The crew of the Fortune Rising arrives at a Nar Shaddaa landing pad to take possession of a YT-2400 light freighter (Subject to Change) acquired through a faked sabacc registry, only to be ambushed by Baron Songir's thugs led by a Weequay enforcer. Aisaiy is dragged in as a hostage while Sorin and Suana take cover and shoot it out, killing the goons. Pilot Valya gets the engines running and, amid blaster fire, is browbeaten into joining the crew during the chaotic escape. They lift off with their stolen freighter intact and a new pilot aboard.

title: RPlog:Alois vs Maethor
summary: Danik Kreldin, operating under the alias Alois on a quest to build a second Neo-Imperial Movement, spots former Imperial Royal Guardsman Maethor Savage at a Corellian starport and decides to test his combat skills. He ambushes Maethor, and a running fight breaks out through the starport and into Bottom's End, escalating with daggers, blasters, flash and gas grenades. CorSec agents intervene, and Alois finally lobs a thermal detonator to cover his escape, devastating a chunk of the neighborhood and killing innocent bystanders.

title: RPlog:Ambushing Jedi
summary: Under orders from Sinestra Ataraxis, Imperial Supreme Commander Danik Kreldin leads a stormtrooper assault on the Jedi Master Aurejin's grounded Lambda-class shuttle Ensorceled in a Coronet starport on Corellia. Aurejin slaughters the boarding troopers with his lightsaber and flees in the crippled, bomb-rigged shuttle, while his apprentice Mira escapes into the city sewers and the Empire seizes a crate of Jedi documents. The Ensorceled explodes mid-flight and crashes into the Corona House government seat; Aurejin and Sinestra plummet free-falling, locked in a struggle to the death, his fate left uncertain.

title: RPlog:An Abyssal Union
summary: A joint Maffi-Imperial strike team descends into the Abyssal Ruins beneath Coruscant to plant explosive charges against the foundation of the New Republic Military Base. Led by Sith Lord Tyler Damion (Malign) and crime lord Tyy'sun Eson, the team fights through hordes of mutants, then rappels 150 feet down a tunnel while swarmed by biting spiders. At the bottom they confront a massive horned beast, which Malign lures away while the others set charges and battle giant spiders, suffering casualties and poison wounds. The charges are set and the wounded team retreats up the tunnels using pheromone decoys to divert the mutants.

title: RPlog:An Ally Appears
summary: At Club Utinni on Tatooine, the Sith Antoine Dareus, the Jedi Johanna Siri te Danaan, and the bounty hunter Jorj Brinaj form an uneasy alliance over drinks to hunt down their common enemy, the criminal Eson Tyy'sun. They negotiate terms: Johanna intends to bring Eson to the Hutt Draga and to obliterate his Maffi criminal organization, while Dareus pledges two squadrons of Interceptors and Johanna reveals a sizeable fleet of her own. They agree it will be a team effort and arrange to meet again in a week to finalize the plan.

title: RPlog:An Apprentice Rises
summary: Aboard the bridge of the HIMS Predator near Nal Hutta, the Dark Lord Darth Malign (Tyler Damion) confronts Captain Antoine Dareus, sensing the Force awakening within him and a sickness eating at him. Malign delivers an extended philosophical discourse on the Dark Side, the Force, and the Sith, declaring that Dareus's betrayal undid Danik Kreldin so that Dareus could take his place as the new apprentice. Dareus accepts his fate and pledges lifelong service, and Malign issues commands to finalize the hidden droid army, destroy the Cochran facilities, and relocate to evade the Jedi.

title: RPlog:An Assassin Arrives
summary: At a brightly lit beach-side cafe on Etti IV, Gren Delede meets the assassin Graden Transal to formally induct him into the Brotherhood of Zhao/Maffi crime organization. Gren returns a datachip showing Graden's face was caught at a crime scene as a warning to be more careful, and offers payment that Graden refuses out of an honor code. Gren explains the organization's hierarchy, naming Graden a Pledge and himself a Soldier, and stresses loyalty and obedience. The two trade veiled barbs, with Graden privately noting Gren's drinking, before they part with no new contract assigned.

title: RPlog:An Audience With...
summary: At Juuka the Hutt's grand party celebrating his self-proclaimed overlordship of Tatooine, the masked Sith Darth Vidious arrives unannounced aboard the stealthy Twilight Heart and demands an audience. Vidious flatters Juuka, denigrates his Besadii rivals, and proposes a galaxy-spanning crime cartel under Juuka's control, sweetening the pitch by spilling a fortune in Corsuca gems as a down payment. He advises Juuka to exploit Corellia, where the Republic refits its fleet with smuggled arms, and departs leaving his identity and Imperial backing deliberately ambiguous as Juuka agrees to investigate the opportunity.

title: RPlog:An Encounter on Tatooine
