summary: In Mos Eisley's docking bays at dusk, a Corellian freelance pilot named Wes is repeatedly accosted by Jawas and a child pickpocket before striking up a conversation with an Elomin calling himself Flaron Korr (an unemployed 'finds man'). Korr explains he lost his equipment in an accident on Nar Shaddaa and is seeking a basic weapon and a personal shield. Wes, who works as a broker connecting traders, offers to ask a contact and gives Korr a business card for the cantina 'The Blasted Stormie' where messages can be left, promising to arrange a meeting.

title: RPlog:An Evening's Entertainment
summary: Ylsa Estrallas, a former princess now in the service of Ullo the Hutt, is summoned to a gala where Ullo stages a gladiatorial duel as 'entertainment.' Her lover Paul Nighman, lured into the palace by the servant Ilyana, is forced to fight the brutal Mephisto with Mandalorian blades, ostensibly for Ylsa's hand. Paul ultimately kills Mephisto in the dark after Ilyana sabotages the room's lighting, sacrificing herself to free them. Ilyana dies, but Paul and Ylsa escape through a hidden passage toward a waiting speeder.

title: RPlog:An Evening to Remember
summary: Cleaned up and rested at the Grand Palanhi Hotel, Paul Nighman dines and observes the Horansi Dionysis lecturing a distraught Jessalyn about Mashi who never mate. After Alora leads Luke upstairs, Paul spends a long heartfelt conversation in the lobby consoling Jessalyn over her unrequited love for Luke, urging her to value herself. The evening ends when a shattered Luke emerges, mourning the death of his friend Erik, and drops his lightsaber in the square before Jessalyn follows him to comfort him.

title: RPlog:An Interrogation
summary: Confined to a barracks at Talon Karrde's hidden base on Myrkr, Jessalyn Valios is brought a meal by Declan Rahn, one of Karrde's loyal retainers, who secretly records and interrogates her about Emperor Valak's attack on the asteroid base and her relationship with Simon Sezirok. During the conversation Jessalyn becomes preoccupied with the mysterious 'Force bubbles' on the planet and concludes the Force-blocking phenomenon is alive. Rahn assures her Karrde will never hand her to Valak, recommends she and Simon relocate for safety, and leaves to fetch bio-scan records so they can investigate the anomaly together.

title: RPlog:An Interview with a Spy
summary: Celo'gnaritas'Subnoto (Cetolum), a Chiss spy for the Caspian Democratic Union, visits the Kreldin Estate on Corellia posing as a security representative of the family's company while investigating the terrorist bombing on Caspar. He meets Danik Kreldin, who is presumed dead and operating under the alias Alois while plotting a Second Neo-Imperial Movement. Both men play a careful game of deception: Cetolum deduces that Kreldin staged his own death and was behind the bombings as part of an insurgency, while Kreldin grows suspicious that Cetolum is a spy and dismisses him, intending to have him followed.

title: RPlog:An Odd Acquaintance Turns into a Promising Endeavor
summary: On Etti IV, Captain Violet Allure literally bumps into OOAG Auditor Malif Tal-Tahn at the Zoiby Auction House, where both are competing (alongside Colonel Delede) over a weapons shop up for auction. They share a meal and drinks at Club Xanadu, trading small talk before discussing business. Malif proposes becoming a silent partner in Allure's auction bid in exchange for an off-the-books weapons pipeline, and Violet gives him her contact disc to pursue the partnership.

title: RPlog:An Offer She Can't Refuse
summary: In the O'Paal bazaar, the hooded Imperial Lord Director Labatiel Atrox approaches the rootless trader Morganna Tazecks with an offer. After probing her lack of goals and desire to settle on Caspar, he reveals he can make her Imperial Ambassador to Caspar with her own staff, autonomy, and a chance for real power. Despite self-doubt and reluctance to surrender her freedom, Morganna accepts, taking the official High Command appointment datapad and agreeing to undergo training on O'Paal.

title: RPlog:An Offer They Couldn't Refuse
summary: In the radically redecorated CSA Direx boardroom on Etti IV, the newly appointed Prex G.S. Qwynt VIII, a megalomaniacal Toydarian styled as a god, summons Miranda Jabs and Lord Geophreigh Smitherbodkins IV to make them his lieutenants in exchange for unlimited access to their companies and a million-credit buy-in. The offer is a ruse: Qwynt shoves Smitherbodkins out the window-less wall, but the Corellian catches the ledge, climbs back, draws a sword-cane and declares 'I accept,' demanding Qwynt abdicate or die. CSA security bursts in after Jabs's shouts; she fabricates a story that the men were dueling over her, getting both hauled to the brig for one night. Qwynt's spilled glitterstim stash is quietly scooped up by Jabs as a partial down payment.

title: RPlog:An Offer of Information
summary: During a Senate recess, Senator Tokoga relaxes in Organa Park on New Alderaan and encounters spacer Rainier, who offers to sell information about a resurgent crime syndicate (Nass' legacy). Rainier reveals he can pinpoint when and where one of the group's bosses will oversee a smuggled shipment, in exchange for a price. Meanwhile Brek Halsmer, Myiari Oerstead, and Shane Sonax make small talk about spacer life, mercenaries, and books, with Brek and Myiari sharing a flirtatious moment.

title: RPlog:An Old Score with Solo
summary: A New Republic recon flight to Imperial-held Corellia, including Han Solo's Millennium Falcon and several A-wings of Falcon Squadron, is intercepted by Imperial fighters led by Danik Kreldin in his Scimitar. Kreldin relentlessly targets the green pilot Kieran (Falcon 3), crippling his A-wing despite missiles from Solo and pursuit from Captain Moralis Rodriga, who has a vengeful personal score against Kreldin. Rodriga rescues the wounded Kieran by docking his Mantaray, the Conqueror salvages the wrecked A-wing, and the surviving Republic craft withdraw, leaving Kreldin to settle his old grudge against the Falcon.

title: RPlog:An Uneventful Evening
summary: Jessalyn Valios and Orson Tighe try to have a quiet dinner at the Sandbar in Plaxton City on Caspar, where they reconnect with the Horansi cub Toryn and Griffon ambassador Wally Vascili. Wally excitedly recounts meeting Luke Skywalker, who warned him Caspar is treacherous. Meanwhile the menacing Malus Brock confides to Zerae that he was forced to kill a man in the hangar the previous night over the Ion Dove; Jessalyn overhears the whispered confession through the Force, ending the supposedly uneventful evening on an ominous note.

title: RPlog:An Unexpected Journey
summary: CDU celebrity Adam Shadow wakes drugged aboard his newly acquired freighter Arachnea, discovering a stowaway droid brain has hijacked the ship and diverted it to Nar Shaddaa. There, the pirate Kora and her hired guns Sid and the Tusken Raider Sulla board to capture Shadow and steal the ship, but their gas-grenade plan fails when Shadow's astromech Clicker seals the ship. In the ensuing firefight Shadow uses a flash grenade and superior tactics to stun Kora and then Sulla, leaving all three invaders captured; he ties them up, has Clicker disconnect the rogue droid brain, and sets course for Caspar.

title: RPlog:An Unexpected Visitor
summary: During the Winter Fete, three New Republic Ghost Squadron X-wing pilots aboard NRSD Reprisal scramble to intercept the freighter Valspar, which is broadcasting an invalid transponder code in Mon Calamari space. Pilots Kesander 'Sandman' Beysarus, Raxis L'ygr, and Kyrin (Ghost One) pursue the fleeing smuggler Mitler through cargo barges as he attempts to flee the gravity well. Mitler vents his cargo to obstruct the fighters and escapes into hyperspace, but is forced to abandon a large pressurized cargo container that the NR recovers, suspecting it may hold sentients (possibly slaves).

title: RPlog:An Unlikely Alliance
summary: During the war on Nar Shaddaa, Luke Skywalker and Flight Cadet Seamus Doherty patrol the Nal Hutta system aboard X-wings and are hailed by the Corporate Sector vessel Authority commanded by Colonel Gren Delede. Luke lands alone aboard the Authority to meet Delede and Lt. Twila Virda, where Delede reveals he is bound to Darth Malign by a deal to save Twila's life and offers an alliance against Tyler Damion's Sith Star Destroyer. Delede hands over an Imperial communicator that can contact Malign/Tyler directly, and Luke pledges to bring the matter to the New Republic fleet while warning that the Sith may have foreseen the meeting.

title: RPlog:An Unpleasant Meeting
summary: Aboard the ship Diligence over Ord Mantell, Twila Virda emerges from days of hiding to call her senior associates Xar'on Tanner and Tak Dagon, playing them a farewell holomessage from her husband Gren Delede announcing he has taken the flagship and veteran crew to wage a doomed war against the Empire. Xar'on rages at the desertion and Dagon coolly threatens to leave before both reaffirm their loyalty to Twila and the company VSC. They agree to consolidate legal control under Twila, hold a press release, meet with the New Republic for a ship, and give Gren a month before holding his funeral.

title: RPlog:An Unscrupulous Undertaking: A Pound of Flesh
summary: At his Ol'jeliic Palace on Nar Shaddaa, Lorda Nasiri Gejalli hosts a banquet for the slaver Elias (Alastar) after having one of Elias's company's top earners assassinated in retaliation for the Kohoun-poison killing of one of Nasiri's girls. Nasiri displays the severed heads of palace staff to demonstrate that flesh is cheap and that he cannot be impressed by atrocity, then reveals that the meat dishes served were made from the murdered women. Despite his disgust, Alastar comes to respect Nasiri's ruthlessness, and the two agree to future business dealings.

title: RPlog:An Unscrupulous Undertaking: Atrocious Arrangements Pt 1
summary: Aboard the CSA Star Destroyer Nemesis/Excise, ISB Agent Elias Corentin (under his cover dealings) meets CSA VicePrex squatter Zeak Oppenhiemer to arrange the covert acquisition of Wookiee slaves in exchange for arming Trandoshan revolutionaries. They spar over whether the deal is a sale or a lease and over wear-and-tear and accounting concerns. Corentin reveals the Empire wants discretion above all and grants Oppenhiemer 24 hours to devise a workable business structure.

title: RPlog:An Unscrupulous Undertaking: Atrocious Arrangements Pt 2
summary: Corentin returns to Oppenhiemer's office where Oppenhiemer presents a finalized laundering scheme: a Falleen major-domo (Nasiri Gejalli) will serve as the transfer point on Nar Shaddaa, the Etti Group will buy and deliver the weapons, and a shell company, Bonadan Labor Solutions, will take possession of the Wookiees under Corentin's alias. They negotiate pricing, settling on roughly 57.5 million credits for 5,000 units at a 15 percent markup. Corentin agrees to take the figures to his superiors for approval and arrange transport.

title: RPlog:An Unscrupulous Undertaking: Complications
summary: On Nar Shaddaa in the Ol'jeliic Palace, Corentin (using the alias Alastar Tritarian) asks Falleen Lorda Nasiri Gejalli to place a 20,000-credit live-capture bounty on Drax Rendolen, a party snooping into the Trandoshan side of the operation. Nasiri, sensing his importance, tries to extort a larger cut and refuses to be threatened. When Corentin condescends to him and declines to pay more, Nasiri throws the credit chit back and declares the deal off entirely.

title: RPlog:An Unscrupulous Undertaking: Deal With the Devil
summary: In a Corellian-sector sabacc casino on Nar Shaddaa, Corentin corners pirate Nastaran Zohreh with a job offer to captain a transport carrying cargo between Trandosha and Nar Shaddaa. When she learns the cargo is Wookiee slaves she repeatedly refuses, but Corentin coerces her by revealing knowledge of her hidden ailing mother and implicitly threatening her mother's medical care. Cornered, Nastaran takes a 2,000-credit deposit and is forced into accepting the job against her will.

title: RPlog:An Unscrupulous Undertaking: Infiltration
summary: Aboard the Dreadnaught Edean's Ferry above Trandosha, a Blackscale Trandoshan infiltration team led by Trrs'kal (sent by Drax Rendolen) smuggles itself aboard hidden in a lightweight slave container to sabotage the Wookiee shipment. After a deception passes the droid cargo inspection, the team ambushes the security droids once the ship jumps to hyperspace, but suffers heavy casualties against loader and HK droids. The surviving warriors split up, and a doomed Trandoshan named Tahk'pa manually shuts down the reactor in a suicidal act, dropping the ship out of hyperspace.

title: RPlog:An Unscrupulous Undertaking: Ominous Forecast
summary: On a rainy Nar Shaddaa landing platform, Corentin introduces Nastaran Zohreh to her assigned bridge crew for the Edean's Ferry and explains the 650-ton cargo of 5,000 sedated Wookiee slaves. Nastaran demands two spice-addicted Twi'lek crew be replaced; Corentin coldly has his Gand enforcer execute them and dump the bodies. Afterward, Corentin (as Alastar Tritarian) introduces himself to the arriving Falleen Lorda Nasiri Gejalli and confirms the cargo will arrive in days.

title: RPlog:An Unscrupulous Undertaking: Recruiting
summary: On the Nar Shaddaa Concourse, the strange off-world slaver Elias Corentin deliberately provokes a brawl with a Gran enforcer and Nastaran Zohreh offers to fight as his 'second' for a fee. After Nastaran stuns the Gran, Elias covertly shoots it dead with his own blaster and credits her with the kill, paying her 400 credits. Impressed by her fire, Elias recruits her for future lucrative work and swears her to secrecy about the Hutt enforcer's death.

title: RPlog:An Unscrupulous Undertaking: Repercussions
summary: At an ISB safe house on Nar Shaddaa, Corentin reports to Duke Aldus Thel via holo that the Falleen Nasiri Gejalli got greedy and backed out as broker, leaving the inbound slave cargo without a buyer. Thel orders retribution: poison Nasiri's best earner with kouhun slugs, have the Bloodclaws hire a bounty hunter against the Republic spy, and relocate the exchange to Sleheyron and the Besadii clan. Frustrated by the setback, Corentin destroys the holoterminal and burns down the safe house apartment.

title: RPlog:An Unscrupulous Undertaking: Reporting In
summary: On the security deck of the V2SD Nemesis, Agent Elias Corentin reports to Duke Aldus Thel on his negotiations with Admiral Zeak Oppenhiemer, detailing the Bonadan Labor Solutions shell scheme, the Nar Shaddaa brokerage through Nasiri Gejalli, and the 57.5 million credit cost for 5,000 units. Thel approves the plan, provides funds and a code cylinder, and advises acquiring a Nebulon-class frigate. They debate Corentin's plan to blackmail pirate Nastaran Zohreh into becoming a long-term mole within Shiari Vane's crew, with Thel cautioning against over-complicated deception.

title: RPlog:And That's No Small Thing
summary: Aboard the cockpit of the Revenant, Lynae Cassius and Darth Malus debrief their recent meeting with Johanna and her guests on Tatooine. Lynae is furious that Janus Tarasar revealed the Presav Crestian is sharing security-sensitive information too widely, threatening her son Andrev. They discuss relocating Andrev to safety, how to inform Axel Vichten of the Lynae-Malus partnership, and the opportunity to exploit the leak to fracture the Caspian Union from the Imperium. Lynae resolves to move her son, resign from the Caspian Navy, and admits Malus was right.

title: RPlog:Angry Rancor Deal Pt I
summary: Commander Imriel, an emissary for Marshal Krieg Inrokana of the Imperial Task Force Inquisitor, comes aboard the luxury cruise liner Angry Rancor to negotiate a recreation contract for off-duty Imperial personnel. Inanna Jordain, managing the ship in the owner's absence, hears out his detailed proposal regarding diplomatic immunity, payment, and military restraint, noting the ship already holds extraterritoriality treaties with both the Empire and New Republic. She agrees to bring the matter to those truly in charge but cannot sign, and offers Imriel and his aides accommodations while they await a decision.

title: RPlog:Angry Rancor Deal Pt II
summary: The Imperial delegation led by Commander Imriel reconvenes aboard the Angry Rancor, this time meeting Captain Bruno Ringoire and the ship's star entertainer Serenella Jordain alongside Inanna. Inanna reports she now has authority to finalize the recreation deal and raises a final point about the ship detaining troublemakers before handing them to the Empire, while declining the offer of a posted Imperial delegate. The negotiation concludes with a handshake agreement; Serenella flirts with the two young lieutenants, Josh and John, inviting them to her concert and the casino once their paperwork is done.

title: RPlog:Another Clue
summary: Strolling through Fountain Square in Plaxton City, an on-edge Jessalyn Valios and Orson Tighe find a bag of candy and a foil-wrapped ticket left near the fountain, planted by the stalker Ash Seneal who has been following them. The ticket is a pass to Plaxton City Beachfront Amusements, an old waterfront complex. Daana Roon, drawn to the square out of boredom, approaches and chats with the pair; Jessalyn recognizes the candy as the same kind the sinister stranger was eating and suspects the ticket is bait luring them into a trap, but they decide to go investigate anyway.

title: RPlog:Another Fine Mess
summary: Two Sith Lords, Warlord Vassily Korolov and Lord Aldus Thel, disguise their X-wings as battle-damaged Republic Regulator squadron fighters to infiltrate the Sloan Drydocks at Kichnar Orbital Station and disable them. Rogue Squadron leader Lance Corbet escorts the impostors in before realizing the deception, leading to a fierce dogfight. Both Sith fighters are shot down and Corbet's craft is also destroyed, but before ejecting Korolov uses the Force to ram his crippled fighter into the dry-dock's control tower, crippling the shipyards. The two Sith float in space amid the wreckage, having only partially achieved their objective.

title: RPlog:Another Late Night at the Casino
summary: At the Half-Moon Hotel and Casino on Bonadan, Captain Violet Allure and Doctor Xar'on Tanner gamble on Lugjack slot machines, with Xar'on losing badly while Violet wins. After cashing out, Violet asks the doctor to escort her to her ship, the Venture, and the two drink black membrosia and other liquors while chatting about his rough trip to Ord Mantell, the upcoming starfighter pilot event, and her role in CSA Security. The relaxed, flirtatious evening ends with Xar'on departing for his ship.

title: RPlog:Another Round of Interrogation
summary: Imperial interrogator Lieutenant Rainier returns to a holding cell to extract access codes from the captured Mon Calamari senator Tokoga, this time bringing along reluctant, bored fighter-pilot cadet Jonas Alsten as an unwilling observer. After delivering meager rations, Rainier resorts to crude physical torture, repeatedly striking Tokoga's hands and arms with a baton while lecturing the cadet on interrogation psychology. Despite escalating beatings, Tokoga remains defiant, taunting his captors and insisting the information dies with him.

title: RPlog:Apprentice Revealed
summary: In the detention block of the CSA flagship Corporate Takeover, Colonel Gren Delede brings Jedi Master Luke Skywalker, Twila Virda, and Dr. Xar'on Tanner to interrogate the captured Antoine Dareus. Luke senses Dareus has become a Sith apprentice and uses a powerful Force mind-trick to compel truthful answers, learning Dareus commands the Predator for Lord Malign, that the Sith have no fixed plans yet, and that they intend to bring back a Sith Empire. Dareus, enraged and defiant, is finally sedated and ordered transferred to a stasis chamber, vowing revenge as he loses consciousness.

title: RPlog:Aramis Promoted
summary: Aboard the NRSD Reprisal after a costly skirmish with Imperial troops, Twi'lek pilot Kegren'Te informally promotes Aramis Tyrese to the rank of Flight Officer for his combat actions over Coruscant. The ceremony is warm but bittersweet, with Kegren visibly concerned for him. Aramis reveals he has arranged with General Skywalker to fly a ship down to Coruscant to rescue orphaned children stranded in a government building, and the two friends part with Kegren worried for his safety.

title: RPlog:Argon's Awards
summary: At a New Republic military ceremony on New Alderaan's parade grounds, Chief of State Leia Organa Solo presents commendations to personnel who fought in the liberation of Bothawui, honoring some posthumously. Lt Commander Argon Brand of the Lightbringer is called forward, receives an epaulet upgrade and a quiet word of reassurance from Leia, then rejoins his family before the refreshments.

title: RPlog:Ariana Millikin and Company
summary: At the Coral City spaceport on Dac, the retired Lando Calrissian charms a downcast Ariana Millikin while complaining about supply problems for his Nkllon operation. Smuggler Talon Karrde arrives and trades barbs with Lando, eventually inviting both to his new casino in the Caspar system. After Lando departs for a meeting, Ariana and Karrde have a tense, intimate exchange in which she pleads to come with him; he firmly refuses, citing risk to them both, and returns to his ship.

title: RPlog:Arrival
summary: Investigating reports of refugees sold into slavery, Jedi initiate Ikihsa Enb'Zik and his Horansi wife Snarl arrive over Ord Vaxal in their fighter Ranger One only to find a massive Sith fleet under Darth Malign assaulting the world. They fight through the space battle, dodge a torpedo from Malign's X-wing, and crash-land in the jungle to begin a covert approach toward the besieged capital Tof Soren. Unknown to Zik, the temporary captain of Malign's flagship Dark Presence is Lynae Cassius (now 'Cato'), who, advised by Lord Regent Drayson Honos, orders the Jedi captured alive and unharmed.

title: RPlog:Arrival on Myrkr
summary: Jessalyn Valios, Simon, and Orson Tighe arrive at Talon Karrde's base on Myrkr seeking safe haven after Orson's attempt to save them provoked the Emperor (Valak). Karrde rages that the attempted assassination of the Emperor has placed huge bounties on his head and threatens his promise to Luke Skywalker to find the Death Star, but eventually relents. The ysalamiri on Myrkr block the Jedi's connection to the Force, leaving Jessalyn disoriented and Simon strangely at peace. After Karrde storms off, Simon and Jessalyn share an intimate conversation about love, honor, and the prospect of joining their souls.

title: RPlog:Art Collection
summary: Aboard the interdictor Leviathan, Crestian Tarasar consults Nara Rhen and Zubindi Hakoon about which pieces of his personal art collection to loan to a new gallery opening in Xi Xin run by the Xi Charrian Dean cadracak-'r'shak. They weigh Mandalorian cubist paintings, Wookiee totems, and Eriaduan shellwork against Xi Charrian cultural sensibilities. Nara suggests lending the Mandalorian paintings and Wookiee totems, possibly supplementing with an anonymous donation after seeing what the gallery already has. The conversation also touches on Charros IV's entry into the Caspian Union and the players' future plans toward Corellia.

title: RPlog:Art Therapy
summary: Crestian Tarasar closes the Xi Xin art gallery on Charros IV to hold a private, candid conversation with Johanna Siri te Danaan during the late Prelate's funerary period. They discuss the growing darkness in the galaxy: the menace Malus, the chaos-seeking Mitra and Doctor Cassius, the escape from the Oubliette, and the instability of both the Imperium and Republic. Crestian reveals a painting he forged himself of a deceased Circle of Irluuk member, reflecting on the human cost of what they have built. The two warlords, neither wanting war, agree they must be ready for one and affirm their alliance against those sowing chaos.

title: RPlog:Art of Darkness
summary: At the renamed Memorial Art Gallery in Xi Xin on Charros IV, Crestian Tarasar meets the Falleen Nasiri Zithreej, accompanied by the unsettling witch Ystile Wye, during the funerary period for the late Prelate. Nasiri seeks intelligence on a Twi'lek dark sider, whom Crestian identifies as Skawn Kairn, wanted for the attack on Bespin and an assault on a Krittish transport. Crestian shares what he knows of Skawn's past movements around The Wheel and Nar Shaddaa and his current dangerous associates. The two discuss the Caspian Union's wary alliance with the Imperium and agree there are grounds for renewed friendship amid a coming galactic conflict.

title: RPlog:Ash Seneal Strikes Again
summary: While strolling through Plaxton City on Caspar, Jessalyn Valios and Orson Tighe are ambushed by the gaunt 'High Baron' Ash Seneal and his thugs, who kidnap their crewmate Drew Carvallo. Jessalyn kills one thug with the Force and Drew shoots another before being stunned and dragged off. Ash demands that, to ransom Drew, they rob sealed safe number fourteen at the Bank of the Core and deliver the contents to his ship; during the standoff Orson ignites his own newly-built lightsaber for the first time. Sensing deception, the pair instead track Drew's comlink to an abandoned warehouse and descend into a hidden access tube to mount a rescue.

title: RPlog:Assassin!
summary: In the entertainment district of Plaxton on Caspar, Imperial Ambassador Morganna Tazecks mingles with FLS traders (Benjamin Jawatha, Naldo, Selektah) while Webb confronts the troublemaking Horansi cub Kaein. A New Republic sniper, NR Fleet Ops Lieutenant Adams Garat, opens fire from a rooftop, hitting Morganna in the throat and stomach and killing a nine-year-old Sarian girl. Medics Qua'lor and Jindra Langri stabilize the critically wounded Morganna and rush her to a hospital, while Webb and his spotter Sung hunt down the sniper—who has already shot himself—and Webb finishes him with a rifle, recovering his NR dog tags.

title: RPlog:Atsvara's Hot Takes
summary: During a victory reception aboard the Caspian battleship CMS Renaissance of Innovation following a simulated evacuation and wargame exercise, the young Atsvara Tarasar entertains guests with deadpan humor, tallying a thrown donut as a 'casualty.' Engineer Selko Aronat mingles awkwardly while pilot-commander Elana Tracer leads a toast to the fallen, announces the reopening of Marin Mountain resort, and chats about swoop racing. Crestian Tarasar, the Xi Charrian ambassador ak, and others discuss the new Caspian battle droid lines (E5 Baron Droid and IG-240 Hailfire Droid Tank) debuting in the closing wargame exercises. Crestian also quietly informs Councillor Zaalbacca that his friend Charrs died at Twin Suns.

title: RPlog:Attacked on GDIStar
summary: On the observation deck of GDIStar, a cloaked Sithkassi assassin named Sneer mistakes CSA VicePrex Piper (Simone Drake) for Princess Leia and stabs her in the side with an S-shaped blade. Lotus Blackpool shoots the assassin and Kuxli the Horansi rips out his throat, killing him after he briefly revives. Piper is treated with a medpack by Rtufo and evacuated, while GDI security officer Inoga arrives to investigate the apparent assassination attempt on Leia.

title: RPlog:Attempted Arrest
summary: At the Sandbar on Caspar, Caspian Naval officer Lynae Cassius locates wanted former Grand Moff Scaven Marx and, after a chillingly cordial conversation about war atrocities, signals security to arrest him. Scaven resists, drawing a heavy blaster and his sword, and a chaotic brawl erupts as Kyrin Sh'vani, Shael Edur, Ruen Vigos, Rasi Praddhan Cen, and the droid HM743 become involved. Kyrin is shot through one heart, Lynae is accidentally hit in the back by Kyrin's bolt, Shael is gashed by Scaven's sword, and Rasi is shot in the leg. The Union Constabulary under Captain Cunha storms in with stun and gas grenades, knocking Scaven unconscious and arresting the surviving combatants.

title: RPlog:Audience with Mighty Juuka
summary: Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard travels to Juuka's palace on Tatooine to petition the Hutt crime lord for information on the Wookiee trafficking operation run by the Trandoshan Bloodclaw (Bloodclaw/Blackscale) clan. She lavishes Juuka with gifts (tomuon cloth, holo tapestries, and a Shownar crystal hookah) to win his favor, navigating his crude hospitality. Juuka agrees to gather intelligence and connect her with a useful mercenary in exchange for unmolested passage of his ships through Republic space, and they strike an accord.

title: RPlog:Audience with a Senator
summary: Brin Harper (Kalna) brings Margrave Gustaf Heram of Vandelhelm to meet New Republic Senator Alistair Al'Dira at the Ord Mantell government center. Gustaf requests supplies, trainers, and Republic support for an insurgency to make the Imperial occupation of his homeworld untenable. Al'Dira agrees in principle to smuggle small arms, medical supplies, and training in exchange for raw materials, while cautioning that Republic resources are limited and Vandelhelm would largely be on its own.

title: RPlog:Aurejin Saves Jessalyn
summary: On Yavin 4, the fallen/Sith-corrupted Jessalyn Valios stalks the Jedi Aurejin into a jungle ravine, convinced he means to destroy her and begging to be killed to end her torment. Aurejin instead goads her into turning her own blaster on herself, then deflects the killing bolt with his lightsaber, severing only a lock of her hair and symbolically freeing her from Palpatine's mental control. Mailyn arrives, feels only betrayal and distrust, and walks off into the jungle, while Mira reunites joyfully with the freed Jessalyn. The group decides to flee Yavin together to a safe haven, away from Simon.

title: RPlog:Avalyshaar Aboard the Alderaan
summary: Aboard the New Republic vessel NRV Alderaan, Major Jessalyn Valios receives a docking medical team from the CSS Implacable, including an injured man and a hooded woman who turns out to be Jessa's old Caspar friend Avalyne (Avalyshaar) Dusten, now President of Caspar traveling in disguise. The two reunite warmly and catch up: Avalyne reveals she disbanded Caspar's Senate and instituted a new government of three speakers while keeping Caspar neutral. Jessalyn also converses with Captain Beaubos 'Skeezix' Calhoun about his failed mission at Etti and the nature of the Force, and Luke Skywalker passes through asking Jessalyn to find him later.

title: RPlog:Avid and Sinjon Torment Morganna
summary: In the KOS Gardens, the scarred Morganna Tazecks wakes hungover under a bush and decides to scare the merchant Turk Avid, but he reflexively counterattacks and they tumble together, re-injuring her recently damaged knee. The Horansi gardener and Force-sensitive Sinjon Teague intervenes, then telepathically presses Morganna about her slipping control over her anger, offering to guide her toward the Light if she ever seeks it. Morganna angrily rejects the intrusion while Avid tries to tend her swelling knee, and the comedic scene ends with the trio leaving the garden amid Alan's yapping puppy.

title: RPlog:Axel and Raver
summary: In a rough Bottom End cantina on Corellia, smuggler Axel Vichten shoots dead a drunk who had passed out atop Imperial recruit pilot Raver (Ravaun Huckleberry), blowing the man apart to free the pinned pilot. Raver's commanding officer, Flight Lieutenant Alex Dante, and pilot Cade Vaughan (whose brother once flew with the War Shrike Squadron) look on as Axel berates Raver for weakness. When the arrogant Raver refuses to disarm and draws on Axel, Axel shoots his arm nearly off; Alex finally disarms Raver at gunpoint, and Axel drugs him and summons a smuggler team to take him to the hospital, promising to clear the matter with Lord Korolov.

title: RPlog:Axel and Tyler Again
summary: At the Smuggler's Den on Corellia, smuggler Axel Vichten dopes himself with glitterstim when the Sith Lord Darth Malign (Tyler Damion) enters the bar, while companions Khanar Stryker, Kinsa'una, and Keifan (Antoine Dareus) are present and Alana Ten'ou slips in and out. Malign confronts Axel, reminding him that he lives only as long as he is useful to the Empire and warning him against betrayal, while Axel demands compensation for a broken deal and a defective prototype weapon. The tense exchange ends with Axel demanding Danik Kreldin's ships as recompense and Malign departing with his shadow guards.

title: RPlog:Axel and Tyler on Tatooine
summary: Axel Vichten tracks down the Sith Lord Darth Malign (Tyler Damion) to a small desert camp outside Mos Espa on Tatooine, where Tyler has been on a multi-day binge of drink and drugs. Axel confronts him angrily over being electrocuted on Caspar and over Tyler's apprentice nearly killing a friend of his in orbit, but Tyler defuses it by offering to help overthrow the Caspian government and proposing they form a freelance starfighter unit. Sharing glitterstim, the two reconcile as business partners and agree to assemble a small mercenary squadron ('Squadron One') alongside Juran and Dareus.

title: RPlog:Baby Steps
summary: Johanna Siri te Danaan takes her employee Chana antiquing at Bodkins Antiquities in Coronet City, Corellia, accompanied by Johanna's daughter Ara. Chana, a Jedi who has lived for over half a century, gravitates to the Clone Wars section and reveals her ignorance of anything unrelated to war, offering to sell 'clone war artifacts' that are implied to be her old lightsabers. Johanna gently advises her not to sell them, framing them as reminders that she was cherished, and buys Chana a small antique holosculpture of a galaxy as a gift, hinting at a growing maternal bond.

title: RPlog:Back Alley Politics
summary: In a dark alley in Coronet City, Senator Tarshyyk of Kashyyyk meets disguised Senator Alistair Al'Dira of Ord Mantell to coordinate New Republic support for a brewing Corellian independence movement. They agree to covertly supply weapons, medical aid, and food to dissident Corellian nobles, hoping unrest will draw Imperial forces into a blockade and weaken the Empire elsewhere. Al'Dira notes the Dac shipyards are already being rebuilt with Caspian funding, and the two part as wary allies.

title: RPlog:Back In the Fold
summary: On the observation deck of the I2SD Predator, recently released ex-convict Ensign Antoine Dareus is dressed down by Commissar Lanil Jast, who warns him against further insubordination, while Ensign Alden Spiers defends Dareus and clashes with Jast over ISB methods. The political tension subsides into civil banter about COMPNOR and the war. Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin then arrives with an entourage to reinstate Dareus's Star of Cimber, award him the Navy Cross, promote him to Lieutenant Junior Grade, and approve his transfer to the Stolz under Captain Syris.

title: RPlog:Back from Prison
summary: Aboard the living-ship sanctuary Refrain of Anshalar, a now-pregnant Jessalyn Valios joyfully reunites with her husband Aurejin, who returns disheveled from a long imprisonment. They discuss the troubled Mailyn Raines, who remains loyal to Simon and distrustful of the Jedi, and Aurejin reveals through the Force that their unborn child is a boy. Their apprentice Kyyel Marrak arrives, reports on his training and his lingering but controlled anger toward Mailyn, and plans to accompany Han in searching for clues to Leia's whereabouts. Jessalyn confides her intention to join the search, hoping to infiltrate the Sith Domani aboard the Fallen Star.

title: RPlog:Back in the Good Ole New Republic
summary: Jessalyn Valios returns to Corellia aboard Orson Tighe's YT-1300 with Orson and the Force-user Simon Sezirok, intending to contact the New Republic and Councilor Leia Organa-Solo. They discuss caution regarding the Skywalkers and the fate of Eva Sargent, who is under the spell of a Sith device wielded by Cort Stasus. At the starport, Jessalyn is found by Rislyn, an NR Intel operative who reveals she was assigned to find the missing Jedi. Jessa suffers a sudden, terrifying Force vision of swirling Darkness before agreeing to take a CEC shuttle up to seek an audience with Organa-Solo.

title: RPlog:Bad Place for a Call
summary: In a recorded holo-message, Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard asks privateer Jaspar Andromidas of Andromidas Galaxy Logistics to cease all raids on supply runs in the Caspian system, since a CSA humanitarian relief flotilla (some ships resembling Imperial vessels) must pass unfettered to avoid provoking a heavier Imperial response. She offers him 30,000 credits to lay low. Much later, Jaspar returns the call from the back room of a Nar Shaddaa night-club, agreeing to the terms while being violently interrupted by an impatient Gamorrean who slams his face into the terminal and cuts the call.

title: RPlog:Ballistic Equipment Parts
summary: On Tatooine in Mos Espa, the deranged old astromech Cricket shops for parts to build an upgraded taser after his original was confiscated, accompanied by Ara te Danaan and joined by the scheming young Sith Baroness Atsvara Tarasar. A Muun arms dealer named Bil Faan offers black-market ballistic parts, but Ara's insistence on law and order spooks him into closing his case of wares. Cricket reluctantly agrees to behave while Atsvara privately continues scheming on the droid's behalf.

title: RPlog:Basca Starker's Fate
summary: On Caspar, Marius Bariss Starker delivers the dead body of his estranged brother, Dr. Basca Dorian Starker, to Presav Crestian Tarasar of the Caspian Union, having posted the bounty himself. The body is verified by genetic scan by Councillor Zig Al Fidel and accepted; Basca is to be placed in carbonite rather than vaporized. Crestian reveals that Basca spent his last weeks manipulating Jedi Master Jessalyn Valios, prompting Marius's anger and his recollection of having once dined with Jessalyn years earlier on Isada. Marius vows to find Jessalyn to set things straight and offers his apologies and future service to the Union.

title: RPlog:Basca Starker Meets Jessalyn Valios, or Dr. Jekyll Decides to Woo a Jedi
summary: On Tatooine, biotech researcher Basca Starker seeks out Jedi Master Jessalyn Valios in the Mos Eisley market to explain himself after a damaging newscast. Over tea, he recounts how the Empire's Select Committee (overseen by Zeak Oppenheimer and COMPNOR) hired his firm to study and weaponize the Force, how he bargained Jedi Archive copies to cure the Caspar Phage, and how he kept his research from the CSA, leading Oppenheimer to throw him under the bus publicly. In a second scene in the desert at twilight, Basca shares wine, kisses Jessalyn, and reveals his theory that the Dark Side is a Sith alchemical transfiguration of the living Force, plus a secret answer: a non-adept could be linked to the Force only through a Jedi and a Dark Adept working together at great risk. He invites her to be his date to a naming ceremony in his honor on Caspar; Jessalyn, charmed but wary, declines to go further romantically for now but agrees to attend.

title: RPlog:Basilica Evacuation
summary: Kyle Senesca, studying captured stone tablets at the Basilica on Coruscant, is reunited with the recently-escaped Jedi padawan Ai'kani Za'netra. They exchange news of the Jedi who have been captured or scattered by the Empire (Brandis hurt, Luke and Sabrina missing), and Ai'kani confesses she allowed a sympathetic Imperial who developed feelings for her into the Basilica. They travel to Leia's office, where Leia orders the children and residents relocated, tasks Kyle and Ai'kani with evacuating the Basilica's collection of knowledge, and insists Ai'kani stay away from Brandis until she is vetted for Imperial tampering.

title: RPlog:Battle Droid Duel
summary: At the Sheighoreleigh Resort on Kalla in CSA space, Arakyd Industries hosts a gladiatorial dueling-droid event. The modified 501-Z police droid 501-Zed (billed as 'Shen-Lung'), who serves as both master and combatant, first survives the arena's automated traps, then destroys a Mark X Executioner droid in melee combat using his axe attachments. Violet Allure watches from the stands, befriending a Jawa named Lola, while spectator Siva looks on; Zed emerges victorious and is led off for repairs.

title: RPlog:Battle of Bespin - Ground
summary: A New Republic Marine platoon smuggled aboard an Action-class transport infiltrates a tibanna processing platform near Cloud City, Bespin, to steal a shipment of tibanna and destroy the facility. While Republic demolitionist Gene Malantean plants explosives, his force trades fire with Imperial 501st Legion stormtroopers and corpsmen; medics on both sides (Chool Ndresi, Calyx Drogyn, Galatea Demor, Sev'rance Cassoni) are wounded in the firefight. The Republic detonates the charges, crippling the platform and securing a substantial tibanna haul before evacuating.

title: RPlog:Battle of Bespin - Space
summary: As a diversion for the ground raid on the Bespin tibanna platform, a New Republic task group built around the MC40a cruiser Rapier engages a numerically superior Imperial fighter force over Bespin. Rogue Squadron pilots including Lance 'Wildman' Corbet, Alex Dante (Chance), Leo Corak, and Crash dogfight Imperial TIE Avengers while Commander Rasi Praddhan Cen maneuvers the Rapier to screen the fighters. The Republic's support ships and fighters disengage and jump safely out of system after the tibanna is secured.

title: RPlog:Battle of Bimmiel
summary: The crippled Victory-class Star Destroyer Vindictive, stranded without hyperdrive near Bimmiel under Admiral Jal'Dana Rall, is ambushed by a New Republic task force led by the Audacity with Ghost and Falcon squadrons. In a brutal capital-ship and starfighter engagement, the Republic destroys the corvette Land Runner and cripples the Plaxif while methodically dismantling the Vindictive's shield domes. With her ship doomed, Rall evacuates her crew aboard shuttles and escapes in her own fighter, conceding the field to Major Kyrin Sh'vani after inflicting heavy losses.

title: RPlog:Battle of Bothawui (25 ABY)
summary: A small New Republic fleet under Lt. Commander Argon Brand attempts to punch through Imperial defenses around Bothawui to land marines and establish a beachhead. Using a decoy transport as a fireship, the Republic destroys the Imperial corvette Sentry, then clashes with the Venator-class Responder commanded by Commander William Roice. Republic gunship missiles tear the Responder in half, killing Roice, but the three Corellian Gunships are destroyed in turn. At heavy cost the surviving transports break through to make planetfall, beginning the liberation of Bothawui.

title: RPlog:Battle of Bothawui III (25 ABY)
summary: After Drev'starn City falls to the Republic, the Imperial fleet maneuvers to land reinforcements; Captain Harval Shaw's Star Destroyer Executioner and escorts engage Argon Brand's assault frigate Derlin. In a daring maneuver, the Derlin's pilots overshoot and slip behind the Executioner, then disable its engines with ion cannon fire. Brand demands surrender, and after Shaw stalls hoping to jump to hyperspace, his hyperdrive fails. With Captain Cen relaying terms, Shaw surrenders the Executioner and crew, then secretly leaves the bridge to purge the ship's computer core.

title: RPlog:Battle of Bothawui II (25 ABY)
summary: Republic reinforcements led by Captain Rasi Cen aboard the Mon Calamari cruiser Deliverance arrive to secure the Bothawui beachhead, joined by Argon Brand now aboard the assault frigate Derlin. Imperial reinforcements under Vice Admiral Solomon Fields arrive with three Star Destroyers. The fleets exchange long-range fire; the Deliverance leads the Imperials on a chase to draw the Star Destroyer Desolator away, weakening its shields. Fields breaks off pursuit when the Deliverance damages his stabilizers, but the Rapier is finally crippled and ordered to withdraw, leaving the engagement a costly draw.

title: RPlog:Battle of Bothawui IV (25 ABY)
summary: In the final battle of the Bothan Campaign, the Republic fleet under Captain Rasi Cen aboard the Deliverance, with Argon Brand's frigate Derlin, assaults the Imperial ships holding orbit over Holm'starn, commanded by Vice Admiral Solomon Fields aboard the Star Destroyer Desolator. The Desolator ion-disables the Deliverance and then destroys it with a massed broadside, killing Cen and his crew. But the Derlin rakes the Desolator's exposed engines and breaches its reactor, destroying the Star Destroyer and killing Fields. With Bothawui taken on the ground, Brand assumes command and negotiates an orderly Imperial withdrawal with Captain Corliss of the Annihilator.

title: RPlog:Battle of Gyndine
summary: A Republic fleet jumps out of hyperspace near Gyndine to destroy the Imperial battlestation, with the Mon Calamari cruisers Rapier and Promise tasked to pin the Imperial Star Destroyer Inquisitor. Commander Rasi engages the Inquisitor from two sides, concentrating fire on its sensor arrays to prevent it joining the wider battle, over the objections of newly-promoted Captain Valerius. Fighter ace Ghost 8 and Imperial pilot Jonas Alsten dogfight repeatedly while bombers from both sides cancel out. The Golan battlestation is crippled and the Republic forces, including the damaged Bluegrass, withdraw to hyperspace.

title: RPlog:Battle of Selene (Part I)
summary: The opening of the War of the Throne: forces loyal to Lorn Rhys, allied with opportunists in the Corporate Sector Authority, strike at Kendal Osbourne's Imperial regime above the capital world Selene. The Super Star Destroyer Dark Eminence is crashed into the planet, causing catastrophic destruction and chaos. CSA Espo forces from the Strike Cruiser Authority and VSD Litigator land amid the panic while turncoat stormtroopers under Raika Navar betray the palace guards from within. Combat engineers breach the perimeter fence, and Espo infantry seize a foothold in the Imperial Plaza, but the loyalists seal the palace blast doors and dig in for a siege. This is a GM-run NPC event narrating the battle.

title: RPlog:Battle of Selene (Part II)
summary: Continuing the War of the Throne siege on Selene, Lorn Rhys leads a commando strike team, dropped by the gunship Meteor, into the Imperial Palace to hunt down Emperor Kendal Osbourne, with Morrison Van Sen and Zrak'Hroun at his side. Inside, fierce close-quarters fighting rages through the corridors between Espo commandos, turncoat Imperials, loyal stormtroopers, and Royal Guards, with E-web emplacements, satchel charges, glop and nerve-gas grenades. A heroic Espo named Gorath sacrifices himself on a grenade, and the loyalist Colonel Imral leads a doomed counter-charge that is broken by sonic rifles and nerve gas. The Espo strike team rigs the turbolift with explosives, obliterates the lower-level defenders behind the blast doors, and descends the shaft to press deeper into the palace.

title: RPlog:Battle of Teyr, Part 1
summary: An element of Task Force Inquisitor, with Flight Officer Liza Molokai's Alpha Squadron escorting a sensor shuttle, conducts a passive recon of Teyr, where dissident Imperial resistance groups opposed to Emperor Vadim have massed a fleet around three Golan III battlestations under Admiral Harkenson. The Imperials are detected and Harkenson sends Green and Dagger squadrons to destroy the shuttle, but Molokai's pilots out-fly and shoot down most of the attackers. Imperial capital ships arrive to cover the recon team's withdrawal; the shuttle completes its scans of the fleet and Golans, and both sides break off after the recon objective is achieved.

title: RPlog:Battle of Teyr, Part 2
summary: Weeks after the recon, Admiral Bejin leads an Imperial task force in an all-out assault on the Teyr resistance fleet, demanding surrender from Admiral Harkenson, who refuses. Commander Alex Dante coordinates a fighter screen around Liza Molokai's bomber wing to punch through to the central command Golan, while Jek Mirden's Star Destroyer absorbs heavy fire from swarming rebel ships, surviving by ramming enemies with tractored debris and corvettes. Repeated bombing runs collapse the command Golan's shields and destroy it, killing Harkenson and shattering the rebel command structure; a junior captain surrenders, and Imperial stormtroopers board and secure the remaining ships.

title: RPlog:Battle of Teyr, Part 3
summary: The final phase of the Battle of Teyr, in which Imperial forces assault the resistance redoubt within the Teyr Rift. Imperial bombers, fighters, AT-ATs, and stormtroopers grind through anti-aircraft fire and entrenched defenses while two downed Imperial pilots, Odion Cobb and Marz Tank, are hunted by resistance troops and rescued by a stormtrooper squad including Illyana Crane. The Empire breaches the base, but the resistance leadership escapes offworld by shuttle as the last defenders surrender.

title: RPlog:Battle of Trandosha
summary: A large New Republic task force jumps into the Trandoshan system to attack the New Sith Order's homeworld fleet, initially gaining the upper hand against poorly-positioned Sith capital ships and destroying several vessels. The Sith commander Axel Vichten springs a trap: a massive second fleet led by three new Sith Leviathan-class Destroyers (commanded by Grand Inquisitor Aknar Koth'lyri) and an Interdictor jumps in behind the NR forces, while new Barb-class fighters engage. The Leviathans annihilate the MC80 Red Reef and other ships; the NR commander orders a fighting retreat to Kashyyyk. Commander Rasi Cen evacuates and rams the corvette Audacity through the Star Destroyer War Hawk to clear an escape path, dying- readying to abandon ship at the last moment, opening a route for the surviving Republic fleet to flee as an Imperial scouting party also arrives.

title: RPlog:Battle of Varonat
summary: A New Republic strike force led by the MC40 cruiser Rapier attacks a critical Imperial refueling station in the Varonat system near Bespin. Rogue, Falcon, Dagger, and Ghost squadron fighters screen the bombers against roughly two and a half squadrons of TIE Avengers led by Wing Commander Liza Molokai, while the Rapier duels an Imperial Star Destroyer. Bomber runs ignite the station's fuel conduits, triggering a massive chain explosion that destroys the depot before the Republic forces withdraw.

title: RPlog:Battle of the Rocks
summary: Captain Violet Allure's light cruiser CSAV Corporate Venture is pulled out of hyperspace into an asteroid field on the fringes of the Corellian system and ambushed by a large pirate group, including two capital ships and a fighter swarm. Viceprex Tyy'sun Eson's carrier CSAV Remittance executes a micro-jump into the field and launches its starfighter squadron under Gren Delede in the Chir'Daki. Delede destroys a boarding shuttle and exploits a known Carrack-class design flaw to cripple a pirate capital ship while the Remittance tractors the Venture to safety. The pirates break and flee, leaving the CSA forces victorious despite losing four fighters.

title: RPlog:Bazil, Revisited
summary: In Fountain Square on Caspar, Jessalyn Valios and Orson Tighe encounter the now-sober agent Bazil McKenzie, who apologizes for an earlier drunken incident and asks Orson to contact Talon Karrde on his behalf to arrange a meeting. Bazil offers his help and contacts should they need anything before departing for the fountain. Afterward, Jessalyn pleads with Orson that splitting up now is too dangerous given that he is being hunted, and Orson agrees that she will accompany him back to the base, sharing affectionate Force communication.

title: RPlog:Beach Getaway
summary: After fleeing an Imperial attack on the New Republic embassy on Caspar, the Jedi Leo carries Ambassador Delgard's young daughter Gabi to a remote sea cave on Orleanon. Gabi unpacks her bag, revealing a data chit her mother Ambrosia left for Leo containing banking details, instructions for Gabi's care, and information about her grandmother on Corellia. Leo bonds with the exhausted girl over starfighters before settling her to sleep and meditating at the cave entrance.

title: RPlog:Bean Spilling
summary: After Luke Skywalker discovers Shenneret 'Shenner' Veery's true gender, Jessalyn Valios chases the distraught youth down at Palanhi City Starport and takes her drinking at the Grand Palanhi Hotel casino. Over Corellian brandy, the two redheads confide painful pasts: Shenner reveals she is a prostitute's daughter, an orphan, that she fled Tatooine after a Corellian kissed her, and that her disguise is being uncovered. Jessa drunkenly rages over Luke kissing her and then apologizing. Grathix Stur'ttrakath arrives and tries to forcibly take Shenner, learning to his shock that 'he' is a 'she'; Jessalyn draws her blaster, fires a warning shot, and hauls the passed-out Shenner away to the Black Dragon.

title: RPlog:Beers, Cheers, and Buccaneers
summary: At the rowdy Beggar's Cove Cantina on Nar Shaddaa, smuggler Jaspar Andromidas struggles to get served until pirates Nastaran Zohreh and the boisterous captain Shiari Vane take him under their wing. Vane pitches Jaspar a heist job requiring deception and fancy flying, and after some banter they negotiate the pay up from fifteen thousand to twenty thousand credits. They toast to the deal over a bottle of vile liquor while Vane's monkey-lizard steals Nastaran's beer, and Nastaran departs to meet a Rodian.

title: RPlog:Beginning Again
summary: This is an index/summary page narrating Lynae's transition from her former Imperial Naval career into the CDU Navy as a medical officer, with bridging narration linking to several other separate RP logs (Volunteering, What We Become, Come What May, Mutual Understanding, The Price of Tea). It contains connective prose and links rather than a single self-contained played scene.

title: RPlog:Bespin Blows Up!
summary: The 1st Annual Bespin Miners Dinner at the Yarith Hotel Ballroom in Cloud City, hosted by Grand Moff Johanna te Danaan, celebrates new worker shares and raises under the Imperium. The chaotic evening features the Falleen Lorda Nasiri with his Witch and undead neks, a Caspian delegation led by Crestian Tarasar and Zaalbacca, and the eccentric Gamorrean Mox. After Johanna leaves for the refinery, a massive explosion devastates the facility, followed by Boba Fett blasting through the ballroom wall and a slaver named Skawn Kairn mutilating victims elsewhere, leaving the gala in disaster.

title: RPlog:Bespin Cultural Festival
summary: Cloud City Baroness-Administrator Quinne Stardust Rose hosts the First Annual Bespin Cultural Festival at the Yarith Hotel, mingling with guests at the Lobby Bar before performing a song to open the ballroom festivities. Conversation among Quinne, the Quarren doctor Druze, technician Selko Aronat, Caspian Presav Crestian Tarasar, and Lynae Cassius covers a recent foiled lobby bombing, Quinne's rise from club singer to acting-then-permanent administrator, and Selko's life as a self-taught mechanic. Quinne offers Selko a full-time job at the hotel and leaves a parting gift of Yarith pyjamas. The evening unfolds with food, fireworks, a guest DJ set, and easy socializing.

title: RPlog:Best Left Alone
summary: On the abandoned, toxic moon Kohlma, treasure-hunter Sekes Reyoz Ric'amar lands atop an old temple seeking hidden outlaw loot, while CSA VicePrex Morrison Van Sen arrives separately with a science team and an Umbaran woman scavenger trails them. The intruders are attacked by mutated, deathstick-rotted native creatures; Van Sen calls an orbital strike that vaporizes the Umbaran and many beasts, losing one of his men's arms in the fighting. Sekes loots the temple vault before fleeing, while the stealth-suited Scaven Marx ignores treasure and instead recovers a Germanium plaque inscribed in a forgotten language matching writing from his cryotube.

title: RPlog:Beware Siths Bearing Gifts
summary: At the hidden underworld bar Crime Moon on Nar Shaddaa, the Sith alchemist Lady Mitra meets Darth Malus for a second time to formalize their alliance. Mitra gifts Malus Ahzad's Cube, an ancient Sith artifact she retrieved from Vassily Korolov's vaults, and briefly invades his mind to assert dominance. Malus reveals his plan is not to seize the throne but to slowly cripple Malign's New Sith Order and dismantle the Imperium piece by piece. He intends to travel to Chandrila with Skawn to test the Imperium's reactions and establish exploitable patterns of behavior.

title: RPlog:Birds of a Feather
summary: In Organa Park on New Alderaan, Ord Mantell, medic Myiari Oerstead and mercenary Brek Halsmer share a quiet afternoon and open up about the deaths they have witnessed in their respective lines of work. Brek recounts losing entire squads, and Myiari confides about mercy blows and the toll of being unable to save everyone. They bond over their shared weariness with death, Myiari offers to show Brek around the city before his shore leave ends, and they agree to meet again.

title: RPlog:Birthday Baroness
summary: At the Silvergrass Arboretum on Silver Station, Atsvara Tarasar's tenth birthday party gathers younglings, droids, and powerful guests including Grand Moff Elana Tracer, the Jedi Johanna te Danaan, and Nara Rhen. The droid Cricket causes chaos with a risque Jawa hologram before being silenced. Crestian Tarasar formally announces the creation of the title of Baroness for Atsvara, pinning a flame-lily brooch on her and naming her heir of House Dragonflower; Atsvara accepts with a chilling vow of protection and ruthlessness.

title: RPlog:Blizzard Baby
summary: At the New Republic Embassy in Plaxton City, Ambassador Ambrosia goes into labor amid a backdrop of political stress over rumors about the CDU and the Empire. Her husband Tivadar returns to find her near labor, and despite her reluctance to leave her political duties, they travel through a blizzard to Dr. Tarquin Memorial Hospital with their droid C4. After hours in the maternity ward, Ambrosia gives birth.

title: RPlog:Blood Brothers
summary: Drax Rendolen contacts veteran smuggler Krackor Reincus using old Knights of Korriban codes and docks with his ILC Edgecrusher in an asteroid field near Corellia. Drax seeks the destination where Krackor dropped off Andreya Carvalo, a friend pursuing a dangerous lone vendetta. The two bond over shared trauma at the hands of Darth Malign, and Krackor agrees to reveal the destination (Coruscant) in exchange for NR customs connections plus a cache of Durindfire gems. Drax leaves to arrange insertion into Imperial-held Coruscant.

title: RPlog:Blooming Chaos
summary: At a kitschy Kashyyyk-themed restaurant on The Wheel, the masked, yellow-eyed agent Murrain seeks out the slaver-raider Captain Skawn Kairn, having tracked him down after his Bespin raid. Over a bottle of potent spirits, Murrain probes Skawn's motivations and pitches himself as an 'agent of realistic chaos' who wants to ally and cause mayhem together. Skawn deflects with chaotic banter, accepts a drop-link datachit to contact Murrain, and Murrain warns him that the Imperator's agents (familiar with Darth Malign's methods) are hunting him.

title: RPlog:Blurred Visions
summary: In Yan Square on Dreven, the Falleen Sith Intelligence Network head Ssanyu Natrulon is accosted by Auntie Maya, an old half-blind crone beggar who claims to have foreseen her in visions. Maya leads Ssanyu to her hovel and delivers a stream of cryptic prophecy about 'the Dark One' coming full of rage, the return of the 'Cold Kings,' and a coming storm, urging Ssanyu to seek council with the Red Man and warning of figures like the Green Woman, the Golden Woman, and the Woman of Fire. When Maya begins loudly chanting the prophecy and shouts dangerous words ('The Senator', 'Veng...'), Ssanyu warns her to be silent, then uses a concealed neurolash to stun the old woman unconscious before quietly leaving.

title: RPlog:Boldness
summary: Hungover and remorseful after confessing her feelings, Sabrina Rheatis visits Luke Skywalker aboard the NRSD Crusader to apologize and deliver decrypted intel from R2-D2's data tap. Their conversation about duty and emotion spirals into mutual confession, and despite Luke insisting their bond cannot be, the two share a kiss before Luke pushes away and asks to be left alone. Sabrina leaves the datapad, deeply shaken, resolving to seek solitude and continue the search for the missing General Solo.

title: RPlog:Bombardment
summary: Following a cease-fire between the Empire and New Republic over the Griffon Alliance world of Cochran, Imperial and Republic ground forces both withdraw from the battlefield. Griffon veteran Gyzen Bel and Bothan advisor Demitri Vry'lya realize the New Republic's retreat signals something dire and try in vain to warn the SAT command to evacuate. Danik Kreldin then orders a Base Delta Zero orbital bombardment of Cochran; turbolaser fire rains down outside the shielded city as civilians and defenders scramble for shelters and ships, and Gyzen and Demitri narrowly escape offworld in a damaged fighter.

title: RPlog:Bombers Over Etti IV
summary: Imperial Scimitar Assault Bombers from the ISD Vanguard launch and patrol around Etti IV, alarming CSA security during the tense aftermath of Han Solo's capture. VicePrex Piper (Simone Drake) goes to the Port Security Office where Xegid Roark repeatedly hails the Imperials, who claim a routine patrol while flying provocatively close to CSA ships and the Phoenix. Piper concludes the bombers likely scanned the CSA fleet's capabilities, orders patrols doubled and a heightened alert, and discusses the upcoming trial of General Solo and his defense attorney Pike before leaving to confer with Dillon.

title: RPlog:Borderlines
summary: On Cloud City, Paul Nighman meets the former princess Ylsa Estrallas to finalize a business arrangement: she will forge cover documentation and fool the Imperials so they can hunt for the lost treasure of the Old Republic pirate Darius Nul on Athaniss. Ylsa accepts the offer, seeing it as her path out of Ullo the Hutt's grasp. The pair share several intimate dances, but when Ylsa invites Paul into her apartment, he gently declines a romantic encounter, leaving the relationship strictly professional and Ylsa cold and withdrawn.

title: RPlog:Boring Conversation Anyway
summary: Pirate Shiari Vane, having captured an Imperial Action VI freighter (the Corulag Haul), misjumps and arrives at Caspar's moon without her escort ship Crimson Lightning. She bluffs the New Republic warship Nemesis by impersonating 'Lieutenant Collins' of the Imperial Navy, torturing the bound real Collins for the ship's logs to pass inspection by Lt. Commander Amaza Sunrider. Sunrider, reluctant to fire on a seemingly Imperial vessel and worried about its claimed hull damage, ultimately grants Vane clearance to land, and Vane slips toward the planet to deliver the prize to the Republic.

title: RPlog:Both Briefing
summary: Vice Admiral Laivin Quix (NPC) briefs Second Fleet at the Ord Mantell military base on a reconnaissance mission into the Both system to scan the strengthening Imperial fleet near Bothawui without engaging. Lt Commander Argon Brand of the Lightbringer is assigned the task alongside Falcon Squadron and a Ghost Squadron diversion. Marine pilot Halos heckles from the crowd, urging a larger force, but the cautious scout-and-return plan stands.

title: RPlog:Breaking Point
summary: Imperial agent Rainier drags the badly beaten, unconscious Senator Tokoga into Myiari's cell after another harsh interrogation, taunting both prisoners about the futility of the Rebellion. When Rainier begins clubbing Tokoga, Myiari attacks him in a rage but is stunned by Stormtroopers. Rainier shatters Tokoga's knee and threatens execution, but Stormtrooper Brek Halsmer argues against killing a Republic Senator. Afterward, in a private kitchen conversation, Rainier mentors Brek on interrogation philosophy, and Brek proposes letting the prisoners go while planting a tracking bug on the Senator to satisfy Command.

title: RPlog:Brig - Day Five
summary: On the final day of their imprisonment aboard the Star Destroyer Inquisitor, ISB Director Korynn Fleming interrogates the captive Lynae Cassius and Antoine Dareus about the location of Caiton's ship and their flight after freeing prisoners. Lynae refuses to disclose the ship's location, having deliberately arranged not to know it, while Dareus is brutally electroshocked and beaten, breaking many of his bones. Fleming reveals Danik Kreldin has been captured and spares the pair's lives, but forces them to kneel and swear loyalty to the Emperor before their estranged parents before discharging and exiling them from Imperial space; Lynae is surgically implanted with a heart-monitoring kill device. The pair are ultimately transported off the ship and set free on Tatooine.

title: RPlog:Brig - Day Four
summary: Held in solitary aboard the Inquisitor, Lynae Cassius endures supersonic alarm torture before ISB Director Korynn Fleming arrives for her first face-to-face interrogation. Fleming, treating Lynae as a betrayed friend, demands she detail Danik Kreldin's plot to usurp Emperor Vadim's throne; Lynae recounts the treasonous discussion while insisting it was mere talk and that she freed Dareus and Quinn to preserve the Caspian treaty. After a heated philosophical clash about loyalty to the Emperor versus a Grand Admiral, Fleming has her beaten with stun batons and subjected to renewed sonic torture. In a second scene, the battered Lynae and Dareus are reunited in a shared cell, where they tend each other's injuries, trade dark humor and threats against Kreldin, and share personal histories while awaiting their fate.

title: RPlog:Brig - Day One
summary: Defected Imperial officer Commodore Lynae Caiton (Cassius) and former fighter ace/ambassador Antoine Dareus voluntarily return to the Empire aboard the Inquisitor to face treason charges and avert war between the Empire and the Caspian Democratic Union. Escorted by Lynae's loyal 'sister' Maris Becton, they are arrested in the hangar by Commander Keline Nelhrn on orders from Darth Malign and Grand Inquisitor Vassily Korolov, and Dareus hands over a data disk identifying the still-living conspirator Danik Kreldin. The pair are strung up by magnacuffs in the detention block, where Maris secretly loops the surveillance feed to give them fifteen private minutes, deliver painkillers, and exchange last instructions about Lynae's wedding ring and divorce papers. They pass the long hours hanging from the ceiling trading gallows humor about their predicament.

title: RPlog:Brig - Day Three
summary: By the third day the prisoners are briefly lowered for hygiene; Dareus, whose shoulder repeatedly dislocates, deliberately resets it each time he is freed despite torn tendons, and Lynae tends to him while promising future surgery. The pair are then separated and moved to individual interrogation cells. Maris Becton, now stripped of rank and playing the harsh interrogator, questions Dareus about Danik Kreldin's conspiracy: how the supposedly dead Grand Admiral recruited him, the plan to use the Jedi against the Sith, and the meeting at the Kreldin estate. Dareus answers truthfully while Maris alternately slaps him and probes, ending by warning that his next questioning will be far less pleasant.

title: RPlog:Brig - Day Two
summary: On the second day of their imprisonment aboard the Inquisitor, the suspended prisoners Lynae and Dareus receive two hostile visitors. Captain Jal'Dana Rall, who blames Lynae's pride and poor leadership for the deaths of soldiers including Damien Katon (whom Rall personally executed), berates and physically assaults both prisoners, striking Lynae and kneeing Dareus. Then High Colonel Davyd Levvis, Lynae's oldest friend who stood at her wedding, questions why she ran with Dareus and the Caspian diplomat; Lynae explains she acted to protect the CDU treaty and avert war, and to spare lives from the new Emperor's contempt. As Davyd leaves he quietly confesses that he loved her, leaving Lynae stunned.

title: RPlog:Bringing in Brandis
summary: Having kidnapped the Jedi doctor Kitterick Brandis Finian on Tatooine, Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin brings him and the captive youth Etiel before Darth Malign in the Sith Lord's dark meditation chamber aboard the SSD Malevolence. Malign frees and sends away his nephew Etiel, praises Kreldin, and attempts to use postcognition by touching Brandis to extract memories, including the location of his daughter. Brandis resists and slips his binders, so Malign Force-chokes him unconscious and orders him kept sedated as a living source of information for future interrogation.

title: RPlog:Burn Victim's Barter
summary: Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard wakes aboard the bounty hunter ship Maiden's Prayer, badly burned and captured by the Trandoshan hunter Nachkt'lyysk after her convoy was destroyed. Nachkt, who actually holds a secret commission to track the trafficked Wookiees, debates ideology with her while she negotiates her freedom. Rather than be delivered to the Empire (a likely death sentence), she offers him 50,000 credits, more than her bounty, and the two agree; they land briefly on Trandosha so she can withdraw the credit chits before he sets a course away from the war zone.

title: RPlog:Burning Sands
summary: On Tatooine near Mos Eisley, Trandoshan bounty hunter Nachkt'lyysk ambushes Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard's diplomatic convoy by using his light freighter as a weapon, slaughtering her Republic marine escort and leaving her badly burned. Holo-producer Ewan Dain, who had unwittingly become entangled in the operation believing it a rescue, helps carry the wounded ambassador aboard the Maiden's Prayer. A tense standoff follows between Dain (wielding a thermal detonator) and Nachkt over the plan to use Ambrosia as a political piece against the Empire, ending with an uneasy agreement to keep her alive and proceed with the hunter's scheme.

title: RPlog:Buskers
summary: Caspian Intelligence operatives Veruca Violet, General Janus Tarasar, and the albino agent Vanilla visit Yan Square on Dreven under cover of scouting corporate real estate, to discreetly meet a field agent posing as a veiled exotic dancer. The dancer engages the trio amid the square's buskers, then leads Vanilla off under the pretense of a paid liaison so she can deliver her report in a side alley. The agent reveals that a beggar named Auntie Maya recognized and grew hysterical over a woman named Ssanyu Natrulon, ranting about a returning 'Dark One' angry with 'all his children' and a 'man in red,' before Maya likely turned up dead. Vanilla punches the agent to fake a robbery scuffle, hands over a chit and earring for cover, and slips away to maintain the operation's secrecy.

title: RPlog:C Is For Cookey
summary: In the Cat's Claw Cantina on Ord Mantell, the squib refugee Grizz (Grizzlawlooraleth-Itabo, called Cookey) arrives demanding good ale after losing his old ship, the Black Betty, to the Hutts. Pirate captain Salty Jack (Jaqen H'gar) shares his private bottle and learns Cookey was a ship's cook who can make a meal from almost anything. Recognizing Jack's reputation, Cookey agrees to join the crew over a drink, on the condition that his galley is off-limits to everyone but the captain.

title: RPlog:Calling in on Old Friends
summary: Returning from a naval headquarters meeting at the Mon Calamari spaceport, Rasi Praddhan Cen runs into the smuggler Shael Edur, who is delivering New Republic medical supplies amid the Dac crisis. Over drinks in the cantina, Rasi recruits Shael to investigate how insurgents are smuggling weapons past the blockade to the Quarren Survivalist Party, while she deflects questions about her recent time in an Imperial labor camp. Their conversation is interrupted by an IGN broadcast revealing Quarren individuals have sided with the Empire, prompting Rasi to refocus her task purely on finding the customs smuggling routes.

title: RPlog:Camerata Ostile Blockade Run
summary: A flight of New Republic X-Wings led by Kyrin Sh'vani escorts the freighter Camerata Ostile, piloted by Shael Winters, in an attempt to run the Imperial blockade of Coruscant. The Imperial bomber wing (Krieg Inrokana's Darkswords) and TIE Interceptors, backed by Captain Lynae Cassius-Caiton's strike cruiser Broadsword, disable the freighter and shoot down most of the X-Wing escort. The Imperials capture the freighter, strip it of all cargo, and hurl the wreckage at Coruscant; only Kyrin escapes by microjumping away. The blockade run is a disaster for the New Republic.

title: RPlog:Candid Conversation
summary: Leia hosts Imperial defector Sandor Woden in her office, bringing in Luke to interview him about Imperial tactics and the question of mind-sifting locked knowledge. Luke uses Truth Sense to confirm Woden is honest, and they instead agree Winter will work with Woden to document Imperial doctrine; Woden reveals the public 'Emperor' is a fiction with Lord Korolov actually steering the government. After Woden and Winter leave, Luke privately tells Leia a true hidden Emperor (Vadim) does exist, and they discuss healing Brandis, mounting a rescue for the captured Sabrina, and Leia's neglected Force training.

title: RPlog:Cantina Chatter
summary: In the Head Quarters Cantina in the undercity of Imperial Center (Coruscant), Captain Violet Allure unexpectedly runs into Chase, having gone looking for him at the clinic. Over a bottle of fine Corellian brandy the two old friends catch up, discussing the planet's recent change of hands, her plans to open a part-time weaponry business, and a shared interest in martial arts and staff weapons. Violet eventually leaves for her ship, and Chase lingers, drinking and privately mourning someone named Miranda.

title: RPlog:Capture Of A Marine
summary: Vengan Draelis pilots a disguised shuttle to Coronet City Spaceport to extract a mysterious intel courier, but CorSec ambushes them; the courier escapes aboard the shuttle while Vengan is knocked out and left behind. He awakens as a captive in the office of CorSec Colonel Twila Virda, a Twi'lek he previously met on Coruscant, who tends his wounds and fakes a beating for appearances. After a tense interrogation in which she bluffs with a tampered medical droid, Vengan reveals he was merely a hired pilot who knew nothing of his passenger, and Twila strikes a deal to release him in exchange for delivering a warning message and setting up a secure means of future contact.

title: RPlog:Casino Royale
summary: At the Royale Casino in Coronet City, Corellia, recently resigned Imperial officer Antoine Dareus gambles and reconnects with Commander Seifer Wolf, meets Colonel Twila Virda, and is joined by musician Salann Grayhe and pilot Alex Dante over a long evening of drinks and conversation. The talk ranges over Dareus's resignation, Imperial gossip, swoop racing, and an Imperial incident involving an Ensign Balak that Wolf wants to question Twila about privately. Dareus cashes out over 11,000 credits in winnings and eventually departs, revealing that he resigned and returned home to find out who abducted his missing father.

title: RPlog:Caspar's Good Faith
summary: Following the Corellian Corruption Scandal and the mysterious prison break of Ambassadors Dareus and Quinn from the HIMS Inquisitor, CDU Rear Admiral Naten Bonrue meets ISB Station Chief Commander Ebon Zyar at the Imperial Embassy on Caspar. To defuse a situation threatening war, Bonrue offers intelligence on the Maffi crime syndicate (led by Tyy'sun Eson) and the Corellian Resistance flagship Litigator (captained by Gren Delede) as a 'good faith' gesture. Zyar accepts the information but warns that if the CDU is found harboring the escaped war criminals, it will be considered an act of war.

title: RPlog:Caspar Conversation
summary: In the neutral territory of the Marin Mountain Resort on Caspar, New Republic Admiral Moralis Rodriga seeks out Imperial Commodore Lynae Caiton, his former battlefield rival, to ask 'why' their endless war continues. Over caf and wine, Rodriga voices his weariness and frustration that both sides ostensibly fight for the same good, while Lynae argues people are neutral until forced to choose. Pilot Shael Winters, given the cover identity 'Kara Winters' by Rodriga, joins the conversation; they agree to suspend their mutual kill-vendetta for the duration of the talk before Rodriga departs for a meeting.

title: RPlog:Caspar Welcomes Us
summary: Darth Malign (Tyler Damion) and Axel Vichten arrive on Caspar seeking talks with the Caspian Dictatorship Union, but Marine Captain Webb relays through Interim President Thomas Mahon that their request is initially denied. As Malign begins to leave, Mahon reconsiders and accepts a datachip of intelligence (CDU annexation records, fleet movements, and Battle of Cochran data) as a gesture of goodwill while warning against trusting the Jedi. When the Caspian-born Axel angrily denounces Mahon as a usurper and illegitimate ruler, Malign uses the Force to drain Axel's strength and put him to sleep, then departs after securing tentative future contact.

title: RPlog:Casual Conversations in New Alderaan
summary: While touring New Alderaan on Ord Mantell under New Republic guard, former Imperial Commodore Lynae Cassius-Caiton strikes up a conversation with young CDU pilot Gene Malantean while he feeds swans, discussing military life, families on bases, and old Imperial acquaintances. She then encounters arms dealer Rasi Praddhan Cen, swoop racer Shael Winters, and the brash Serenella Jordain in Chianar Plaza, where she delivers a withering lecture to the vain Serenella about armor and wisdom. The scene is largely social, establishing Lynae's status as a watched ex-Imperial moving freely through Republic space.

title: RPlog:Cathedral Factory Tour
summary: As part of the Caspian Wargames at Charros IV, Presav Crestian Tarasar pilots a Lambda shuttle carrying distinguished guests (Grand Moff Elana Tracer, Marshal Axel Vichten, Nara Rhen, and young Atsvara) to the Cathedral Factory of Xi Can. The Xi Charrian councillor ak gives them a tour of the sacred manufacturing complex where Haor Chall Engineering produces AC translation spheres and Mark IV Vulture droids. The group reflects on the Xi Char's recovery after the Clone Wars and the tension between cultural harmony and difference within their hive society.

title: RPlog:Cease-Fire at Sullust
summary: The Galactic Empire has invaded Sullust, capturing the New Republic Star Destroyer Templar (renamed HIMS Magnificent) and blockading the volcanic world while a tense cease-fire holds. When the New Republic fleet attempts to break out, fighting reignites, with Imperial and Republic starfighters dueling amid a graveyard of ships. Captain Mirhoz of the Inquisitor brokers a renewed truce, and Admiral Danik Kreldin orders his forces to stand down, allowing the battered Republic fleet and Sullustan refugees to retreat toward Mon Calamari. The Empire retains control of Sullust at the scene's end.

title: RPlog:Celebration of Truth
summary: Aboard the CMS Reannon Calder, CDU officer Lynae Cassius briefs her hand-picked team (Dug pilot Bakrak, naval officer Sadim Gnik, and droid HM743) as they arrive at Trandosha for a week-long galactic festival celebrating the new Theocratic Republic of Truth under High Priest Tantrix.
