She explains the militant Trandoshan culture and the diplomatic purpose of presenting CDU warriors to the new government. At the Hsskhor starport they pass through a tight Trandoshan security checkpoint, present credentials, are granted ambassadorial small-arms rights, and are directed toward the White Citadel.

title: RPlog:Celestine Cycle - And A Body Hits The Floor
summary: Aboard the luxury liner Celestine, Johanna te Danaan attempts a strained business negotiation with the haughty aristocrat Ailah Vieres while the bounty-hunted former Emperor Darth Malus circles to taunt her. Nearby, Atsvara, Veruca Violet, and Euphoria enjoy a girls' trip, encountering ak and exchanging words with Malus. As Ailah delivers a cutting insult, a corpse crashes through the stained-glass atrium ceiling onto the gambling floor, triggering panic; the ship locks down and security floods in while Malus observes the reactions with delight.

title: RPlog:Celestine Cycle - Rising Tensions
summary: Hours after the body fell through the Celestine's atrium, witnesses including Johanna, Atsvara, Veruca, Euphoria, ak, Darth Malus, and the CSA's Malif Tal-Tahn are corralled into an observation lounge for questioning under deliberately rising heat and tension. The group banters cynically about whether the death was murder while a frazzled security officer summons people for statements. Atsvara needles the staff and defends ak's dignity, Malus muses on interrogation as pattern-finding, and Johanna and ak are escorted off to give their statements first.

title: RPlog:Changed Friends and Near Death
summary: Aboard Kichnar Orbital Station, the smuggler Morganna Tazecks reunites with her changed friend Turk Avid, who provokes her into a violent brawl in the station garden to demonstrate that she remains a slave to her rage. After bitter exchanges over Morganna's Imperial entanglements and her new lover, Avid later nearly drowns saving her from a riptide off the station beach, after which she drags his unconscious body to safety. They recover together at his flat, sharing food and grim talk of killing, and Avid shows off his trophy box of Tusken finger bones before they part.

title: RPlog:Changing The Guard
summary: In the Meltdown Cafe on Nar Shaddaa, a tense night erupts into open warfare when a Sith-backed coup against Grubba the Hutt spills into the bar. Tyler Damion (the Sith Lord Malign, posing as 'Tatooine Bob'), Thanos, Axel Vichten and assorted patrons fight off Grubba's wookiee general Xanzar and waves of Hutt thugs. After bloody close-quarters combat the bar is secured, the wookiee killed, and the group plans to push toward Grubba's palace to install Thanos as the new ruler of the Smuggler's Moon. The scene ends with survivors drinking, treating wounds, and dispersing into the ongoing planet-wide civil war.

title: RPlog:Chanti at a swoop race
summary: On a snowy day at the Marin Mountain Resort swoop track on Caspar, Ernest Pallando wins his swoop heat through the flaming finale. In the spectator tents, Countess Athena Thistleborn observes a tense covert business meeting between ex-Imperial Zeak Oppenheimer and Republic pilot Johanna Siri te Danaan over smuggled items priced at a quarter million per piece. Johanna departs irritated, and Athena reveals to Zeak by drawing the Bureau of Operations symbol in the snow that she recognizes his Imperial COMPNOR affiliation, declining to be paid for her silence.

title: RPlog:Charity Ball
summary: At the Arkanis Sector Children's Relief Fundraiser and Ball in the Royale Hotel's ballroom in Coronet City on Corellia, costumed guests mingle and bid on a silent auction of art, armor, jewelry, and donated curiosities to raise funds for famine relief. Grand Admiral Axel Vichten places proxy bids and departs early; a masked 'Silent Curator' (Lorn Rhys/Malus) probes the identity of 'Starlight' (Lynae Cassius) while dancing with her, and the 'Sexy Red Guard' (Elana Tracer) wins a contested painting against Zubindi Hakoon's Nute Gunray. Crestian Tarasar (as Count Dooku) secures the Blazer family Corellian Rapier and artworks, his daughter Atsvara wins a Nek Battle Dog, and Kasha Tabasuri's carving is bought for a Xi Charrian gallery. The auction closes with generous donations as the festivities continue into the night.

title: RPlog:Chasing Shadows
summary: Having recovered valuable data on Ord Vaxal, Jedi Padawan Ikihsa Enb'Zik and his wife Snarl lift off in their Mantaray fighter Ranger One while Sith battle droids and speeders try to force them back down. A New Republic recon squadron (Falcon/Ghost/Rogue) jumps into the system and clashes with Sith R-41 Starchasers launched from the cloaked capital ship Dark Presence, captained by Cato. Enb'Zik repeatedly urges the NR forces to keep their distance and fall back, eventually breaking through the lines and outrunning all pursuit. Captain Cato ultimately orders the Starchasers to disengage, deliberately allowing the NR pilots to escape so as not to reveal the full strength of Darth Malign's growing shadow fleet.

title: RPlog:Chewbacca Bursts Through the CSA Defenses
summary: Chewbacca, upset after an incident aboard the Hyperion, flies the Millennium Falcon toward Etti IV and ignores all CSA hails. CSA patrol squadrons (Headhunters and IRDs) pursue him and a running starfighter firefight erupts, in which Chewbacca destroys an IRD-A and an entire Headhunter squadron before jumping to lightspeed. He immediately jumps back, lands the Falcon in a meadow near the city, and slips away on foot with his bowcaster as Espo guards swarm the area.

title: RPlog:Chewbacca Returns to Etti IV
summary: An agitated Chewbacca finds Piper (Simone Drake) in Memorial Park after speaking with Kuxli about Kuxli being shot. He angrily confronts her in Wookiee about ordering the shooting, accusing the CSA of behaving like the Empire and abandoning personal freedom. Piper coldly defends her actions as protecting the Authority's interests, and Chewbacca leaves disgusted, pitying the CSA's direction.

title: RPlog:Chewbacca and Roark
summary: In the brig aboard the NRV Hyperon, Jessalyn Valios visits the prisoner Xegid Roark, who reveals a mysterious tall, blue-eyed visitor hinted he could trade information for release and that his lawyer Pike has abandoned him. Chewbacca arrives with guards, declaring Roark is in danger now that Dillon has returned and someone may try to buy off an internal NR agent or threaten Roark's life. Over Roark's reluctant objections, they relocate him to the freighter Black Dragon, setting course for Yavin a few hours away. Jessalyn stays with Roark in the crew quarters, refusing to betray her friends but promising to help him survive.

title: RPlog:Choices
summary: Ten days after a failed raid left New Republic and Imperial survivors stranded together on Dathomir, scout teams report finding three more escape pod sites. At a campfire, NR Lieutenant Wrista Ipex receives a report from a Vultan scout while scarred young pilot Lance 'Wildman' Corbet asks to join the search rotation despite a healing wound. Wrista agrees on conditions that he see a medic, take lighter marches, and report any pain, integrating him into the recovery effort during the uneasy NR-Imperial coexistence.

title: RPlog:Cleared
summary: Senior Agent Drax Rendolen visits Liora Kovani, a former Imperial held as a political prisoner on the New Alderaan military base, for a final debrief. Over caf, Drax counsels her about life after defection, draws on his own Alderaanian past, and confirms she has been cleared by the Jedi and by background and medical checks. He formally welcomes her to the New Republic, grants citizenship, and tells her she is free to go.

title: RPlog:Cochran Invaded
summary: Newly-appointed Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin, still bedridden with a broken back from a recent torture ordeal, leads the Imperial fleet in a surprise dawn assault on the Griffon homeworld of Cochran. Aboard the Star Dreadnought Malevolence, he executes a three-group encirclement (pattern triad) supported by Scimitar bombers and TIE squadrons against the unprepared Griffon home defense fleet. The Griffon flagship GSS Gabriel (a Mako cruiser) is pounded into ruin and makes a final ramming run; the Griffons fight desperately to buy time for civilian evacuation. As the New Republic fleet begins to arrive, the Griffon Black Eagle prepares to retreat and regroup.

title: RPlog:Coffee Talk
summary: Aboard the Red Sky during a diplomatic lull, Doctor Lynae Cassius hosts Darth Malus, freshly released from twenty years of carbonite, lending him a drying tube and sharing caf. Over conversation they debate leadership, rules of engagement, and what defines 'right' and 'wrong.' Lynae reveals her research into a genetic bio-weapon meant to disable the Force-sensitivity 'key' in carriers, and admits she abandoned it to avoid mass murder. The exchange becomes a verbal sparring match as Malus probes her motives, eventually drawing out that Malign took her lab, the true source of her hostility toward the regime.

title: RPlog:Coffee and Conversation
summary: At the Bonadan spaceport, smuggler Jaspar Andromidas meets his employer Zeak Oppenhiemer to report on a completed delivery run and collect his pay. Jaspar recounts being stopped by an Imperial blockade enforced by the Star Destroyer Nemesis, scanned, and escorted in to Caspar, while name-dropping Zeak's group as instructed. The cargo he picked up turns out to be Imperial-themed toy figurines, which ruins Zeak's plan but amuses him, and Zeak pays Jaspar with a bonus for return passage to Nar Shaddaa.

title: RPlog:Coffee and Hydrospanners
summary: On the Ord Mantell flight deck in the early morning, Ghost Squadron pilot 2nd Lieutenant Raxis L'ygr meets Askra Sho'bre, a newly enlisted Bothan mechanic with cybernetic limbs and a foul-mouthed R-5 droid named Tinker. Over coffee they discuss starfighters, her Nar Shadda past, the Empire, and the Jedi while Askra inspects and realigns the laser cannons on Raxis's X-Wing (Ghost 3). Raxis helps her with paperwork issues and welcomes her aboard before being paged to launch on a sortie.

title: RPlog:Come What May
summary: At the Union Starport on Caspar, Jedi-in-training Ikihsa Enb'Zik arrives in his starfighter Ranger One with the dangerous Force-sensitive Arissa Kiiko, hoping Luke Skywalker will take her on as a Jedi student. Unbeknownst to Enb'Zik, Arissa is secretly stalking Lynae Cassius as a target while a Nightsister spirit in her mind urges her to kill. Lynae, on planet for Caspian survival training, greets Enb'Zik warmly, recognizes Arissa from a prior Imperial Gala encounter, and privately warns Enb'Zik to stay armed and alert because she judges Arissa dangerous; the scene ends as Enb'Zik must leave to take a priority comm.

title: RPlog:Comfort Among Beasts
summary: Aboard the Imperial Orbital Station Guardian, Morganna Tazecks spars verbally with Captain Labatiel Atrox while delivering an Admiral's daughter and waiting to refuel. A CSA man named Mekeal is arrested on the deck while they talk. Their hostile banter gives way to a raw, confused emotional confrontation in which both admit feelings for one another despite being smuggler and Imperial captain, before each retreats behind their cold public personas.

title: RPlog:Coming In From The Cold - Part 2
summary: Drax Rendolen wakes in Doctor Lynae Cassius' medbay aboard the Red Sky and discusses options for replacing his lost arm. Two of Cassius' own security guards, Coleman and Kretzman, are revealed as Sith sleeper agents activated by the presence of both former Malign associates, and they open fire shouting that the Sith never forget. Drax and Cassius fight and kill both attackers, with Cassius taking a graze wound. Afterward Drax confides his fears about a Sith text and his corrupted identity, and Cassius, the self-described 'butcher of Cochran,' urges him to consider Jedi help and to take recovery one step at a time.

title: RPlog:Coming Unglued
summary: At the Selene starport, Imperial pilot Lt. Krieg Inrokana, near his breaking point under stress and hatred for the Jedi, vents a venomous tirade to Lt. Commander Jal'Dana Rall, whom he doesn't initially recognize. Rall calmly counsels and then orders him to stay away from the Jedi Ai'kani and clear his head before returning to duty, warning he is a danger to his squadron. Grand Admiral Kreldin arrives separately to prepare for Selene Day, and Seifer Wolf appears, defusing the confrontation.

title: RPlog:Commander Brand Petitions for Pirates
summary: In a private meeting at the New Alderaan government complex, Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard updates Commander Argon Brand on suspected forced Wookiee labor by Rendili and the Trandoshan Bloodclaw clan's slaving. Argon pitches a privateer/letter-of-marque scheme to enlist private ship owners against Imperial shipping and slavers in exchange for pardons. They discuss funding rival Trandoshan clans and possibly recruiting the wealthy, troubled General Johanna te Danaan, agreeing Argon will quietly sound out the idea and the Admiral.

title: RPlog:Common Thread
summary: In Fountain Square on Caspar, former Imperial doctor Lynae Cassius meets Doctor Xar'on Tanner, whose banned medical research she had studied during her Imperial career. Tanner, a defector who quit the Empire after they tried to weaponize his comparative-physiology work, confronts her over how the Empire abused such research, then urges her to stop being an administrator/officer and return to simply being a healer. He hands her a datachip with a surgical procedure plan for a patient and asks her to review it, ending on a note of mentorship and reconciliation.

title: RPlog:Commute
summary: Eleven hours into a grueling nighttime trek through the jungle of Ord Vaxal, Jedi Padawan Enb'Zik and his Horansi wife Snarl evade Sith battle droids hunting them after their earlier attack. Enb'Zik plants thermal decoy generators in a hollow tree to mislead the droids while he plots a route into the layered penal city of Tof Soren via storm drains and bluffs. The droids, equipped with sensors and linked to a central unit, methodically quarter the search area and close on heat signatures, having already captured dissenting citizens. The scene ends with the pair pausing two kilometers from the city as the droids continue their approach; it continues in a second part.

title: RPlog:Commute, part 2
summary: On a jungle world near the layered penal-colony city of Tof Soren, Jedi adept Enb'Zik and his Horansi wife Snarl evade Sith battle droids that are methodically sweeping the forest and conducting orbital bombardment to flush them out. Enb'Zik explains his plan to infiltrate Old Soren via storm drains rather than scaling exposed bluffs. They locate a hidden ferrocrete drain cover, drop into the tunnel pulling it back over themselves, and Enb'Zik uses the Living Force to rapidly grow vegetation over their entry point to hide their trail while the droids converge on their abandoned position.

title: RPlog:Complicated Motivations
summary: At a lavish coronation fete aboard the KDY Spaceview above Selene, the New Order's elite gather to honor the newly crowned Imperator Tyler Damion (Darth Malign). Crestian Tarasar works the room on behalf of Caspar's relief Mission while planting falsified donation records; the Falleen Nasiri Gejalli mingles for profit; and Johanna te Danaan, simmering with rage over her brother's open seizure of power, nearly attacks Malign before her son Etiel defuses the confrontation. Malign elevates swoop-racing magnate Elana Tracer to Moff of Selene and CEO of KDY-SFS, tasking her with renegotiating the Empire's relationship with the embezzler-run CSA.

title: RPlog:Confrontation
summary: Lured aboard the corvette Kolier by a threat to her cousin's life, Twila Virda confronts the Imperial Moff Bailey Sora Laran, who interrogates her about Gren Delede, the Caspar Defense Force, and Maffi contacts while holding the cousin in an atmospheric suit on a tether outside the ship. Twila refuses to answer, and Bailey appears to vent the cousin into vacuum before restoring her air, leaving the woman critically injured and likely blinded. Bailey claims she actually fought for Twila's freedom and gave her soul for it; Twila rejects her, takes the injured cousin to a waiting medical team, and a bitter new enmity is forged.

title: RPlog:Confrontation with Morganna
summary: While evading lingering Imperials in the Twi'lek District of Nar Shaddaa, Jessalyn Valios (disguised as Annalar) and Orson Tighe (as Fritz-Orson) sense and then confront the Sith Morganna Tazecks at a weapons stall. Morganna telekinetically chokes Orson and hurls a Force-conjured fireball at Jessalyn, burning her hand, while urging the pair to join the Dark Side. Both ignite their lightsabers and press her from two sides; Orson fights with newfound skill, deflecting Morganna's claw attacks and a thrown Twi'lek. Outmatched two-on-one, Morganna retreats into the crowd, and the wounded pair flee through the alleys back toward their ship to warn Karrde.

title: RPlog:Connections, Communications, Comfort, and Conflict
summary: Aboard the Black Dragon on Palanhi, an exhausted Paul Nighman wakes and accidentally hits on the young Shenner, then tries to make amends. He buys her a new silver flute to replace the one ruined when he stranded her, and they bond over a music lesson and jam session in the starport. He spars verbally with Han Solo and warns him the dark Jedi Alora is on Palanhi, sending Han storming off. Paul's attempt to console a heartbroken Jessalyn over Luke Skywalker backfires when his harsh advice drives her away, and he ends the night getting drunk at the hotel casino.

title: RPlog:Considering Delede's Offer
summary: Aboard the NRCV Audacity near Nar Shaddaa, Luke Skywalker convenes New Republic military leaders to debate Colonel Gren Delede's offer of a joint CSA-NR strike on Darth Malign's Star Destroyer. Major Kyrin Sh'vani, the Horansi Marine Snarl, XO Kesander Beysarus, and Flight Cadet Doherty weigh the risks of trusting a CSA officer, fears of betrayal, and the strategic value of harming Malign versus uprooting the Hutts. The group reaches no firm decision but agrees that more intelligence is needed, resolving to gather scans, call in Falcon Squadron, and approach Admiral Farnsworth for additional fleet assets.

title: RPlog:Conundrum
summary: In a quiet Chalmon's Cantina on Tatooine, the Toydarian Zergo (who slips and nearly reveals his real name, Polly) drinks heavily while wrestling with whether to stay tied to a group of difficult 'associates' or strike out on his own. The bartender, Shem, offers homespun advice that the devil you know may be better than the devil you don't, and that even people using you can be useful in return. Zergo references two infamous pirate-talking spacers (a Quarren and a Mon Cal) whom Shem recognizes, and leaves credits to buy them drinks. Zergo decides to stay with his associates and flaps off, declining to call them friends.

title: RPlog:Conversation with a Verpine
summary: While people-watching in Fountain Square in Plaxton City on Caspar, the Jedi Jessalyn Valios reconnects with Vzzee, a Verpine salesbeing and technician for the Rendili Shipyards. Her companion Orson Tighe, a fellow ship mechanic, joins them and surprises the trio by greeting Vzzee in the Verpine language. The conversation centers on ship technology, Rendili's Kale Light Cruiser and trade-in offers, and a joking exchange about whether to replace Orson's beloved YT-1300, the Uwannabuyim. They part as new friends and head off to an appointment.

title: RPlog:Conversations Act1
summary: At the Sandbar on Caspar, ex-Imperial doctor Lynae Cassius confronts her friend Keifan (Antoine Dareus) over his heavy drinking and use of the drug andriss, and tries to talk him out of a dangerous new venture targeting the Maffi organization. Their tense conversation, overheard by patron Jamon Grendine, reveals both are former Imperials now exiled after swearing oaths on Corellia. Lynae suffers a violent medical seizure tied to her implanted punishment device and collapses; Keifan stabilizes her with a sedative injection on the floor of the bar.

title: RPlog:Conversations Act2
summary: At the Sandbar cantina on Caspar, the dying former Imperial doctor Lynae Caiton, fitted with a lethal pacemaker device as punishment, confesses her past to Jedi pilot Johanna Damion. Lynae admits she aided in the torture of Brandis Finian and his mate Kyrin under Malign's orders, and Johanna presses her to admit genuine guilt and contrition. Recognizing Lynae's regret, Johanna offers her a chance at survival by relocating and traveling with her, and possibly seeking surgical help from Brandis Finian.

title: RPlog:Conversations Act3
summary: Continuing at the Sandbar on Caspar, the Sith Darth Malign (Tyler Damion) arrives as the Empire's new Ambassador and confronts his Jedi sister Johanna and the dying former Imperial Lynae Caiton. Malign mockingly probes the group with the Force, calls Lynae a coward for fleeing her post, and threatens to torment her existence, while Lynae defiantly defends free will and the Caspian way over the Empire. Brandis Finian arrives to assess whether Lynae is worth saving, and President Mahon's Presidential Guard escort him in; Mahon declares Malign persona non grata as the Sith departs.

title: RPlog:Conversations Act4
summary: Aboard a bar on Caspian-held territory, the former Imperial physician Lynae Cassius (Caiton) pleads with Jedi healer Brandis Finian to remove a lethal device implanted in her chest by the Empire. After a tense exchange about her past atrocities and whether she has truly changed, Brandis extracts a promise of a future favor and uses the Force to heal her damaged heart, agreeing to later perform surgery to remove the device. Lynae offers him accommodations, which he declines, preferring to remain aboard his ship for a quick getaway.

title: RPlog:Convincing Sel To Talk To Her Mother
summary: Aboard the Angry Rancor, Lila and the Twi'lek engineer Ka'una La corner Serenella Jordain in Captain Bruno's ready room. They gently press her to consider visiting her estranged mother on Vorzyd V, both to introduce her daughter Tara and to learn the identity of her unknown father. Ka'una shares her own story of fleeing her abusive parents on Ryloth to build rapport. Serenella reluctantly agrees to make the trip as pilot for Ka'una's cargo run, and Ka'una smooth-talks Captain Bruno into approving the vacation.

title: RPlog:Convoy Assault and Capture
summary: A New Republic strike force of sixteen starfighters and two marine-laden shuttles, led by Raxis 'Raptor' L'ygr and Lance 'Wildman' Corbet, ambushes an Imperial convoy of four freighters escorted by the CR90 Visceral. Marshal Krieg Inrokana and pilot Liza 'Slush' Molokai launch TIEs and engage the attackers in a prolonged dogfight while Y-wings and A-wings disable freighters. The New Republic disables two freighters and captures them with boarding marines, though one freighter escapes to hyperspace; Krieg's fighter is disabled by Lance and recovered by the corvette's tractor beam before the Imperials withdraw.

title: RPlog:Convoy Lost
summary: The New Republic launches a larger fleet raid against an Imperial convoy escorted by two Neutron Star-class bulk cruisers carrying Marshal Krieg Inrokana and Captain Keline Nelhrn. NR commander Gren Delede directs Mon Calamari cruisers and the corvette Diligence (with Twila Virda) while Kyrin Sh'vani, Raxis L'ygr, and Lance Corbet lead fighter squadrons; eight Action VI transports arrive as the real prize. After a heavy capital-ship and fighter slugfest, the Empire loses one bulk cruiser and all eight freighters to the New Republic, while Krieg disables and forces the ejection of Raxis before the surviving Imperial cruiser retreats to Carida.

title: RPlog:Corellia-Bound
summary: Aboard the NRSC Rapier, Commander Rasi Cen and Senator Tokoga brief newly arrived Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard on the New Republic's plan to help Corellian resistance cells liberate the planet from the Empire. They explain that CEC shipyard strikes sparked militant revolutionary groups that lack coordination, and that the NR aims to win their trust and unify them. Delgard agrees to join the mission, dons a disguise, and the party prepares to depart by shuttle to meet a resistance cell planetside.

title: RPlog:Corellia Corellia
summary: Retired Imperial Navy pilot Antoine Dareus reconnects with CorSec Twi'lek Twila Virda at the Coronet City spaceport, where ISB Director Korynn Fleming conducts a brutal lockdown and arrest of rebel-sympathizer teenagers. The group relocates to the Smuggler's Dig Cantina, where Dareus drinks heavily and gets into a tense verbal sparring match with embittered ex-Imperial pilot Gren Delede over the Empire, the Navy, and Grand Admiral Danik. Dareus reveals his disgraced past (five years on Kessel, demoted to Ensign) and his darker ambitions, while Imperial pilot Seifer Wolf storms out, contemplating killing Delede. The scene ends with Dareus shattering his glass in rage and a tearful Twila feeling their friendship is over.

title: RPlog:Corellia Prison Break
summary: At Coronet City Spaceport on Corellia, distant explosions draw CorSec away just as a prison transport shuttle is hijacked and thirteen armed prisoners spill out seeking a ship to steal. Prime Minister Dash Blazer deputizes the bystanders, and Presav Crestian Tarasar, Imperator Tyler Damion, Moff Liza Molokai, mechanics Selko and Druze, the Horansi Kasha, and others fight the escapees. After a chaotic skirmish the prisoners are subdued one by one; Blazer is shot but survives, and Crestian suspects a coordinated plot behind the breakout.

title: RPlog:Corellian Craziness
summary: At Coronet Space Port on Corellia, Simon Sezirok, Markus Lisardis, and Mira Isaria are about to depart when NRI Major Bazil McKenzie, intrigued by Simon's lightstaff, approaches and reveals he knows where Luke Skywalker is. As they negotiate, the wife of Senator Jrevelian, Kathryn McGuire, is kidnapped by a rogue 'driver' and the group commandeers Bazil's hoverlimo to pursue the fleeing sedan alongside CorSec, NRI, and the senator's escort. Simon leaps from the airborne limo, slices open the doomed sedan with his lightstaff, and saves Kathryn using the True Source while Markus crashes the limo. Battered and with cracked ribs all around, the survivors escape the exploding wreck, and Bazil agrees to take them to see Skywalker the next day.

title: RPlog:Corellian Craziness Aftermath
summary: At the Coronet spaceport, the exiled Telgosse hunter Simon, the Corellian pilot Markus, and the strange girl Mira regroup after a chaotic speeder chase, all nursing broken ribs. The undercover intelligence agent Bazil McKenzie, posing as a backworld shipping captain named 'Mege Vauki', offers to fly them to Coruscant to meet Luke Skywalker, while the wary Wroonian trader Daana Roon nearly triggers a standoff before being talked down. The group departs Corellia for Coruscant, with Bazil arranging a stay on a quiet monk-inhabited mountain and Simon and Markus bonding over their pasts during the flight.

title: RPlog:Corellian Slave Liberation
summary: A New Republic Marine team, disguised as animal-control workers, infiltrates the Coronet City Spaceport to help Corellian rebels free 50 sedated slaves bound for Kessel aboard an Imperial freighter. When ISB agents detain the deserter Galatea and the cover blows, a chaotic firefight erupts; Marines Stail and Handon trade fire with COMPNOR troopers while Vengan flash-bangs his way in to rescue Galatea, the two escaping through a sewage pipe. The rebels seize the freighter and flee, but Marine Shael is gunned down on the tarmac and four slaves are left behind, and the captured YT-2400 narrowly escapes into hyperspace under TIE and assault-shuttle pursuit led by Liza Molokai.

title: RPlog:Coreshan and Morganna
summary: In the Blue Nebula cantina on Kichnar Orbital Station, Morganna's old friend Coreshan confronts her after deducing she has been working for the Empire and reported him to Imperial authorities. He recounts his own past of Imperial atrocities to appeal to her, but she coldly insists she is irredeemably evil. The standoff escalates to drawn weapons in public before they move to the station gardens, where Morganna fires a stun bolt at him; Coreshan escapes into the foliage, calling out that he still cares for her as she flees in tears.

title: RPlog:Coronation Pre-Game
summary: On Selene during the festivities preceding the coronation of Sonja Damion as heir to the Imperium and Hapan thrones, the long-imprisoned smuggler-turned-Sith-Thane Axel Vichten resurfaces after a decade in isolation aboard a secret prison ship. Sith acolyte Aeron Corvus intercepts him and brings him before Imperator Darth Malign, Grand Moff Elana Tracer, and Caspian Presav Crestian Tarasar. Malign expunges Axel's crimes, declares him a citizen of both the Imperium and Caspian Union, and offers resources to aid him; Axel reveals he was held aboard transport ISG-3329 on the orders of Thomas Mahon and vows vengeance against impostors calling themselves the Olumi Osahn. Tracer and Crestian arrange a ship and medical care, and Axel departs to rest, having already released a holonet video.

title: RPlog:Courtesy
summary: In the Starlight Gardens cafe on New Alderaan, Direx trustee Zeak Oppenhiemer meets a still-recovering Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard for an off-the-record discussion of CSAS relief shipments to Caspar. They negotiate around the aid flotilla composition, the role of Imperial schemer Aldus Thel, and pirates Delgard secretly paid to harass Imperial shipments. Lt Amaya Halos stumbles upon them and joins; Delgard agrees to call off her pirate contacts in exchange for Zeak steering the Direx away from sending Star Destroyers.

title: RPlog:Crashlanding!
summary: Aboard the shuttle Sanguine Raptor approaching Caspar, the inexperienced Mira pilots while Simon, equally unfamiliar with ships, grows alarmed at a burning smell and the dangerously steep descent. Neither knows how to land, and a panicked struggle over the controls sends the shuttle careening out of control across Plaxton City. The shuttle clips the FLS tower and crashes into the Imperial Embassy's rooftop landing pad; miraculously both survive unhurt though the ship is destroyed.

title: RPlog:Crestian's Condolences
summary: Crestian Tarasar, leader of the Caspian Union, contacts the Jedi Jessalyn Valios over a communications channel to inform her privately, before the news goes public, that Basca Starker is dead and his body was delivered to them. He also reveals that the body was brought in by Basca's brother Marius Starker, who knew Jessalyn and intended to seek her out. Jessalyn, grieving but composed, asks Crestian to pass along her condolences and word that she looks forward to meeting Marius again, while pointedly noting she has not forgotten Crestian's prior unkindness toward her.

title: RPlog:Crew of the Black Dragon
summary: Aboard the YT-1300 Black Dragon following the escape from Palanhi, the crew tends to the recovering Jessalyn Valios and the wounded Luke Skywalker, whose hand is being repaired by medic Amylynn Starr. Paul Nighman and the young Shenner comfort Jessalyn, who is emotionally torn over her unrequited feelings for Luke and her belief that nothing can come of them. The mood lightens into a pillow fight and a music session in which Paul plays guitar and sings an original song while Shenner accompanies on flute. Luke wakes, and he and the others invite Shenner, Amylynn, and the rest to join the New Republic.

title: RPlog:Cry Baby, Cry
summary: Pirate Shiari Vane ambushes an Imperial convoy of four Action IV freighters escorted by the Carrack cruiser Vulture. Lying in wait powered-down aboard the Crimson Lightning, she broadcasts a fake distress call that lures the Vulture away on a micro-jump, then opens fire on the convoy's TIE escort and boards the central freighter. Her crew fights through the freighter, stunning the captain, while the returning Vulture trades ineffectual fire with the agile Lightning; Vane then jumps the seized Action VI to lightspeed, leaving the Imperials behind.

title: RPlog:Culture on Myrkr
summary: At Talon Karrde's base on Myrkr, the Jedi Jessalyn Valios returns from a swim and tells the mechanic Orson Tighe that she has decided to begin training him as a Jedi. Their conversation is interrupted by the intelligence operative Declan Rahn, with whom Orson bonds over a shared love of opera and theatre, including the propaganda piece The Agony of Tarkin commissioned by Palpatine. Orson enthusiastically proposes staging a play to bring culture to the base and casts Declan in a role. The exchange touches on Jessalyn's painful memories of having been on the Yavin side of the first Death Star's attack.

title: RPlog:Cup o Caf at Starlight Studios
summary: New Republic Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard visits holo-producer Ewan Dain at the Starlight Studios offices on Ord Mantell's New Alderaan, following a professional favor she pulled on his behalf with NRI. Over caf, Dain discusses his uncertain standing with New Republic Intelligence and pitches the idea of producing truthful pro-Republic films and a tourism documentary series called Galaxy Tours. Ambrosia advises showcasing the galaxy's diverse beauty to counter xenophobia and reflects wistfully on worlds like Chandrila, Corellia, and Caspar. Dain gifts her his contact card, a yacht-party invitation, and two concert tickets for her daughter Gabi as thanks.

title: RPlog:Dangerous Decisions
summary: On Mon Calamari, Paul Nighman returns to the NR barracks where Shenneret Veery is fretting over her decision to join the New Republic under General Calhoun rather than pursue music. Paul gives Shenner a voice lesson that grows emotionally charged, then steps out to comfort an exhausted Jessalyn Valios, who reveals she must flee to Yavin. Resolving not to repeat his own past heartbreak, Paul returns and offers Shenner a place at his side, ultimately kissing her and committing to give a relationship a try despite his deep misgivings.

title: RPlog:Dangerous Games
summary: Lord Geophreigh Smitherbodkins IV hosts a Corellian-themed sabacc tournament at Kartathia Manor in Coronet City, drawing a mix of Imperials, gamblers, and rough characters. The senior COMPNOR official Giles Pendleton joins the high-stakes table alongside Smitherbodkins, Harmon, and the disguised Corellian agent Alac Y'all. Mid-game, Alac suddenly draws a concealed DL-44 blaster and shoots Giles Pendleton dead at point-blank range, then flees through a prepared escape route, fighting off COMPNOR guards on his way out. Imperial troops arrive late, secure Pendleton's body, and the host smoothly manages the aftermath as the chamberlain Mara Shinomiya makes a grand late entrance.

title: RPlog:Dangerous to Redheads
summary: Aboard the Black Dragon, Luke Skywalker, Jessalyn Valios, and the young Shenner await the smuggler Grathix to help rescue Han Solo. When Luke leaves to find Grathix, he asks Jessalyn to talk to Shenner, having already sensed through the Force that Shenner is secretly a girl disguised as a boy. Shenner breaks down in tears and confides her fear, while Jessalyn comforts her and reveals her own anguish over her feelings for Luke. Luke returns, gently acknowledges he frightens both women, and the scene ends with both redheads shaken and Shenner fleeing the ship.

title: RPlog:Danik's Trap
summary: On Chandrila, a New Republic-backed insurgency led by Ridge Archilles and Fenn Khor attempts to raid an Imperial prison disguised as stormtroopers, supported by Republic marines, artillery (trebuchets), and a commando in assault armor. Thanks to the defector Fenn Khor, Danik Kreldin has set an ambush: the prison's E-web emplacements and hidden stormtroopers spring the trap inside the security corridor. A bloody battle erupts as the rebels try to escape; many are killed, Imperial TIE bombers and fighters strike the artillery site, and the prison complex is left in ruins with casualties near triple digits. The rebels are forced to surrender or retreat, and Danik plans to use captured rebels as bait for Luke Skywalker.

title: RPlog:Danik and Sandor Talk
summary: Aboard the Malevolence, Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin interrogates the captured defector Sandor Woden, a former Imperial soldier who turned to the New Republic out of love for the Jedi Ai'kani. Kreldin alternately pleads, threatens, and attacks with his Corellian Rapier, trying to coax Woden back into the Empire and revealing his own newfound Dark Side power. Woden refuses, declaring he fights for Ai'kani even at the cost of his life. Kreldin reveals he has lured Ai'kani to come rescue Woden as a trap, then ends the conversation over brandy and has Woden taken to a cell.

title: RPlog:Danik vs Ai'kani
summary: Using the captive Sandor Woden as bait, Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin lures the Jedi Padawan Ai'kani Za'netra to the Moff's Office on Selene, intending to capture or kill her as a gift for his Sith master. Ai'kani surrenders her lightsaber on arrival, and Kreldin duels her with his Corellian Rapier as she fights back with his backup sword. She tricks the guards into opening the doors, recovers her lightsaber, severs two stormtroopers' hands, and frees Woden, while a humiliated Kreldin flees to his shuttle. Ai'kani and Woden battle their way down through reinforcements and escape by leaping onto a transport, badly wounded but alive.

title: RPlog:Danik vs Sandor
summary: Aboard the Imperial star destroyer HIMS Conqueror, Danik Kreldin reunites with the returned veteran Wescal Cantrell and meets the newly promoted Sergeant Major Sandor Woden in the recreation deck. After Cantrell and Woden show off marksmanship on the firing range, Danik proposes a sparring match that turns into a no-holds-barred brawl between him and Sandor, with stun blasts, knives, and tackles. The aging Danik ultimately wins by getting a vibro-knife to Sandor's throat but spares him, lecturing the young sniper about war, death, and his own demons before naval guards arrive to detain Sandor.

title: RPlog:Dareus Meets A Doppelganger
summary: Luke Skywalker, meditating aboard his ship far outside Tatooine, projects a fully solid Force-illusion doppelganger of himself onto the Sith flagship HIMS Predator to conduct reconnaissance. The doppelganger confronts the Sith captain Antoine Dareus, debates dark-side philosophy, and deliberately provokes combat to study the ship's hidden droid army. Dareus eventually 'defeats' and captures the puppet, only for it (and Luke's lightsaber) to dissolve into nothing, revealing he had been fooled while Luke gathered intelligence on the Predator's true droid capacity. Luke then orders his real ship to jump to hyperspace, untracked.

title: RPlog:Dark Wedding
summary: Aboard the ship Purple Haze, in a chamber dedicated to the Caspian shadow-god Olum, Captain Axel Vichten serves as high priest to wed Naval officer Antoine Dareus and Serenella Jordain in a dark cult ritual. With Serenella's sister Inanna and the Sarian woman Lila looking on, Axel performs a handfasting that binds the couple's hands around an obsidian dagger, lights ceremonial candles to Olum, and has them exchange vows (Serenella singing a song instead of speaking). Axel then cuts both their palms to mingle their blood in a chalice, ignites the wine to seal their souls, and pronounces them husband and wife.

title: RPlog:Dathomir Ambush Brief
summary: Aboard the HIMS Inquisitor, Marshal Krieg Inrokana and his XO Keline Nelhrn brief Task Force Inquisitor commanders on a planned ambush at Dathomir. They reveal the depot is bait: the New Republic intends to raid it with Nebulon-B frigates and the Ghost and Falcon squadrons, and the Imperials will lure them in, then jump in Interdictors, I2SDs, and the HIMS Malevolence to envelop and annihilate the rebel force, allowing only one crippled CR90 to escape. Afterward ISB Agent Dorian Navtilos privately hands Krieg a decrypted transcription recovered from a captured rebel TIE pilot's datapad.

title: RPlog:Dathomir Raid
summary: A New Republic strike force, joined by VSC mercenaries, raids what they believe is a lightly defended Imperial container depot over Dathomir, successfully boarding and capturing the guarding CR90 corvette. The raid is a trap: Marshal Krieg Inrokana flies disguised in an unmarked TIE while Task Force Inquisitor, including two Imperial Star Destroyers, a Victory destroyer, and flanking Interdictor cruisers, drops out of hyperspace to envelop the attackers, with the SSD Malevolence sealing the deep-space escape route. The Republic fleet is largely annihilated, Captain Racknar's frigates make a suicidal charge, and several ships and the captured corvette are forced down onto Dathomir's surface. The Empire wins decisively, though three damaged corvettes escape.

title: RPlog:Day At The Cantina
summary: At the Cat's Claw Cantina on New Alderaan, Senator Tokoga is quietly investigating rumors that Nass' criminal syndicate is regaining strength when he, Myiari, Shane, Rainer, and Brek all coincidentally cross paths. Rainer (the disguised spacer) joins Tokoga and Myiari while Shane senses he recognizes Rainer's voice but cannot place it. The scene's recorded portion is partial; an editorial note explains the second half was lost, but states Rainer agreed to supply Tokoga with information on Nass' operations for payment.

title: RPlog:Daybreak
summary: Aboard the Hawk's Wing, Paul Nighman nurses a badly hung-over Ariana Millikin the morning after she drank herself sick over her troubled relationship with Talon Karrde. He cleans her up, gives her a sobering remedy, and lets her shower while reiterating his offer to make her a partner in a treasure-hunting venture on Anthaniss. Their conversation escalates into a painful confrontation: Paul accuses Karrde of manipulating her and suggests she is obsessed rather than loved, prompting Ariana to defend her lover and ultimately leave undecided, promising to send her answer.

title: RPlog:Deal with the Falleen
summary: On Nar Shaddaa, the Jedi Jessalyn Valios visits Nasiri Gejalli, the Falleen Lorda of Rive Ga'uche, in his Goetia Garden to seek sanctuary for her endangered family. She explains that the arrival of Malign's fleet at Bespin and the involvement of the Caspian Union have left her with nowhere safe to turn, not even New Republic space. Nasiri offers a fortified building under his protection, asking no questions, in exchange for a single unspecified future favor, which Jessalyn agrees to with the caveat that it must fit her Jedi conscience. The deal is sealed and Nasiri invites her family to dinner once they are settled.

title: RPlog:Death Sentence for a Padawan
summary: After recovering from a head wound, coma, and awakening to his Force sensitivity, an enraged Tyy'sun Eson visits captured Jedi Padawan Ai'kani in the holding cells of the Black Sun asteroid base Demonspine. He chokes and strikes her, raging over her team's attack on him and his claim on the child Yejide as his daughter. Tyy'sun pronounces a death sentence on Ai'kani, ordering the mute agent Vaelyn to clothe her in a funeral shroud, blindfold and bind her for transport. Vaelyn tends the malnourished padawan and dresses her for death as Tyy'sun departs to prepare his ship for Trandosha.

title: RPlog:Death of Orson Tighe
summary: On a Nar Shaddaa landing pad, the fledgling Jedi mechanic Orson Tighe confronts the fallen Selas acolyte Simon Sezirok in a duel to the death. The two trade lightsaber blows and Force mind-attacks, with Simon physically transforming into a horned monster as he draws on the dark side. Orson eventually impales Simon with an extended light-lance, but the dying Simon uses his last strength to cut Orson down diagonally with his lightstaff, killing him as well. Both combatants die, with Orson finding peace and his identity as a Jedi in death.

title: RPlog:Death of Sabbathius Osbourne
summary: Luke Skywalker lands his X-Wing aboard the Dark Lord Sabbath's corvette Ummagumma to rescue the captive Jessalyn Valios. Sabbath tries to provoke Luke to anger, shoots at Jessalyn (Luke deflects the bolt), then throws his lightsaber, severing Luke's prosthetic right hand; Luke runs Sabbath through with his saber. As the mortally wounded Sabbath detonates a self-destruct device, Luke and Jessalyn escape just before the Ummagumma explodes, then dock with the Black Dragon where Leia, Lando, Tacra and Tand tend to their wounds.

title: RPlog:Death of a Jedi
summary: In a holding cell aboard the Super Star Destroyer Malevolence, Director Ysanne Isard, Commander Wallas Thurl, and Sith Warlord Vassily Korolov discuss the imprisoned Luke Skywalker, whose Force connection is suppressed by ysalamiri-like creatures. Rather than stage an elaborate double, Isard releases a debilitating gas and personally executes Skywalker with a borrowed blaster as he refuses to recognize Imperial authority. She then severs his artificial hand as a trophy and orders the body taken to the incinerator.

title: RPlog:Death of a Planet
summary: In the space above Cochran, Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin's Imperial fleet has decimated the Griffons Alliance and is engaging the retreating New Republic 2nd Fleet. Admiral Moralis Rodriga parleys with the bedridden Kreldin, securing a ceasefire that lets Imperial ground troops evacuate in exchange for lowering a gravity well so the Republic fleet can escape. Once his troops are aboard, Kreldin treacherously orders a Base Delta Zero, and the fleet (including Captain Lynae Cassius-Caiton aboard the VSD Malignant) begins systematically bombarding Cochran into a molten dead world, killing civilians and military alike. Republic fighters scatter and flee as the Imperial March plays over the comms in celebration of total victory.

title: RPlog:Death of an Imperial
summary: Imperial Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin flies his signature crimson TIE Interceptor Black Star I into the battle over Coruscant, escorting bomber runs against the NRSD Monarch while tormented by Dark Side voices. New Republic flight leader Kyrin Sh'vani (callsign Phoenix) leads Ghost, Falcon, and Dagger squadron elements against him. With his damaged fighter's controls failing, Kreldin is overwhelmed and his Black Star I is destroyed, killing the legendary admiral. Both sides honor the dead as the New Republic withdraws and the Imperials recover Kreldin's remains for burial.

title: RPlog:Death of the Dimlyn Titan
summary: This page is only a redirect to 'RPlog:Death of the Dimlyn Titan IV' and contains no scene content of its own.

title: RPlog:Death of the Dimlyn Titan IV
summary: Guided by a Force vision, Jessalyn Valios and Orson Tighe arrive at a starship graveyard and board the abandoned Old Republic warship Dimlyn Titan IV. Aboard, Orson confesses he cannot leave his past behind, breaking Jessalyn's heart, which sends her spiraling into despair and a fall to the dark side. Simon Sezirok attacks and fights both Orson and a darkened Jessalyn while the collapsing ship is torn apart; Jessalyn nearly chokes Simon to death but is shown a vision of his redemption and relents. Mira and Markus (Cronos) recover the mysterious Force-glowing brass object Jessalyn found, and the party escapes as the ancient ship finally dies, with Jessalyn fleeing aboard Simon's ship rather than returning to Orson.

title: RPlog:Declan and the Jedi
summary: During an evening walk around Talon Karrde's compound on Myrkr, Jessalyn Valios and Drew Carvallo encounter Declan Rahn working at a data terminal. Declan questions Jessalyn about her life before becoming a Jedi, revealing she was a Corellian Flight Academy technician for the New Republic before discovering the Force at age twenty-five. The conversation turns philosophical as Declan, a former Imperial whose family once funded the Jedi Council, argues the galaxy would be better off without Force-wielders controlling it, while Jessalyn defends the Jedi as protectors rather than rulers.

title: RPlog:Deep Space Skirmish
summary: Two New Republic pilots, Lance 'Wildman' Corbet (X-Wing) and Marl 'Gambit' Jace (A-Wing), on a deep-space patrol encounter a Sith ambush after a Corellian Corvette is destroyed. Darth Malign engages Lance in a dogfight while his apprentice Vectus duels Marl. The fight ends inconclusively: Malign loses interest, Marl jumps away to safety, and Lance bugs out under Sith orders to regroup at Ord Grovner, leaving the lone X-wing to flee.

title: RPlog:Defense of Farlex
summary: The New Republic invades the Imperial-held mining planet Farlex, having seized space and most of the surface, leaving the capital Morai as the Empire's last stand. Danik Kreldin, having taken command after Major General Paulusi's death, fortifies the city with trenches, mines, booby traps, snipers (Sandor Woden), and a frequency-tuned siren that incapacitates non-human Republic troops. Captain Snal'Fashtalli leads the Republic ground assault on multiple gates while Pathfinders under Evir Yissik and others breach from the north. Despite brutal house-to-house fighting, civilian human-wave tactics, and Imperial air support, the northern gate falls and the Imperials retreat toward the plaza for a final stand; the scene ends noting the New Republic would go on to victory.

title: RPlog:Departing Myrkr
summary: Jessalyn Valios, Orson Tighe, and Simon Sezirok finally leave Myrkr aboard the Uwannabuyim, bound for Corellia, and feel the Force return to them after the planet's Force-dampening environment. Simon discovers Orson's nascent Force sensitivity and is hurt that Jessalyn kept it secret, accusing her of distrust. The three discuss training Orson and the differences between the Jedi and Selas understandings of the Force, while Simon and Jessalyn share an intimate Force-bond moment as he tentatively trusts her to touch his mind.

title: RPlog:Depot Lost
summary: A New Republic strike force, supported by the VSC's Gren and Twila Delede, raids the Imperial-guarded Talasea civilian depot just as Marshal Krieg Inrokana arrives by shuttle to assess it. A disguised freighter docks and Marines burst out into a firefight with a ten-man stormtrooper squad over the cargo, while in space NR fighters, gunships, and the Nebulon-B frigate Trident clear the minefield and battle TIEs and a Victory Star Destroyer commanded by Keline Nelhrn. The Imperials vent the hangar's air and inflict casualties, but the rebels load most of the priority cargo and jump away; the VSD disables one freighter and damages the Trident's engines, leaving the operation a costly partial Imperial loss.

title: RPlog:Depot Lost Recon
summary: Ahead of a larger raid, NR pilot Raxis L'ygr leads a Ranger Patrol reconnaissance flight to the Talasea depot to scan its containers with probe-equipped Y-wings. Imperial pilot Liza Molokai, commanding a TIE patrol and seeking redemption for a past failure, intercepts them and engages Raxis in a prolonged dogfight laced with a heated debate over Alderaan, terrorism, and the morality of the war. Raxis disables one wingman and tries only to disable Molokai, but her TIE's reactor breaches and critically wounds her; the recon team completes its scans and jumps away as Imperial reinforcements arrive too late.

title: RPlog:Destruction of Garrison Vexed
summary: Task Force Inquisitor of the true Empire assaults Garrison Vexed, the last stronghold of the traitorous Danik Kreldin / Neo-Imperial regime in the Outer Rim. After an infiltrator (Dreven) sabotages the base shield generator, loyalist ground forces of the 501st Legion storm the garrison while the Imperial fleet engages Neo-Imperial corvettes and fighters in orbit; a New Republic Ghost Squadron arrives to investigate and joins the chaotic three-way battle. A surprise Neo-Imperial reinforcement of eight cruisers and hidden AT-AT walkers nearly turns the tide, but Jal'Dana Rall's fleet maneuvering and the ground troops' grenade/glop assaults break the defenders, bringing the Corellian Corruption Scandal to its official end.

title: RPlog:Dibar & Tyler over Etti IV
summary: Tyler Damion in his X-wing and Octavian Dibar in a Lambda shuttle attempt to break out of a Corporate Sector Authority picket fleet blockading Etti IV, dodging the fleet and a Golan battle station. Tyler dives toward the station and fires proton torpedoes to create a proton-gas screen for cover while the Bothan pirate captain Paladin brings the corvette Night Scourge and its assault group in to provide covering fire. Despite fire damage to Dibar's shuttle (losing a dorsal fin), both ships break through and jump to hyperspace along the Smuggler's Run, escaping with the pirate fleet.

title: RPlog:Dillon and Piper Discuss Kuxli
summary: ExO Sean Dillon summons Piper (Simone Drake) and Kuxli to his CSA HQ office to sort out the events on Caspar where Piper ordered Espos to shoot the Horansi cub Kuxli. Kuxli argues he was only trying to stay with friends and fled because he was being shot at, while Piper insists she acted in the Authority's best interest and stands by her order. Dillon calls Piper's actions heavy-handed, announces an investigation, and reveals Kuxli has been temporarily relieved of duty and enrolled at the University of Kalla.

title: RPlog:Dining on Danger at the Red Dragon
summary: After a circuitous flight from the Rapier, Ambassador Delgard, Senator Tokoga, Commander Rasi Cen and bodyguard Caliph Rhannak land on Corellia and meet a resistance cell at a baker's house in Coronet City. Spokesman Adler presses the NR delegation on whether they want Corellia within the Republic or fully independent; Tokoga and Delgard affirm Corellians' right to self-determination. The rebels agree to cooperate if the NR delivers supplies and proves it can defeat the Empire on the ground, and Rhannak is assigned as an advisory officer.

title: RPlog:Dinner and a wedding
summary: On the first evening of 17 ABY, a small group of friends gathers at the Casohav Lodge on the Caspar mountain resort for what they think is a simple dinner party. Caspian Interim President Thomas Mahon and Lynae Cassius surprise the guests by announcing they will get married on the spot, before the appetizers, to preempt any mischief. A Caspian chaplain performs the ceremony, with HM743 as best man and Lynae's friend Maris and newly revealed half-brother Sadim standing with her; the couple exchange rings and are pronounced husband and wife. The reception devolves into joking about decorating the honeymoon ship with 'Just Married' in gold glitter binary and explosive-bolt streamers.

title: RPlog:Discussion (NRI)
summary: Aboard the NRSC Deliverance, New Republic Intelligence officers Voren Nadil, Xanatos, and Kathryn review recordings of recent prisoner interrogations and study a holographic profile of the Imperial Admiral Cimber. They debate strategic targets for the next New Republic offensive, weighing strikes against Dreven, Selene, the O'paal naval station/OSG, and lightly defended worlds like Trandosha, Kessel, and Athaniss. They conclude that they should present the pros and cons to the Navy, who will make the final operational decision.

title: RPlog:Discussions with Chewbacca and Jessalyn
summary: Aboard the NRV Alderaan in the days after Han Solo's arrest on Etti IV, Leia meets with Chewbacca and Jessalyn Valios to discuss the escalating crisis. They worry that holding the captured CSA executive Roark and bringing in warships risks starting a war and endangering Han, who could be handed to the Empire. Leia concludes the New Republic should release Roark to rebuild the Authority's trust, and Chewbacca departs to check on the prisoner.

title: RPlog:Disturber of Inner Peace
summary: In the Jedi Temple solarium on New Alderaan, a bored Gabi pesters Zeak Oppenhiemer while her mother Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard watches the sunset. Zeak, there to collect his children and tutor, invites Gabi and Ambrosia on an Oppenhiemer family cruise that Johanna has insisted upon, tempting Gabi with turbolaser time. Ambrosia, headed soon for Kashyyyk, deflects and declines Zeak's offer of covert paramilitary support, promising only to consider the vacation and to be present for Gabi's birthday.

title: RPlog:Doctor-Patient *Confidential*
summary: Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard, a New Republic captive aboard the Imperial Star Destroyer Nemesis, awakens restrained in the ship's medical bay after being intubated and rehydrated. A young Imperial Navy doctor, an orphan from Dreven, tends to her with unexpected gentleness, treating her injuries and giving her water and painkillers. As the drugs loosen her tongue, Delgard and the doctor debate the morality of the Empire versus the Rebellion, the doctor defending Imperial governance while Delgard condemns its tyranny and the seizure of her child. Delgard finally succumbs to the sedatives and falls asleep mid-argument.

title: RPlog:Don't Want Visitors
summary: After a painful conversation with Luke, a drunk and hungover Sabrina Rheatis barricades herself in her Crusader quarters, wanting only solitude. Johanna Siri te Danaan barges in to confront her and force her to sober up, followed by Leia Organa Solo bearing Alderaanian ice cream, but Sabrina throws both women out. Johanna and Leia then go to Luke's quarters seeking answers, but Luke refuses to discuss the matter, and Leia concludes it is no one else's business.

title: RPlog:Doril Farnsworth Commits High Treason
summary: Aboard the privateer vessel Purgatory, the smuggler Axel Vichten receives a captured NRI figure (Korbel/Doril Farnsworth) brought to him in hostile space. The man reveals he is the NRI Assistant Director and offers to remove Axel's bounty and provide a senatorial pardon in exchange for a personal alliance and one of Axel's skiprays/blastboats. Axel, distrustful, demands proof and a guarantee, then declines to decide immediately, confining the man to guest quarters while he weighs whether to accept the deal or sell him to the Empire.

title: RPlog:Downtime at the Tatooine Jedi School
summary: A slice-of-life scene at the Jedi School on Tatooine showing daily life among Luke's students before the school is later purged by the Sith. Leia visits and reflects with Luke and student Aubrey on the bittersweet aftermath of Emperor Palpatine's death, noting the war is far from over. Students Ethan, Cort, and Tholt mingle, with Cort sketching a new training device and comedic mix-ups in introductions, while Leia insists the students treat her as a fellow learner named simply Leia.

title: RPlog:Dressing Room
summary: On Charros IV in the makeshift Xi Chall broadcast studio, freelance holonet interviewer Nara Rhen finishes recording an on-air interview with Veruca Violet amid a media frenzy over the late Xi Charrian Prelate. Waiting in her dressing room for a delayed wardrobe delivery, Nara and Veruca speak candidly, revealing both are intelligence operatives using their public personas as cover. Veruca briefs Nara on her next undercover assignment: travel to Chandrila to investigate New Republic unrest and watch for outside agitators exploiting the situation following Darth Malus's prison-break escape from the Karthakk System. The scene ends with a wardrobe mix-up delivering a man's suit and Nara getting a comforting hug from Veruca before she departs.

title: RPlog:Drew Makes a Stand
summary: In the personal barracks at Talon Karrde's base on Myrkr, Drew Carvallo confronts the mechanic Orson Tighe about his decision to shelter the fugitive Jedi Simon and Jessalyn, warning him he is putting his life and his standing with Karrde at grave risk. Orson admits he doesn't know what he's doing but insists that helping the Jedi was both right and necessary, refusing to compromise his beliefs even at the cost of the organization's hunt for the Death Star. Jessalyn and the wounded Simon arrive and listen as the argument escalates. Drew, unable to convince Orson to be more cautious yet unwilling to abandon him, storms out frustrated, telling him he is naive and will get himself killed, but agrees to think about staying.

title: RPlog:Droid Control - The Ladies Prefer Electrum
summary: Aboard the Sith flagship Leviathan, the young Atsvara Tarasar brings the astromech droid Cricket to the ship's droid control centre to replace the prized taser that was forcibly removed from him at the Mos Espa market. The renowned Xi Charrian droid engineer ak, along with Colonel V1C3 and the droid commander T3-A7, gather to design a custom one-of-a-kind replacement. After comic debate over plating, they settle on electrum, with T3-A7 declaring electrum 'sexy' and beginning to flirt with Cricket. ak resolves that the definitive replacement will be crafted on Charros with 'cathedral precision.'

title: RPlog:Easiest Job Ever
summary: Sleepless in temporary base housing, Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard returns a call from the Rattataki pirate captain Shiari Vane, a former client. Ambrosia hires Vane to stop raiding Empire/Authority shipments in the Caspian system for about a month, negotiating a payment of fifty thousand credits off the books while High Command remains unaware. Vane agrees to avoid Caspian space for a few weeks and transmits account data before they part on cordial terms.

title: RPlog:Ecks File - AR-01 - Promise of Pleasure
summary: On the concourse of Nar Shaddaa outside the Meltdown Cafe, broker Kracen Ecks waits for a contact who never shows and instead becomes captivated by Ka'una, an exotic four-lekku Twi'lek who deftly deflects a drunken admirer. The two share a drink and flirtatious conversation; Ka reveals she works as an engineer aboard the cruiseliner Angry Rancor. Ecks is called away to another appointment, promising to visit her ship aboard the Angry Rancor.

title: RPlog:Ecks File - JD-01 - Welcoming Committee
summary: Broker Kracen Ecks lands his Lambda-class shuttle Ecks Factor in the hangar of Johanna Siri te Danaan's large vessel and is greeted by suspicious pilot Chanera 'Chana' Thorn. Chana, who has her droid quietly run the ship's registration, sizes Ecks up while he charmingly probes for information and notes references to Johanna's Jedi son. They part on friendly terms, with Chana playfully patting his rear as she leaves for a certification test, while Ecks secretly catalogs everything for later use.

title: RPlog:Ecks is a Naughty Boy
summary: At an abandoned spaceport in East Coronet City on Corellia, Johanna Siri te Danaan confronts Kracen Ecks after discovering he played her, aided by Chana and pilot Leo Corak. Ecks returns claiming his identical 'twin' (revealed to be a clone) is on life support, and Johanna uses the Force to pin and choke him against a wall until he confesses he was maneuvered into her employ by a vengeful New Republic general from her past. Ecks insists the general played them both and sent the clone to kill them before he passes out; meanwhile a hungover gambler named Jaykub stumbles onto the scene.

title: RPlog:Election Night Mayhem
summary: Kichnar Orbital Station hosts the first announced results of the Caspar Union Council election, attended by presumptive Presav Crestian Tarasar, Moff Elana Tracer of Selene, Prex Zeak Oppenheimer's Griffon exiles, and wanderer Rafan Janrenk. Sirlahn Inglet of Praecet wins the seat, but the celebration is shattered when 'Pure Caspar' nativist suicide bombers detonate among candidate Trett Hilo's supporters, followed by waves of armed fanatics. Crestian (stabbing with a datadagger and taking a blaster wound), Calyx Drogyn (protecting the knocked-out Tracer), and young Griffon snipers help put down the attack, leaving Hilo dead and the survivors bloodied but alive.

title: RPlog:En Route to Destiny
summary: Aboard the freighter Uwannabuyim, an upset Orson Tighe returns and orders the ship to depart immediately after his slicer disappears, taking with him coordinates matched to a constellation seen in the Jedi's shared Force vision. Jessalyn repairs the malfunctioning droid 2SK-MI (TooSock), whose head and balance keep failing in his new body, while the droid questions her motives for chasing an unknown destination. Jessalyn affirms that the Force is driving them and admits she would follow Orson anywhere. Orson powers up the ship and launches them toward the mysterious system as the droid abruptly deactivates mid-sentence.

title: RPlog:EncountARR in the Side Deck
summary: At the Side Deck bar on Nar Shaddaa, owner Del Marx serves the awkwardly heeled pilot Johanna, the armed Sluissi-raised Kaitlin Mainwaring, and the genteel Dr. Xanatos Xavier after a meeting with the Hutt Lord Draga. Pirate captain Salty Jack (Jaqen H'gar) and his first mate Barnacle Bill (Billious Qarrack) stumble in seeking grog; Bill's lewd remarks to Kaitlin nearly provoke a blaster fight until Jack reins him in. The tension defuses into banter and the patrons drink, tip, and part ways amicably.

title: RPlog:Encounter at Nak Shimor
summary: The New Republic corvette Audacity, with Caspian observers Lynae Cassius and Sadim Gnik aboard, is dispatched to the border system of Nak Shimor to contain a suspected Imperial incursion. After a briefing by XO Rasi Praddhan Cen, the NR fighters (Ghost and Dagger squadrons) ambush an Imperial recon force of TIE Interceptors (Razor Squadron) and the corvette Somnium, quickly gaining the upper hand and forcing the outnumbered Imperials to retreat. As the Imperials fall back, a relief wolfpack of Skiprays under Marshal Krieg Inrokana of Task Force Inquisitor jumps in to cover their escape. Both sides trade threats over comms; Lynae (recognizing Krieg's voice) responds with a disguised, scornful warning, and the Imperial forces withdraw into hyperspace rather than face inbound NR reinforcements.

title: RPlog:Encounter at Nak Shimor pt. 2
summary: While the New Republic corvette NRCV Audacity patrols the Nak Shimor system deploying sensor probes, it runs into an Imperial Marauder corvette (the Pillager) and a Lancer frigate (the Stormfire) belonging to Task Force Inquisitor. A capital-ship duel ensues alongside a one-on-one starfighter fight between the Jedi pilot Ikihsa Enb'Zik and the Imperial pilot Krieg Inrokana. The Audacity detonates a cluster of probes to blind the Pillager and inflict damage before jumping out with the intel gathered, with both sides withdrawing.

title: RPlog:Encounter in the Dig
summary: In the aftermath of a Trandoshan barroom brawl at the Smuggler's Dig Cantina on Corellia, the Twi'lek medic Alistair Al'Dira tends a wounded man while chatting with smuggler Krackor Reincus. Lord Geophreigh Smitherbodkins IV and his Kubaz valet J'Eeves arrive to procure Kubindi Cognac for an upcoming party, inviting both Krackor and the crime lord Tyy'sun Eson, who is drawn to Smitherbodkins' rare book acquisition. Tyy'sun grows hostile, threatening Smitherbodkins at blasterpoint to drink a shot of bootleg Lum; J'Eeves drunkenly intervenes and passes out, while Smitherbodkins coolly drinks several shots and verbally spars with the Twi'lek. Tyy'sun eventually backs down, conceding there may be more to the aristocrat than pride.

title: RPlog:Encounter with Simon Sezirok
summary: At the space station Pride-1, Jessalyn descends from the Uwannabuyim and senses the dark presence of the fallen Simon Sezirok, who is disguised under the alias 'Petre Simonson' and attempting to recruit the Duros Legato to help him locate the same vision-ship the Jedi seek. Jessalyn and Simon communicate telepathically through the Force, exchanging regret and bitterness over his fall and the severing of his hand. The malfunctioning droid 2SK-MI clatters down the ramp and unwittingly disrupts the tense standoff. Simon, repulsed and unwilling to expose himself to bounty hunters, defers his deal with Legato and departs with his SAT escort, leaving Jessalyn with a cold sense of closure.

title: RPlog:End Ceremony
summary: A banquet on Ord Mantell/New Alderaan celebrates the conclusion of joint New Republic-Caspian wargames. Chief of State Leia Organa Solo mingles with senators and military officers, debating with Senator Lemos Ackinbrac, Commander Rasi Cen and others about the moral differences between the Republic and the Empire. Admiral Ackbar and General Rieekan deliver speeches and award medals, with Leia announcing she will call for general elections. Brigadier General Ikihsa Enb'Zik receives the Superior Service Medal and Senator Ackinbrac the Medal of the Republic Spirit.

title: RPlog:End Run
summary: New Republic Ghost, Falcon and Dagger squadron pilots escort three convoy freighters in an attempt to break through the Imperial blockade of Coruscant. They run into the corvette Prowler, commanded by Jal'Dana Rall, and her TIE fighter screen. In the running battle the Imperials cripple one freighter and destroy several Republic fighters, but two freighters slip past into hyperspace, making the blockade run a costly partial success for the Republic.

title: RPlog:Enslaved
summary: Held on Yavin 4 (the Hutt sector), Jessalyn has agreed to serve as one of Tarba the Hutt's enslaved entertainers in exchange for the release of Orson's carbon-frozen body. In the Nerf Herder cantina, the bounty hunter Krinko (alias Max) and his Horansi companion Motwa surveil her while the mysterious Krackor probes the pilot Kyyel Marrak for information about her. Jessalyn performs a sorrowful ballad about a lost love that openly references the Jedi, the Force, and the Sith, drawing Force-attentive listeners. After the show she uses the Force to throw off a groping Gamorrean guard, and the elderly Gar'thriln privately reveals he knows she is a Jedi and offers New Republic help to free her; Jessalyn cautiously asks him to return the next day.

title: RPlog:Enter Corellia
summary: Disguised as the crew of a trading freighter, Tokoga, Myiari, and Commander Rasi venture into Coronet City's Bottom's End on a covert mission into Imperial-held Corellian space. A nervous Myiari frets about being recognized, while Rasi gets his boots splashed with mud by a departing airspeeder. They strike up conversation at a roadside food shack with an independent Lethan Twi'lek, Raynn Keel, who reveals his business lies on Nar Shaddaa, before Myiari departs to source power coils.

title: RPlog:Enter Darth Malign
summary: Aboard Axel Vichten's gaudy ship the Purple Haze, Axel meets secretly with CDU/NIO Rear Admiral Naten Bonrue to discuss handing over Imperial 'traitors' to the Empire to keep Caspar safe and to discuss Danik Kreldin's conspiracy. The meeting is interrupted by the arrival of Inquisitor Darth Malign (Tyler Damion), the Emperor's agent of Imperial Diplomatic Operations. Malign uses Force postcognition to read the room, lets the Caspians leave, then privately authorizes Axel to stall Petra Doom with fake leads while finding the real traitors, before violently threatening Axel against failure or comparing his Emperor to past warlords.

title: RPlog:Enter The Rapier
summary: Myiari Oerstead is invited aboard the New Republic cruiser Rapier, landed at the New Alderaan Military Base, to fill out its depleted medical staff for a covert mission into Corellian space. Senator Tokoga boards at the same time with Senate guards and aides for reasons left unstated. Commander Rasi greets both, explains the secrecy of their Corellia-bound deployment, and assigns quarters; Myiari nervously discloses her runaway past and worries about being recognized.

title: RPlog:Enter the Hunter
summary: In the Smuggler's Dig cantina on Corellia, Simon explains his lightstaff and Selas heritage to Markus, who reveals he suffers from intense waking nightmares and seeks Luke Skywalker for help. A bar fight erupts, drawing in the dangerous Force-using huntress Kacela, who uses fear powers on a man named Darkan while Simon secretly jams the man's blaster with the Force. Kacela senses Simon's abilities and confronts him, offering to find him a teacher (her dark master); Simon refuses to duel, and he and Markus withdraw to find Mira and leave Corellia.

title: RPlog:Ephant Mon and Enb'Zik
summary: In Chalmun's Cantina on Tatooine, the former Hutt enforcer Ephant Mon, now claiming religious enlightenment and financial hardship, recruits the Sullustan Jedi Ikihsa Enb'Zik to hunt for one of Jabba the Hutt's last secret treasure vaults. Ephant Mon explains that Jabba kept multiple hidden vaults and one remains unfound, suggesting leads at Draga's palace and the Pit of Carkoon. Enb'Zik, secretly interested in any Force-related artifacts, asks to partner with another searcher already in the field. Ephant Mon names Malif Tal-Tahn, currently on Bespin, and Enb'Zik agrees to join him under the alias 'Jailbird'.

title: RPlog:Ephant Mon and Malif
summary: In Chalmun's Cantina on Tatooine, treasure-hunter Malif Tal-Tahn follows rumors to meet Ephant Mon, who recruits him to find Jabba the Hutt's last hidden treasure vault. Ephant Mon explains that Jabba kept several secret vaults and that all the ones he has found were already looted or trapped, but he believes one final vault remains. He offers Malif a fair share and suggests three leads: Jabba's old palace, the Pit of Carkoon, and the Jawas who scavenged the sail barge wreckage. Malif, thrilled by the challenge, accepts and takes Ephant Mon's contact datacard.

title: RPlog:Escape!
summary: Captain Lynae Caiton enters the cell of Twi'lek prisoner Tal'sin Secura aboard the Imperial cruiser Broadsword to skim final information before deciding his fate. Tal'sin overpowers her, breaking her arm and seizing her sidearm, then kills her aide and several stormtroopers before forcing her to help him escape. Using a stolen medical shuttle and her command codes, Tal'sin launches off the Broadsword, jumps to hyperspace, and cuffs Lynae to a pipe, intending to deliver her as a captive of his own.

title: RPlog:Escape and Evasion Training
summary: During a month-long stand-down at Selene, Task Force Inquisitor conducts SERE (escape and evasion) training. A briefing aboard the Inquisitor led by Marshal Krieg Inrokana, Captain Keline Nelhrn, training officer Wolf, and Lt. Vextin Mandor prepares pilots for the exercise. On Sullust's jungle surface, downed pilots Krieg and Liza attempt to evade ISB and stormtrooper hunters while a Navy away team mounts a rescue; despite the rescue effort, the pursuers capture Liza, Xy'lear, and Wolf, while Krieg and Arissa escape aboard the shuttle.

title: RPlog:Escape from Caspar
summary: Jedi Leo Corak and young Gabi Delgard, fleeing battle on Caspar, approach a makeshift Imperial TIE airbase aiming to steal Darth Venger's modified TIE Avenger. With CDU veterans creating a guerrilla distraction by setting the forest ablaze and firing on the base, Leo cuts through the perimeter fence and reaches the ship. Commander Amylynn Starr scrambles fighters and realizes too late that the personal TIE is being stolen; Leo powers up the Avenger and escapes into space with the feverish, injured Gabi aboard.

title: RPlog:Escape from Caspar, Part 1
summary: After a failed assassination attempt on the Imperial ambassador and a bombing at a swoop event on Caspar, Danik Kreldin (disguised as 'Alois') is a wanted man hunted by Caspian security. In a mountain lodge he spots his former subordinate, the Imperial pilot Krieg Inrokana, who is socializing with the swoop racer Shael Edur. Danik draws Krieg aside, reveals his identity, and reveals he survived his apparent death and is now fighting against the usurper Vadim's control of the Empire. Krieg agrees to smuggle Danik and a companion off-planet using his swoop and Imperial skipray blastboat, providing an access card and arranging to rendezvous the next day.

title: RPlog:Escape from Caspar, Part 2
summary: Executing the plan from Part 1, Danik Kreldin (no longer disguised) and Sandor Woden use Krieg Inrokana's swoop to flee through the wilderness around Marin Mountain on Caspar after their terrorist attack. Krieg flies his Imperial skipray blastboat out under treaty protection, lands at a rendezvous point by the racetracks, and meets them. Danik and Sandor board the blastboat, planning to regroup on Corellia and continue their campaign against Vadim, and the ship prepares for takeoff to escape Caspar.

title: RPlog:Escape from Kessel
summary: Aboard an Imperial prison transport bound for Kessel, pirate captain Shiari Vane stages a violent jailbreak to free smuggler Jaspar Andromidas, who has lost a hand during his imprisonment. The two fight their way through stormtroopers in the corridors, killing two who had cut down some of Vane's pirates, before reaching the docking tube. They escape aboard Vane's ship, the Hardlace, as Republic starfighters battle TIEs outside, and Vane reveals the New Republic paid her fee to free Jaspar, who now owes her a favor.

title: RPlog:Escape with Simon
summary: In the cockpit of the fighter Tortured Soul, fleeing the wreck of the Dimlyn Titan, Jessalyn confesses to the fallen Simon Sezirok that the prize he stole from the Jedi was actually passed through the Force to Mira before their escape, leaving his efforts for nothing. Wracked with guilt over how easily she nearly gave in to the dark side during their duel, Jessalyn begs Simon to kill her, declaring herself a vile failure with nowhere left to go. Simon refuses, calling her a 'Selas' now cast out of her order, and insists she either kill herself honorably or remember her honor. The two reach an uneasy truce as Jessalyn pilots them toward open space, with Simon announcing that training for them both begins once they have rested, which she furiously rejects.

title: RPlog:Establishing Task Force Inquisitor
summary: Aboard the Star Destroyer Inquisitor, Warlord Vassily Korolov assembles the command staff of the Broadsword and other battle groups to announce the creation of Task Force Inquisitor, a mobile fleet tasked by Emperor Vadim with hunting the remnants of the New Republic and its Jedi. Korolov, named Grand Inquisitor, promotes Captain Lynae Caiton to Commodore in command of the Inquisitor and the task force's naval assets, and names Korynn Fleming as Systems Director over security personnel. Caiton then issues a round of promotions and outlines a strategy of surgical strikes against rebel supply lines and morale.

title: RPlog:Eternal Sunshine of A'estshy's Mind
summary: A'estshy Nubiari, a Twi'lek, suffers a vivid nightmare in which the Mandalorian/Quarren figure of Cantrell torments her aboard the burning, exploding wreck of a ship, demanding to know if she fears death while she watches her loved ones (Thrask, Sha'dria, Tyy'sun, Brin) get sucked into space. She insists she would die for Thrask and refuses to surrender, before the tormentor's helmet melts into a mirror image of Thrask and casts her into the void. She wakes in bed in the dark, shaken and shivering, with a broken nose, struggling to ward off the lingering visions.

title: RPlog:Etiquette 101
summary: On O'paal, newly conscripted Imperial ambassador-trainee Morganna Tazecks is put through diplomatic training by a face-changing Imperial 'man in red' (Atrox NPCing) who first appears wearing her abusive father's face to unsettle her. He fits her with a painful identification droidlet implant, then runs her through staged diplomatic encounters with the agent Gabriel/Bourne playing a furious foreign ambassador and a feline syndicate envoy.
