Morganna fails by being abrasive, gradually learns to feign charm, and ends the day rewarded with an ambassador's suite aboard the Guardian and praise from Atrox.

title: RPlog:Eva Sargent
summary: On the resort world of Caspar, Jedi Jessalyn Valios and her apprentice Orson Tighe approach FLS executive Eva Sargent at her corporate office, intending to free her from psychic damage left by her contact with an ancient Sith cube and the Sith lord Cort Stasus. They reveal Jessalyn is a Jedi who can undo the mental suggestions, but Sargent, wary and frightened, refuses to consent and only agrees to a follow-up appointment. Afterward Orson and Jessalyn argue over whether to forcibly help her against her will, with Jessalyn insisting a Jedi cannot force its way into someone's mind, then reconcile their teacher-student relationship before going surfing.

title: RPlog:Everything's Eventual
summary: In the Library of the Republic on New Alderaan, former Imperial Doctor Lynae Cassius debates Imperial vs New Republic ideology with arms dealer Rasi Praddhan Cen and tactician Malif Tal-Tahn, dwelling on the destruction of Alderaan and the meaning of the Emperor's Mercy. Darth Malign (Tyler Damion) then darkens the library, isolates the group, and offers to take Lynae back into Imperial service as a captain, revealing that Danik Kreldin is dead. After an agonized choice, Lynae refuses and chooses to remain in exile; Malign mind-wipes Rasi of the encounter and departs, leaving Lynae shaken but resolved.

title: RPlog:Everything With Your Testicles Alright?
summary: In the renovated Council Chambers of Union Hall on Caspar, Imperator Darth Malign delivers a policy address to the Caspian Union Council introducing new treaties between the Imperium, the Union, and the Corellian Confederation, pledging aid to independent worlds threatened by piracy. During the reception, Grand Inquisitor Axel Vichten suffers an allergic reaction from his dry-cleaned uniform while estranged Sith allies Salin Fawzy and Ssanyu Natrulon reappear after a decade away. Malign privately voices suspicion that Fawzy and the Authority betrayed the Sith to the Republic during the purge. Grand Moff Elana Tracer works the room as the Night of the Charm Offensive, while Ssanyu humiliates Axel and the party winds down toward an after-party.

title: RPlog:Extraction Race
summary: Luke Skywalker and Jedi apprentice Ikihsa Enb'Zik, guided by R2-D2's tracking of a beacon, race through the chaotic levels of Nar Shaddaa during the climactic battle to extract stranded NRI agent Lon Cotar and his injured betrothed Ona Rei 'Siren' Delamont. Using the Force to mask their presence and a commandeered speeder, the Jedi reach the couple hiding in a restaurant and flee through falling debris and opportunistic attackers. They swing the wounded couple to the roof of the Side Deck via grappling line while the Jedi crash and abandon the speeder, leaping to rejoin them. The reunion on the rooftop ends with armored guards appearing, kept unnoticed thanks to an off-screen ally named Kaitlin.

title: RPlog:Face Off
summary: Aboard the ship Hyperion in a Mos Eisley docking bay, former Moff Bailey Sora Laran hires Tritus and his Verpine doctor Madixli to perform secret plastic surgery, permanently altering a sedated man's appearance to exactly match a holo-image (including a back scar) for a covert spy operation. They negotiate payment, settling on 2600 credits of untraceable freshly-earned funds, while Tal'sin and Cade Vaughan stand guard. Madixli completes the permanent transformation successfully.

title: RPlog:Face Off with Sidi and Eson
summary: Drawn to Monument Plaza on Coruscant by a Force premonition, Luke Skywalker is ambushed by bounty hunter Sidina Renard, who tries to collect the large Imperial bounty on him. The disguised Sith Tyler Damion (Malign) and Jarek Syris, meeting there with crime lord Tyy'sun Eson, choose not to intervene, while Eson swoops in to rescue Sidi. Luke absorbs Sidi's blaster fire with his bare hand and disables Eson's swoop with deflected bolts, trapping them. Eson buys his freedom by ordering hostages executed if he fails to report back, and Luke, after warning both about their dark paths, lets them depart in an unmarked speeder.

title: RPlog:Face to Face
summary: At 'Bog's', a sports-betting tavern in the smuggler's port of Esau's Ridge on Tholatin, New Republic pilots Raxis, Rebecca Varn and Gene Malantean meet for downtime, while Imperial Marshal Krieg Inrokana conducts covert intelligence business at another table with his aide Keline. Raxis spots Krieg and warily coordinates with Rebecca over comlink while Gene also recognizes the Imperial. The standoff builds with concealed weapons drawn under the table as Imperial pilots Liza Molokai and Alex Dante also arrive. Part I, continued in Face to Face 2.

title: RPlog:Face to Face 2
summary: Continuing at Bog's tavern on Tholatin, Imperial Marshal Krieg Inrokana approaches the New Republic pilots' table, buys them a round, and reveals himself as 'Raptor I' in a tense verbal sparring match with Raxis and Rebecca Varn before departing peacefully, choosing a known enemy over an unknown one. After Rebecca and Gene leave, Imperial pilots Alex Dante and Liza Molokai join Raxis for a philosophical debate about the war, civilian deaths and whether peace is possible. Liza kisses Raxis before leaving, and Dante taunts him about future combat; everyone departs without violence.

title: RPlog:Fall From Grace
summary: Aboard the Black Dragon over/near Corellia, a wounded Paul Nighman meets Leia Organa Solo on the bridge, confirms the new medic Amylynn Starr's identity, and learns Han is Leia's husband. Shenner finds him and Paul, on a teasing impulse, tries to kiss her again; she punches him and he falls, aggravating the side wound Vermillion gave him. Paul hides his worsening injury, mends fences with Shenner through a comforting hug and learns she is seventeen, arranges to bunk in the cargo bay near her, but his condition deteriorates and he stumbles to the Palanhi Medical Center where he collapses unconscious.

title: RPlog:Farewell, Qwynt
summary: At Kartathia Manor on Corellia, friends, family, lovers, and associates gather for the funeral of Amalgamated Waste kingpin G.S. Qwynt III, hosted by Lord Geophreigh Smitherbodkins IV. The grotesquely comedic ceremony descends into chaos as the Ortolan Frederiko weeps, the obese Toydarian Momma Cleo and her family arrive, and rival 'fiancees' brawl. The Verpine Murdock slices the manor's systems to cut the power during the moment of silence, while Imperial officers including Alex Dante and Warlord Vassily Korolov attend and place bets on the catfights. Smitherbodkins delivers a forced eulogy and tells Momma her son died with her name on his lips, and the disastrous wake eventually breaks up.

title: RPlog:Fashion Show
summary: The Silverwood House of Fashion, led by Kubaz designer Zubindi Hakoon, hosts a charity fashion show at the Royale Hotel ballroom in Coronet City, Corellia, to benefit The Mission and the Arkanis Sector relief effort ahead of the Children's Relief Fundraiser and Ball. Zubindi delivers a speech about the famine and communications sabotage afflicting the Arkanis Sector, then introduces a series of masquerade-themed models (Eris, Rylo Ken, Vanilla, Amidala). Guests including retired Lynae Cassius and the Hutt-associated Krackor Reincus reconnect, while flamboyant media personality Thurston Unger critiques each look with his droid 'Chrome Court' entourage. Krackor slips away mid-show after receiving a discreet message.

title: RPlog:Fay and Morganna
summary: Sheltering from a rainstorm in an abandoned lighthouse on Caspar's Hideaway Beach, Morganna Tazecks and the Griffon diplomat Fay strike up a long, wary conversation. They discuss the Noghri-guarded Grand Admiral's procession, the Force-user Ozzle who torments Morganna, and the philosophy of killing, with Morganna admitting she enjoys it while Fay gently probes her psychology. Morganna burns scavenged wood and a rat for warmth and reveals her distrust and Imperial-watched status, before a wet stranger named Vito Zarl stumbles in seeking refuge from the tide.

title: RPlog:Festival and Dance
summary: At a cultural festival in Organa Park on New Alderaan, Ambassador Delgard mingles with the Verpine Vophsi, who voices anxiety about an unfound bomber, then shares food and a dance with NRI agent Drax Rendolen, who updates her on two captured suspects he believes are linked to the Olumi Osahn. Zeak Oppenhiemer and his daughter Ara slip through the crowd to covertly hand Gabi a 'liberated' stolen holosculpture as a gift for Ambrosia. Smuggler Jaspar Andromidas and tech Feyd Siva also appear, and the evening ends with the Delgard women moving on while Drax dashes off to work.

title: RPlog:Fett vs Firecats
summary: In a Mos Eisley docking bay on Tatooine, bounty hunter Boba Fett ambushes the crew of the Forge of Hope, declaring Ikihsa Enb'Zik and his crew enemies of the Empire wanted dead or alive. The Horansi Snarl shields Enb'Zik and Brandis Finian while the Jedi tries to disarm Fett with the Force; Fett shoots Brandis in the leg. Snarl then bodily charges Fett, smashing him into a ship and nearly knocking him out. The crew retreats up the ramp and escapes aboard the Forge, while a battered Fett plants a short-range tracker on their ship, vowing to hunt them again.

title: RPlog:Fight Dirty if it Comes to That
summary: In the Moff's Council chamber on Selene, Johanna Siri te Danaan convenes an informal meeting of Imperium Moffs to investigate suspicions that FineLine Spaceways (FLS) is smuggling slaves through the Tion Cluster in league with those behind the attack on Bespin. Axel Vichten offers to scout his old smuggling hideouts in the cluster, while Moff Nasiri Gejalli presents data showing shell companies with shipping ties to FLS and waypoints into Hutt space. Crestian Tarasar, defending Caspian-flagged shipping, insists no vessels be destroyed without solid proof and bristles at Nasiri's needling about pro-Sarian bias. The group agrees to an investigation: Axel scouts the cluster, Johanna's slicer and accountant analyze records, and Nasiri's assets probe the Hutt Moaba's network.

title: RPlog:Finding Lynae
summary: Deep in New Republic territory on Ord Mantell, Antoine Dareus and Axel Vichten track down Dr. Lynae Cassius, who is under New Republic protection escorted by Senator Ikihsa Enb'Zik and the Horansi Snal'Fashtalli Teague-Ikihsa. After a tense standoff in the rain, Lynae chooses to leave willingly with her old Imperial comrades, and Darth Malign arrives to add his persuasion. Aboard Lynae's ship and then the black-painted Star Destroyer Predator, Dareus and Axel recruit her to command a warship (the Embrace) in their independent Sith battle group led by Malign. Lynae weighs the offer carefully but does not commit, asking Dareus to arrange the cremation of Yoseph's remains; meanwhile Cade Katon silently recognizes her as responsible for his brother's death and vows future revenge.

title: RPlog:Fire(y tempers) in the Burn Ward
summary: Recovering from severe burns in a Corellian hospital, Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard angrily receives Ewan Dain's PR man Teag Barrett, who plays a self-exculpatory hologram of Dain's account of the Tatooine ambush that killed her escort. Ambrosia furiously rejects the version of events, insisting her convoy was attacked by a low-flying freighter and that Dain delivered her into the bounty hunter Nachkt's hands. Commander Argon Brand and Lieutenant Amaya Halos arrive to support her, and finally Dain himself appears to apologize and give his own account. Ambrosia grudgingly accepts his story as plausible and demands he file a full written statement with NRI about Nachkt of clan Voth.

title: RPlog:First Encounter
summary: In Fountain Square in Plaxton on Caspar, Imperial commander Danik Kreldin spots the wanted Jedi Ezkhil i'Falzin and a Rodian bounty hunter, Gimel Daleth, in an alley and discreetly comms the Conqueror to report them. Ezkhil confronts Danik in the street, demanding to know whom he was speaking with, while Gimel covertly readies a heavy blaster. When Danik tries to brush past, Ezkhil grabs his arm and uses the Force to injure it, leaving Danik's shooting arm useless. Outmatched and unarmed, Danik retreats into the crowd vowing they will meet again; the Jedi and Rodian, now aware they have been spotted by the Empire, prepare to leave. Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard and her marine escort depart the scene separately by speeder.

title: RPlog:Fist Full of Force Users
summary: At the Imperial City spaceport on Coruscant, Simon, Markus, and Mira await Luke Skywalker while Mira covertly panhandles for credits. They are approached by New Republic Jedi General Tarroc D'agor, who offers help, and then by the blind young Jedi Ethan Katana with his cybernetic Nek battle-dog Bram. After Mira fends off the slobbering Bram and flees to the ship, Markus and Simon explain their search for Skywalker, and Ethan, recognizing them as Force-sensitives, offers to take them to wait for his Master.

title: RPlog:Fixing a Hole
summary: Pirates Salty Jack (a Quarren) and Barnacle Bill (a Mon Calamari) arrive at the Ord Mantell starport after losing their ship, loudly bemoaning their fate. They encounter Lynae Cassius, Shael Winters, and Marine Sergeant Holden Deckherd, with Lynae clinically discussing prosthetics and treatments for the pirates' wooden leg, hook, and eyepatch. Deckherd repeatedly demands identification, which the pirates claim was lost when their ship was eaten by a space monster, and finally directs them to customs. The pirates wander off in search of a tavern.

title: RPlog:FleetOps, and GroundOps, and StarOps, Oh My!
summary: The New Republic Second Fleet holds an all-branch promotion and awards ceremony aboard the NRSD Reprisal, hosted by Admiral Ackbar with Generals Crix Madine and Wedge Antilles. Marines (Wrista Ipex, Vengan Draelis), technicians (Javin Mitali), and a gunner (Rasi Cen) receive promotions and medals, and David Stone is elevated to Rear Admiral. Kyrin Sh'vani is promoted to Captain and awarded a Silver Star for stealing an Imperial Star Destroyer after escaping captivity, plus the Star of Alderaan for killing Danik Kreldin. The ceremony ends with a buffet, music, and Kyrin giving a humble acceptance speech.

title: RPlog:Fleming's Abduction
summary: While ISB Sector Director Korynn Fleming conducts an overt investigation into CSA involvement at Nar Shaddaa, touring the Titiana swoop track on Theseus Station, Darth Malign leads a disguised strike team to abduct him. Malign's force (including Antoine Dareus) disables Fleming's CompForce guards with non-lethal Sith toxin barbs and corners Fleming, who tries to kill himself rather than be taken before Malign disarms him with Force speed. The team spacewalks Fleming off the station to the unmarked YT-2400 Whipping Star and escapes using sixty decoy probe droids and false hyperspace jumps. The Inquisitor task force under Line Captain Jal'Dana Rall pursues but loses the freighter in the sensor confusion.

title: RPlog:Fleming's Abduction 2
summary: Aboard the fleeing Whipping Star, Korynn Fleming discovers his abductors are Darth Malign and Antoine Dareus, the exiled traitor he once condemned. Malign reveals he serves the Sith and the Emperor directly, outside the Imperial Order, while Dareus, now redeemed in Malign's service, calmly assures Fleming the operation serves the Emperor's true will. Fleming, recognizing his abductors share his loyalty oath to the Emperor, masters his rage and agrees to keep an open mind and play along. The ship runs the Imperial blockade through decoy jumps and an asteroid field to dock at the I2SD Predator, where Fleming accepts guest status, learns Lynae Cassius is also aboard, and is shown to a stateroom.

title: RPlog:Fleming's Reinsertion Plan
summary: Aboard the Star Destroyer Predator, ISB Director Korynn Fleming consults Sith Lord Darth Malign about a covert plan to re-insert himself into the Imperial Security Bureau by faking his abduction and torture. Malign approves and assigns Captain Antoine Dareus and Axel Vichten to assist. The three then meet over breakfast to finalize the scheme: Korynn will be encased in carbonite, planted on an unwitting CSA-registered smuggler with falsified manifests, and 'rescued' by ISB agents who will burn the false trail. Dareus arranges stealth Sith assassin droids to monitor the operation while Axel handles the smuggling logistics.

title: RPlog:Fleming Interrogates Sandor
summary: Aboard the HIMS Predator, ISB interrogation specialist Corporal Korynn Fleming is summoned to question Sandor Woden, a former Imperial who defected to the New Republic. Under the truth/suggestion serum Bavo Six, Sandor begins to break, but reacts violently when questioned about a Jedi named Ai'kani, punching Fleming twice before Cantrell knocks him unconscious with a rifle. Reporting to Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin, Fleming reveals Sandor's emotional link to Ai'kani, and Kreldin decides to use Sandor as bait to lure the Jedi into custody.

title: RPlog:Fleming Joins the Sith
summary: Aboard the HIMS Predator, ISB Director Korynn Fleming and former Commodore Lynae Cassius, who consider each other enemies, are summoned by the Sith Lord Darth Malign (Tyler Damion). Malign rebukes their bickering, then leads them at blasterpoint to a secret Sith Meditation Chamber, revealing a hidden organization that secretly serves Emperor Vadim against Danik Kreldin, including a covert facility being built on the dead world Cochran and sentient Sith dart flowers usable as assassination weapons. Fleming swears loyalty immediately; Lynae, torn by guilt over the lives she has taken and her feelings for a man, asks Malign for time to decide rather than committing.

title: RPlog:Fleming Tortures Brandis
summary: The captured Jedi Brandis Finian is brought to the detention block of the I2SD Predator for interrogation. Darth Malign (Tyler Damion) blinds Brandis by channeling dark-side energy into his eyes, then turns him over to ISB interrogator Korynn Fleming. Fleming injects a nerve-sensitizing drug and uses electrical torture and pain-conditioning, demanding Brandis answer to a prisoner designation, but the Jedi resists all attempts to break him. Fleming finally seals Brandis into a sensory-deprivation device, leaving him to endure indefinite isolation.

title: RPlog:Fleming Tortures Kyokusha
summary: On the medical deck of the SSD Malevolence, ISB agent Korynn Fleming confronts the near-human prisoner Kyokusha, who had ransomed the rescued Admiral Danik Kreldin for fifty thousand credits. Fleming straps her into Surgical Room Seven and administers a nerve-sensitizing serum, then uses an electrified halo device through escalating pain settings to extract her story and condition her against hatred of the Empire. Kyokusha insists she saved Kreldin only out of conscience and respect, not loyalty to the Empire, and refuses to accept Imperial reconditioning. Fleming halts at setting four of ten, vowing to consult Kreldin before continuing, and administers a reversal agent.

title: RPlog:Flight of the Corellian
summary: Archeologist Paul Nighman and the young redhead Shenner board the retired Admiral Jeralic Mandragon's Lambda-class shuttle Excalibur for a flight to Tatooine to track down Grathix. During the journey Paul teaches Shenner how to navigate hyperspace jumps while she recounts how she ended up mugging Jawas, was recruited by Grathix to target Simone Drake on Etti IV, met Luke Skywalker, and was taken aboard the Alderaan. They land on Tatooine and prepare to find Grathix, with Jeralic agreeing to keep the shuttle available for an onward trip to Mandalore.

title: RPlog:For the Good of Caspar
summary: Axel Vichten, Grand Inquisitor of the Imperium, and Crestian Tarasar, Presav of the Caspian Union, meet over wine and finger foods at the Captain's Table restaurant on Caspar to share intelligence. They discuss the absent Darth Malign, the security of Selene against terror attacks, and the forced resignation of Lynae Cassius after she became entangled with the wanted Sith Malus and pulled her son Andrev from the academy. They reflect on the fragile state of the Imperium, the strength of the Caspian Union, and their shared pragmatic goal of protecting Caspar amid potential collapse. Axel pledges his loyalty to defending the Union and offers to mentor Lynae's son.

title: RPlog:Forcing A Gem of Knowledge
summary: Aboard the Trader's Envy near the Corellian system, Tyy'sun Eson keeps the death-sentenced, hallucinating Padawan Ai'kani captive and presses her to teach him the basics of the Force, which he discovered through spice-fueled meditation. Through a long philosophical exchange, Ai'kani lectures him on the Force's neutrality and reveals her own dark past under a false Sith father who murdered her mother and used her. Tyy'sun offers to spare Ai'kani's life and return Yejide unharmed in exchange for her training him, releasing her bonds and feeding her. Ai'kani secretly resolves never to truly teach him; Tyy'sun rebinds her and departs to the cockpit as the ship moves toward the Corellian starport.

title: RPlog:Fortune Favors The Bold
summary: Eight days after a failed raid stranded New Republic and Imperial survivors on Dathomir, both camps independently dispatch scouts to investigate a signal fire on a mountainside, unaware the other is also en route. NR Lt. Wrista Ipex and Corporal Rook Sallowar climb the rock face while Imperial Marshall Krieg Inrokana leads stormtroopers up the same mountain; an Imperial scout grenades a nest of avian creatures and is killed by the enraged mother, whom Wrista distracts and then blinds with sunlight off her sword, saving the Imperials. At the summit cave they find a downed Imperial TIE pilot and a New Republic Squib pilot (Barvareedee) who crashed together and are sheltering as allies. With rancors threatening the Imperial base camp, Wrista offers refuge at the better-defended Republic camp, and Krieg agrees to a truce, exchanging names and a handshake to relocate both forces together.

title: RPlog:Fourth Battle of Corellia
summary: The Galactic Empire launches a massive invasion of Corellia, using a smuggled EMP weapon disguised as a freighter cargo to black out the entire planet and disable all electronics before the Imperial fleet jumps in. Imperial ground forces, AT-ATs, walkers, stormtroopers, Scimitar bombers and the Royal Guard pour onto the darkened planet while New Republic Marines under Colonel Sabrina Rheatis mount a doomed guerrilla resistance from the alleys of Coronet. Jedi pilot Johanna Siri te Danaan crash-lands her X-Wing, joins Sabrina's marines, and duels her brother Darth Malign (Tyler Damion) with the Force while he hunts her with a lightsaber. Over seventy percent of Corellia falls to the Empire and Sabrina is finally felled by a stun bolt, the planet lost.

title: RPlog:Freezer Burn
summary: Mercenaries deliver Darth Malus, just freed from twenty years in carbonite, to Doctor Lynae Cassius at Hawk's Roost Spaceport on Caspar. She brings him aboard her ship the Red Sky and treats him in her medbay, flushing carbonite toxins and rehydrating him while his vision slowly returns. Over a shared meal they spar verbally about murder, the Sith, the Force, and the current state of the galaxy, with Lynae unimpressed by his power and Malus dismissive of her materialist worldview. Malus recites the Sith Code and challenges her to break her psychological 'chains' before settling in to meditate.

title: RPlog:Friendly Interrogation
summary: Chiss NRI agent Galin Wraith debriefs the recently rescued Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard about her time in Imperial custody. Over the recorded session she recounts the attack on the Caspar embassy, her capture by black-uniformed Imperial troops, her torture and brief death under interrogation, and her dealings with Lord Aldus Thel, who coerced a confession by threatening her daughter Gabi. She reveals key intelligence about Dr. Liora Kovani (a brainwashed Imperial medical officer) and Thel's plot to seize the Caspian system. The debrief ends tensely with Ambrosia demanding the real culprit behind the rigged-aid scandal be found.

title: RPlog:Friendship Shaken
summary: Aboard the Imperial ship Inquisitor, Marshal Krieg Inrokana briefs stormtrooper TK-4461 (Ansforth Nicodemus) on new training duties before bringing him to interrogate the captive Shael Edur, his former friend. Under orders, Ansforth brutally beats Shael, stomping her, smashing her wrist, and dragging her by the hair as she gives up the name 'Vengan Draelis' under duress. Krieg, maintaining his cold Imperial persona while inwardly conflicted, repeatedly orders the trooper to stop, then provides Shael food and bacta and treats her wrist while she remains hostile toward him.

title: RPlog:From Caspar with Love
summary: An Imperial strike team led by Lt. Loreck Hawkins and ISB Agent Kelbris Cooper infiltrates a warehouse near Union Starport on Caspar, disguised as HVAC repair technicians, to find proof of CDU weapons shipments to the New Republic. Suspicious guards demand they open their equipment cases, and the cover is blown into a firefight. The disguised stormtroopers gain cover behind their skiff and gun down the guards (Cooper is knocked unconscious early), then breach the warehouse, slice the data terminal, and discover crates labeled 'foodstuffs' actually contain proton torpedoes and turbolaser components, gathering evidence before withdrawing.

title: RPlog:From Diplomat to Spychief
summary: Tsaran Joir summons Morganna Tazecks to his Bureau office over O'Paal after her psychological evaluation flags her as too dangerous and unstable for diplomatic work. He formally relieves her of all diplomatic duties, leaving her fearing she is being discharged. Instead, Joir reveals a transfer file promoting her to provisional Chief Intelligence Officer of the Bureau of Operations, redirecting her aggression toward intelligence work; she accepts and pledges loyalty to the Emperor.

title: RPlog:Full Circle
summary: Crestian Tarasar, volunteering as a doctor at The Mission's refugee aid warehouse in Mos Eisley on Tatooine, is reunited with Kasha Tabasuri, who once spent a year stranded here selling hand-carved figurines. Along with Crestian's daughter Atsvara (Biscuit Baron CEO), they share a meal of porf and plan for an upcoming charity auction to raise funds for famine refugees. They discuss donations for the auction, where to base Biscuit Baron's corporate headquarters given galactic politics, and the possibility of opening restaurants near Horansi worlds. The conversation drifts to Tatooine's harsh sandy nature and whether it should ever be terraformed.

title: RPlog:Fun With Ozzle and Sinjon
summary: In the KOS Gardens on Kichnar Orbital Station, the dark Force-user Ozzle Olumpari and the Horansi light-side warrior Sinjon Teague debate the grey path and the nature of truth. A foul-tempered Morganna arrives, brushes off her pet skrit, and trades vicious Horansi insults with Sinjon, who mockingly critiques her grammar. Ozzle telekinetically trips Sinjon into the fountain to humiliate him, then counsels Morganna that her anger is a source of power she must learn to control rather than fear.

title: RPlog:Funeral for a Ghost
summary: Aboard the NRSD Reprisal, Major Johmac Mabru leads a military funeral for Kyrin Sh'vani, presumed killed in action over Coruscant; her casket holds only her empty flight suit since no body was recovered. General Luke Skywalker, standing at the back, steps forward to eulogize her and reveals there is speculation she may have survived, urging the assembly to hold onto hope. Falcon pilot Aramis Tyrese and technician Lianna Blackledge wrestle with doubt over the uncertain circumstances of her death. The ceremony concludes with the folding of the Republic flag for her family and a missing-man X-Wing flyby.

title: RPlog:Futile Research - Arrival
summary: At the Ord Mantell military depot during the New Alderaan expansion, ten-year-old refugee Arise arrives aboard the Wild Rose with the Sullustan Enb'Zik amid a massive influx of construction and recycling equipment. They visit Luke Skywalker, who is repairing his X-Wing, and chat with the trader-pilot Shael Winters. Arise voices anxiety that hiding refugees on Ord Mantell, surrounded by Imperial space, is unsafe; Enb'Zik and Luke try to reassure her, but she remains uneasy and tired.

title: RPlog:Futile Research - Checking In
summary: On Coruscant, refugee child Arise spots Luke Skywalker in line at a starport and rides the tram with him to the government complex. She reports that a woman named Valkyr Tenebre offered to teach her self-defense, and Luke promises to look into the stranger. Arise also hints she has been pursuing an idea he suggested but defers discussing it in public; the unfamiliar Valkyr follows them into the Senate building.

title: RPlog:Futile Research - Presentation
summary: Aboard the refugee transport Expedient 3 at Dac's starport, Luke Skywalker visits the New Republic's young wards and shields Arise from teasing classmates. Arise presents him her datapad of cartographic research listing candidate relocation worlds, sorted by safety versus resources, and proposes a more organized mobile fleet. Luke accepts the datapad, noting the Jedi already use a capital cruiser as a mobile base, and promises to show Arise the vessel as thanks.

title: RPlog:Futile Research - Reading
summary: In Coruscant's Parliamentary District, refugee student Arise studies galactic geography on a park bench when the winged, armored Azurian woman Valkyr Tenebre strikes up a conversation. Valkyr offers to teach Arise self-defense and independence, drawing on her Rim upbringing of early apprenticeships. The dark-clad Malif Tal-Tahn briefly interrupts to ask about Valkyr's species before departing; Arise notes she would need her Social Services guardians' permission and records Valkyr's name and hostel for follow-up.

title: RPlog:Futile Research - Reading 2
summary: On Coruscant, refugee child Arise meets the winged Chyleni Kyrin Sh'vani, a New Republic operative, in the Parliamentary District. They discuss flight, displacement, and the war, and Kyrin recounts being present at the Cochran tragedy, where the Empire massacred fleeing refugees in violation of a truce. Kyrin encourages Arise that thinking freely and staying brave is itself an act of resistance, and the two part with mutual respect.

title: RPlog:Futile Research - Reading 3
summary: In the Coruscant Government Complex lobby, refugee child Arise strikes up a conversation with Evir Yissik, a diplomatic emissary from Wann Tsir/Tsiran territory. They bond over missing their forested homeworlds and discuss bravery, destiny, and resisting the Empire; Evir shares how his planet beat the Empire and how he adopted an orphaned niece. Arise reveals her mother was arrested by the Empire and that she is a ward of New Republic Social Services, before they part warmly.

title: RPlog:Futile Research - Runaway
summary: On a Coruscant starport, the orphaned girl Arise tries to withdraw funds to travel to Cochran but is blocked by a Parental Consent Override on her account. New Republic Marine Sandor Woden, recently evacuated from Cochran himself, intercepts her and tries to dissuade her from running away, even offering money before learning she is a state ward. Disappointed and unable to leave, Arise resigns herself to returning to the New Republic Social Services refugee program she despises.

title: RPlog:Gackt and Kreldin
summary: Shortly after the Imperial ambush against the Jedi during the occupation of Corellia, Danik Kreldin patrols the starport near the ruined Corona House, tasked with finding the wounded Jedi Aurejin and luring Mira into a trap. He encounters Kyokusha Gackt, the cloaked former wife of his friend Gavin, and confronts her about stealing his datapad on Selene months earlier, an act that nearly got him killed. Gackt apologizes, and the two trade verbal sparring over their shared history on Tatooine. Kreldin reveals he is now an advisor to Warlord Malign, warns Gackt that Malign seeks her head, and departs to continue his Jedi hunt while she remains pondering her need to reach Casus before his coronation.

title: RPlog:Gallery Opening
summary: Councillor cadracak-'r'shak hosts the grand opening of a new art gallery in Xi Xin on Charros IV, intended to expose the formerly isolated Xi Charrian people to art from across the galaxy. Guests including Crestian and Atsvara Tarasar, Admiral Lynae Cassius, Nara Rhen, the Quarren Druze, technician Selko Aronat, and Ama-Li Vapasi mingle while Selko finishes repairing the lighting. They discuss the gallery's theme of cultural identity, Atsvara's complete collection of Biscuit Baron Jolly Meal toys, and an upcoming charity auction. The reception celebrates the Xi Charrians' growing integration into the wider Caspian Union and galaxy.

title: RPlog:Garat and Stalh
summary: In a seedy Casparian bar, New Republic Navy Lieutenant Garat (a persona played by Tsaran Joir) approaches Heinrich Stalh, an embittered ex-Imperial diplomat, hoping to bond over shared anti-Imperial hatred. Stalh speaks ominously of a one-eyed woman who 'has to die', meaning the Imperial ambassador, and gauges Garat's own murderous intent toward her. Drawn by his own hatred, Garat agrees to Stalh's coded proposal to bring her down 'once and for all', committing to the assassination plot.

title: RPlog:Garbage to Deal With
summary: During the Winter Fete, an alert sounds aboard the NRSD Reprisal in Mon Calamari space and Ghost Squadron pilots Kesander Beysarus (Ghost 7), Raxis L'ygr (Ghost 3) and Kyrin Sh'vani (Ghost 1) launch to interdict the freighter Valspar, which has an invalid transponder. The smuggler Mitler attempts to flee, using a barge for cover and venting his cargo to obstruct the pursuers before jumping to hyperspace and escaping. The Ghosts recover the dumped cargo, including a large pressurized container possibly holding sentients, and return to the Reprisal. This is Raxis's first combat engagement.

title: RPlog:Ghastly Gala
summary: Zubindi Hakoon and the Tahn Consortium host a grotesque-themed party, 'Grotesques and Odalisques,' at Castle Tsabak on Dreven, morbidly 'celebrating' the aesthetic of Basca Starker, the doctor responsible for the Sariphage pandemic that killed billions on Caspar. The cloned corpse of Basca lies on a central altar while bands Dooku's Droogs and the Five Elements perform and disfigured Xa Fel waiters serve grotesque food. Lynae Cassius, the astromech Cricket, and Atsvara Tarasar mingle amid the macabre spectacle, while Darth Malign arrives disguised in Jedi robes with apprentice Quaye and a squad of mutant Wookiees. A drunken blaze bug causes chaos by attempting to mate with reporter Nara Rhen's camdroid before being apprehended by the droid V1C3.

title: RPlog:Ghastly Gala: Episode 2
summary: Continuing the Ghastly Gala at Castle Tsabak on Dreven, an inebriated Tray Garos nearly collides with the Falleen Ssanyu Natrulon while carrying wine, then clumsily attempts to court both her and reporter Nara Rhen. Ssanyu deflects his advances with blunt, emotionless observations about human mating customs and reproduction. Zubindi Hakoon discusses the merits and cultural relativity of insect-based cuisine, lamenting his failure to get anyone to try the grotesque black-platter delicacies. Ssanyu samples an insect while Tray gags on a droch, and Veruca Violet notes Caspian agriculture survived Basca's genocide.

title: RPlog:Giles Vermillion
summary: On Palanhi, Jessalyn Valios collects Paul Nighman from the Grand Palanhi Hotel and reunites with Shenner at the starport, where the menacing red-haired man Vermillion (also called Khaj) confronts them. A blaster-and-blade fight erupts: Vermillion stabs Paul deeply in the side before Paul wounds him and Vermillion flees, leaving the cryptic word 'Mandalore.' The group gets the bleeding Paul aboard the Black Dragon, where Luke Skywalker arrives and uses the Force first to ease Paul's pain and then to close his wounds; afterward Luke and Jessalyn share a quiet, emotionally charged conversation in the engine room about her temptation by Alora and their unspoken feelings.

title: RPlog:Giving Counsel to the Jordains
summary: Luke Skywalker tracks Serenella Jordain to the Cat's Claw Cantina to update her on the fate of her estranged husband, the fallen Jedi Antoine 'Tony' Dareus (Darth Malign). He reveals he could not confirm whether Dareus is dead and intends to seek him out at Darth Malign's fleet directly. Through the Force he quietly probes Serenella's mind, confirming she knew of Dareus's Force powers, and urges her to let go of him for her own safety. Serenella breaks down in tears while her sister Inanna and friend Shael comfort her, and Luke departs to confront Dareus.

title: RPlog:Glitterstim Withdrawal
summary: At the Vichten Estate on Caspar, Axel hosts a dark dinner for Malif Tal-Tahn and Dr. Lynae Cassius, presenting Malif with a box containing the severed thumbs of Tyy'sun Eson as revenge. Axel reveals he now works for the Sith and asks Lynae to provide confidential medical care to those bearing his Order of the Broken Spear card. During dinner Axel collapses into severe glitterstim withdrawal; Malif insists it is a Dark Force taint and they move him to the garden, while Lynae treats him medically and Malif warns him to avoid Malign until clean.

title: RPlog:Glowblue Noodles
summary: Crestian Tarasar hosts an intimate dinner of Glowblue Noodles aboard his flagship Leviathan for Axel Vichten and Johanna Siri te Danaan to discuss the situation in Hutt Space. Johanna reports that the Hutt warlord Nasiri is willing to let them bring firepower in to eliminate the last major slave traders, but suspects he means to consolidate his own power afterward. Axel and Crestian distrust Nasiri, viewing him as a failed Moff trying to use them as shock troops, and Johanna argues invading Hutt Space would yield little of value. They agree to pursue their own anti-slaver targets independently rather than serve Nasiri's political ambitions, with Crestian especially concerned about alleged enslavement of Sarians.

title: RPlog:Good Morning, Myrkr
summary: In the barracks at Karrde's base on Myrkr, Jessalyn Valios visits her Force-student Orson Tighe, who has fallen asleep designing an elaborate lightsaber. Their conversation ranges over the true purpose of being a Jedi, the dangers of the Dark Side and figures like Stasus, Valak and Morganna, and whether one can return from it (with Jessalyn citing Vader saving Luke). The talk turns personal as Jessalyn confesses her conflicted feelings about loving Simon and her former feelings for Luke, while Orson offers gentle counsel before the two head off to breakfast.

title: RPlog:Good Old-Fashioned Business
summary: At the Meltdown Cafe on Nar Shaddaa, smuggler Jaspar Andromidas is approached by the stiff, ex-military Zeak Oppenhiemer representing the Etti group, who offers him a contract to run food and medical supplies to Caspar and bring goods to Bonadan while loudly publicizing the Etti group's name. After negotiating a fee of four thousand credits split half upfront, Jaspar accepts despite being blacklisted and persona non grata with the Imperials over a prior failed run. Zeak offers to loan a ship belonging to his wife, the Padawan Johanna Siri te Danaan, warning Jaspar not to damage it.

title: RPlog:Green Clouds Over Mon Cal
summary: Following the New Republic's forced withdrawal from Coruscant, technician Javin Mitali coordinates relief efforts for two million refugees crowded onto the parade grounds of Reef Home on Dac (Mon Calamari). He works alongside Bith technician Ohaotrantak Ostivort, distributing Marine rations and loading emergency power generators for makeshift shelters. A brief band of mysterious green clouds/energy flashes across the sky, nearly triggering a mass panic among the refugees. Mitali has a tech raise the Reprisal, confirms the phenomenon poses no danger, and works to calm the crowd.

title: RPlog:Greeting the Newcomers
summary: The NRCV Audacity hosts a personnel exchange with the Caspian Navy in the Mon Calamari system. Lt. Commander Rasi Cen welcomes Lt. Commander Lynae Cassius and her party aboard and conducts a tour of the corvette's engine room and fire control center. During the tour a lengthy philosophical debate unfolds over the difference between the Old and New Republic, sparked by the Dug cadet Bakrak's grievance about the Republic ceding Malastare to the Gand. The exchange ends amicably with both sides agreeing to disagree.

title: RPlog:Griffons, Betrayal, and a Mandalorian Plant
summary: In the KOS Gardens above Caspar, Morganna Tazecks crosses paths with the Griffon admiral Lanthazar and Fay, then is approached by the enigmatic Grathix, who reveals he came specifically to see her carnivorous 'Snarlyplant.' Meanwhile Han Solo and Leia Organa Solo meet with Lanthazar about possible New Republic military aid, and Grand Admiral Adlerson arrives planetside greeted by Ambassador Erin Abrosen, prompting Morganna to discreetly warn the Imperials of the NR presence. Aboard her ship the Sable Fox, Grathix poisons the plant to force Morganna to surrender it, revealing himself as one of the last Mandalorians, and takes it after promising to help her contact a Mandalorian for her unnamed employer.

title: RPlog:Ground Battle on Cochran
summary: The ground battle on the Griffon Alliance world of Cochran intensifies as the Imperial 501st Legion 'Vader's Fist' digs into the starport while CompForce and the Army deploy AT-ATs and AT-STs behind the New Republic lines. New Republic Marines, Army troops and SATs counter-attack while Ghost Squadron X-Wings and Dagger Squadron Y-Wings bomb the walkers, downing several AT-ATs, and War Shrike TIE squadrons contest the air. Warlord Korolov leads the stormtroopers with his ignited lightsaber, while NRI agents Kintor Roberts, Greiko Lornan and Cassie slice into Imperial comms to feed false targeting data. Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin discovers Imperial intelligence was wrong about a planetary shield generator and orders a full Imperial withdrawal, evacuating troops under cover of two Victory-class Star Destroyers despite the stormtroopers being on the verge of victory.

title: RPlog:Ground Battle on Sullust
summary: After a two-month Imperial blockade of Sullust, the Galactic Empire lands ground troops to drive out the New Republic defenders. Imperial stormtroopers under TK-2501 storm the spaceport, blast into the sublevels, and destroy the power generators to disable the anti-aircraft guns, while Legionnaire Savage's platoon assaults the industrial factory and AT-STs are landed. New Republic forces, including Sullustan commandos, General Unnh, the Horansi Major 'Snarl,' and Cadet Wilhelm Krieger's marines, mount a fierce defense and counterattack, inflicting heavy Imperial casualties. Admiral Danik Kreldin watches from the Star Destroyer Selene with former field marshal Tyrus Valtoor, ultimately calling in the Selene's orbital bombardment to break the rebel resistance as the Empire seizes the starport.

title: RPlog:Gruel'n'Company
summary: Held prisoner in the medical pod of the Star Destroyer Nemesis, Ambrosia Delgard recovers enough to eat solid food, fed by a sympathetic Imperial Navy doctor (later identified as Liora Kovani). The doctor shields her from further interrogation by Aldus Thel's agent. Over a meal of pureed vegetables, the two debate the Caspar conflict, with Ambrosia insisting the Empire engineered the embassy attack while the doctor defends Imperial actions. Ambrosia recounts her past enslavement and her motivations for joining the Rebellion, ending convinced her allies will eventually come for her.

title: RPlog:Guest of the Empire, part 1
summary: After being shot down and ejecting during a space battle, captured New Republic X-Wing pilot Kyrin Sh'vani, a winged Chyleni, is brought aboard the Imperial Star Destroyer Broadsword with severe burns. Captain Lynae Caiton's medical team treats and stabilizes her while Director Petra Doom and Commissar Lanil Jast observe and set guard protocols. Once healed, Korynn Fleming begins interrogation and, when she refuses to give her assignment, subjects her to a 'de-personalization' torture: strapped into a chair with eyes clamped open, forced to watch a recording of the torture and mutilation of Jedi Kitterick Brandis Finian on endless loop. Kyrin endures with stoic dignity, retreating into her own mind.

title: RPlog:Guest of the Empire, part 2
summary: Continuing the captivity aboard the Broadsword, ISB interrogator Korynn Fleming rouses Kyrin Sh'vani after some 14 hours of the looping torture footage, forcing water on her and demanding her name and assignment. She gives only her name and otherwise retreats into composing music in her mind, refusing to break. Fleming briefs pilot Krieg Inrokana on his 'pain without damage' doctrine and lets Krieg attempt a 'good cop' conversation, appealing to shared love of flying and offering food, but Kyrin responds only with silent pity and gives nothing away.

title: RPlog:Guest of the Empire, part 3
summary: In the detention block of the ISC Broadsword, ISB interrogator Korynn Fleming escalates his attempts to break New Republic prisoner Kyrin Sh'vani, a winged Chyleni pilot, while Lynae Cassius-Caiton observes for research. Korynn injects her with a pain-amplifying drug and applies escalating electrical shocks, and she briefly breaks free in an acrobatic escape attempt before collapsing. He ends the session by threatening her homeworld Chylene with a two-Star-Destroyer bombardment, leaving her to mull her decision.

title: RPlog:Guest of the Empire, part 4
summary: Korynn Fleming finally breaks Kyrin Sh'vani aboard the ISC Broadsword using an elaborate staged holographic simulation of an Imperial bombardment of her homeworld Chylene. When she still resists, he strings her up and begins surgically carving into her wing joint with a laser scalpel, crushing an artery, until she breaks and divulges full New Republic strategic intelligence on Operation Shado Kolpo. She begs for death, but Korynn refuses and knocks her unconscious, then begins healing her.

title: RPlog:Guest of the Empire, part 5
summary: After healing Kyrin Sh'vani's wounds without scars, Korynn Fleming attempts to test whether the broken Chyleni pilot could be re-educated into an Imperial spy. He reveals the bombardment and wing-amputation threats were staged, presenting a soothing 'good cop' facade, but Kyrin defiantly challenges him to an honor duel to the death. Korynn refuses to risk the fight, and when she physically attacks him he easily overpowers her, leaving her crushed and despairing in her cell. The intel she gave will make him an Imperial war hero by helping shut down Operation Shado Kolpo.

title: RPlog:Guest of the Empire, part 6
summary: Aboard the Imperial cruiser Broadsword, Captain Lynae Caiton visits the broken New Republic pilot prisoner Kyrin Sh'vani, whose interrogation supplied intel that helped the Empire destroy a Republic fleet in a recent battle. Caiton has the listless, traumatized Chyleni doused with cold water and dragged into the light, taunting her about the civilian deaths and threatening to harvest breeding pairs from her homeworld. Caiton revives the catatonic prisoner with stimulants and delivers a chilling message intended for the Jedi Brandis Finian, that every Rebel she kills dies in his place, before leaving.

title: RPlog:Guest of the Empire, part 7
summary: Slated for execution, Kyrin Sh'vani is marched past Korynn Fleming, who signed her death order, and transferred via the shuttle Wanderer to an experimental remote-controlled Victory-Class Star Destroyer for execution at Sigma 2. Feigning total defeat, she suddenly bolts on the hangar deck, flying into the ductwork and escaping her guards. She arms herself, takes the bridge skeleton crew prisoner, has a technician override the ship's remote-control AI, and forces the ship into hyperspace toward a Republic system. Aboard the Broadsword, Keline Nelhrn watches the VSD vanish into hyperspace.

title: RPlog:Gustaf Heram's Arrival
summary: A mysterious, aristocratic newcomer named Gustaf Heram arrives at New Alderaan's starport carrying a guarded backpack and takes refuge in the Goodman's Tavern, where Brin Harper, Lynae Cassius-Mahon, Jessalyn Valios, Senator Alistair Al'Dira and pilot Ranma Hoshiakarui happen to be present. A starport quarantine announcement traps everyone inside just as assassins open fire on Gustaf. A firefight erupts involving a Rodian, two human goons, and reinforcements including a Shistavanen; Jessalyn deflects bolts and reverses a grenade while Lynae and her guards gun down the attackers. Gustaf, wounded, is taken to a hospital by arriving police, leaving his pursuers dead and his purpose a mystery.

title: RPlog:HIMS Predator Day 1
summary: Aboard the Sith-run Imperial Star Destroyer Predator, hidden in the Bothan asteroid belt, Dr. Lynae Cassius debates faith, war, and the Force with Captain Antoine Dareus and Darth Malign while she weighs whether to rejoin the Empire/Sith order. Malign demonstrates a prototype Sith-alchemy combat droid and delivers a passionate sermon on Sith philosophy, knowledge from dead worlds, and serving the Emperor Vadim. Lynae remains undecided but increasingly tempted, while Axel Vichten is dispatched to cause chaos and terrorism to draw galactic attention away from Malign's projects.

title: RPlog:HIMS Predator Day 2
summary: On the bridge of the Predator while it shelters in the asteroid belt near Cochran, Dr. Lynae Cassius and Captain Antoine Dareus discuss her pending decision to join the Sith order. Dareus reveals Lynae's tactical skills are prized and offers to build her a lab; Axel had asked her to devise a way to wipe out a planet's food supply without killing its inhabitants. They also touch on Dareus's terminal illness, his estranged relationship with Kiare and their possible children, and Lynae's intent to find a cure.

title: RPlog:HIMS Predator Day 3
summary: In the Predator's hangar bay, Dr. Lynae Cassius and the smuggler Axel Vichten talk about flying, surgery, and what motivates them. Axel argues Lynae belongs with the order and should seize the chance to make a galaxy-wide difference rather than settle into civilian life. Axel reveals he serves not the Galactic Empire but the Sith Empire backed quietly by Emperor Vadim, operating outside galactic law for what he calls the galaxy's good.

title: RPlog:HIMS Predator Day 4
summary: In the Predator's crew commons, ISB Sector Director Korynn Fleming and Dr. Lynae Cassius, both former adversaries, are confronted by Darth Malign. Fleming pledges his loyalty after learning Emperor Vadim backs Malign, while Malign escorts the pair at blasterpoint to his Sith Meditation Chamber. There he reveals a secret Sith facility being built beneath ruined Cochran and shows sentient poison-firing Sith dart flowers; he probes Lynae's hesitation, and she admits the blood on her hands and a man she loves give her pause, asking time to settle that before deciding.

title: RPlog:Han's Admission
summary: Concerned over Han Solo's deteriorating state after Chewbacca is presumed dead over Etti IV, Admiral Ackbar visits the Solo suite on Mon Calamari and persuades the sleep-deprived, obsessed Han to rest in exchange for sending a ship to scan Etti for distress signals. Luke later coaxes Han out to the Rusty Urchin Restaurant, where Ariana Millikin, Eddie, and technician Bec Ga'lec gather; conversation turns to Han's captivity by Grathix and the discovery that Shenner and Paul are working with the untrustworthy Grathix. Pressed about losing the Millennium Falcon, Han erupts in anger and storms off to drink at the Briny Deep Tap House. Luke follows, and after a heated argument Han finally admits he has been suffering nightmares and cannot sleep, agreeing to let Luke help him.

title: RPlog:Han's Nightmares
summary: Back at the Solo suite on Mon Calamari, Luke uses the Force to give Han a protective mental bubble so he can confront the nightmares plaguing him since his Imperial imprisonment, while Leia secretly watches from the bedroom doorway. Han relives the Noghri torture on Palanhi, Grathix's threats, the loss of Chewbacca and the Falcon, and a Hutt audience chamber filled with carbonite-frozen friends, jolting awake in distress. Having processed the dream with awareness that it is only a dream, Han recovers his composure. He then goes to Leia, who had collapsed from worry, and the couple reconcile and finally rest, with Luke quietly noting that something has at last gone right.

title: RPlog:Han's Rescue
summary: The Empire stages a public trial and execution of Han Solo on Athaniss before judge Laurence Dante, with Moff Morrison Van Sen and the Bureau of Operations overseeing security. A New Republic rescue team led by Luke Skywalker infiltrates the crowd; a droid bombing diversion triggers the assault, and Luke leaps onto the gallows to free Han while comrades fight Imperial stormtroopers. Sabrina commandeers a landspeeder to extract the team amid heavy grenade fire and civilian casualties, while Imperials Danik Kreldin and Petra Doom resist; the rescuers escape with a wounded Han and a badly injured Rook Barnsdale.

title: RPlog:Han Solo's Return
summary: On Palanhi, a drunken Jessalyn Valios and the disguised musician Shenner are found aboard the Black Dragon by Leia, who shepherds them while Amylynn Starr arrives carrying a gravely wounded Han Solo she smuggled out of Lord Sabbath's captivity by faking his death. Luke Skywalker urges Jessalyn to stay rather than flee, fearing Sabbath will target anyone he cares about. Amylynn recounts her elaborate rescue, then discovers Han's stabbed foot has developed gangrene needing antibiotics, and the group resolves to find medicine while keeping the AWOL stormtrooper Amylynn and Shenner hidden.

title: RPlog:Hangars Hazards & Hangovers
summary: Aboard Johanna Siri te Danaan's flagship Price of Pleasure, a mynock infestation brought aboard by a drunken shuttle pilot wreaks havoc in the main hangar, damaging coolant lines and power couplings. Johanna's homicidal astromech Cricket hunts the last mynock while tasering newly-arrived NR liaison Galen Rourke, and broker Kracen Ecks frantically tallies the repair costs. Dr. Lynae Cassius arrives, recognizes Rourke, and after he gropes and kisses her she flips him to the deck, while a drunk Johanna vomits on Ecks' custom boots.

title: RPlog:Harsh Realities
summary: A largely introspective narrative log following Paul Nighman after Shenner's emotional declaration of love. Fleeing to the Mon Calamari academy library, Paul buries himself in Mandalorian language study until his childhood mentor Dr. Molari Canto confronts him about using work to avoid emotional issues. Paul then walks the shoreline wrestling with his feelings for Shenner, concluding that despite his attraction he is the wrong man for her, and resolves to return and end things gently.

title: RPlog:He Did It!
summary: On an aid trip to Trandosha for the charity The Mission, Crestian Tarasar encounters the disreputable Zeltron Ezlo being marched off by two female Trandoshan guards for defecating in a ceremonial fountain. Crestian intervenes, persuading the guards to release Ezlo into his custody rather than beat him in a ditch. During the encounter two of Darth Malign's Dark Side adepts, Aldus Syn and Carmella Rise, emerge from a hidden Sith cache they were looting and exchange tense pleasantries with Crestian before departing to report Ezlo's desecration of Malign's former seat of power. Ezlo reveals he was trying to sell dangerous spice to Trandoshans and eventually wanders off chasing Carmella, owing Crestian a favor.

title: RPlog:He Was Doing You A Favour
summary: The astromech droid Cricket is locked up in the Mos Espa constabulary on Tatooine after repeatedly tasing Axel Vichten's backside, raging and threatening retaliation against Johanna and the police. His corporate partner, the young Baroness Atsvara Tarasar, arrives dressed in House Dragonflower uniform to negotiate his release, sparring verbally with the unimpressed Devaronian officer over titles, threats of lawsuits, and a rejected bribe. She secures Cricket's release into her custody after he grudgingly promises not to retaliate, though the police keep his taser as evidence. Atsvara departs already plotting petty future revenge against the officer who disrespected them.

title: RPlog:Headaches and Hangovers
summary: Shenner, Luke Skywalker, and Jessalyn Valios track Paul Nighman to the Grand Palanhi Hotel, where they find him hungover after a two-day bender; Luke uses a Jedi mind trick on an evasive bellboy to locate him. After a tense, prickly exchange Paul reconciles with Shenner and the group, joined by Lando Calrissian, discuss the Mandalore artifacts Grathix spoke of. Paul reveals a sketch of a Force-amplifying device possibly from the Jedi purges and agrees to travel with Jessalyn and Shenner aboard the Black Dragon to investigate, while Luke insists on staying behind because danger is coming on his account.

title: RPlog:Headed for Hijarna
summary: Having struck a deal trading the treasure map of pirate Darius Nul for passage, Paul Nighman and his companion Ylsa board the Rodian Leebo Krupt's YT-2400 Comet's Tail, bound for the obscure world of Hijarna. During the flight Paul unwraps an ancient gilded six-armed goddess statue from Tamis, explaining to crew members Terrin and Fulk that it is one of a series central to a millennia-old holy war he intends to recover for a museum. He reveals his rebuilding career as a xenoarcheologist and an uneasy feeling about Hijarna, while gunslinger Fulk pledges his protection in exchange for a cut of the action.

title: RPlog:Healing on Calamari
summary: Recovering in a Mon Calamari hospital with his arm in a bacta enclosure awaiting a prosthetic, Luke Skywalker is visited by Jessalyn, who comes to thank him for her rescue. After Leia briefly stops by worried about the still-missing Han, Luke presses Jessalyn into discussing the kiss they shared and his feelings for her. They share a tender exchange in which Luke insists he cannot pursue a relationship given his responsibilities, while Jessalyn admits she has fallen in love with him.

title: RPlog:Hey Mister Tally-Man, tally me stolen cargo
summary: Pirate Shiari Vane delivers the stolen Imperial Action VI freighter Corulag Haul to the New Republic Embassy in Plaxton City, along with its cargo and ten captured Imperial crewmen as a bonus. Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard negotiates payment, totaling sixteen thousand three hundred credits plus cargo value and ten percent of the ship's black-market worth. When Vane refuses to surrender her weapons at the Embassy's security scanner, Delgard declines admittance, so Vane opts to wait topside on the landing pad for her final tally while discussing future runs and her difficult exit through the Imperial blockade.

title: RPlog:Hide and Seek
summary: In Organa Park on Ord Mantell, the Horansi K'tyyri Tarashabi coaches her cubs Sufa and Yadumu in stalking practice in a civilized setting. Yadumu's ambush goes awry when a child on a hover scooter spots her and flees screaming 'Sand Panther!', blowing her cover. The human Maris Becton, out for an evening stroll, notices the predatory feline and warily watches the scene unfold.

title: RPlog:Hindsight is 20/20
summary: Aboard the observation deck of the Star Destroyer Nemesis, Lord Aldus Thel summons stormtrooper Lieutenant Loreck Hawkins to assign him a critical mission ahead of the planned Caspian blockade. Thel explains that the Caspian Democratic Union violated its treaty by arming the Rebel Alliance, and that he intends to avoid Rellik's past failure by breaking the Caspian people's will rather than just their army. He tasks Hawkins with selecting eight men to support Agent Cooper in covertly obtaining physical proof of the illegal arms shipments. Hawkins accepts the infiltration assignment and is dismissed to prepare his men.

title: RPlog:Hiring the Caterer
summary: Lord Geophreigh Smitherbodkins IV dines at the upscale Ruathen's restaurant on Coruscant with his valet J'Eeves to find a caterer for his upcoming party. They discuss the guest list, security, and menu over Rimble wine and Pikpik eggs, while the Rodian Gimel Daleth tips the maitre'd to seat himself nearby and instructs the proprietor Vyal Ruathen to watch the wealthy pair. Vyal, a fellow Corellian, recognizes the Smitherbodkins name and offers to cater, mentioning he is already negotiating with Frederiko to perform. The arrangement is agreed before Vyal excuses himself.

title: RPlog:Homeward Bound
summary: Fifteen days after a failed raid, stranded New Republic and Imperial survivors share a camp on Dathomir, having banded together for survival. A Wroonian tech boosts their jury-rigged transmitter, and sensors detect a dozen contacts arriving in orbit. The contacts turn out to be the NR fleet (Redemption/Audacity), which lands shuttles to evacuate the Republic survivors while honoring a truce that leaves the Imperials under Lord Marshal Krieg Inrokana with a week's supplies. The peaceful evacuation succeeds and the fleet moves on to locate other survivor camps.

title: RPlog:Honor Among Killers
summary: At the Imperial Embassy on Caspar, Bounty Hunters' Guild member Taggor Bren consults Ambassador Morganna Tazecks about whether the bounty hunter Detjin is exempt from joining the Guild. The conversation turns tense when Morganna reveals she possesses the skin of the Horansi Samus, who was Taggor's dear friend and master. After clearing the air that Detjin, not Morganna, killed Samus, Morganna takes Taggor to her private trophy chamber and gives him the pelt so he can lay Samus to rest honorably, in exchange for a promise that he replace it with the next Horansi he hunts.

title: RPlog:Hooch and Planning
summary: The crew of the Templar (the 'Pregnant Guppy') hold an all-hands meeting in the hangar to review intelligence gathered from a successful raid on a pirate base, where they freed roughly two dozen captives intended for slave trafficking. Druze presents data showing the slaving operation runs targets through Nar Shaddaa for the Hutts, chop-shopping ships to evade transponders. Colonel Eckhart, Siarra Krell, Kelnas, Druze and Wrexan plan a stealth intelligence mission to Nar Shaddaa to locate the remaining captives and stage a surgical strike. They settle on sending a small team with Kelnas and Druze, gearing up discreetly, while booze flows and Eckhart enforces a no-pets-on-the-ship rule.

title: RPlog:Hope Renewed
summary: Aboard the Inquisitor, Marshal Krieg Inrokana visits the broken captive Shael Edur to say farewell before a mission, leaving food and again playing the role of her sole comfort. Shael, suicidal and resigned, is shaken from her apathy when Krieg reveals that Whisler's father, whom she believed killed during the Empire's invasion of Altion years ago, is actually alive, works for the Imperial military, and may be permitted to come speak with her. Hope rekindles in Shael, who thanks Krieg and accepts a hidden bar of chocolate, her goodwill toward him restored.

title: RPlog:Hope for Peace
summary: With the Battle for Corellia at a bloody stalemate, the Empire and New Republic send delegates to a peace conference on a hover-platform over a Corellian river. Imperial Captain Auxin Valerius meets NR/Jedi representatives Doril Farnsworth (Korbel) and Leo Corak, who demand the Empire withdraw from Corellia. Valerius refuses to cede any territory, citing the Council of Moffs and the Emperor, and the talks collapse with both sides preparing for renewed war.

title: RPlog:How Much is Too Much?
summary: Captive Shael Edur (Prisoner C-1125) is subjected to extreme sensory-deprivation and torture aboard the Inquisitor, then dragged before an ISB agent who demands she reveal her New Republic intelligence work. To break her, the agent lowers two dozen bound prisoners over a vat of acidic liquid and lethally dissolves a young boy before her eyes, then electrocutes him to death. Shattered, Shael confesses she is an NRI informant reporting directly to the Chief of State; the agent halts the killings, rewards her with food and medical care, and notes her psyche is breaking as planned.

title: RPlog:Hunter Becomes Corrupter
summary: At the Caspar Union starport, the unstable Force-user Mira slips away from NRI custody to search for Markus Lisardis's ship, drawing the attention of the dark-sider huntress Kacela. Kacela uses the Force to mentally manipulate the ranger Troy McTavish, then is confronted by Simon Sezirok, who blocks her attacks (including a small fireball deflected by a flung wrench) and refuses to be baited into a full battle. Kacela assaults Simon's mind with a vision of millions dying before withdrawing, vowing they will meet again in the forests. No one is killed; Simon and Mira remain safe.

title: RPlog:Hunter on Call
summary: Rodian bounty hunter Zeebo Bex arrives at Drev'starn City Starport on Imperial-occupied Bothawui, where stormtroopers are dragging families from their homes and customs is now rigorously controlled by naval officers. Waiting in a long line, Bex is processed by a contemptuous human Sub-Lieutenant who hopes to find grounds to detain him. The officer is frustrated to find Bex's Imperial bounty-hunting license is valid and in order. He grudgingly stamps Bex's travel papers, clearing him for limited-region passage and licensed weapon carry, and dismisses him.

title: RPlog:Hunting Kyokusha and Thrask
summary: On Tatooine, Imperial Admiral Danik Kreldin and his team hunt the fugitive Kyokusha Gackt for a bounty, despite his earlier promise to her. Sniper Sandor Woden spots her in the slums of Old Mos Eisley, and Danik snatches her off the street with his swoop before chasing and stunning her down an alley with help from Sethas. The Quarren Barrien Thrask arrives too late to rescue her and battles Sethas and Woden, gravely wounding both before Danik knocks him out with his ship's tractor beam hurling debris. Danik captures both Thrask and Kyokusha, treats his wounded men and the prisoners with bacta aboard the Broadsword, and transports the captives toward Imperial Corellia for delivery to the authorities.

title: RPlog:Hutt Palace Raid
summary: Thanos, leading a ragtag band of usurpers backed by the Sith Warlord Darth Malign (Tyler Damion), storms Grubba the Hutt's palace on Nar Shaddaa in the final assault for control of the Smugglers' Moon. The attackers breach the door despite a smoke-bomb trap, cut through Gamorrean guards, and confront Grubba in his throne room; when negotiations fail Thanos opens fire and Grubba flees toward the hangar amid an explosion. Malign slaughters the surviving mercenaries, rescues the prisoner Gillian, and orders Axel's bombers to level the palace as the group retreats.

title: RPlog:I Know She Cheats at Cards
summary: At the seedy Wayside Cantina on Smuggler's Run, Chanera Thorn, Kracen Ecks, Johanna te Danaan, and Leo Corak pass time around a sabacc table where an enraged Quarren named B'ric Toppe accuses the players of cheating. Ecks slips out to send a covert encrypted transmission warning that his cover mission is compromised and an assassin is tailing him. When the Quarren turns violent and shoves Ecks, Chana incapacitates B'ric with a thrown drink and a groin strike, and the group decides to pay up and leave before being thrown out.

title: RPlog:I Was Only Passing Through
summary: In a detention block aboard the Super Star Destroyer Palpatine, Rear Admiral Airion Cimber interrogates captured Caspian Marine Lieutenant Vincit 'Yeeks' Danyeko, whose Strike Centurion was forced down after passing through Dreven's system and possibly glimpsing the Death Star III. Danyeko maintains military discipline and insists he was merely on a cartographical survey assignment cataloging spatial objects, deflecting Cimber's pointed questions. Cimber lays out the suspicious circumstances of the flight and threatens more forceful methods, while Danyeko maintains his cover story with dry, precise deflection. The interrogation ends without Danyeko admitting he was spying on the battlestation.

title: RPlog:Identification
summary: At NovaCom Cybertronics headquarters on Etti IV, antiquities dealer and Direx board member Geophreigh Smitherbodkins brings a mysterious poison canister he found planted on his ship to fellow board member and NovaCom CEO Aurelia Silabar for analysis. Aurelia identifies it as a crude first-generation fungal toxin (to which Toydarians are immune), revealing she received an identical canister the day before. The two corporate titans agree the Prex Qwynt must be removed, and Smitherbodkins announces he will convene an emergency Direx board meeting calling for Qwynt's resignation.

title: RPlog:If You Plant Them They Will Grow
summary: In an Imperial Interview Chamber, newly promoted Corporal Lanil Jast briefs the Bureau of Operations director Celo'gnaritas'Subnoto on Botanical Sample 80-2075, the highly lethal 'Alien Death Plant' that reproduces exponentially and renders soil infertile. Lanil proposes using the plant to exterminate suspected Rebel militias hiding on the border world Onderon, asking Celo's office to locate the cells so Redesign can deploy the specimen. Celo questions the ecological consequences and ultimately insists the operation be formally reported up the chain of command and approved by appropriate commanders before proceeding.

title: RPlog:Ignition
summary: At a CEC space station event unveiling a heavily modified Corellian Corvette, magnate Geophreigh Smitherbodkins IV courts guests including holovid star Wynn Ryder, gunman Alac, and Varvani chamberlain Mara Shinomiya. Over drinks, Smitherbodkins dangles a luxury speeder line called the Vanquish to entice Wynn, while Mara departs with a Sarian singer. Smitherbodkins then lures Wynn to his private office, drops his frail-cripple act, and reveals he has been secretly funding Corellian freedom fighters but wants a sovereign Corellia free of both the Empire and the New Republic. Wynn agrees to infiltrate the freedom fighters' leadership and steer them toward Smitherbodkins's goals.

title: RPlog:Imperator Circle: Crestian & Tracer
summary: While jogging through Imperator Circle in the Imperial City on Selene, newly appointed Moff Elana Tracer has a chance encounter with Admiral Crestian Tarasar. Crestian delivers a lengthy explanation of his Sith allegiance, the meaning of the term 'Sith' as species, order, and creed, and his political plans for rebuilding Caspar and the Caspar Union as a tributary of the Imperium. Tracer, softening her earlier suspicion, agrees to work with him and asks him to investigate a mysterious off-the-books black ops unit code-named Mercury.

title: RPlog:Imperial Assault on Caspar
summary: The Galactic Empire launches a massive ground assault on the planet Caspar, with General Maximilian Veers leading walker columns across a rebuilt bridge over the Sessapan River against Caspian Defense Union (CDU) Marines. Young bard Shenneret Veery disguises herself in Sergeant Sung's gear to join Webb's recon platoon and fight, despite being told she is too young. The CDU mounts a fighting withdrawal to Trinumvira base, inflicting heavy Imperial casualties; Jonathan Webb snipes and wounds Veers, and the Empire pulls back just far enough to keep the Marines cornered.

title: RPlog:Imperial Awards Ceremony
summary: Captain Danik Kreldin holds the first Conqueror award ceremony in years aboard a hotel on Selene, attended by Warlord Malign, who emerges from concealment to personally bestow the Order of Liberation on Kreldin. Enlisted Sergeant Sandor Woden and Lieutenant Lauranne Tremichall, the event's organizer, are decorated, and Woden privately confirms with Danik that a covert payment for a past favor has been received. The evening proceeds through dinner and dessert, with Commander Lanil Jast also collecting medals before Danik retires to the Conqueror.

title: RPlog:Imperial Clampdown
summary: During the Corellian Corruption Scandal, ISB Director Korynn Fleming orchestrates a COMPNOR and 501st Legion lockdown of Corellia. He receives intelligence from agent Solon Halwinder that CorSec is infiltrated by 'The Maffi' crime syndicate run by Tyy'sun, implicating Governor Bailey Sora Laran. Korynn coordinates the military occupation with Major Davyd Levvis and General Petra Doom, arrests Governor Laran in the spaceport, and prepares to transport her and CorSec Colonel Twila Virda to the Inquisitor for interrogation. Doom tortures Virda with a knife and bloodworm, and Korynn aggravates the bloodworm's path for hours of pain.

title: RPlog:Imperial Clemency
summary: Aboard the Star Destroyer Nemesis in orbit over Caspar, Imperial nobleman Lord Aldus Thel interrogates captured New Republic ambassador Ambrosia Delgard after she has endured drug-assisted torture. He offers her a full pardon and asylum in exchange for signing a confession that the Rebellion induced Caspar to breach its arms treaty. When she refuses, Thel reveals that her long-lost first daughter is Imperial Lieutenant Kovani and threatens to execute the woman within five minutes; Ambrosia capitulates, signs the confession with her thumbprint, and is sent to share a cell with her reunited daughter.

title: RPlog:Imperial Gala Continued
summary: At a lavish Imperial Day gala in the Grand Ballroom of the Imperial Museum on Coruscant, hosted by High Marshal Krieg, Imperial officers, nobles, and an ISB contingent mingle while a reporter conducts interviews. ISB Director Korynn Fleming interrogates Twi'lek geneticist Dr. Dariza Ipex about her recombinant genetics work while abusively disciplining his date Jayla Burano under the table. A disguised Sullustan agent (Enb'Zik posing as florist Fiub Giun) shadows the conversation, swoop racer Jeni Donella socializes, and the evening winds down with guests departing.

title: RPlog:Imperial Interrogation
summary: Commander Danik Kreldin and Commander Lanil Jast interrogate captured smuggler Seneca Eris Foyle in an Imperial cell on Selene, accusing her of running weapons to rebel cells. When she refuses to confess, stormtroopers tape her eyelids open and she is subjected to two hours of horrific Imperial atrocity imagery and a simulated Death Star destruction of Bonadan, leaving her unconscious. Afterward Danik revives her, fines her 5,000 credits, and dismisses her claim of being a protected Auditor of the Office of the Auditor General, threatening her further.

title: RPlog:Imperial Negotiations
summary: In a fortified safe house deep in Coruscant's Abyssal Ruins, crime lord Tyy'sun Eson meets with Imperial agents Tyler Damion, Jarek Syris, and Tanis Cadell to negotiate an alliance. Tyler reveals the plan to implode the New Republic Military Base by planting charges on its undercity foundation while striking from the surface. Tyy'sun agrees to provide reconnaissance, slicers, and intelligence in exchange for the Imperials clearing an undercity bunker for his Syndicate, which will also train their forces for the larger operation. The parties settle logistics, equipment, and oversight, with Jarek named overseer and Tanis volunteering to lead the recon, sealing a lucrative Maffi-Imperial alliance.

title: RPlog:Imperial Raid on Coruscant
summary: Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin leads an Imperial commando team through the sewers into the New Republic-held former Imperial Palace on Coruscant to retrieve a datacard containing the location of a Sith planet. After a fierce firefight in the main hall and throne room against NR Marines, Danik reaches the throne room where he confronts the Jedi Johanna, coercing her with a hologram showing her captured son Etiel held hostage. Danik recovers the datacard, takes Johanna prisoner, and escapes by balcony aboard a YT-2400, leading into the trip to Ord Trasi.

title: RPlog:In Her Own Skin
summary: TIE pilot Major Jal'Dana Rall, who has posed as a man for twelve years to serve the Empire, is forced into a mandatory medical examination by Colonel Liuz Bogumil of the 988th Special Operations Company. During the exam she reveals her true identity and female sex; rather than being arrested, Bogumil reacts with admiration. ISB Agent Trent Ceska then interviews her privately and, instead of punishing her, conscripts her as a weekly informant reporting on her own unit.

title: RPlog:In Mourning
summary: Late at night in the Caamasi Gardens of Ord Mantell, a heavily wounded Raxis L'ygr, recently shot down for the third time, sits alone smoking and reflecting on his mortality after killing two Imperial pilots. He encounters Shael Winter, who is restless over a missing friend and the aftermath of a trial. The two share quiet confidences about war, killing, the Imperial ace Krieg who downed them both, and Raxis's feelings for Serenella, before Shael helps the dizzy, medicated Raxis walk back to the medical center.

title: RPlog:In the Atrium
summary: In the atrium of the University of Corellia, Jedi student Orson Tighe meditates and plays a water flute when his teacher Jessalyn seeks him out for comfort. They discuss the nature of being a Jedi, with Orson questioning the cost of the Jedi path and arguing for finding personal peace, while Jessalyn defends a balanced approach. Orson agrees to meet with Skywalker for Jessalyn's sake but remains conflicted about the path before him.

title: RPlog:In the Heart of a Wroshyr Tree
summary: Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard's quiet meditation in the Wroshyr Temple on Kashyyyk is interrupted by Ewan Dain and then Lt Commander Argon Brand. The three discuss the disappearances of Wookiees and how to respond to the slavers and criminals behind them. Dain offers to assemble a civilian team to hunt the perpetrators, but Ambrosia cautions him to coordinate with New Republic Intelligence first. She agrees to arrange a meeting between Dain and NRI before departing to find an Intel liaison.

title: RPlog:In the Jungle
summary: On the newly Sith-conquered world Ord Vaxal, the Jedi Ikihsa Enb'Zik and his Horansi wife Snarl meet contact Aldol-Eo Pold, who confirms that Zik's enslaved family members were shipped offworld three months prior. Borrowing an old Chariot speeder, the couple race thirty kilometers through the jungle toward Zik's grounded fighter Ranger One while pursued by Malign's Sith battle droids, directed in orbit by Captain Cato and General Siege. Snarl destroys multiple droids (including throwing a decapitated droid into a pursuing speeder) as Zik pilots evasively through trees and old bombardment craters, reactivating Ranger One by comm as they near it.

title: RPlog:In the Sewers
summary: Hiding in the sewers of Plaxton City on Caspar after grieving the loss of Orson through the Force, Jessalyn argues with the dark-sider Simon Sezirok, who insists she cannot escape her destiny with the True Source while she vows never to be ruled by the Dark Side. To prepare disguises for the inevitable manhunt, Simon deliberately burns his own skin black with the Force, renaming himself Shale, then cuts and dyes Jessalyn's signature red hair.
