The scene captures Jessalyn's internal struggle between despair and her resolve not to betray those she loves.

title: RPlog:Interesting Developments
summary: While Salty Jack and Barnacle Bill wait in the long customs line at Ord Mantell starport, retired Commodore turned Senator Del Marx recognizes them from a past acquaintance and approaches with Marine scout Wrista Ipex. Del issues them temporary IDs and floats a proposition to make the pirates privateers working for the New Republic government, likely under the Ministry of Defense, including providing a ship. Bill's lecherous advance toward Wrista earns him a sword pressed to his groin. Del agrees to look into the privateer arrangement and the pirates provide a contact.

title: RPlog:Interlude
summary: At the New Republic base on Ord Mantell, Commander Jared Starwind discusses intelligence with the Bothan officer Askrut Melan'lya, rebuking his single-minded desire to annihilate the Empire and reminding him their duty is to defend the Republic. Mandalorian Ambassador Aranzael Moyat inquires about the overdue Wrista Ipex, and a Wookiee cadet, Cheko, introduces himself. The base erupts into chaos as three heavily damaged CR-90 corvettes - the only survivors of the Dathomir Raid - make emergency landings, one exploding on approach. Crews and Admiral Ackbar arrive to coordinate the evacuation, recover flight recorders, and triage the wounded, with Ackbar promising decorations and a cruiser squadron.

title: RPlog:Interpreting the Vision
summary: Aboard the Uwannabuyim on Yavin, Cronos (the Jedi formerly known as Markus Lisardis) joins Orson and Jessalyn to discuss a shared recurring vision of a starfield and how to identify its location. Cronos urges them to let the Force guide them while Orson proposes finding a slicer contact to map the star pattern. Underlying the planning is Jessalyn's growing distress over Orson's emotional distance since his meeting with Karrde, which culminates in him refusing to discuss their relationship and leaving her in tears.

title: RPlog:Interrogation - Face Off
summary: Aboard the New Republic Star Destroyer Reprisal, captured Imperial Captain Lynae Caiton, kidnapped by Tal'sin, is interrogated by Luke Skywalker, the Jedi Johanna Siri te Danaan, and pilot Rook while Luke probes her mind through the Force. Johanna adopts aggressive, menacing tactics, drawing out Caiton's chillingly detailed knowledge of torture and her vow that the Rebels will die by her hand. An enraged Admiral Moralis Rodriga storms in demanding answers about a General's ties to Lady Doom and threatens her life, but Caiton mocks them all; Luke concludes she is too conditioned and uses a Force compulsion to make her answer honestly before departing.

title: RPlog:Interrogation - Tell the Truth
summary: Aboard the captured-prisoner security deck of the NRSD Reprisal, the captive Imperial Captain (Doctor) Lynae Caiton is interrogated about her role in torturing Jedi Brandis Finian. Defector Captain David Stone first tries to argue her into abandoning the Empire, but she defiantly refuses; Luke Skywalker then uses a Force compulsion to make her answer truthfully, extracting that Darth Malign handed Finian over, that she has no knowledge of an 'Emperor Vadim,' and that she knows of no plans against the Jedi. Skywalker pushes a Force vision of the dark-side terror on the ship into her mind, then apologizes and leaves, unable to turn her.

title: RPlog:Interrogation Training Day 1 - Liza Molokai
summary: Aboard the I2SD Inquisitor, ISB Sector Director Korynn Fleming runs a brutal resistance-to-interrogation training operation on loyal Imperials Liza Molokai and the injured Xy'lear Dagnmith. After sleep and sensory deprivation, the pair are confronted with a staged execution of supposed comrades and their families to test their will. Both refuse to break for the 'Empire'; Korynn rewards their resilience, sparing the children and concluding that they passed, ordering them fed and their wounds treated.

title: RPlog:Interrogation Training Day 2 - Liza Molokai
summary: ISB Agent Dreven Mercurio continues Liza Molokai's interrogation-resistance training aboard the Inquisitor, escalating to extreme psychological and physical torture. He shows her a live feed of her adopted parents being executed when she refuses to submit, then drugs her with an induced migraine and surgically implants electrified probes that he uses to shock and burn her. Liza finally breaks, and Dreven instructs her that she must instead break for a younger agent who will gain commendation, leaving a vial of acid as a threat before she passes out.

title: RPlog:Interrogation Training Day 3 - Xy'lear Dagnmith
summary: On the final day of Liza Molokai's interrogation-resistance training aboard the Inquisitor, the gentle ISB Agent Dorian Navtilos talks her through her weakness (excessive compassion), guiding her to focus on duty to the Emperor. To test her, troopers brutally beat the loyal Xy'lear Dagnmith while Dorian demands her squadron's comm frequencies; Liza refuses to give them up, declaring it an honor to die for the Empire. Dorian critiques her earlier cheekiness toward Xy'lear, sends him to medical, and leaves to report his reassessment of her.

title: RPlog:Interrogation of Korynn Part 1
summary: Aboard the Inquisitor, ISB agent Dreven Mercurio interrogates a captured, badly injured Korynn Fleming (Prisoner 198A) while agent Acthpa Sanduleak observes, unaware the abduction was staged. Korynn deflects, claiming his torturers were sloppy and that he revealed nothing, pinning blame on the Corporate Sector Authority. Dreven applies repeated subcutaneous electrical shocks and, to test Korynn's will, displays a live feed of Korynn's parents Ban and Shandra and orders their execution by gunshot, which Korynn endures with fanatical loyalty. An OOC note clarifies the parents were not actually killed; the whole operation was staged.

title: RPlog:Interrogation of Korynn Part 2
summary: Continuing aboard the Inquisitor, agent Dreven Mercurio resumes pressing Prisoner 198A (Korynn Fleming) to test his loyalty and will, repeatedly shocking him with implanted probes, including one jolt that briefly stops his heart. Dreven demands to know who placed Korynn in carbonite and why CSA-marked grav-lifts were involved; Korynn maintains the abduction occurred at a Hutt facility and points suspicion toward the Corporate Sector Authority. Dreven detonates the probes out of Korynn's flesh and ends the session. An aftermath note states Korynn was later cleared for duty by the Select Committee off-camera.

title: RPlog:Interrupted Lesson
summary: Aboard the Uwannabuyim, Jessalyn teaches Orson telekinesis, coaching him until he successfully lifts a heavy crate with the Force. The lesson is interrupted first by crewmember Drew Carvallo returning from shopping, then by the arrival of Han Solo bearing bottles of brandy and Chewbacca, who greets Jessalyn warmly. Orson, uncomfortable with the unexpected visitors and worried about Karrde's ship being commandeered, makes introductions and slips away on an errand.

title: RPlog:Into Coruscant
summary: Simon Sezirok and Mira Isaria arrive at a near-deserted Corusca City spaceport on Coruscant, which has been emptied by an Imperial blockade overhead. Simon, who loathes the artificial city-world, scans nervously for danger while Mira treats the eerie quiet as merely boring. They take a lift down into the city, observing NR patrols and a passing Imperial TIE scout. The scene ends comically when Simon eats a piece of Mira's lint-covered jerky and nearly gags.

title: RPlog:Into The Nexu Den
summary: Imperial pilot Liza Molokai takes leave to tour Nar Shaddaa with the pirate Juran Reinzhiner, starting at his Beggar's Cove Cantina where he plies her with strong lum-and-caff liquor and a dose of recreational spice. He drags the nervous, increasingly intoxicated Liza through the Concourse, has her pampered in the Pleasure Palace bathhouse, and feeds her at the Meltdown Cafe while debating morality. Liza, growing drunk, makes a vague offer to help the apparently doomed Juran before passing out, with Juran leading her off to sleep it off.

title: RPlog:Into the Fray
summary: Ghost Squadron (Kyrin Sh'vani, Lance Corbet, Raxis L'ygr) jumps into deep space to intervene in an Imperial-on-Imperial battle following a failed coup against the Emperor, hoping to aid ensnared civilians. Imperial Marshal Krieg Inrokana launches with the loyalist fleet and recognizes his old nemesis Kyrin, opening a duel between them while Imperial captains Jal'Dana Rall and Keline command capital ships against the rebellious neo-Imperial cruisers. Raxis repeatedly tags Liza Molokai's interceptor in a dogfight against Alpha Squadron pilots Dante and Liza, while the loyalist fleet inflicts heavy losses on the traitor force.

title: RPlog:Into the Imperial Embassy
summary: After crash-landing the stolen shuttle Sanguine Raptor on the landing pad of the Imperial Embassy on Caspar, Simon Sezirok and Mira Isaria are surrounded by Ambassador Kizuka and a squad of stormtroopers ordering their arrest. Mira talks rapidly trying to explain while Simon Force-flings a trooper and deflects blaster fire with his lightstaff. A chaotic firefight erupts; Mira's random button-pushing in the cockpit causes the wrecked ship to lurch into the embassy wall, and stun grenades detonate among the hyperdrive. Simon cuts through the cockpit floor with his lightstaff and the pair drops away to escape.

title: RPlog:Into the Trap
summary: Battered and disarmed after losing a lightsaber duel to Lara Grayson, Jessalyn is escorted into Emperor Bacharan Valak's Sith trophy hall on Ord Trasi. Valak reveals that the artifact pieces Jessalyn unwittingly delivered form an ancient Sith device meant to freeze her life force and preserve her as a trophy. She attempts to flee, hurling her guards back with the Force, but Valak unites the artifacts and a blue beam strikes her down, causing her to vanish from the galaxy for nearly two years.

title: RPlog:Into the Underworld
summary: After Tyler Malign exorcises the Sith Spawn 'Sov'stayn' from the scientist Basca Starker, Basca and Jessalyn Valios flee Cloud City aboard the Tibanna Blues into Hutt Space. Basca reveals he chose Jessalyn over Vadim and his research, then takes her to Sov'stayn's medical frigate Jaded Redemption, where a Force-blind chamber (built with ysalimiri) hides them from all Force users. There he introduces a clone girl named Hanna, confirms Jessalyn is pregnant with his child, and proposes marriage and a life together in the Outer Rim.

title: RPlog:Introduction to Serenella
summary: In the Spire of Meditation at the Jedi Temple on New Alderaan (Ord Mantell), Luke Skywalker counsels pregnant performer Serenella Jordain, who decides to let the Jedi help raise her Force-capable daughter Tara while pursuing her own stage and holo-film career. Luke's apprentice Sabrina Rheatis arrives and is introduced, learning that Tara's father Dareus has become Malign's Sith apprentice. After Serenella leaves to rest, Luke and Sabrina privately discuss the danger of harboring two Sith offspring (Dareus's and Malign's) in the Temple, and Sabrina commits to resuming her formal Jedi training under Luke.

title: RPlog:It's Just a Flesh Wound
summary: Recovering in the infirmary of the HIMS Dauntless after being shot in the leg defending Grand Admiral Danik during a Rebel bombing attack, ISB Senior Agent Lanil Jast first clashes over the comm with Bureau of Operations agent Liuz Bogumil, who refuses to share classified findings about the security failure. Lieutenant Maris Becton then visits, worried about her soul-sister Lynae, and Lanil admits his romantic feelings for Lynae. Finally Dr. Lynae Cassius treats Lanil, reports the Admiral survived and the terrorists are dead, and Lanil shares disturbing rumors that her husband Yoseph is MIA/presumed dead, which Lynae refuses to believe.

title: RPlog:It's Lorn Rhys
summary: Aboard Orbital Station Guardian, Moff Lorn Rhys intercepts the escorted civilian Morganna Tazecks in the lounge and interrogates her about why she has access to the station's restricted areas. Morganna claims she is delivering Caspian luxury goods under her Imperial trade permits, but Rhys, a trained interrogator, senses her evasiveness about her connection to station commander Captain Atrox. The exchange grows hostile as Rhys threatens her with COMPNOR detention and references an earlier offer aboard the Redemption before departing to discuss her with Atrox.

title: RPlog:Jailbreak
summary: Imprisoned and tortured by the Empire on New Alderaan, the medic Myiari Oerstead snaps when a stormtrooper taunts her, beating him unconscious and seizing his weapons. She frees the tortured Mon Calamari Senator Tokoga and drags him out via a makeshift harness while fending off Lieutenant Rainer Maximilian and the stormtrooper Brek Halsmer in a running firefight using stolen rifles and grenades. Unknown to the escapees, Rainer and Brek had orchestrated the escape as a staged exercise, deliberately using stun rounds and avoiding lethal force. The pair finally break out as local Civil Security storms the building, and the captured Imperials escape through a hidden basement door.

title: RPlog:Jairen Stops a Thief
summary: At the Sandbar in Plaxton, Caspar, Tsaran Joir strikes up a conversation with Marine pilot Tarlin and ex-TIE trainee Azya about their pasts, revealing his Imperial Royal Guard tattoo. The gathering is interrupted when the swordsman Jairen catches a young pickpocket, prompting the pickpocket's drunken friend Tegger to draw a blaster. Jairen slices the blaster apart with his sword, Tarlin's summoned Marines arrest Tegger at the door, and the confrontation ends without bloodshed.

title: RPlog:Jamon's Abduction
summary: On Caspar, a Sarian woman named Breecia seduces Caspian naval pilot Lt. Jamon 'Bullseye' Grendine at the Sandbar bar, then lures him into an alley where she and a blond accomplice abduct him at gunpoint. They imprison him in a makeshift cell and inject him with the truth-serum Bavo Six to extract the name of his commanding officer (Commander Adam Shadow) and record a coerced message. Breecia's employer, the Twi'lek crime planner Kora Liadin, is being held in Caspian military prison; the kidnappers use Jamon as leverage and arrange a beach exchange with Commander Shadow. The prisoner swap goes off on a Caspian beach, returning Jamon while freeing Kora.

title: RPlog:Jedi Lessons
summary: On a nighttime beach in Coronet City, Corellia, Jessalyn Valios guides her new apprentice Orson Tighe through a Force-perception exercise, having him sense distant people, animals, and sounds. The lesson turns personal as they share their pasts and Orson confesses his feelings for her. They end up in the ocean together, where Orson insists she is no waste and worth pursuing, while Jessalyn, afraid of repeating past mistakes, asks for time to heal.

title: RPlog:Jedi Purge - Aubrey's Death
summary: On Tatooine outside Luke Skywalker's Jedi School, the corrupted apprentice Cort Stasus confronts Aubrey Saralyn over the body of Priti, whom Aubrey killed in a rage with a saber Cort secretly modified to be lethal. Cort taunts Aubrey into a furious lightsaber duel atop his training tower, urging her to embrace the Dark Side. As the fight rages, Aubrey ultimately releases her hatred, finds peace through the Light, and extinguishes her blade in surrender. Cort kills her anyway, hurling her off the platform with a Force blast and breaking her neck, then collects her saber as a trophy.

title: RPlog:Jedi Purge - Cort versus Ethan
summary: Returning to Luke's Tatooine Jedi School at Luke's behest, apprentice Ethan Katana arrives with C-3PO to find the courtyard strewn with the bodies of Aubrey, Priti, and Tholt. The now-fallen Cort Stasus, calling himself Etrigan, shoots C-3PO and Force-kills Ethan's dog Bram before dueling Ethan. Cort overpowers and brutally kills Ethan, stomping his head, while Ethan vows revenge with his dying breath. Cort then detonates a bomb that destroys the school and walks off into the desert with his trophies, completing the Second Jedi Purge.

title: RPlog:Jedi Purge - Priti's Death
summary: At Luke's Jedi School on Tatooine, apprentices Aubrey Saralyn and Priti agree to a friendly sparring match on Cort's training apparatus, unaware Cort has secretly modified Aubrey's practice saber into a lethal weapon. As Priti gains the upper hand, Aubrey's competitiveness curdles into Dark Side rage. When Priti surrenders and deactivates her blade, Aubrey swings one final time and cuts deep into Priti's side; Priti dies peacefully, consoling her stricken friend with words about feeling the Force. Consumed by grief and then fury, Aubrey blames Cort and screams his name, setting the stage for the rest of the purge.

title: RPlog:Jedi Under Glass
summary: Posing as a male officer, Lt. Commander Jal'Dann Rall visits the captive Jedi Ai'kani Za'netra in an Imperial brig where she is being held in deliberately cold, low-ration conditions. Rall, under vague orders to 'know the enemy,' engages Ai'kani in a philosophical debate about morality, deception, nature, and loyalty. Ai'kani perceives Rall's hidden secret and warns that some comrades are more aware than Rall perceives, while Rall tells the parable of the scorpion and the otter.

title: RPlog:Jessa Drops a Bomb
summary: A chance gathering at Johanna's Cloud City penthouse brings together Jessalyn, the returned Corellian Kyyel Marrak, Moff Elana Tracer, and Presav Crestian Tarasar with his daughter Atsvara. Johanna offers Kyyel a new ship and smooths over a dispute with Tracer about their children's courtship. Jessalyn pulls Johanna aside and silently transmits the recent events with Basca Starker through the Force, then departs after publicly telling Crestian she hopes he can bring Starker to justice, leaving Crestian furious and baffled over the inconsistency of letting the mass-murderer go.

title: RPlog:Jessalyn's Dream
summary: In the corridors and crew quarters of the NRV Alderaan, Jessalyn confides to Luke Skywalker that she has been having unsettling dreams of an intruding voice in her mind. Luke probes her dream through the Force, witnessing a presence asking 'What do you think of the prisoner?', and abruptly breaks contact, fearing a Dark Lord (Sabbath). Admiral Jeralic Mandragon intervenes, and afterward Luke speaks with the young busker Shenneret Veery, learning that the fallen Dark Jedi Alora Antieres was on Etti IV trying to recruit the kid.

title: RPlog:Jessalyn's Hardest Lesson
summary: Aboard the Millennium Falcon, Jessalyn has her first real conversation with Luke Skywalker since returning from captivity. She reports that the Force cannot be sensed on Myrkr due to a certain creature there, then turns to personal matters, explaining her failed attempt to save the now-fallen Simon Sezirok. The talk culminates in Jessalyn finally confronting Luke about her long-unrequited love for him and declaring she must let him go, leaving him confused and reflective.

title: RPlog:Jessalyn Meets Leia
summary: Aboard the NRV Hyperon, Jessalyn Valios enters the crew quarters and unknowingly meets Princess Leia Organa Solo, who is reading on a bunk. After realizing who she is and apologizing for not recognizing her, Jessalyn reports that she and Chewbacca were unsuccessful in finding Mr. Roark's daughter during their search for clues to Han Solo's whereabouts. The two exchange warm courtesies before parting for the night.

title: RPlog:Jessalyn and the Force
summary: In the Coral Gardens of Mon Calamari, Luke Skywalker seeks out Jessalyn Valios to reveal that she is strong in the Force and that he wishes to train her as his first Jedi student. Jessalyn reacts with disbelief and fear, insisting she never wanted this and that it would upend her life. Luke explains the danger of remaining untrained, warns of the Dark Side and the fallen Alora, and they agree to meet on Yavin to begin her training.

title: RPlog:Johanna's Senate Hearing
summary: The New Republic Senate convenes a public, galaxy-broadcast hearing to judge Jedi Knight Johanna Siri te Danaan for war crimes: failing to warn of the Empire's Base Delta Zero of Cochran and helping destroy the Jedi Basilica. Prosecutor Aideen Shamus presses her, Luke Skywalker and General Ikihsa defend her as a victim of Sith manipulation, and Senator Viktor Faust opens the floor to senatorial questioning. By majority vote the Senate accepts Johanna's guilty plea, sparing her a court martial; General Madine orders her stripped of all military rank and discharged, with a recommendation she be demoted from Jedi Knight to Apprentice.

title: RPlog:Johanna Disembodied
summary: At nightfall Luke Skywalker secretly visits the ruins of the destroyed Jedi Basilica on Coruscant, using postcognition to learn that the fallen Jedi Johanna Siri te Danaan caused its destruction. Confronting her, he tries to persuade her that the dark presence of Aleister Vadim has manipulated and corrupted her, but she ignites her lightsaber and attacks. Mid-duel, Vadim fully possesses Johanna's body, halting Luke's Force attack and conversing with him about his ancient designs while dismissing the Jedi Order. When Luke refuses to ask for Johanna's release, Vadim withdraws and frees her by killing her, leaving Luke grieving over her lifeless body in the rubble.

title: RPlog:Johanna Has a Ball on Bespin
summary: Johanna te Danaan hosts the First Annual Youngling Ball in the Yarith Hotel ballroom on Cloud City, bringing together the children of Jedi and Sith. Imperator Malign arrives with his Sith witches Quaye and Leda, sparking tension when they goad Jessalyn Valios and her son Kiri, defused by Johanna; meanwhile Imperium Captain Kipran Jawatha woos Malign's daughter Sonja Damion, and washed-up reporter Loy Marin needles the adults for a story. Malign interrupts the young couple's near-kiss but grants his approval, gifting Sonja an estate on Selene before departing. In a closing coda, distant scavengers unwittingly free a goateed man held in stasis, who kills them.

title: RPlog:Johanna Must Be Saved
summary: Leia visits Luke at the New Republic Military Base, where he keeps vigil over Johanna's bacta-preserved body while her spirit wanders inside another man, the Horansi Snarl standing guard. Stepping out to a starport for privacy, the twins debate the danger that the Sith Lord Vadim deliberately released Johanna's spirit as a trap. Despite the risks, they resolve to do everything possible to reunite Johanna's spirit with her body, and discuss communing with their father Anakin and preparing through meditation.

title: RPlog:Johanna is a Witch
summary: Returning to his Corellian estate for a vacation, Imperial Danik Kreldin is ambushed by fallen Jedi Johanna Siri te Danaan, who uses Affect Mind to lure him aboard her ship and transport him to Tatooine. There she dangles him over the Sarlacc pit and uses the Force to extract the secret Imperial plan to Base Delta Zero the planet Cochran. She then drugs him in Mos Eisley and, threatening his elderly mother, forces a mind-controlled Danik to record a denunciation of the Empire, which is broadcast galaxy-wide on IGN before the reporter Bruce Mach mysteriously vanishes.

title: RPlog:Joir and Adlerson
summary: Tsaran Joir meets privately with Grand Admiral Morlok Adlerson in a back office of the Imperial Embassy on Caspar to report intelligence that Caspar is on military alert over a possible Imperial civil war. After guardedly identifying mercenary informant McTavish as his source, Joir learns Adlerson independently suspects a plot emanating from the OS Redemption system. The two agree Joir will feign ignorance, keep watching figures like Dogma and Morrison, and pledge mutual support to root out the brewing treason.

title: RPlog:Joir in Command
summary: Tsaran Joir reports to Grand Admiral Morlok Adlerson about disturbing rumors regarding the stability of the Imperial Bureau of Operations and the questioning of his own role. Adlerson informs Joir that Lord Atrox is no longer in command of the Bureau and that Joir is to act as its leader until a new Director is appointed. Joir accepts the responsibility, pledging to serve the Emperor to the best of his ability.

title: RPlog:Judgement Passed
summary: Aboard the I2SD Inquisitor, Line Captain Jal'Dana Rall is summoned to pass judgment on Pilot Officer Damien Loki Katon, who has been interrogated by ISB Director Korynn Fleming for treason. The charges of high treason, sedition, and disloyalty are read aloud, and Rall offers Katon a choice: submit to Emperor Vadim or die. Katon refuses to kneel, defiantly proclaiming loyalty to Palpatine's dream, and Rall executes him with a single blaster bolt to the head, ordering his body disposed of as garbage.

title: RPlog:Juran's Interrogation
summary: Aboard the Imperial Star Destroyer Inquisitor, ISB System Director Korynn Fleming interrogates the pirate captain Juran Reinzhiner and his companion Kyokusha Gackt, both implicated in Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin's attempted coup against Emperor Vadim. Korynn tortures Kyokusha with a swarm of piranha beetles to pressure Juran into confessing the details of Kreldin's bombing plot and providing descriptions of attendees. Juran cooperates and is offered a deal: a 20,000-credit bail and waived treason charges if he helps hunt down Kreldin, with a tracking device placed on their ship under penalty of death.

title: RPlog:Just Play the Game
summary: On leave at a smuggler's settlement on the lifeless world of Tholatin, New Republic pilot Raxis L'ygr recognizes Imperial pilot Liza Molokai and rescues her from a hostile Chiss after she enters the cantina unarmed. The two enemies sit down to play a friendly game of sabacc over drinks, discussing the war, loyalty, and death while neither takes the rivalry personally. Raxis teaches Liza the game and, despite winning, lets her take the forty-credit pot; she returns half and asks him to walk her to the spaceport. They part amicably, fully aware they will try to kill each other in their next dogfight.

title: RPlog:Justice
summary: At the Sandbar on Caspar, Tsaran Joir, now flanked by two bodyguards after a recent shooting, meets Marine pilot Tarlin and discusses the wounded Imperial Ambassador. Tarlin presses for her medical status and bristles at perceived veiled threats, while Joir reveals she remains in critical condition. The two reach a tenuous agreement to share information and bring the assailants to justice, repeating the motto 'Duty First'.

title: RPlog:K'tyyri Meets Rasi
summary: At Chianar Plaza on Ord Mantell, naval Commander Rasi Praddhan Cen meets the pregnant Doctor Lynae Cassius, and their quiet time is interrupted by the Horansi K'tyyri Tarashabi and her wandering cubs. After K'tyyri disciplines her stray cub Sufa, the three discuss Mutanda's plight, the war against the CSA, Empire, and Griffon Alliance, and how K'tyyri might petition the Republic's senators. Lynae advises her on approaching the Senate while Rasi offers to help arrange connections, and K'tyyri makes clear she seeks war or another acceptable solution for her people.

title: RPlog:Karaoke
summary: A small gathering in arms dealer Malif Tal-Tahn's Coruscant office to discuss weapons contracts devolves into a raucous party. The drunken pirate Juran and the disguised Sith Lord Tyler Damion (Darth Malign) commandeer the bandstand at blasterpoint and perform rowdy drinking songs. Imperial pilot Alex Dante follows with several bawdy and irreverent fighter-pilot ditties while shy Imperial officer Liza Molokai and Captain Keline Nelhrn look on. The night is pure comic revelry with smashed glasses, free booze, and karaoke.

title: RPlog:Karrde & Gang's Great Escape
summary: On Imperial-occupied Chandrila, smuggler Talon Karrde is running weapons to the insurgency when his group is spotted by Imperial Agent Sarbuck in Hanna City, triggering a running gunfight in which two of Karrde's men, Thom and Frey, are killed or captured. Captain Danik Kreldin issues an ultimatum to orbitally bombard Hanna City unless the insurgents surrender, and dispatches stormtroopers and tanks to capture the Wild Karrde. The heavily armed freighter fights off the ground assault, lifts off, and with Leia Organa Solo using the Force to deflect fire, escapes through the Imperial fleet's blockade into hyperspace.

title: RPlog:Karrde Visits
summary: On Talon Karrde's hidden base on Myrkr, Jessalyn Valios privately reveals to Karrde that something living in the forest blocks the Force, affecting both her and another adept named Simon. Karrde, distracted and burdened by a crisis threatening to unravel his organization, dismisses the need for experiments and quietly confides his despair to his mechanic Orson Tighe, lamenting that Luke Skywalker is unreachable. The scene ends with Karrde leaving for a walk and Orson returning to ship repairs.

title: RPlog:Karrde and Joir
summary: Count Tsaran Joir, an Imperial official from the Ministry of Commerce now working in covert operations, meets Talon Karrde, the Baron Administrator of Cloud City on Bespin, to negotiate special treatment for the corporation TCF. Joir asks Karrde to notify him if TCF breaks station laws and to occasionally turn a blind eye to their operations, in exchange for Imperial compensation and TCF's free services. Karrde, courteous and noncommittal, agrees to allow TCF to operate while reserving the right to act against them if they overstep, and asks for details on their ships to avoid incidents. The Rodian Leebo eavesdrops on the initial dockside exchange.

title: RPlog:Kashyyyk Infiltration
summary: An Imperial commando platoon led by Danik Kreldin lands a Corellian Corvette in a remote Kashyyyk clearing to sabotage a Rebel/New Republic military installation, targeting a communications array and a medical supply depot. The NR flagship Redeemer detects the unauthorized arrival and hot-drops marines via drop pods to intercept, while two Wookiees (Nol'Fet and Rharkyrtha) independently move to attack the Imperials. The Imperial vanguard reaches its target while the rear guard, aided by Maethor Savage's mine ambush and Anatoli Black's Sith vibro-blade attacks, surrounds and cuts down the NR skirmish line. The NR marines suffer heavy casualties as they are pinned and overwhelmed.

title: RPlog:Kashyyyk Intel
summary: Under orders from Darth Malign, Seifer Wolf flies a black Headhunter II to Kashyyyk space to assess New Republic military strength, escorted by two Lightning Squadron TIEs. He deliberately ignores hails from Kashyyyk control while scanning passing ships and recording fleet data. New Republic Ghost Squadron, led by Major Kyrin Sh'vani, intercepts and confronts him; after a tense stalling exchange the three X-Wings lock S-foils to disable the intruder. The log is marked unfinished.

title: RPlog:Kidnapped on GDIStar
summary: In the GDIStar lounge, Piper (Simone Drake), Kuxli, and the Mon Calamari N'Saldon debate Imperial competence and CSA economics with the Dark Jedi Sabbathius Osbourne, who hints ominously about a coming change in the Empire and his planned meeting with Grand Moff Caldny. After Kuxli storms off and N'Saldon leaves to fetch Espo guards, Sabbath corners Piper in the residential sector and forcibly abducts her, confiscating her comlink. He flies her aboard his Corellian Corvette the Ummagumma as an 'insurance policy' for his visit to Caldny.

title: RPlog:Kidnapping Brandis
summary: Danik Kreldin lures the Jedi-in-training and doctor Brandis Finian to a Tatooine marketplace with a faked distress message about Talon Karrde, then ambushes him with two disguised stormtrooper snipers. The two duel with vibrorapiers; Danik throws a frag grenade into a crowded shop to exploit Brandis's protective instincts and stabs him through the shoulder. A masked Hutt agent named Rake intervenes with a neurolash, claiming Hutt territory and demanding tribute, but Danik wounds and drives him off. Brandis is eventually downed by multiple stun bolts and Danik orders his unconscious body taken back to the ship.

title: RPlog:Kidnapping Celo
summary: After a meeting at the Kreldin Estate, Danik Kreldin (using the alias Alois) pursues the Chiss CDU spy Celo'gnaritas'Subnoto (Cetolum) into a Corellian alley using a jetpack and enhanced armor. Realizing the man is a spy, Danik traps him with a non-lethal glop grenade and then a powerful HM-100 riot gun. Cetolum tries to disable the jetpack with a concealed blaster but is blasted down when Danik shoots the crates sheltering him. Danik hauls the incapacitated Chiss over his shoulder, intending to return through the Coronet sewers to his estate for interrogation.

title: RPlog:Korolov's Senate Bombing
summary: During a New Republic Senate session on Coruscant, Chief of State Leia Organa Solo presides over debate on Senator Jenya Vala's failed 'Liberation Incentive Motion' to retake Imperial-held worlds within 30 days, which General Ikihsa Enb'Zik argues against and the Senate votes down. As Leia calls a recess, the Coruscanti Senator 'Viktor Faust' detonates planted explosives that vaporize the Coruscant Governor's platform and dozens of delegations, revealing himself as the Sith Lord Vassily Korolov. Disguised Coruscant Guards led by Captain Davyd Levvis turn their weapons on the senators while Luke Skywalker arrives to duel Korolov and shield survivors. Korolov escapes to seize the Palace as his headquarters, the Senate building collapses, and New Republic Marines evacuate the wounded Leia, Enb'Zik, and others amid hundreds of casualties.

title: RPlog:Korynn is Discovered at Selene
summary: Korynn Fleming's covert reinsertion plan reaches its point of no return when his tortured body is found frozen in carbonite aboard a smuggler's freighter caught during a customs inspection at Selene. Colonel Desson dispatches ISB Agent Dreven Mercurio with a CompForce Assault Squad to recover the carbonite slab, which is verified at a 97% match to Fleming. Back on the Inquisitor, Korynn is thawed, revealed to have been brutally tortured, and placed in a bacta tank, where Dreven formally strips his rank and designates him 'Prisoner 198A' pending a Select Committee hearing to determine whether he was compromised.

title: RPlog:Krieg... to the Rescue?
summary: Aboard the Inquisitor, captive Shael Edur is hooded, cuffed, beaten, and deprived of sleep by a sadistic guard as part of her ISB conditioning. Marshal Krieg Inrokana then visits, insisting she address him by her prisoner number C-1125, and offers her only two ways out: betray the New Republic's locations or accept Imperial military service. Shael refuses both, claiming she knows nothing and pleading that there were children in the crates bound for Kessel; Krieg, citing Director Fleming, says he cannot help her unless she cooperates and leaves her to another beating.

title: RPlog:Kubaz, Trandoshan, and Wookiee
summary: In the aftermath of devastating attacks on Cloud City (a refinery explosion and assaults on a banquet and brothel), three Caspian-aligned beings take a break at the Caspar Caff. There they find acting Baroness-Administrator Quinne Stardust Rose, exhausted from reassuring residents, and discover the Caff's founder Zeak Oppenhiemer personally training a Rodian barista (whom he insists on calling 'Jack'). Drorq orders an experimental drink tasting like swamp water, and the group muses suspiciously about whether Zeak (Johanna's ex) could be behind the attacks. The scene ends with Zeak slipping away cryptically, hinting more is to come.

title: RPlog:Lady Alora Antieres
summary: Aboard the Black Dragon on Palanhi, Jessalyn reconciles with the runaway teen Shenner after a fight and they go to find Paul Nighman for a way offworld. In the Grand Palanhi Hotel, the dark-side fallen Alora Antieres confronts Jessalyn, manipulating her through the Force with promises that she can save and be loved by Luke Skywalker if she embraces her anger. Paul and Shenner forcibly drag the distraught Jessalyn back to the ship, where Leia helps her resist Alora's continued telepathic temptation, while ESPOs and the agent Crimthan look on.

title: RPlog:Landing on Cochran
summary: Imperial 501st Legion stormtroopers, led by Sergeant Tanis Cadell, make a contested dropship landing at Lingons starport on Cochran to take down shield generators, encountering surprisingly light resistance. Sandor Woden, a former Imperial now defected to the New Republic, fights alongside the mercenary Kintor against his old comrades and is gravely wounded by Tanis's fire. As the NR mounts a counter-attack, the Empire springs a pincer with AT-ATs, AT-STs and CompForce troopers landing behind the rebel lines, while a Lambda shuttle blasts the Imperial March. NR Ghost Squadron X-wings finally arrive and down the lead AT-AT, and Warlord Vassily Korolov personally joins the ground battle.

title: RPlog:Last Night on Kichnar
summary: At the Keepon Casino on Kichnar Orbital Station, the Corellian Paul Nighman seeks out Ariana Millikin before leaving the system, having failed to buy a submarine. They dance and drink while Ariana confides her unhappiness over her relationship with the absent Talon Karrde, who is both her employer and lover. Karrde himself arrives and sends a bouncer to hover over their table; meanwhile Lando Calrissian discusses Karrde's new Bespin venture and his sizable loan, and Ariana's protective brother Jase watches the room. Ariana, increasingly angry and humiliated, prepares to leave for fresh air.

title: RPlog:Leamer
summary: Aboard a New Republic frigate's medbay, Jessalyn tends to the recovering Xegid Roark and they share a tender, uncertain conversation about their future. The Horansi officer Captain Leamer arrives, condescendingly questioning Roark, then is found in the crew lounge harshly drilling the young Horansi corporal Kuxli under their species' caste system. Jessalyn furiously confronts Leamer in Kuxli's defense, orders are issued, and afterward she comforts Kuxli, who returns a pendant she once gave him; she reveals she lost her baby.

title: RPlog:Lecture on Imperial Leadership
summary: Aboard the HIMS Inquisitor, Commodore Krieg Inrokana delivers a training lecture on leadership, discipline, and professionalism within the Imperial Military, assisted by Lieutenant Vextin Mandor. Officer Liza Molokai recounts being ambushed in a New Republic trap when she flew without her wingman, used as a cautionary lesson, while SAG Cadet Ashden Keldrona argues fervently for obedience and Imperial vigilance. Krieg stresses that commanders must think for themselves and flex their plans rather than blindly run into traps, using a surgeon-and-scalpel metaphor for precise versus wasteful action. The session ends with notes promised to all and hints at an upcoming major operation and an awards ceremony.

title: RPlog:Left Unsaid
summary: Aboard the Crusader's lounge, Sabrina Rheatis and Luke Skywalker share a meal and wine while worrying over the injured Leia and the missing Han. Their easy, flirtatious conversation about Luke's youth and Sabrina's upbringing edges toward intimacy, prompting Luke to abruptly resolve to maintain proper master-student boundaries. When he tries to leave, Sabrina confesses her feelings; Luke, shocked, declares it impossible and flees the lounge, leaving Sabrina anguished and alone with the wine.

title: RPlog:Leia's Advice
summary: Luke is summoned to Leia's office after Sabrina's rescue; he reports Sabrina was retrieved unconscious and that he senses a darkness in her, fearing she met Vadim. They discuss the upcoming Senate hearing on Johanna's Empire-coerced actions, weighing whether revealing the secret true Emperor's existence could inflame the non-human population. After a brief interruption by the Quarren Barrien Thrask (reporting Karrde received a datachip), Luke teaches Leia a Force-unity meditation, deepening their twin bond over a three-hour communion, then they turn to reassigning Enb'Zik and Snarl.

title: RPlog:Lessons Learned - Part 1
summary: At a Corellian starport on her day off, CorSec Colonel Twila Virda relaxes on smuggler Cubitt Tethes's docking ramp sharing brandy when the bigoted Imperial officer Oren Balak insults her as a lesser 'creature.' Twila sucker-punches Oren, Cubitt draws his sword, and Gren Delede and the medic Bren Senzi arrive to back her up while CorSec officer Auo brings a squad to defuse the scene. The droid 501-Zed swings a stun baton at Oren but accidentally strikes Twila, knocking her unconscious as the confrontation ends.

title: RPlog:Lessons Learned - Part 2
summary: At a Corellian spaceport, a brawl erupts after Imperial Ensign Oren Balak clashes with Colonel Twila Virda, who takes a stun-baton hit from the security droid 501-Zed meant for Oren and is knocked unconscious. Governor Bailey Sora Laran arrives and orders a full CorSec containment, putting Twila on report and detaining the participants for investigation. The droid surrenders, Cubitt Tethes (the swordsman who tried to help) is held for clearance, and Imperial pilot Seifer Wolf arrives with Black Squadron to take custody of the Imperial side.

title: RPlog:Lessons Learned - Part 3
summary: The aftermath of the spaceport brawl is resolved as CorSec Lieutenant Auo negotiates jurisdiction with Imperial Lt. Commander Seifer Wolf over custody of Ensign Oren Balak. Wolf asserts Imperial authority, and stormtroopers (notably ST-8843 Estos) vouch for his rank, allowing Oren to be remanded to the Imperial garrison. Twila, recovered, orders Cubitt's ship impounded with fees waived, salutes the departing officers, and leaves; Oren vows this is not over.

title: RPlog:Let the Tour Begin
summary: Minister of State Leia Organa Solo makes a surprise inspection visit to the New Republic embassy on Caspar, greeted by CDU representatives Lord Camrath Kizuka and his adopted Shistavanen son Prince Ullan. A pregnant Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard arrives slightly late to welcome Leia. Leia exchanges diplomatic pleasantries with the Kizukas, noting the Presav's conspicuous absence, then announces she would like a tour of the embassy. Ambrosia quietly instructs her droid C4 to forward a notice to the Presav as the tour begins.

title: RPlog:Letting the Chips Fall
summary: Aboard the bridge of the CSAV Remittance, Lieutenant Gren Delede reports to crimelord Tyy'sun Eson that Twila Virda has been captured by Compnor/ISB and that he negotiated her release directly with Darth Malign by agreeing to withdraw the Maffi syndicate's operations from the Empire. Enraged that Delede overstepped his authority and spoke for the council, Eson chokes him and rails against the decision. Eson ultimately spares Delede's career, demanding instead that he find the traitor who exposed the Family's Corellian operations and that he forfeit a finger as punishment. The Pledge Scrat is forced to sever Delede's finger with a vibroblade.

title: RPlog:Life Begins Young
summary: Two young Caspian girls, Atsvara Tarasar and Veruca Violet, travel to the Killaniri/Justa system to meet their old friend Kasha Tabasuri, a Horansi spiritual advisor, at the Vulgar Mynock cantina. Over porf and drinks, they reveal it is not a social call: as CEO and COO of the Golden Bantha Group, they share intelligence (originating from Kasha's father) that the Nova Syndicate is using Biscuit Baron franchises for sentient trafficking, and that they are buying the chain to take it independent. They also discuss a covert intelligence operation disguised as a party for tycoon Malif Tal-Tahn. Kasha agrees to return offworld to rejoin the Mission and reconnect with her father.

title: RPlog:Lightsaber Lesson
summary: During a hyperspace journey from Nar Shaddaa to Yavin IV aboard the Uwannabuyim, Jessalyn Valios secretly trains Orson Tighe in lightsaber combat, disobeying Luke Skywalker's request not to. She spars with him and adds his own training remote to the exercise, pushing him hard so he'll be prepared for a coming conflict with the Sith. After Orson takes several stings and a fall, the lesson ends affectionately with Jessalyn healing his leg through the Force and the couple making plans to relax on Yavin.

title: RPlog:Line In The Sand
summary: Aboard the Jedi cruiser Refrain of Anshalar over Mon Calamari (Dac), Leia seeks Luke's counsel about the deteriorating crisis on the planet, including the sabotaged bacta and food supplies and the attack on Coral City. She reveals that Darth Malign has offered to use his dark-side abilities to find the cause of the disaster, and weighs whether to accept. Luke adamantly refuses, arguing Malign is wholly Vadim's servant and a war criminal; the two debate Jedi morality and Leia critiques Luke's arrogance. They ultimately agree to go to Dac themselves rather than rely on Malign, drawing a 'line in the sand.'

title: RPlog:Liquid Breakfast
summary: A sleep-deprived Gimel Daleth stalks into the rebuilt Sandbar tavern in Plaxton, ordering caf laced with whiskey and complaining that his pregnant mistress Tuzzi Reenoon kept him up all night. He trades barbs with NR Commander Adam Shadow and the clumsy human Shintu, then chats more openly with pilot Asli Nayana, revealing he and Tuzzi are unmarried and live separately. As the alcohol takes hold, Daleth waves his hold-out blaster around (jokingly 'hunting' a muffin), nearly shoots Krel by mistake, and finally falls asleep at the table clutching the muffin, leaving Krel to fetch Sinter to carry him off.

title: RPlog:Little Storyteller
summary: In a seaside cliff cave at dawn, a young girl named Gabi tends a small fire and recites the creation myth of the Sarian people, etching the tale into the limestone floor with fossilized coral as she tells it. The legend describes how the stars unleashed a burning cataclysm, how those who heeded the warning signs survived underground while others perished, and how the survivors were forever changed in a 'new birth.' As she finishes and smothers the fire, she senses the approaching footsteps of Leo, a Jedi pilot she regards as her guardian.

title: RPlog:Liza's Morning After
summary: The morning after her Nar Shaddaa binge, Liza Molokai wakes hungover in Juran Reinzhiner's quarters aboard his privateer ship Privateer, repeatedly ill into a basin he prepared. Juran reassures the embarrassed pilot that nothing improper happened and lectures her on the morning-after lesson while polishing his rare armor. He then takes her on an EVA flight test of his Z-96 fighters, coaching her unorthodox piloting and giving her a confidence boost, insisting she will rise in the ranks and dropping her back near her duties.

title: RPlog:Local Law
summary: An Imperial Inquisition delegation from the ISD Inquisitor meets CorSec officers at a station in Coronet City to discuss the investigation into a pirate broadcast tied to the Five Worlds resistance group. The meeting turns into a trap when Captain Durjan, a secret Corellian patriot, locks the room, murders his loyal superior Major Peny, and attempts to take the Imperials hostage for a prisoner exchange. Jonas, Valerius, Rainer, and the arriving stormtrooper Brek Halsmer fight back, eventually beating Durjan into unconsciousness and capturing him. Afterward the trio debate intimidation versus subtlety as counterinsurgency tactics and raid the dead major's office for whiskey.

title: RPlog:Loki's Confession
summary: ISB System Director Korynn Fleming interrogates detained TIE pilot Flight Officer Damien 'Loki' Katon, who attended Danik Kreldin's meeting plotting to overthrow Emperor Vadim. Loki defiantly argues his loyalty lies with Palpatine's ideal Empire and openly disdains the new alien Emperor Vadim, while Korynn counters that the Emperor is the Empire and that Loki was manipulated by Kreldin. Korynn informs Loki he is now an enemy of the Empire facing treason charges, dangling cooperation as his only hope while privately viewing him as a tool to extract more on Kreldin's plans.

title: RPlog:Looking For Old Soldiers
summary: On Vorzyd V, Serenella Jordain returns from a fraught visit with her mother and, with Ka'una La, sets out to track down the identity of her father among the old Freedom Fighters of Efavan. At a restaurant they meet Serenella's old flame Jalek Wessiri, who reveals the group was his late father's unit and points them to a small museum. At the museum, the curator Maxxen helps them search records tied to a photo from the Naughty Kitty club; leads on a blond technician (Aerith Fenn, killed in action) and recruiter Rhade Terrel emerge but yield no definite father. Serenella donates 2000 credits and resolves to pursue Rhade Terrel through the Marines.

title: RPlog:Lost Fingers
summary: Aboard the luxury cruise liner Angry Rancor, Simon Sezirok attempts to 'free' a cybernetic Nek battledog by cutting a wire, which causes the dog to bite off two of his fingers. Mira Isaria distracts the maddened animal by throwing a holocube that turns out to be a message from Markus telling them to go to Caspar. Simon Force-subdues the Nek without killing it, then he and Mira steal a shuttle (the Sanguine Raptor) to leave, with Mira's chaotic flying barely getting them into space. Simon, traumatized by the loss of his fingers and his hatred of technology, struggles while Mira sets a destination toward Caspar.

title: RPlog:Love's Recovery
summary: On Caspar, Orson Tighe flees to a lonely abandoned lighthouse island after Jessalyn glimpsed the dark, shameful memories within him through the Force. Swallowing her pride, Jessalyn rents a speeder and uses the Force to find him atop the lighthouse, where he fears she cannot truly accept what she saw. She reassures him that she knows and loves him completely, leading Orson to open himself fully through the Force; the two reconcile, declare their love, and renew their bond.

title: RPlog:Love Story on Caspar
summary: On the isle of Yaeguero on Caspar, Jessalyn returns from a day on the mainland laden with gifts and stories spun about her by the locals, who have begun calling her 'Lady Starker.' She gently teases Basca Starker about the fairy tales and his charm offensive while the household staff help with her packages. Basca invites her to sense his feelings through the Force for the first time, overwhelming her with the pure, unbridled joy of his love and his philosophy of total commitment, and they share a deep kiss.

title: RPlog:Lover's Quarrel in the Dome
summary: Piper (Simone Drake) relaxes at the Free-Flight Dance Dome on Etti IV and witnesses ExO Sean Dillon storm in enraged, trashing the bar and abusing the staff. Alora Antieres confronts Dillon and uses the Force to choke a bouncer; when the larger bouncer lunges, Dillon draws a blaster and kills him on the spot, then pays for the damages. Dillon tells Alora to inform Grand Moff Caldny he wishes to settle the Solo affair, and both leave; Alora announces she is departing for Dreven.

title: RPlog:Luke's Apology
summary: On the Black Dragon during a sandstorm, Luke Skywalker awkwardly apologizes to Jessalyn Valios for kissing her, calling himself 'too bold.' His apology enrages Jessalyn, who accuses him of toying with her affections; she slaps him, then kisses him hard, before Luke insists he likes her too much to lead her on and departs glumly to work.

title: RPlog:Luke's Response
summary: Jessalyn wakes aboard the Black Dragon and recounts to Luke her dangerous encounter with the dark-sider Lady Alora, who tried to manipulate her by claiming she is touched by the Force. Luke counsels her that knowing her own center is her defense, but his evasive response to her near-confession of love wounds her. Paul Nighman and Shenner arrive, and Paul escorts the distressed Jessalyn out for fresh air.

title: RPlog:Luke's Return
summary: Sensing Jessalyn's plunge toward the Dark Side, Luke Skywalker travels to Caspar's Hideaway Beach where Jessalyn (now calling herself Annalise) has fled in despair. With Kyyel Marrak, Han Solo, and Chewbacca present, Luke opens a Force-bond to share her grief and urge her to release her pain. Her former lover Orson Tighe arrives and the two have a wrenching exchange, but Jessalyn ultimately cannot fully let go, and both she and Orson remain bitter and unresolved.

title: RPlog:Luke Skywalker to the Rescue
summary: After a failed New Republic prison break on Chandrila, Imperials under Captain Danik Kreldin hold roughly two dozen captured rebels, and Darth Malign arrives to oversee the situation. Luke Skywalker leads a large rebel assault force demanding the prisoners' release; Malign feigns compliance, then orders the prisoners executed and the E-webs to open fire as rebel demolition teams breach the walls. A chaotic battle erupts with TIE air support, jet-packed Sith guards, and hundreds of rebels storming the compound. The Empire ultimately evacuates and scuttles the prison facility, leaving heavy casualties on both sides.

title: RPlog:Luke and Jessalyn
summary: Aboard the YT-1300 Black Dragon during a mission to rescue Han Solo, Luke Skywalker confronts Jessalyn Valios for stowing away after he expressly told her not to come. Their argument over recklessness and mutual concern dissolves into banter, and Luke impulsively kisses her before both retreat in embarrassment to return to work.

title: RPlog:Luke and Leia versus Sabbath
summary: On the desert world of Palanhi, Luke Skywalker tracks the Dark Jedi Lord Sabbath to the Grand Palanhi Hotel, where Sabbath demands Luke join him or Han Solo will die. Sabbath repeatedly tries to goad Luke and then Leia into attacking him to draw on the dark side, but both refuse. The confrontation erupts into a lightsaber duel; Luke disarms Sabbath using the Force, but Sabbath blasts both Leia and Luke with Force lightning and escapes with his recovered saber. Afterward, aboard the Black Dragon, Winter reveals she knows Sabbath is headed to Bilbringi where Han is held, and the group sets course to rescue him.

title: RPlog:Luke and the Noghri
summary: Luke Skywalker travels to Etti IV searching for information on Han Solo's whereabouts, intending to meet the CSA's Simone Drake. On the street near a cafe he is ambushed by the Noghri assassin Ahkaurakh, whom he repeatedly disarms and refuses to fight, prompting the attacker to retreat. The Dark Lord Sabbath then reaches Luke through the Force, taunting him with a vision of Han in pain and summoning him to face his destiny, while Leia anxiously contacts Luke's mind. Luke takes the frightened young musician Shenner with him as he flees the dangerous scene.

title: RPlog:Lunch With a Legend
summary: Aboard the VSD2 Litigator over Etti IV, Captain Gren Delede hosts the wealthy smuggler Axel Vichten for a luncheon to recruit him into the Maffi crime family on behalf of Tyy'sun Eson. Axel plays a recording proving an earlier Maffi pledge (Helion/Jalek) damaged his reputation by discussing business openly in a crowded Caspar bar, which Gren promises will be punished. Gren pitches the benefits of Maffi membership: open markets, planted security agents, and loyal allies, while Axel offers spice and touts his personal fleet including an Interdictor. Axel refuses to commit until he meets Eson personally, and the two agree to arrange that meeting.

title: RPlog:Lynae's Arrival
summary: At the New Republic supply depot on Ord Mantell, former Imperial Commodore Lynae Cassius (using the alias Doctor Caiton) arrives under armed Marine guard and seeks out the Force-blinded Doctor Brandis Finian. Brandis lashes out emotionally at both Lynae and the Chyleni pilot Kyrin Sh'vani, driving Kyrin away despite his apology. Lynae chastises Brandis for trying to hide from his friends after losing his connection to the Force, insisting he keep living, while Gene Malantean, departing his squadron, recognizes her with mixed feelings.

title: RPlog:Lynae's Homecoming
summary: After more than fifteen years away, Lynae Cassius returns to Caspar and seeks out Axel Vichten at the Night Tavern in Noques Rasala. A growing gathering of statesmen forms as Crestian Tarasar and Fleet Captain Drorq, then former Presav Elana Tracer and the Jedi Etiel te Danaan arrive. Axel, now high priest of the Olumi Osahn cult, departs to lead a new-moon prayer, prompting Lynae to question the others about his religious turn and the sect's worship of the shadow god Olum. The conversation ranges over Caspian faith, Crestian's accidental rise to Sar Admiral, and the uneasy coalition of Jedi and Sith bound by their wariness of the Imperator Tyler Damion (Darth Malign).

title: RPlog:M&M
summary: At the Tahn Consortium offices on Athaniss, the Sith Darth Malus (Lorn Rhys) meets the businessman Malif Tal-Tahn following their introduction aboard the casino ship Empress of the Stars. The two discuss the stagnant state of galactic politics, the rival powers (the Imperium, Korolov's Imperial core, the wobbling New Republic, the Caspian Union), and Malus's philosophy of 'balance' versus Malif's embrace of chaos. Malif, a bored former Grand Admiral, agrees he will support any opportunity that disrupts the boring status quo, declaring his contract is his bond. Malus offers no benefits, only opportunities, then takes his leave, warning Malif to seize opportunities when they arise.

title: RPlog:Make Way, I am a Doctor
summary: On a Cloud City landing pad on Bespin, Baroness-Administrator Quinne Stardust Rose insists on hanging a festival banner herself, falls off a ladder in a gust of wind, and breaks her arm and dislocates her shoulder. Three medically-trained bystanders converge: Dr. Lynae Cassius takes charge, while Dr. Druze and Caspian politician Crestian Tarasar assist with crowd control and logistics. Quinne is dosed with Lynae's experimental analgesic and taken aboard Lynae's ship the Red Sky for treatment, with Crestian arranging a candy care package and floating a research collaboration on pain medication.

title: RPlog:Making New Friends (Part 1)
summary: Free-trader Jaspar Andromidas leaves his Twi'lek partner Lonri'napara aboard their freighter and travels to Club Utinni in Mos Eisley, Tatooine, to meet a contact about arms and work. Among the predatory cantina crowd he approaches a menacing black-clad, steel-handed man who turns out to be Tritus Vaticus, owner-operator of Gundark Industrial. After Jaspar identifies himself as a free-trader seeking reliable armaments or work, Tritus invites him to follow to his shop to discuss business.

title: RPlog:Making New Friends (Part 2)
summary: On Tatooine, smuggler Jaspar Andromidas strikes a deal with the black-clad arms dealer Tritus Vaticus at Gundark Industrial in Mos Eisley, accepting a blaster and agreeing to haul cargo exclusively for Tritus, who works for Draga the Hutt. The pirate captain Shiari Vane arrives mid-meeting and trades veiled threats with Tritus over piracy and his cargo, warning that Draga's protection won't last. The standoff ends with Vane departing after dismissive parting words, while Jaspar's new employment arrangement is sealed.

title: RPlog:Making it Official
summary: Aboard the ship Uwannabuyim, Jessalyn Valios formally introduces Orson Tighe to Luke Skywalker. After tense undercurrents over the recent fight with the Sith Simon, Luke assesses Orson's strong but unfocused Force potential and grants permission for Jessalyn to take Orson on as her own Jedi apprentice, on condition they obey the Jedi scriptures and allow Luke to oversee defensive training.

title: RPlog:Malign Visit
summary: Recovering in the medical bay of the ISC Broadsword after a botched operation on Bothawui left his legs paralyzed, Imperial pilot Antoine Dareus is visited by Darth Malign, who saved his life the previous night. Malign delivers the Black Squad report, promises to spearhead an investigation into the rogue officer who wounded Dareus, and reassures him that no blame will fall on him for the operation. The two discuss the Force, duty, and the captured Bothawui terrorists, and Malign hints he may have future use for Dareus.

title: RPlog:Malign and the Holocron
summary: Aboard the SSD Malevolence, Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin meets with Darth Malign after recovering his ancestor's Sith Holocron and discovering he carries Sith blood. Malign levitates the Holocron to demonstrate Kreldin's paranoia, then discusses their secret blood pact and Dark Brotherhood alliance, urging Kreldin to set aside his loyalty to the Empire to unlock the Dark Side. Kreldin reluctantly agrees and they toast to Emperor Vadim over Corellian ale. Kreldin reveals he intends to travel to Ord Trasi and asks Malign to accompany and guide him.

title: RPlog:Man-to-Man
summary: At Karrde's base on Myrkr, Orson Tighe approaches the Selas warrior Simon Sezirok intending to confront him over Jessalyn, but instead receives a staff-fighting lesson and they reach an uneasy peace. Jessalyn and Drew Carvallo join them, and the group discusses Simon's plan to split from Talon Karrde and act as a guerrilla 'distraction' against the Empire while Karrde hunts for a second Death Star.

title: RPlog:Mandalore - Arrival
summary: After months of preparation, the Corellian xenoarchaeologist Paul Nighman, the bard Shenner, and the Mandalorian warriors Dane Noth and Kairne Saa'thul arrive on the war-ravaged planet Mandalore aboard the Hawk's Wing. They are met by the Mandalorian official Urio'kosh, who subjects them to ship lockdown, retina scans, and fingerprinting before housing them in a refurbished hangar at the Mandal Motors research complex. The Mandalorians depart to discuss the group's unannounced arrival, leaving Paul to reassure an overwhelmed Shenner and to privately worry about tension between the older warrior class and the post-war youth. Dane returns to check on them, somberly warning Shenner to keep a blaster handy, deepening Paul's sense that danger awaits.

title: RPlog:Mandalore - Departure
summary: Aboard the Hawk's Wing, Paul Nighman and Shenneret Veery depart for Mandalore with Mandalorian warriors Dane Noth and Kairne Saa'thul, ending their romantic interlude on Caspar. During the journey Dane removes his helmet for Shenner, a Mandalorian sign of deep respect and trust, and offers to tutor her in Corellian, Rodian, Mandalorian, and even Wookiee, telling her she reminds him of his daughter. Paul afterward explains to an astonished Shen the cultural significance of a Mandalorian baring his face, noting she has made a friend for the expedition.

title: RPlog:Mandalore - Disturbing Delays
summary: Waiting on Mandalore for word on whether their expedition will proceed, Paul Nighman is summoned outside by Urio'kosh, who reveals that the Circle of Elders is meeting to reconsider canceling the expedition under pressure from a faction that fears disturbing Mandalore's past. Urio'kosh also reveals that Grathix of Stur'ttrakath has been freed and will arrive too late to address the Elders before their decision. Paul, frustrated that he revealed more than he gained in the tense exchange, returns to the hangar and he and Shenner set a watch rotation for the night, their bond quietly deepening.

title: RPlog:Mandalore - Second Day
summary: At 5 a.m. Dane Noth and Urio'kosh wake Paul and Shenner to plan the cavern expedition, which will be made on foot without vehicles or droids per the Elders' rule that the sacred site must be braved as a test of a true warrior. Paul reveals his theory, drawn from the historian Kassique's journal, that the caverns hold Force-amplifying Mandalorian weapons created during the Empire-Mandalore alliance, prompting open scorn from the skeptical Urio'kosh and a clan-name check that turns up nothing. Dane sides with Paul, vowing to protect Mandalorian artifacts from destruction, and the group resolves to wait for Grathix and Skywalker while watching for hidden agendas and a likely tail to the crypt.

title: RPlog:Mandalore - Striking Out
summary: On the war-ruined world of Mandalore, the Mandalorian administrator Urio'kosh informs Major Dane Noth that the Circle of Elders has canceled Dr. Paul Nighman's archaeological expedition and ordered the offworlders escorted away. Dane insists on an audience with the Elders while Paul considers calling in a debt owed by Lord General Kairne; meanwhile Paul and Shenner share a tense romantic interlude and Shenner suffers a vivid nightmare of a future life with Paul. A staged power outage covers the secret return of the long-absent Mandalorian Grathix, who disguises himself as a guard, lets Dane stun the door sentry, and guides the party into the sealed caverns to pursue the quest anyway. The escape is sprung as a trap: inside the cavern the blast doors slam shut and Urio'kosh emerges from hiding with guards, telling Nighman his move was very foolish.

title: RPlog:Mandalore - Testing Ground
summary: A party of travelers continues an arduous trek across the wilds of Mandalore, leaving their camp at dawn and following a river up toward the legendary Warrior's Path. After crossing barren ridges into a renewed green plain, they reach a chasm where they find an ancient Mandalorian standing stone marker. They fit a bladed key piece into it and discover the stone demands blood sacrifice; each member offers blood in turn, producing rising musical tones until the stone sinks into the ground and reveals a hidden stone bridge across the chasm, which they cross to reach a foreboding jungle.

title: RPlog:Mandalore - Tunneling Out
summary: On war-ravaged Mandalore, the Mandalorian Urio'kosh confronts Paul Nighman's expedition party at a sealed blast door, having lost their ally Grathix. Rather than fight, Urio'kosh negotiates his way into joining the secret expedition to a crypt, claiming a piece of his heritage. The mismatched group of Paul, Shenner, Dane Noth, Kairne Saa'thul, and Urio'kosh together heave aside a massive engine core to uncover a hidden tunnel, then begin a grueling, hours-long descent down a treacherous slippery ladder shaft. The exhausting climb culminates when Paul loses his grip and falls roughly ten meters, surviving with only bruises and discovering another crevice/tunnel at the bottom.

title: RPlog:Many Thoughts, Little Words
summary: On a moonlit night on Tatooine, the assassin/freelancer Mithral stalks the Nagai warrior Ash (Nitisha Lazure) through the streets and alleys. After a tense cat-and-mouse pursuit involving a flash-bang grenade, the two engage in an extended hand-to-hand and knife duel that ends with Ash wounded and disoriented by an old inner-ear injury. Mithral, who fought to earn her respect, bandages her wound and escorts her to a discreet bounty hunter's clinic to be treated. There he reveals himself as a freelance mercenary, offers to work with and train her, and the two part as wary potential allies.

title: RPlog:Marching Orders
summary: Aboard the NRCV Audacity during the Dac campaign, Drax Rendolen encounters Leia Organa Solo over caf and tells her he intends to move on. Leia, acting director of NRI, presses him to find purpose and offers him a dangerous deep-cover assignment infiltrating a growing religious-political movement on Trandosha. Naval Commander Rasi Praddhan Cen joins, warning that Trandosha threatens the Kashyyyk sector. Drax accepts the mission on his own terms, insisting on going in alone with no support team.

title: RPlog:Markus and the Force
summary: In an ancient dark-side-saturated temple on Yavin 4, Simon Sezirok leads Markus Lisardis (who can no longer touch the Force after leaving the Jedi). When Markus touches a painted eye on the wall, a dark-side entity animates a statue's hand and seizes him, while Simon's own lightstaff is turned against him by an unseen force. The entity blinds Markus by forcing his hand to gouge out his eyes, but in surrendering and embracing the Dark Side, Markus reclaims his connection to the Force and consumes the entity. Now blind but Force-sensitive again, Markus returns Simon's weapon and the two leave the temple, declaring everything has changed.

title: RPlog:Marshalling Resources
summary: At Zubindi Hakoon's Silverwood House of Fashion on Caspar, Presav Crestian Tarasar meets the pilot-priest Axel Vichten to recruit him into upcoming Caspian Union wargames. Crestian offers Axel the rank of Star Marshal and a Caspian Starfighter Corps uniform, expecting only a temporary role for the exercises. Axel, increasingly stable and devoted to Caspar, surprises Crestian by accepting the position permanently and outlining plans to ramp up pilot training and border patrols. They drink Whyren's Reserve and agree to treat the wargames as a trial run.

title: RPlog:Masquerade Ball: A Night on Yavin
summary: This is the index/wrapper page for a multi-part masquerade ball event aboard the Angry Rancor cruiseship over Tatooine. It contains the setting description, detailed costume descriptions for each attendee, and transclusion links to Parts 1 through 5 of the actual scene logs, but no scene dialogue itself.

title: RPlog:Masquerade Ball: A Night on Yavin/Part 1
summary: Aboard the entertainment vessel Angry Rancor in orbit of Yavin/Tatooine, the crew hosts a tropical-themed masquerade ball with costumed guests mingling, drinking, and dancing. Hostess Inanna Jordain oversees the bar and food while her sister Serenella (the 'Birdie') performs tropical songs on stage. Guests including a man in a Massassi totem costume (Ramyxth), a Twi'lek dressed as a wildcat (Ka'una), Solon Halwinder, and a tiki-lamp-costumed Maethor socialize, and Inanna is eventually coaxed onto the dance floor by the totem.

title: RPlog:Masquerade Ball: A Night on Yavin/Part 2
summary: The masquerade ball aboard the Angry Rancor continues with Inanna dancing with the totem-costumed Ramyxth while Ka'una and Serenella scheme to push the pair into a closer dance. New guests arrive in costume, including a pirate (Juran) dressed as a Piranha Beetle, a butterfly-winged woman (Lepidoptera/Lynae), an oddly-dressed man calling himself the Count (Rasi), Shael in a rare dress, and a Rebel pilot. The blue-winged Chyleni Kyrin Sh'vani arrives as herself, and various guests begin recognizing one another behind their masks.

title: RPlog:Masquerade Ball: A Night on Yavin/Part 3
summary: The masquerade ball aboard the Angry Rancor proceeds toward its costume contest as guests mingle and recognize each other. Kyrin reconnects with Shael, Lepidoptera spars verbally with the disguised Rebel pilot (who probes her former rank as Commodore), and the Count (Rasi) banters with Lynae. Serenella and Inanna announce a costume contest with House Pick and Guest Pick prizes of suite vouchers and casino chips, and guests cast their votes.

title: RPlog:Masquerade Ball: A Night on Yavin/Part 4
summary: The costume contest results are announced aboard the Angry Rancor: Ramyxth wins the House Pick and Lepidoptera the Guest Pick, each receiving a suite voucher and casino chips. Ramyxth retires to his Grotto suite, while Ka'una and Kyrin dance together, with Kyrin teaching the Twi'lek to manage her costume tail. The disguised Rebel pilot (secretly a dark Force-user) dances with Kyrin and probes her, while Rasi dances with Lepidoptera and deduces a personal secret about her.

title: RPlog:Masquerade Ball: A Night on Yavin/Part 5
summary: The masquerade ball aboard the Angry Rancor winds down. Luke Skywalker is revealed beneath a convincing Wookiee costume, exchanging cryptic words with the disguised dark-side Rebel pilot and greeting Kyrin. The Rebel pilot lures Lepidoptera (Lynae) away from the lounge for a private walk, while Inanna, Shael, and Kyrin discuss an upcoming asteroid-run piloting race before the party closes and the host goes off duty.

title: RPlog:Mayhem Aboard OS Paladin
summary: Aboard the New Republic space station OS Paladin, a heavily shielded contraband cargo container seized from the smuggler ship Valspar is opened in the main hangar bay. After technicians use the container's own weakened explosives to breach its booby-trapped lock, three caged predators (a horned Doashim and two Nexu) burst out and rampage, killing several civilians and crew. The crew kill the Doashim with concentrated blaster and shotgun fire while the two Nexu escape into the station's ducts; Kesander Beysarus and Vengan Draelis are gravely injured.

title: RPlog:Meals and Deals
summary: On Nar Shaddaa, smuggler Jaspar Andromidas reunites with the Sullustan mechanic Jae Ten, showing off his Sardakh freighter Hirakiis before taking him out for a meal at the Meltdown Cafe. Over food and ale, Jaspar pitches a planned heist: with help from a contact who can stage an 'accident,' they will raid a high-value, high-security transport with hired pirates and split the loot. Jae agrees to keep the ship in top shape for the job, then dozes off after eating.

title: RPlog:Meaning of the Dark Side
summary: Returning to Tatooine after the Cochran battle, Sith apprentice Antoine Dareus is confronted by the Jedi woman Ai'kani Za'netra, who declares she has come to kill him and then his master Malign. Instead of fighting, she uses the Force to take him on a shared vision-journey through darkness, fire, and a field of light to teach him the nature of the Dark Side. The encounter culminates in a kiss and a transformative experience that leaves Dareus feeling stronger and committed to his Sith path. Ai'kani departs, declaring that she has 'killed' him by setting him on the road to his ultimate destruction.

title: RPlog:Medical Consultation
summary: Doctor Lynae Cassius meets CSA Auditor Malif Tal-Tahn and battle surgeon Dr. Xar'on Tanner in Plaxton's Fountain Square on Caspar, then leads them to her beachside cabin to plan removal of a rewired pacemaker implanted in her chest as punishment for treason. Lynae explains the device acts as a lethal 'leash' that shocks her heart if her pulse exceeds 144. Tanner lays out a surgical plan using Thanatizine sedation, kolto/kolcta patches and chromostring, while a cloaked priest (Mugenjin) observes and Malif promises a tech specialist to check the wrist device for explosive traps.

title: RPlog:Meet Brek
summary: Back on Ord Mantell after their adventures on Delar, Senator Tokoga and medic Myiari Oerstead are ambushed in the streets of New Alderaan by an armored attacker (in the same Mandalorian livery as the men who broke Nass out of prison). A passing stranger named Brek Halsmer helps fight off the assailant, but the attacker grabs Tokoga as a hostage before fleeing, revealing the threat comes from 'an old friend'. Afterward the trio realize Nass has resurfaced; Brek asks Myiari to show him around Ord and exchanges contact info.

title: RPlog:Meet Kyyel
summary: At the Justa Starport, Corellian pilot Kyyel Marrak intercepts Simon Sezirok, angry over what Simon has done to Mailyn Raines. The two trade insults; Kyyel defends the Jedi while Simon insists they have corrupted Kyyel's mind. Simon briefly considers Force-choking Kyyel but instead uses the Force to implant the command 'You are not my enemy,' overriding Kyyel's will despite his resistance. Horrified at his lost free will, Kyyel demands Simon leave him; Simon walks off, claiming he has freed Kyyel from the Jedi's chains.

title: RPlog:Meet Rainer
summary: In Organa Park on Ord Mantell, Tokoga and Myiari chat with Rainier (Rainer Aiden Maximilian), an out-of-work spacer between contracts who is new to the planet. The conversation is light and social, covering Ord Mantell's safety, Tokoga's reluctance to keep bodyguards, and Myiari's medical career. Rainier eventually departs for the Caamasi Gardens after gathering local information. (Later events reveal Rainier is actually an undercover Imperial agent.)

title: RPlog:Meet Shenner
summary: In the crew quarters of the NRV Hyperon, a distraught Jessalyn Valios meets Shenner, a wary, androgynous redheaded youngster whom Luke Skywalker has just brought up from a planet for safety. Through cautious conversation Jessalyn learns Luke has returned safely from a dangerous fight, reassures the frightened kid that the ship belongs to the New Republic, and urges Shenner to rest while the Horansi crewman Razi wakes nearby.

title: RPlog:Meeting Adlerson
summary: In the hangar of Orbital Station Guardian, Morganna Tazecks meets Grand Admiral Morlok Adlerson, who agreed to see her only because his wife (Morganna's cousin Kadgie) asked him to look into her situation. In his office, Morganna explains she has been forcibly bound into Imperial service by Director Dixon of the Bureau of Operations simply for being a pre-Endor Imperial citizen. Adlerson agrees to investigate and try to free her, but demands only a genuine apology for how she previously humiliated him during the plague incident; she apologizes, and he asks her to gather information on the Rebels and on Dixon and the Bureau in return.

title: RPlog:Meeting Between the Headlines
summary: At Club Utinni! in Mos Eisley, Tatooine, Presav Crestian Tarasar meets the former Falleen Hutt-space Lorda Nasiri Zithreej, now living a weathered, simpler life. Over water and Ithorian brandy they discuss Crestian's recent blunt public rebuke of the Imperium and the broader galactic hypocrisy of regimes posing as virtuous while practicing tyranny. Nasiri compliments Crestian for speaking truth and warns him to be careful not to become a pawn of the larger powers. They touch on Grand Admiral Axel Vichten's growth, the Caspar famine relief effort, and the Union's strategic pivot toward the Outer Rim.

title: RPlog:Meeting Brandis Finian
summary: On a beach park on Coruscant, marine Sabrina Rheatis is struck by a stray shockball while meditating, and the young Jedi-in-training Brandis Finian comes to her aid, posing as a doctor. As they banter and flirt, Brandis discreetly uses the Force to float the lost shockball back to the players, surprising them. He learns Sabrina is an Alderaanian-born Rebellion-era marine now serving near Calamari, and the scene ends with the two agreeing to go get a drink together.

title: RPlog:Meeting Johanna
summary: In the cargo bay of the YT-2400 Whipping Star following a successful raid on the liberated Coruscant palace, Imperials Antoine Dareus and Master Sergeant Wescal Cantrell tend to wounded men and share Corellian whiskey with their captive. They discover that their kidnapped prisoner, Johanna Siri te Danaan, is a Jedi pilot and sister-figure connected to Malign, taken on the orders of Admiral Danik Kreldin. Johanna reveals the ship is bound for Ord Trasi, a planet steeped in the Dark Side, leaving the soldiers uneasy about Kreldin's true motives.

title: RPlog:Meeting On Kashyyyk
summary: On Kashyyyk, Luke Skywalker meets with VigCorp leaders Twila Virda and Gren Delede to ask about Antoine Dareus, since a dancer named Serenella claims Vichten told her the CSA poisoned her husband Dareus in custody. Gren and Twila deny involvement and suggest Vichten himself, out of jealousy over Dareus's rise as Malign's apprentice, is the more likely culprit. Gren then proposes a strategic addendum to a planned anti-Sith operation: capturing the Interdictor Noquella's Embrace to pin Tyler Damion's fleet in-system, which Luke agrees to present to Admiral Ackbar.

title: RPlog:Meeting With Sinjon Teague
summary: At the Keepon Casino aboard Kichnar Orbital Station, Paul Nighman arrives escorted by an angry Antharian woman with whom he argues in Mandalorian before she leaves with a veiled threat.
