At the bar he strikes up a conversation with Sinjon Teague, a book-loving Mashi Horansi who carries a lightsaber, bonding over rare ancient texts including a Mandalorian historian's journal from the fall of Mandalore. Throughout, the blonde Ariana Millikin flirtatiously baits Paul while observing him, and other patrons such as Eryk Zephron, Rabid, Taggor, and Mari drift through the casino. Paul, still shaken from his recent time on Mandalore, eventually excuses himself to avoid being 'marked' by the Antharian woman, parting on warm terms with Sinjon.

title: RPlog:Meeting on the Sly
summary: In a secret, off-the-books meeting at the New Republic Embassy on Caspar, Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard receives Caspian Minister of State Cordelia Nivhya (arriving in disguise) to discuss the Imperial blockade of the Caspian system. Cordelia presses that promised Republic relief supplies have failed to arrive, after a contracted smuggler's freighter went missing (likely seized by the Empire). Ambrosia explains the NR is prepared to militarily break the Imperial blockade but needs an official invitation and Caspian military support, promising not to claim Caspar afterward. Cordelia gives verbal authorization as close to a formal request for aid as the NR will get, conditional on the Republic proving itself, and warns of brewing anti-NR demonstrations.

title: RPlog:Meeting with Draga
summary: Lord Geophreigh Smitherbodkins IV travels to Draga the Hutt's palace on Tatooine to personally invite the crime lord to his estate party on Corellia. He flatters Draga and presents an extravagant crystal snacquarium as a gift, scolding the servants for mishandling it, which earns the Hutt's respect. Draga tentatively agrees to attend if it amuses him and offers Smitherbodkins a drink to demonstrate trust. J'Eeves arrives late to deliver the formal invitation to the majordomo, and the audience concludes amicably.

title: RPlog:Meeting with Naten
summary: At Cason Hawk's Nest, a pilots' bar in the Caspian system, Axel Vichten waits to deliver an intelligence report but is met instead by Rear Admiral Naten Bonrue, Director of the NIO, who proves his identity with an ident card while staff isolate their table. A wary, armed Axel delivers explosive intel: Admiral Danik Kreldin is alive and plotting to assassinate Emperor Vadim and revive the Neo-Imperial Movement, and that Darth Malign is the former Republic instructor Tyler Damion. Bonrue is intrigued, thanks Axel, and asks him to keep sending reports while deferring the question of compensation.

title: RPlog:Meeting with Petra and Davyd
summary: On a desolate moonlit beach at Coronet City on Corellia, under Imperial lockdown, Axel Vichten meets Imperial Rear Admiral Petra Doom and High Colonel Davyd Levvis. Petra, an old flame of Axel's, asks him to locate the Imperial traitors Lynae Caiton and the former ambassadors (especially Dareus) and keep tabs on them, framing it as personal. Axel negotiates payment, securing an experimental ST-III blaster rifle as a down payment, and agrees to try while insisting he will not betray the CDU.

title: RPlog:Meeting with Tyler on Etti IV
summary: Axel Vichten visits Darth Malign at the dark, cold Imperial Embassy on Etti IV to seek approval and resources for an attack on the Zhao Maffi compounds at Etti IV and Ord Mantell. Malign approves of striking the Maffi but cautions Axel about planetary shields, Jedi, and operating outside Imperial space, recommending diversions, escape plans, and the recruitment of competent crew. Malign offers his resources, including possibly piloting a fighter himself, and stresses that Tyy'sun Eson must be killed for the effort to matter.

title: RPlog:Mind The Stacks
summary: At the Library of the Republic on Ord Mantell, Tokoga and Myiari run into the spacer Rainier a third time. The scene is a casual conversation among the three about research, the tedium of Myiari's medical studies, career paths, and Tokoga's backstory as a former Dacan Council member during the Imperial occupation. A scene break notes a missing portion where Tokoga shared more of his backstory.

title: RPlog:Mira's First Lesson
summary: Aboard a ship on Caspar, Simon Sezirok gives Mira Isaria her first lesson in using the Force (the 'True Source'). Mira believes her 'Tivian jumping beans' move on their own, while Simon demonstrates moving rocks the same way to show it is her own power. He distracts himself reassuring her about unscrewed bulkhead bolts, then guides her to make the beans jump and to recognize the light, feather-like sensation of the Force. Mira tires of the lesson and goes to bed; Simon worries about how to properly train her.

title: RPlog:Miracles and Mayhem
summary: On Mon Calamari, the young busker Shenner arrives at Dr. Molari Canto's seaside home searching for her injured friend Paul Nighman, who has retreated into withdrawn seclusion after the previous night's events left Jessalyn hospitalized. After being initially turned away, Shenner apologizes and answers Canto's probing questions about her history and feelings for Paul, then finds Paul brooding on the cliffs. Paul cooks her an elaborate picnic dinner at sunset and finally confronts the romantic tension between them, telling her that while he cares for and loves her, a relationship would end disastrously given her youth. Shenner breaks down sobbing; Paul carries her inside, comforts her, puts her to bed, and afterward confesses to Molari that he believes he just broke her heart.

title: RPlog:Mission to Forlec
summary: Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin leads an Imperial expedition to Forlec to establish a listening post near Caspian Democratic Union space, only to run into a New Republic SpecOps commando team led by Colonel Sabrina Rheatis. The NR commandos make a dangerous high-altitude airborne drop under TIE/Scimitar fire while a saboteur (Uriel) infiltrates the base disguised as a tech and plants a bomb on the generator. A brutal night battle ensues with heavy casualties on both sides, including the death of marine Jak McCulloch. Darth Malign arrives with reinforcements; the outpost generator detonates and both sides retreat, the battle ending essentially in a costly tie.

title: RPlog:Mission to Ord Mantell
summary: Acting on Crestian's parallel operation to rescue two abducted Force-sensitive younglings, Kasha Tabasuri and Tiali Nora travel aboard the Tortuga to Ord Mantell to collect the children's parents, Casul and Sasha Nettic, for a reunion on Caspar. Posing as charity workers from The Mission to evade New Republic scrutiny, they locate the estranged, debt-ridden couple and convince them their children are safe. As they board the ship, the Nova Syndicate loan shark 'detective' Coxswain and his armed thugs attack; a brawl erupts and Kasha is shocked to discover her long-lost father among the goons, who sacrifices himself by drawing the attackers away so the Tortuga can escape.

title: RPlog:Mistaken Identity
summary: A bounty hunter corners pirate Shiari Vane in the main hangar of the Angry Rancor cruise liner with an arrest warrant. Vane comically denies her identity, claiming to be 'Shenova Lane' accompanied by 'Lando Calrissian' (actually a Trandoshan). Cataleya retrieves a blaster and covers the hunter from the flank, while ship engineer Ka'una La interrupts to warn that security has a zero-tolerance policy on conflicts endangering guests; the bounty hunter backs off with a threat, and Vane boastfully shouts after him.

title: RPlog:Monster!
summary: Ambassador Morganna Tazecks, walking on a rainy Caspar with her aides, is met by weapons dealer Methos and her cousin Kadgie Rodo before Kaley Recourua invites her on a covert 'hunt' to attack a woman named Jali. Disguising herself as a faceless, eyeless monster to protect her identity, Morganna joins Kaley at the beach and they track Jali and her terrorist associates through cave tunnels in the bluffs. In the ensuing raid Morganna brutally kills one terrorist guard while Kaley pursues Jali, who escapes by falling through a weak section of floor; the scene ends with Kaley still chasing Jali and Morganna recalled to the embassy.

title: RPlog:Morganna's Detox
summary: In the naval medical center of Orbital Station Guardian, Morganna Tazecks suffers through painful spice withdrawal from synthonerb addiction, attended by Admiral Morlok Adlerson and Chief medic Maelle. Morganna blames the Empire's delayed plague cure for her addiction and begs not to be sedated due to traumatic flashbacks. Adlerson sternly pressures Maelle to give Morganna first-rate care, threatening her with reassignment to Kessel, while Maelle insists all patients receive equal treatment. Maelle gives Morganna non-sedative medication, warns the worst is yet to come over five days, and offers compassionate support.

title: RPlog:Morganna Reveals A Source
summary: In the Imperial Embassy conference chamber on Caspar, Count Tsaran Joir meets Ambassador Morganna Tazecks to discuss Sienar Fleet Systems' commercial intentions in the Caspar sector and the importance of commerce to Imperial security. Joir signals interest in establishing covert intelligence and black-market arrangements. Morganna names an information broker, Eryk (currently off-planet), and points him to another contact, Zeth Canon, while warning that Canon trades in information and can read lips. She also warns Joir that Caspar has an infestation of Force-users.

title: RPlog:Morganna and Rellik
summary: In an Imperial fleet lounge, the newly titled Lord Jarl Rellik confronts Intel officer Morganna Tazecks, informing her she is being reassigned back to public Ambassador status against her will. Rellik humiliates and dominates her, forcing her to hand over a datacard of intelligence and threatening her with fates worse than Chantinelle Thistleborn if she remains insubordinate. He orders her to act as intermediary to open a dialog with the Caspian government following the kidnapping of their prime minister, setting up a meeting Emperor Valak and Rellik will attend, after which she may return to her Chief Intel Officer post.

title: RPlog:Morganna in Love
summary: In the lounge of Imperial Orbital Station Guardian, the recovering spice addict Morganna Tazecks awaits repairs to her ship before departing. After a warm farewell from Admiral Morlok Adlerson, the cold Captain Atrox unexpectedly invites her to share rare Necr'ygor Omic '42 wine and briefly bares genuine emotion toward her, only to coldly mock and dismiss her moments later. Enraged and humiliated, Morganna hurls the wine bottle at him; he deflects it with seeming supernatural ease, then has guards escort her off the station with orders never to return without his permission.

title: RPlog:Morganna in the Hospital
summary: Count Tsaran Joir visits Imperial Ambassador Morganna Tazecks at Dr. Tarquin Memorial Hospital on Caspar, where she lies critically wounded after an assassination attempt that left her throat shattered. He speaks with the attending medic, who reports she was dead on arrival and revived, remains stable but very weak, and is scheduled for throat-reconstruction surgery the next day. Joir, hiding deep concern behind his impassive mask, expresses respect for her toughness and pledges that the Empire owes the medical staff a debt he will honor.

title: RPlog:Morning Caf
summary: The morning after the launch of the Second Renaissance of Innovation, Caspar Caff #23 in Plaxton is packed because a labor strike has shut Biscuit Baron. Crestian Tarasar, his daughter Atsvara, and his droid aide V1C3 share banter with Dr. Druze, whose pungent sugar-cured Dac scallop pastry draws comment, and with Caspian pilot Nara Rhen. The conversation is light slice-of-life talk about smell, fashion, engineering, and the ongoing TaggeCo labor dispute, ending with Druze treating the table and offers of a future visit to the Yacht Club.

title: RPlog:Morrison and Joir
summary: In Fountain Square on Caspar, Count Tsaran Joir arrives amid a tense standoff with drawn blasters that is defused as Sergeant Webb dismisses the cub Kaein; Joir exchanges words with Troy and Azya McTavish before they leave. Corporate Sector Authority director Morrison Van Sen, bearing a Black Sun tattoo, then approaches Joir and they retire to the Sandbar to talk business. Morrison inquires about the Empire's influence over Mutanda and his interest in using an abandoned orbital station there as a CSA base; Joir directs him to Ambassador Pantek and presses Morrison about the enigmatic Mr. Aldog. Morrison reveals Aldog is to be named acting Director of the Department of Resources but defers further discussion.

title: RPlog:Motherhood
summary: Two estranged mothers, former Caspian Presav Elana Tracer and Jedi Johanna Siri te Danaan, arrive on the Imperium capital world of Selene to discover their eldest sons now serve Darth Malign. Tracer finds her son Kipran Jawatha freshly field-promoted to Commander and gifted a lightsaber, while Johanna confronts her son Etiel, revealed to be the Moff of Byss and O'Paal. Both confrontations are defused as Grand Admiral Drayson Honos invites the parties to a celebratory family dinner, with Crestian Tarasar finding himself awkwardly assigned as Kipran's new commanding officer.

title: RPlog:Mourning
summary: In a darkened Corellia hotel room the day after Simon Sezirok's fall to the Dark Side, a guilt-stricken Jessalyn Valios mourns alone with Simon's severed carved staff. Orson Tighe, having secretly taken Simon's severed hand in a stasis field, comes to comfort her; they share an honest Force-exchange of grief and mutual affection, and Orson kisses her forehead, accepting her inability to return his deeper feelings.

title: RPlog:Mourning Johanna
summary: In a secure wing of the New Republic Military HQ on Coruscant, a grieving Luke Skywalker keeps vigil over the shrouded body of Johanna while Leia, Snarl (Snal'Fashtalli), and Enb'Zik gather to support him. Luke recounts how Johanna, possessed by the ancient Sith Vadim, destroyed the Basilica and died, and that Vadim seems to have taken her soul, vowing to use her until 'the time is right.' The group debates whether her spirit can be recovered, decides to place her body in bacta and consult the Jedi doctor Brandis, and discusses the danger that Vadim could reanimate her corpse as a spy or weapon. They agree to divide tasks (dealing with Fett, rescuing Sabrina, researching Johanna) and to confront Vadim eventually.

title: RPlog:Mr. Karrde and Mr. Kreldin
summary: On the streets of Mos Eisley, Tatooine, the wanted Imperial Danik Kreldin accidentally bumps into smuggler chief Talon Karrde, and the two immediately draw weapons. They exchange fire; Karrde stuns Kreldin unconscious but takes a serious blaster wound to the torso and drags himself into an alley. The Ithullan Indren aU-Phraxus revives Kreldin, and they pursue Karrde, only to find him being carried off by Brandis Finian, who uses the Force to retrieve Karrde's dropped blaster and hold them at bay. Indren pulls Kreldin out of the line of fire, and Brandis escapes through the back alleys to treat Karrde's wound.

title: RPlog:Much Too Frightened to Tease a Padawan
summary: Seeking a break from news of a space battle, Padawan Ai'kani Za'netra is lured by a beggar's message into the Abyssal Ruins beneath Coruscant, where the Twi'lek Tyy'sun Eson stages a confrontation to mock her idealism. Two young muggers attack her; she catches one's weapon and is struck in the head by a falling iron, refusing to fight back or surrender her robes. Eson emerges, taunting and dancing, while Ai'kani accuses him of guilt over some terrible deed. Wounded and pained, she eventually withdraws back to the surface, their philosophical battle unresolved.

title: RPlog:Muera la revolucion!
summary: At his Corellian estate Kartathia Manor, Lord Geophreigh Smitherbodkins IV hires the Zabrak pilot Meissa to track down G. S. Qwynt VIII, a former CSA Prex who stole a Star Destroyer and styled himself leader of the Prex Liberation Army after attacking a CEC shipyard. After negotiating, Meissa raises the bounty to 50,000 credits dead and 100,000 alive, accepts a 10,000-credit advance plus a datacard with Qwynt's last known location, and seals the deal. Smitherbodkins hints at a more permanent position should the job succeed.

title: RPlog:Mutual Understanding
summary: Arissa Kiiko, a Force-using half-breed hearing a nightsister voice in her head, stalks and confronts Dr. Lynae Cassius at Caspar's Union Starport, then they retire to the Red Door restaurant. Arissa demands that Lynae stay out of her business in exchange for the same, citing knowledge that Lynae was offered command of a Sith vessel. Lynae calls the threat a bluff and counter-threatens reprisal if any harm comes to Jedi Enb'Zik. The two part with a tense 'mutual understanding,' though Arissa secretly plans to test Lynae's resolve.

title: RPlog:Muun Money Minute - Greater Javin
summary: At the Yarith Hotel on Cloud City, IGN anchor and economist Professor Brackett Benduday and her producer Gym arrive to interview Baroness-Administrator Quinne Stardust Rose for the Muun Money Minute. Dr. Druze causes a comedic scene by spilling a mountain of seafood from the buffet before heading off to a medical conference. The live segment covers Cloud City's economic recovery from the terrorist refinery attack two years prior, crediting Quinne's leadership and Caspian Union aid, the rising tibanna prices, and the relocation of the Greater Javin Medical Society conference due to piracy on the Nevarro Spur. Crestian Tarasar arrives just as the interview wraps.

title: RPlog:Myiari's Date
summary: After previously meeting at the Cat's Claw Cantina, medic Myiari Oerstead and gunman Brek Halsmer go on a dinner date at a bistro in New Alderaan on Ord Mantell. Over dumplings, steak, and Corellian ale they bond over shared tastes in holodramas, books, mysteries, and a mutual distaste for cocky pilots, while opening up about losing family to Imperial violence (his parents on Coruscant, her eldest brother on Commenor). The evening ends warmly as they rush off to catch a showing of a holodrama together.

title: RPlog:Myiari Just Can't Hack It
summary: After being captured by the Empire, Myiari is coerced into trying to slice into the New Republic defense council's databases using Tokoga's access codes, under threat of the bound Senator being tortured by the Imperial agent Rainier and guarded by Brek Halsmer (revealed as an Imperial stormtrooper). Myiari deliberately trips security flags hoping to alert the NR to trace the intrusion, but the Empire's own slicer counters her efforts. Rainier shoots Tokoga in the leg as punishment, and ultimately has the prisoners dragged back to their cell.

title: RPlog:NRI Interro Montage
summary: In a montage of New Republic Intelligence interrogations, kitchen staff, senators, aides, and security personnel each recount how a shipment of mysterious 'eggs' hatched brain-controlling parasitic worms that hijacked their bodies. The worms used the puppeted victims to infiltrate a memorial ceremony, overpower a Jedi, and abduct Ambassador Delgard during the post-gala evacuation. A violent struggle in the getaway speeder ends with the captive subdued, and in the final frame the recovered mastermind reveals they went into 'the darkness.'

title: RPlog:Nar Shaddaa - Sabrina's Rescue 1
summary: A rescue team aboard the Voidstalker makes the run from Coruscant to Nar Shaddaa to free captured Jedi Padawan Sabrina Rheatis. Luke Skywalker meditates through hyperspace while pilot Rook Barnsdale plans a covert approach, using a falsified transponder ID ("Sideslip") and R2-D2's masked scans to map Galla the Hutt's cargo facility. They slip past orbital defenses with a bribe and a casual approach, capture heat-signature scans of the compound during a low pass, and land on a pad near the facility undetected. Rook stays behind to guard the ship as Luke and Artoo head inside.

title: RPlog:Nar Shaddaa - Sabrina's Rescue 2
summary: Having landed near Galla the Hutt's cargo facility, Luke Skywalker, Padawan Ai'kani Za'netra, and the Horansi warrior Snarl review R2-D2's scans and move in to rescue the carbonite-frozen Sabrina Rheatis. Luke uses a Force-influenced ruse and Ai'kani's first attempt at mind manipulation to bluff past the guards, but a Twi'lek overseer recognizes him and a firefight erupts. They fight through guards to Sabrina's chamber, where Artoo begins thawing the carbonite under heavy fire; Luke cuts down a wave of reinforcements while Snarl shields Sabrina. With Sabrina freed and flash bombs and armored thugs closing in, Luke and Ai'kani cut an escape hole through the duracrete wall and the team escapes back to the Voidstalker.

title: RPlog:Nar Shaddaa - Sabrina's Rescue 3
summary: From the perspective of Rook Barnsdale guarding the freighter Voidstalker, the other half of a rescue raid on Galla the Hutt's cargo facility on Nar Shaddaa plays out. While Luke Skywalker, Ai'kani, Snarl, and R2-D2 infiltrate the building, Rook fends off two of the Hutt's guards who try to board the ship, killing them with her Stormtrooper II carbine and a grenade. After the team returns with the rescued Sabrina, Rook pilots the Voidstalker off-world and dogfights through a swarm of TIE-Y 'Ugly' fighters, destroying several before escaping to hyperspace.

title: RPlog:Nar Shaddaa Infiltration
summary: During the Second Battle of Nar Shaddaa, Luke Skywalker in his X-wing and his Sullustan padawan Ikihsa Enb'Zik in the blastboat Vigilance use Jedi Force Harmony to fly in perfect synchronization through the raging space battle and reach the moon's surface. They thread past a freighter and destroy debris and missiles to mask their entry, dodging pursuing Uglies. Contacting smuggler-technician Kaitlin Mainwaring via Senator Marx's frequency, they land covertly at the Side Deck repair hangar. Kaitlin briefs them on the moon's layout and the threat of Malign's forces, then leads them to the roof to Force-leap to a neighboring building to begin extracting two contacts, Lon and Siren.

title: RPlog:Nar Shaddaa Philosophy
summary: At the Side Deck bar on Nar Shaddaa, the Horansi newcomer Seyyid and the human Tritus Vaticus, a participant in a recent uprising, fall into a lengthy philosophical debate over the nature of death and war. Tritus argues war is purposeful population control no different from abortion, while Seyyid counters that mass deaths become meaningless statistics without emotional involvement. The conversation ends inconclusively as Seyyid rises to leave, the two never reaching agreement.

title: RPlog:Narrow Escape
summary: Emperor Bacharan Valak tracks his enemies to Orson Tighe's ship the Uwannabuyim, docked at Asteroid Kappa, and attacks. Valak telekinetically tosses the ship and disarms Simon Sezirok, then duels the Jedi Jessalyn Valios, intent on killing her. Talon Karrde reluctantly orders Orson to fire an ion cannon from the Wild Karrde, and the combined ion fire plus Simon's hurled debris staggers Valak, allowing Simon and Jessalyn to flee aboard the lifting Uwannabuyim. They escape toward Tatooine and then a safe hideout, with Orson having recorded the whole fight.

title: RPlog:Nasiri Hires Quinne
summary: Aboard the party ship Nyriaan Spiral, Falleen Lorda Nasiri Gejalli approaches the Zeltron singer-dancer Quinne Stardust Rose on the dance floor and invites her to talk business at his table. He offers her a paid engagement as resident performer and event hostess aboard the ship, with luxury quarters and board, warning that his circles include Hutts, scoundrels, and slavers but that she would be protected. Quinne accepts the deal, requests a botanical garden-view suite, and begins planning to audition or hire a band.

title: RPlog:Near Capture & Escape From Tyy'sun
summary: After losing her job at Gundark Industrial, Ash (Nitisha Lazure) travels to Etti IV and is lured by a note delivered by Twi'lek youths to a secluded park platform. There she meets the crime lord Tyy'sun Eson, who confronts her over her ties to Tritus of Gundark Industrial and the Family's grievances over the mistreatment of A'estshy Nubiari. Despite Ash explaining she is now an ex-employee and that a ceasefire exists, Eson throws a glop grenade at her feet. Ash dives clear, draws her weapons, and flees the platform while Eson calmly departs by speeder, having already tagged her shuttle with a tracking device.

title: RPlog:Nelhrn's Loyalty
summary: Following intelligence of Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin's planned coup, Warlord Korolov locks down the HIMS Inquisitor under Action Alert: Black, and ISB interviews all officers. Korynn Fleming interviews Commander Keline Nelhrn, who candidly admits she attended Kreldin's secretive gathering where he revealed faking his death and railed against the alien Emperor Vadim. Her honesty and demonstrated loyalty lead Korynn to clear her of treason charges temporarily, provided she names the attendees and keeps the interview secret so other implicated officers can be questioned without doctoring their testimony.

title: RPlog:Neo-Empire Attacks Kashyyyk
summary: On the Rwookrrorro City landing platform, Jessalyn Valios (pregnant) recruits her student Joshua Arands and the estranged dark-leaning Mailyn Raines to help against a threat she was warned of by an NRI source. A Neo-Imperial strike team led by Greiko Lornan, disguised as a Ryloth diplomatic party, plants bombs and launches a surprise bombing-and-blaster assault on the residential level, setting Jessalyn's house ablaze. Chewbacca and Rawkrawr sound the Wookiee alarm while the Jedi deflect fire and defuse one bomb; the attackers escape up the turbolift after lightsaber-wounding Tanith. Joshua's freighter rescues the group as the rigged district explodes.

title: RPlog:Neutral Ground
summary: Before leaving on assignment, Caspian officer Lynae Cassius secretly invites both the Jedi Ikihsa Enb'Zik and the Sith Lord Tyler Damion (Darth Malign) to her cabin on Caspar to force a direct dialogue about the escalating civil unrest on Dac. Malign argues the planet should become independent of both the Republic and Empire, offering his forces to defend it pending a public vote, while Enb'Zik remains deeply distrustful of the Sith's motives. Malif Tal-Tahn (a hooded agent) and Caspian interim Presav Mahon also attend the tense negotiation over tea. Ultimately Enb'Zik agrees only to travel to Aquarius and present the proposal to Chief of State Leia, refusing to vouch for or trust Malign.

title: RPlog:Neverending Nightmare
summary: In his New Alderaan office, Senator Al'Dira and NRI operative Brin Harper (Shael Edur) compare the nightmares, deja vu, and despair they both developed after visiting the mysteriously vanished planets of Sullust and Corellia. Their tense, emotional conversation ends with Al'Dira angrily leaving, only for a Sith strike team led by the mutant Wookiee Sentinel and Mandalorian Wescal Cantrell to crash through the office window to capture the Senator alive for Darth Malign. Al'Dira's two twi'lek guards are killed, Brin resists and is wounded, and Al'Dira surrenders peacefully and is carried off to a waiting shuttle.

title: RPlog:New Beginnings
summary: On Trandosha, NRI agent Drax Rendolen is summoned by High Priest Tantrix to ascend to the inner circle of the Theocratic Republic of Truth religion. To prove his sincerity he removes his cybernetic arm and confesses his NRI mission and his dark deeds, choosing to defect and embrace the movement. The 'surgery' to fit a new arm is revealed to be a trap orchestrated by Darth Malign, who sacrifices Tantrix and ten cultists to graft a Sith-alchemically cloned arm onto Drax, infusing his own genetic material. Malign declares Drax his apprentice and a Damion, charging him to lead the religion as a Sith asset within the NRI.

title: RPlog:New Blood in the Ministry
summary: The New Republic Defense Council convenes an open session, chaired by Senator Rafel de'Bris of Taanab, to examine failures of the current administration. Newly elected Senator Al'Dira and former Chief of State Peshk Vry'lya debate the failures on Dac, military funding, and human/non-human relations, with Vry'lya provocatively calling for a vote of no confidence against Chief of State Leia Organa-Solo. The Chairman rebuffs Vry'lya's inflammatory tactics, and the council agrees on priorities: increased military spending, a coherent war strategy, improved relations with neutral powers, and diplomatic resolution with the Quarren Survivalist Party.

title: RPlog:New Republic Counter-Attack
summary: The New Republic fleet, led by Rear Admiral Moralis Rodriga aboard the NRSD Reprisal (former GSS Harbinger), drops out of hyperspace to relieve the besieged Griffons Alliance fleet at Cochran, where Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin's vastly larger Imperial force has encircled them. Ghost Squadron, Falcon Squadron, and Shadow/Mantaray squadrons engage Imperial Scimitar bombers and TIE Interceptors in a sprawling starfighter battle. The Griffon ship GSS Gabriel sacrifices itself to shield the evacuation, allowing the DSV Deus and the REPCC Appareo Diem (carrying civilians, officials, and Griffon research databases) to escape to hyperspace before the Gabriel is destroyed. The Imperials then shift their full firepower onto the Republic fleet as the battle continues.

title: RPlog:Nexu Hunting - Part 1
summary: Aboard Orbital Station Paladin, two feral Nexu have escaped into the maintenance tunnels, and a mixed team of New Republic Marines, FleetOps, and StarOps personnel are assembled to hunt them down. Lt. Commander Maggrath briefs the volunteers and puts the battered Marine Lieutenant Vengan Draelis in tactical command. Vengan organizes six-man building-clearance teams led by Sergeants Mason and Tal'sin Secura, with no blasters permitted except shotguns. The teams begin sweeping the tunnels in formation as a great grey Nexu, defending its mate and cubs, stalks toward them.

title: RPlog:Nexu Hunting - Part 2
summary: The grey male Nexu ambushes Tal'sin Secura's squad in the maintenance tunnels of OS Paladin, mauling three Marines in rapid succession. Raxis L'ygr shoves the unarmed technician Ohao to safety and orders his astromech to retreat while he and Tal'sin engage the beast. In a desperate close-quarters fight the two repeatedly cover each other until Raxis lands a fatal shotgun blast to the Nexu's head. The wounded but victorious pair call for medics, while deep in the station the surviving she-Nexu and her cubs remain at large.

title: RPlog:Nodes on the Web
summary: In the Casohav Temple on Caspar, Jessalyn Valios seeks out Luke Skywalker, troubled over her influence on the fallen Selas Simon and her own slide toward the Dark Side. Luke opens the Force fully to her, sharing a vision of the interconnected matrix of past, present and future, and even lays bare his own soul, loss and pain. The profound, intimate experience restores Jessalyn's connection to the Force and her sense of purpose, easing her toward redemption. She tearfully begs forgiveness, and Luke reassures her that emotion, felt through the Force, is a Jedi's strength.

title: RPlog:Nonaggression Treaty
summary: Aboard the Imperial flagship HIMS Inquisitor after the battle over Coruscant, Imperial Commodore Lynae Caiton hosts treaty negotiations between the Galactic Empire and the Caspian Democratic Union (CDU). President Mahon insists on strict CDU neutrality, refusing to favor Empire or Rebellion while permitting trade and visits from both, and pledging to disrupt any military operations staged from Union territory. Imperial Court Advisor Count Dises Diaglo presses for guarantees against arms sales to the Rebels but is rebuffed by Mahon's pragmatism and leaves to review the matter. The session ends with agreement on CDU sovereignty, exchange of ambassadors and consulates (including reopening the embassy in Plaxton and one on Corellia), establishing a nonaggression treaty.

title: RPlog:Not My Kind of Archaeology: Kithan Lost Her Marbles
summary: The Squib Kithan barges into Tokoga's office with a frantic, fragmented story: she overheard two cloaked men (Jan and a cuffed Corellian Jedi apprentice) discussing a relic and a sacrifice while taking holo-orders from a wheezing master. She has lost three hours of memory after following them, and produces a Sith amulet she found in a plaza pool. Tokoga calms her, gathers details, swears her to secrecy pending Commander Cen and the Jedi, and bargains for the amulet in exchange for a large bag of Dac marbles.

title: RPlog:Not My Kind of Archaeology: The Unwelcome Visitor
summary: Near the Jedi Temple on Ord Mantell, a reanimated, decaying corpse animated by the Dark Side approaches Senator Tokoga, the Jedi Leo Corak, pilot Johanna Siri te Danaan, and others. The corpse delivers a Sith ultimatum: hand over the captured 'Orb of Barad' relic on Nar Shaddaa or face dire consequences, and demands specific people including the bystander medic Myiari Oerstead be brought along. The corpse collapses and rapidly decomposes; afterward Brin Harper reassures the shaken Myiari, who is escorted to the Jedi Temple alongside new arrival Flight Cadet Joran Hess.

title: RPlog:Nothin but a family thing
summary: On Caspar, Lynae oversees the re-provisioning of her ship the Red Sky when Axel, now Grand Admiral and acting Regent of the Imperium, arrives in civilian dress to talk family and the future. Axel offers to take Lynae's son Andrev under his wing with an Imperium ensign commission as his aide-de-camp, and Lynae agrees, describing Andrev's strengths. The two discuss their diverging long-game strategies: Axel keeping the crumbling Imperium together and watching the Sith Malus, and Lynae pursuing genetic research to end Force-user cycles. They part with a rare embrace and mutual promises to stay safe.

title: RPlog:Nothing Goes As Planned
summary: Senator Tokoga goes to meet Rainer in New Alderaan's industrial slums to gather information from supposed contacts, while the medic Myiari secretly trails him out of concern. The meeting is a trap: Rainer reveals stormtroopers and unmasks Brek Halsmer, Myiari's lover, as an Imperial agent who confronts and brawls with her. Despite resistance from both, Tokoga's attempt to disarm Rainer fails and Rainer threatens to maim the Senator, forcing surrender. Brek knocks Myiari unconscious before she can call for help, and both prisoners are hauled off to an Imperial outpost.

title: RPlog:Of Diplomacy and Reprisal
summary: Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard arrives aboard the New Republic Star Destroyer Reprisal with her infant daughter Gabi for a joint NR/CDU investigation. Captain David Stone, the ship's XO, welcomes her, and officers Mitali and Wrista Ipex are assigned to escort her and her small entourage. While the pilots Aaden Baeyal and Kegren'Te chat in the hangar, the CDU task force is delayed; eventually CDU Commander Adam Shadow arrives aboard the Forbearant for a brief meet-and-greet. Ambrosia and Shadow exchange courtesies, agreeing to a fuller debrief on Operation Dragon Slayer before she settles Gabi for the night.

title: RPlog:Of Ships and Sentients, Butchers and Arrivals - part 1
summary: Aboard the Caspian cruiser CMS Audace, Lieutenant Commander Lynae Cassius visits engineering and questions the new Twi'lek crewman Ven Secura about the ship's engine status. Ven explains a backup hyperdrive motivator fluctuation caused by a misaligned Batch III refit, and a full diagnostic is scheduled. The conversation turns philosophical: Lynae mentions a sentient droid that will accompany the Audace, which leads Ven to reveal his past as a former slave who fled Hutt space to the Caspian Democratic Union, and the two discuss slavery, freedom, and the meaning of home before Ven is called back to duty.

title: RPlog:Of Ships and Sentients, Butchers and Arrivals - part 2
summary: At Ruathen's Deep Blue Sea restaurant on Caspar, Dr. Lynae Cassius debates sentience, slavery and legal personhood with the sentient maintenance droid HM743, arguing the droid should not be owned property. Their philosophical conversation is interrupted by the dramatic arrival of former Grand Moff Scaven Marx, the 'Butcher of Mutanda,' now head of a criminal syndicate and on the NSO council. HM743 excuses itself, and Lynae and Marx spar verbally over their shared status as former Imperials, their differing methods, and the prospect of peace. Marx offers Lynae employment before departing.

title: RPlog:Of Ships and Sentients, Butchers and Arrivals - part 3
summary: Lt. Commander Lynae Cassius reports to Admiral Camrath Kizuka on the bridge of the CMS Typhoon that former Moff Scaven Marx has been spotted on Caspar. Kizuka, who blames Marx for the kidnapping and death of his first wife, reacts with fury and orders Marx arrested or killed if still planetside. Lynae clarifies she did not follow Marx but suggests the owner of Ruathen's restaurant as a possible lead to track him.

title: RPlog:On Dathomir
summary: Stranded on Dathomir after a battle, Imperial pilot Alex Dante and Rebel pilot Raxis L'ygr (with Rebel marine Leyanne Zion) share an uneasy survival camp under orders to keep the peace. Raxis, whom Dante had shot down, invites himself to her fire and the two engage in a long, sardonic verbal sparring match about Imperial uniforms, expendability, humor, and the futility of their endless conflict. Despite being enemies, they reach a wry mutual understanding that they are merely the hand pulling the trigger, agreeing to cooperate for survival until rescue arrives before resuming hostilities.

title: RPlog:On Ord Mantell
summary: This is an index/hub page summarizing a story arc rather than a single scene. Narrative connective text describes how Dr. Lynae Cassius rescued the wounded Jedi Brandis Finian after the Battle of Nar Shaddaa and pursued him to Ord Mantell to repay a perceived life debt, with a bulleted list of links to the individual sub-logs (Lynae's Arrival, A Friendly Drink, etc.). It also recounts her later penance before the New Republic Senate and her decision to join the CDU navy on Caspar.

title: RPlog:One Bad Day
summary: Fleeing through Plaxton City on Caspar, the fugitive Selas force-user Simon Sezirok is hunted down in an alley by the Rodian bounty hunter Detjin, who binds him with a tow cable and demands his surrender for a bounty. The two struggle in a duel of Force-chokes, blaster fire and Simon's twin-bladed lightstaff, leaving Simon wounded in the shoulder and legs before he carves an escape hole through the alley floor with his blade. Later, on Hideaway Beach, Jedi student Ethan Katana finds Simon and, enraged that Simon's tampering forced the killing of his Nek battle dog, punches him before pulling himself back. NRI Captain James K'Cusi arrives to bring them to a safehouse and reveals that the NRI Director (Bazil McKenzie) and Markus Lisardis were kidnapped by a Sith woman using the name Kacela Ulara.

title: RPlog:Opening Ceremony
summary: The New Republic's 20th Anniversary Gala opens in Chianar Plaza on New Alderaan with speeches from Chief of State Leia Organa Solo and Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard, who awards posthumous medals to families of marines lost defending the Caspian embassy. Meanwhile a covert security team (codenames Gentleman/Drax, Meltdown/Portia, Wraith/Galin) identifies two disguised infiltrators near the stage. Portia stages a fake jealous lover's tantrum slapping Jaspar to create a distraction while Drax and Galin drug and stun the two false guards and quietly extract them to a detention facility. The ceremony ends with a choir performance and Ambrosia's daughter Gabi sneaking away from her bodyguard.

title: RPlog:Operation Nova
summary: Commander Tricia Calder briefs Caspian Marines on Operation Nova, the first phase of a counteroffensive to liberate Plaxton City from Imperial occupation. Three companies HALO-drop into the city, link up with Rangers, and assault Imperial command, sensor, and beach defenses with air support from Voodoo squadron and aid from Rabid's StarShield Dragoons. After clearing the beach and the Fountain Square (destroying multiple AT-ATs and AT-STs), the Marines, Griffons, and rallying civilians push east toward the Government Plaza, routing the disorganized Imperial garrison.

title: RPlog:Operation Shado Kolpo - Fifth Wave
summary: During the fifth wave of Operation Shado Kolpo, the Imperial task force led by Captain Lynae Caiton aboard the ISC Broadsword springs a trap on a New Republic blockade-running convoy near Coruscant, having gained intelligence through interrogation. Imperial War Shrike bombers, TIE Interceptors, the Prowler, and the Broadsword systematically destroy the carrack Admiral Rishar, its escort fighters, and over twenty bulk freighters carrying food and medical supplies. The NR forces fight to the death but are annihilated, with only a few fighters limping away into hyperspace. Commander Jal'Dana Rall reports the decisive victory to a Sith lord, tightening the Empire's chokehold on Coruscant.

title: RPlog:Operation Shado Kolpo - First Wave
summary: In the opening wave of Operation Shado Kolpo, General Luke Skywalker personally leads New Republic Task Force Zulu, a flight of X-wings escorting a bulk freighter back toward Coruscant along the Perlemian Trade Route. They encounter an Imperial TIE MkII patrol led by Krieg Inrokana and Damien Loki Katon, and a fierce dogfight ensues as the Imperials try to disable the freighter. The TIEs score hits and knock out one freighter engine but lose a fighter; when NR Corellian gunships arrive as reinforcements, the outnumbered Imperials disengage and retreat, letting the first shipment through.

title: RPlog:Operation Shado Kolpo - Fourth Wave
summary: This is a placeholder/stub page, not a role-play log. Its entire content is an editorial note stating the page should be deleted or saved for later use when an actual fourth-wave log is ready to be posted. No scene, characters, or events are present.

title: RPlog:Orson's Departure
summary: While sharing a deep meditative experience in the Force, Orson Tighe is overwhelmed by visions of his past, particularly the manipulative and sinister figure of Marina who once betrayed him. Jessalyn Valios threads herself into his consciousness to share and absorb his pain, but the agony proves too much; she suffers real sunburns from the prolonged trance. Devastated and convinced he has 'failed,' Orson withdraws emotionally from Jessalyn despite her declarations of love, and ultimately leaves her without a word.

title: RPlog:Orson's First Lesson
summary: Aboard the ship Uwannabuyim in orbit over Myrkr, Jessalyn Valios begins teaching Orson Tighe to use the Force, having repaired the previous day's damage. She guides him through handstand exercises designed to make him rely on the Force rather than muscle, and after repeated frustrated attempts he finally touches the Force and hears her speak directly into his mind. Orson is awed by the experience, and the two discuss why the Force cannot be sensed on Myrkr and the need to keep this hidden from Karrde.

title: RPlog:Orson's Warning
summary: Late at night in the barracks at Karrde's base on Myrkr, Orson visits Jessalyn while she secretly studies datapad information. Under cover of small talk about a flower and her lightsaber construction, Orson embraces her and whispers a warning not to trust Declan. He offers her access to the base's tool room and crystal fabrication facilities to help build her lightsaber, and reassures her that Karrde will not betray her despite his anger.

title: RPlog:Orson's Wild Ride
summary: Unable to sleep, Orson works on an old repulsor speeder behind the Myrkr barracks when Jessalyn joins him, and he takes her on a midnight flight over the forest. He lands at a secluded waterfall clearing he favors, where the two share an intimate but conflicted conversation about Jessalyn's feelings for Simon, Orson's loyalty to Karrde, and whether anyone can be taught to be a Jedi. Jessalyn goes for a swim, and the ride ends with Orson affirming his support and Jessalyn kissing his cheek, both left with bittersweet, unresolved feelings.

title: RPlog:Orson and the Force
summary: Orson Tighe asks Jessalyn Valios to help calibrate the Uwannabuyim during a short flight in orbit over Myrkr. As they repair scorched power nodes, Jessalyn regains her Force senses in orbit (away from Myrkr's ysalamiri) and is shocked to perceive the Force glowing brightly from Orson as he works. She reveals to him that he is Force-sensitive and has the potential to be a strong Jedi. After a brief mental touch demonstrating the Force, Orson, confused but moved, asks her to train him, and she tentatively agrees to teach him until Luke can take over.

title: RPlog:Orson the Artist
summary: On Karrde's base on Myrkr, Jessalyn Valios discovers Orson Tighe holopainting at night. He shyly reveals a three-dimensional portrait of Luke Skywalker overlooking the asteroid lightsaber battle, made as a gift for her. The two discuss being unexpectedly caught up in epic, historic events, and Jessalyn insists Orson did the right thing saving lives. Orson, more settled and confident now, hugs her and gently steps back from competing with Simon for her, telling her Simon needs her more, though leaving his own feelings ambiguous.

title: RPlog:Orson the Technician
summary: Late at night on Karrde's Myrkr base, Jessalyn Valios meditates while Orson Tighe tests a homemade fusion-cutter lightsaber prototype, which produces a fireball and singes his face. Jessalyn explains that a true lightsaber can only be built and ignited by someone attuned to the Force, no matter how technically correct the construction. As she speaks, Orson lapses into another Force-vision of an aged version of himself holding a lightsaber that won't work. Disoriented, he says he now understands about the lightsaber before retiring for the night.

title: RPlog:Our Private Aftermath
summary: Aboard the Candor's Redress after escaping the Imperial Base Delta Zero destruction of Cochran, Kintor Roberts, Cassie Monoseer, Greiko Lornan, and the wounded Imperial defector Sandor Woden tend their injuries and grief. Lornan stabilizes the concussed Sandor while Cassie breaks down, blaming herself for the failed slicing attempt. The survivors process the loss of millions and resolve to make the Empire pay for the atrocity, with Sandor pleading that any reprisal not happen without him.

title: RPlog:Out of the Frying Pan
summary: The morning after their crash on Dathomir, marines led by Wrista Ipex break camp to escape a hunting rancor and trek across a plain toward a downed X-Wing. Wrista delegates command of the march to the concussed Corporal Leyanne Zion as a confidence exercise, and the group has a tense encounter with a herd of towering malkloc plainstalkers that proves to be harmless herbivores. They reach the crashed fighter and recover its stranded pilot, Lance 'Wildman' Corbet, whom Leyanne treats for a side injury. Wrista delivers a somber speech about honoring the fallen by surviving and finding more crash survivors.

title: RPlog:Out of the Sewer, Into the Fire
summary: Simon Sezirok and Mira Isaria emerge filthy from the Caspar sewers into Fountain Square while trying to reach the New Republic Embassy, where they are spotted by CDU Marines (Lokiru and Sean) and a doctor named Dawn. Mira's bumbling 'sewer cleaner' cover story fails, and when the marines draw weapons Simon takes Dawn hostage with his lightstaff. NRI Captain James K'Cusi arrives to play along, while the Dark Jedi Cort Stasus lurks and telekinetically flings a bystander into the air as a distraction. Simon releases Dawn but then uses the Force to torment her and disarm the guards, hauling Mira to her feet so the pair can flee toward the embassy.

title: RPlog:Outpost Ambush
summary: A flight of four Imperial TIE fighters, including pilot Jonas Alsten, patrols a remote sensor outpost in Gyndine's system when a New Republic Ghost Squadron attack force of four X-wings and a B-wing jumps in. The Rebels execute a strategy to draw off the TIE escorts while the B-wing (Dagger 3) runs at the sensor drone. Despite Jonas's relentless attempts to stop the bomber, the B-wing's torpedoes destroy the outpost, and the resulting explosion cripples Jonas's TIE as the victorious Rebels withdraw.

title: RPlog:Oversight
summary: Aboard the Star Destroyer Inquisitor orbiting Corellia, Imperial advisor Jarek Syris, sent personally by Emperor Vadim to oversee the system amid political upheaval after the IHS headquarters bombing and shipyard protests, arrives by A-wing and is greeted by the ship's executive officer Commander Auxin Valerius. Jarek waves off the ceremonial stormtrooper formation, requesting anonymity, and is briefed on a pirate broadcast that overrode a limmie game and claimed responsibility for recent bombings. Jarek requests further reports, a squad of troopers on standby, and inconspicuous transport before retiring for the night.

title: RPlog:Painfully Stubborn
summary: In the grassy clearing at Karrde's Myrkr base, Jessalyn meditates and uses the Force to revive a wildflower while Simon Sezirok, a Selas, approaches her. They discuss the deep differences between the Jedi and the Selas Brotherhood, Simon's distrust of the Jedi order, and his growing but conflicted feelings for Jessalyn. Despite the tension, they agree to remain friends, and Simon invites Jessalyn to share a meal as they head inside to discuss Karrde and their next move.

title: RPlog:Palace Business
summary: At the Hutt Palace on Nar Shaddaa, majordomo Ewan Dain hosts a party while conducting business, joined by his old friend the Bothan statesman Jakys Vry'lya (Demitri) and Twi'lek associates Ayaka and Aayla. Dain and Jakys trade jokes and a wager over Bothan versus Corellian ales while a Merr-Sonn delivery led by the Quarren Krel arrives with a crate of hatchets ordered for Galaxy Tours. Dain completes the transaction (6885 credits) and arranges for the crate to be dropped with the Black Fox. Smuggler Del arrives and warns Ayaka that frequenting a Hutt's palace could endanger her reputation as a legitimate businesswoman.

title: RPlog:Palace Business, part 2
summary: Continuing at the Hutt Palace on Nar Shaddaa, the Bothan statesman Jakys Vry'lya departs amid a formal escort after inviting Dain and Olbba the Hutt's court to Bothawui. Dain finalizes the Merr-Sonn hatchet purchase with the Quarren Krel, who waives the ID requirement once payment clears. Del, Ayaka, and Kaitlin debate whether Ayaka should keep operating out of the Hutt's palace given the risk to her legitimate business reputation, with Ayaka emotionally insisting on staying loyal to Del's crew. Dain introduces Krel to the women before being pulled away by guards to handle an argument elsewhere.

title: RPlog:Palpatine Seduces Jessalyn
summary: On Chandrila at night, Jessalyn Valios waits alone in a meadow when the Emperor Palpatine appears and freezes her with the Force before she can react. He tortures her with Force lightning and declares he will not turn or kill her but instead make her a vessel for his will, forcing her to commit atrocities against her Jedi friends while remaining aware. As Jessalyn's consciousness flees the pain toward death, Palpatine implants part of his essence into her mind, severing her from the Force and enslaving her, then carries her off to his waiting shuttle.

title: RPlog:Parley For Brandis - Part 1
summary: Luke Skywalker leads a Jedi team aboard the stolen Imperial shuttle Tydirium, escorted by four X-wings, on a covert hyperspace jump to the Imperial capital Selene to negotiate the release of captured Jedi Brandis Finian. Luke contacts Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin and requests parley, offering an artifact in exchange. Kreldin, secretly hoping to capture the Jedi for his Sith master Malign, grants them landing clearance aboard the flagship Malevolence. As Kyrin Sh'vani pilots the shuttle in, Luke, Johanna, and Ai'kani begin weaving a Force Harmony to make a replica artifact seem powerful, while Imperial troops mass in the hangar.

title: RPlog:Parley For Brandis - Part 2
summary: The Jedi land aboard the Malevolence and Luke greets Kreldin, presenting the Force-amplified replica artifact as payment for Brandis Finian. Kreldin escorts the group to his lavish office to negotiate privately, intrigued and tempted by the artifact's seemingly immense power. Luke demonstrates the glowing stone and demands to see Brandis, who is brought in unconscious and horribly tortured, his eyes charred. Sensing the deal is a trap, Luke sets down the artifact, and Kreldin betrays the parley, ordering his Royal Guardsmen, bodyguards, and stormtroopers to kill them all.

title: RPlog:Parley For Brandis - Part 3
summary: Aboard the Super Star Destroyer Malevolence, Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin betrays a parley and orders his Royal Guards and Stormtroopers to kill the captured Jedi. Luke Skywalker, Johanna Siri te Danaan, and Ai'kani Za'netra ignite hidden lightsabers, fighting in Force Harmony while the Chyleni Kyrin Sh'vani carries the unconscious doctor Brandis Finian. The Jedi cut their way out of Kreldin's office, blow a hole in the wall and descend toward the hangar bay, while Darth Malign arrives, scolds Kreldin, draws his apprentice's blood, and sets a freezing dark-side ambush on decks 70 and 69.

title: RPlog:Parley For Brandis - Part 4
summary: Continuing the escape from the Malevolence, the Jedi push through Darth Malign's frozen, darkened trap on deck 70 while Malign's spider-like personal guards and electrified water hazards harry them. Luke, Johanna, and Ai'kani use Force Harmony to repel the dark side, blind the guards with bursts of light, and ride a falling turbolift down to the hangar bay. Luke drains a main power conduit, triggering a reactor emergency shutdown that leaves the entire ship dead in space, though the effort badly burns him. Kyrin flies Brandis to the waiting shuttle and then strafes TIE fighters and troops as the group fights toward escape.

title: RPlog:Party Planning, and Other Pursuits
summary: Jessalyn Valios escorts Basca Starker to his newly acquired estate, Starker Keep on Yaeguero Isle on Caspar, where they meet the Kubaz tailor Zubindi Hakoon to plan a black-and-gold gala. The event is designed to combine a street-naming ceremony in Basca's honor with the public release of his core Sariphage research data to representatives of the galaxy's major powers. After Zubindi departs, Basca and Jessalyn share a private, flirtatious conversation in which he confesses dark details of his research, professes his feelings, and the two acknowledge becoming lovers and allies in recovering lost Force knowledge.

title: RPlog:Party Triggered
summary: Business tycoon Malif Tal-Tahn summons fashion designer Zubindi Hakoon and his assistant Veruca Violet to his offices on Athaniss to commission an extravagant, open party. Malif reveals the theme is to be built around the aesthetic of the notorious Basca Starker, a Sith-controlled figure responsible for a genocide that devastated Caspar. Despite the discomfort this causes the Caspian pair (whose homeworld was the victim), Zubindi is artistically intrigued and accepts the commission. Malif gives them open budget and free rein over venue and guest list, foreshadowing the drama such a party will attract.

title: RPlog:Party at the Manor
summary: Lord Geophreigh Smitherbodkins IV hosts a lavish formal gala at Kartathia Manor on Corellia to display a rare tome, with guests including Jedi, smugglers, and the Hutt crime lord Draga, who brings a B'omarr monk as a gift. The party is a cover for a heist: Jarek Syris, working with the Twi'lek Tyy'sun Eson, sets off flash grenades (while Lianja Tantai stages a self-mutilation as a distraction) and his accomplices steal the book. Johanna te Danaan, a Jedi, chases Jarek down outside and pins him, but Tyy'sun arrives on a swoop and fires a (secretly dud) grenade, which Johanna stops with the Force. The distraction lets Jarek leap onto the swoop and escape with the already-smuggled book, leaving the host bereft.

title: RPlog:Paul Nighman's Letter
summary: On a New Republic barracks at Mon Calamari, the recovering Jessalyn Valios receives a paper letter from Paul Nighman, delivered by the young busker Shenner. The letter ends his relationship with Jessalyn, saying they hurt each other and that she should move on. Devastated but composed, Jessalyn comforts a distraught Shenner, declines General Skeezix Calhoun's offer to enlist Shenner as a band leader, then sets off with Luke Skywalker to find Paul; Luke ends up asking Jessalyn to a celebration the next day.

title: RPlog:Paving a Road to Hell
summary: Aboard the YT-1300 Black Dragon now in space, medic Amylynn tends to Luke Skywalker (who lost a hand and is in a self-healing trance) and a stun-injured Jessalyn Valios after their escape from Palanhi. Paul Nighman and Shenner reunite with the returned pair, and Paul presses Jessalyn about her unrequited feelings for Luke, who she insists has chosen a path that excludes her. The tense mood breaks into a playful pillow fight and tickling, after which Paul plays guitar and sings an original song while Shenner accompanies on flute. Luke wakes, and invites the group to join the New Republic.

title: RPlog:Perfectly Balanced, as All Things Should Be
summary: Aboard his refit YT-1300 freighter Revenant near the wreckage of the destroyed station Pride-1, Darth Malus (Lorn Rhys) hosts Dr. Lynae Cassius to discuss the galaxy's future and forge a partnership. Malus reveals a galaxy-wide broadcast under his name urging Imperium servicemen to break their chains, kills shuttle occupants he scanned to deny the Imperium their interrogation, and shows Lynae the dark-side holocron Azhad's Cube. They debate balance versus chaos, the Force, optics, manipulation, and Lynae's past as the first lady of Caspar and a disgraced Imperial officer once fitted with a cardiac kill-switch by Tyler. By the end they drink Corellian whiskey and agree to an alliance built on mutual trust, with Malus bluntly promising to hunt and kill her son should she betray him.

title: RPlog:Physical Therapy
summary: The day after surgery on the HIMS Dauntless, ISB Senior Agent Lanil Jast is up doing calisthenics and aggravating his stitched leg wound, alarming his nurses. Dr. Lynae Cassius arrives and scolds him for overexerting himself so soon after surgery. To keep the bored and stubborn Lanil from injuring himself while staying under care and addressing security concerns, Lynae decides to move him into her own quarters to recover.

title: RPlog:Pilots and Children's Theatre
summary: At the invitation of retired Rebel veteran Marrell Thelin, Kyrin Sh'vani brings members of Ghost Squadron to a children's amphitheatre production on Ord Mantell's Caamasi Gardens. Children swarm the X-Wing pilots while youngsters reenact the Battles of Yavin, Hoth, and Endor with handmade costumes and glowstick lightsabers. The scene is light and warm, with the pilots holding lap-children, though Kesander Beysarus quietly mourns family lost in the war and Lance Corbet stays withdrawn. The visit ends when Kyrin gets a comlink summons and leads her pilots out to a real mission.

title: RPlog:Piper's Guards Shoot Kuxli
summary: After leaving a party on Caspar, CSA VicePrex Simone Drake (Piper) lectures the young Horansi cub Kuxli on Hideaway Beach about the danger of trusting non-CSA acquaintances, warning him that friendly factions are still enemies. Kuxli rejects her advice, defends his friendships, and tries to storm off. Piper orders her Espo guards to block and then shoot him; the guards open fire, eventually dropping the cub with multiple low-power and stun blasts, and she has them drag his unconscious body back to the ship.

title: RPlog:Piper Speaks with Kuxli
summary: Back on Etti IV after Caspar, Piper (Simone Drake) finds Kuxli brooding at the Government District fountain and tries to talk through the shooting incident. Kuxli bitterly tells her he can no longer trust her after she had Espos shoot him in the back, feeling reduced to 'Corporate Property,' while Piper refuses to apologize and insists she acted in the Authority's best interest. They part unreconciled, and afterward Piper records a transmission to Sean Dillon reporting her early return from Caspar with his aide and requesting a meeting.

title: RPlog:Pirates and Pork
summary: Gren Delede leads a force of Maffi crime family soldiers in a TELGAS shuttle, including Twila Virda and the combat droid 501-Zed, to seize a pirate base on the Pirate's Moon that CSSD records list as already destroyed. After a running firefight on the landing pad, the squads push through the corridors, taking the armory with a glop grenade and reaching the command center. The pirate leader's Gamorrean and Twi'lek guards are turned against him when Gren offers credits to switch sides, and 501-Zed crushes the leader's skull. Gren and a wounded Twila are gassed along with the Gamorreans, but the base is captured intact and quietly brought under Maffi control.

title: RPlog:Plan of Action
summary: Admiral Ackbar convenes a war room briefing of New Republic StarOps, FleetOps, and the 224th Battalion to plan a first strike against the Imperial blockade over Bothawui. Ackbar lays out the Imperial fleet disposition (two Venator cruisers Responder and Remorseless, Vigil corvettes, TIE swarms) and proposes punching through to link up with ground forces. Argon Brand accepts command of the cruiser Rapier and argues for an aggressive close jump, while Captain Rasi Cen proposes diversionary tactics and disguised decoy fireships. The plan coalesces around an aggressive jump with a separated decoy transport to relieve pressure on the convoy approaching Drev'starn.

title: RPlog:Playing Politician
summary: Chief of State Leia Organa convenes a planning meeting with Naval Commander Rasi Cen, Senator Tokoga, and Horansi representative K'tyyri to organize a covert New Republic operation to assist Mutanda's Horansi people in achieving liberty from the CSA. K'tyyri explains the Horansi caste system (Gorvan, Kasa, Treka, Mashi) to guide diplomatic and military approaches, while planners discuss inserting a small team and possibly issuing the CSA an ultimatum. The meeting is interrupted when Myiari bursts in under Sith influence, delivering a threat that a Jedi apprentice has been taken and demanding an 'orb' be brought to Nar Shaddaa, before collapsing.

title: RPlog:Playing for Time
summary: Landed on Tatooine aboard the shuttle Darklighter, Paul Nighman sends Shenner (disguised as a boy) into Mos Eisley to locate Luke Skywalker and pass a message. Shenner returns having learned that the target Grathix is tied to a group called the V'ez-tcha and may be holding General Han Solo, and that Luke wants to meet before Paul approaches Grathix. Paul resolves to win Grathix's trust regardless, and after Shenner insists on accompanying him into danger as his 'assistant,' he begins teaching her field first aid for the upcoming Mandalore expedition. While waiting for Luke, Paul plays guitar and Shenner accompanies on her ocarina before drifting off to sleep.

title: RPlog:Poisoning Incident
summary: At the Grand Palanhi Hotel, the academy youth Jusre overhears hotel staff discovering a male guest dead of apparent poisoning in an upstairs room, with talk of suicide and informing authorities. Shaken and nauseous, Jusre flees downstairs and whispers the news to Alexis Blochson, who is sitting with the CSA party including Piper, Dillon, Runther, and Kuxli amid ongoing political bickering. The group grows paranoid as hotel management tries to downplay the death, while Giles Vermillion observes everything with suspicious interest.

title: RPlog:Poisoning Incident, Take Two
summary: Simone Drake (Piper)'s expanded account of the Palanhi hotel poisoning evening, covering the lobby socializing that preceded the death. Roark accepts a job offer from CSA ExO Sean Dillon, Kuxli arrives bearing fresh claw wounds to his face from a fight with a KASA Horansi named Kasa, and Piper clashes sharply with the arrogant Auditor General Runther DeMagna over his dismissive attitude. Giles Vermillion retrieves and inspects a mysterious metal package while the hotel staff grow agitated, culminating in the discovery of the poisoned guest reported by Jusre.

title: RPlog:Political Repercussions
summary: Aboard the NRCV Audacity's ready room over Dac (Mon Calamari), Lt. Commander Rasi Praddhan Cen hosts a tense meeting with Senator Lemos Ackinbrac and the Quarren representative Chaboub over a New Republic Marine raid on a bacta facility that killed civilians and mutilated a corpse for a brain-tissue sample. The angry senator and Quarren accuse the military of acting like the Empire and worsening the planetary conflict. Marine Captain Vengan Draelis arrives battle-worn and defends his men in a furious speech, defending the use of lethal force and offering his commission. Cen orders Draelis to report for disciplinary action, and ultimately Ackinbrac is appointed coordinator of all Republic relief and military assets on Dac, with Draelis directed to make a televised apology and reparations.

title: RPlog:Positions of Power
summary: Captured smuggler Captain Jaspar Andromidas, taken after his ship was downed running the Imperial blockade of the Caspian system, is interrogated aboard the V2SD Nemesis by a calm, menacing ISB agent. After softening him with sleep deprivation and a heat-box cell, the agent lists his charges, injects him with a truth serum, and presses for the name of who hired him. Jaspar offers to turn double agent and only vaguely fingers an ambassador, identified as Ambrosia Delgard, but without a positive ID his confession is deemed worthless and he is sentenced to the spice mines of Kessel.

title: RPlog:Post-Surgery
summary: Aboard the shuttle Black Ice over Nar Shaddaa, Simon Sezirok lies unconscious recovering from major surgery by the Healer Satine, who has given him a new right arm and other repairs after his injuries on Yavin. Mailyn Raines keeps anxious vigil while Kyyel Marrak comes to say goodbye, explaining he is leaving to seek information about Talon Karrde's rumored plans against the Jedi. As Simon stirs awake, he murmurs Jessalyn's name and then speaks tenderly to Mailyn, declaring his love in his native Telgossian terms before slipping back into drugged sleep. Kyyel quietly departs, leaving Mailyn alone with the sleeping Simon.

title: RPlog:Post Mortem
summary: Aboard his captured Star Destroyer Retribution, Imperial Inquisitor Axel Vichten summons Doctor Lynae Cassius and Caspian Presav Crestian Tarasar to discuss the fallout of Darth Malus (Tyler/Lorn Rhys) escaping a carbonite-storage prison after Lynae treated him. Axel asks Lynae to autopsy the eight crew Malus killed aboard a freighter to learn his abilities. Over drinks, the three debate the threat Malus poses, their entanglements with Sith, and how Axel should spin the prison break to the press.

title: RPlog:Power Facility Attack
summary: During New Republic Second Fleet wargames on Ord Mantell, a force led by Doctor Lynae Cassius (playing the opposing Imperial-style attackers) assaults a mock industrial zone to seize or disable a critical power-generating facility. The defenders, a marine platoon under Lieutenant Varin Rall aided by Jedi Ikihsa Enb'Zik, use defense-in-depth, collapsing prefab buildings and ambushes to trap and pin the attackers. After repeated failed flanking attempts and house-to-house fighting, Cassius is cornered and feigns surrender, then triggers a sim-grenade that 'kills' the defending commander Rall, though her remaining forces are ultimately gunned down or captured.

title: RPlog:Preparation of the Jedi
summary: Aboard the New Republic corvette Audacity near Nar Shaddaa, an intelligence liaison delivers Luke Skywalker and Ikihsa Enb'Zik an order from VADM Doril Farnsworth to mount a ground rescue of missing personnel (Lon, Ona Rai/Siren). Luke and Zik fly the Vigilance to the Jedi cruiser Refrain of Anshalar, where commander Rook Barnsdale meets them. In the meditation chamber the three debate strategy: Colonel Gren Delede's offer to ally the CSA against Darth Malign's Star Destroyer Predator, the independents' blockade of the Smuggler's Moon, and how to break it without causing massive collateral damage. They agree to break the blockade, rescue their people, and drive Tyler out while keeping the Republic's footprint minimal.

title: RPlog:Prison Break Gone Wrong
summary: New Republic Marines under Captain David Stone and Lt. Vengan Draelis are processing roughly 400 prisoners from a makeshift Mon Calamari coastal detention camp onto transports when a Maffi/Zhao raiding party (Adaze Zasul, Gren Delede, Twila Virda, later Tyy'sun Eson) drops in by swoop to break out specific prisoners. The assault goes badly: the swoopers crash over the walls, are pinned by disciplined Marine fire, and Adaze and Eson are wounded as the Marines call in reinforcements including a battleboat and the AT-8 anti-tank gunners. The Trader's Triumph jumpship lands to disgorge mercenaries and blasts a hole in the prisoner chute, allowing some convicts (including Comdore) to scatter, but the raid ultimately bogs down with the attackers trapped in the chute under heavy Marine fire.

title: RPlog:Prison Visitations
summary: Captured after a battle, Simon Sezirok and Mira Isaria are held in cells aboard the Imperial SSD Palpatine. The Dark Jedi Cort Stasus (also called Etrigan) uses the Force to slip past guards and brings Mira to Simon's cell, claiming he only wants to talk, while the Sith hunter Morganna Tazecks (using the name Kacela) intrudes, taunting both and threatening Simon with future torture. Cort and Morganna trade barbed rivalry over a past insult before she leaves. Fearing Mira will be tortured to break him, Simon hastily offers to tell Cort anything if Mira is spared.

title: RPlog:Prize Awards Shooting Contest
summary: At the Half Moon Hotel and Casino on Bonadan, Prex Ernest Pallando hosts the awards ceremony for the Inaugural Merr-Sonn/NovaCom Open Marksmanship Competition. The Shistavanen marksman Mojo (Fenris Wolfenstein) sweeps top honors with a pack of armed packmates collecting his winnings from official Eva Sargent, while Imperial officers Kizuka, Paro, and Dyne and Countess Athena Thistleborn claim their prizes and mingle. Merr-Sonn CEO Cernious Vry'lya arrives to court Bothan supporter Prashk and propose sponsorships and a future Bespin tournament, and Kizuka flirts with Athena throughout.

title: RPlog:Promotion to Wing Commander
summary: In his office aboard the Star Destroyer Inquisitor, Marshal Krieg Inrokana summons Squadron Leader Alex Dante to discuss escalating Rebel raids on Imperial depots. He promotes her to Wing Commander and CAG of Task Force Inquisition, placing her in charge of all six squadrons while retaining leadership of the Razors. Citing security, he withholds details of an anticipated large-scale Rebel operation, charges her to minimize loss of life, and directs her to coordinate with Commander Mandor.

title: RPlog:Prophecy
summary: Aboard the Jedi vessel Refrain of Anshalar in orbit of Chandrila, Aurejin, Jessalyn Valios, and the injured apprentice Kyyel Marrak discuss Kyyel's near-fatal encounter with the Sith Simon and Mailyn Raines. Aurejin and Jessalyn counsel Kyyel on self-defense and not squandering his life, and lament the loss of the student Joshua to Corellia. In a rain-filled courtyard, Aurejin crystallizes a raindrop into a gem and effectively proposes a shared future with Jessalyn, foretelling children and a renewed Jedi Order under her teaching.

title: RPlog:Propositions, Preludes, and Promises
summary: On Mon Calamari, Paul Nighman finishes writing a song before Jessalyn Valios confides that Luke Skywalker wants to train her as a Jedi, leaving her frightened of losing herself; Paul comforts and encourages her. Luke then summons Paul to the spaceport, where Admiral Ackbar reluctantly lends a Lambda shuttle to escort Paul's mission to Tatooine to meet Grathix and search for both Han Solo and Mandalorian artifacts. Returning to barracks, Paul tells Jessalyn and Shenner he leaves in the morning and invites Shenner along, leaving her to decide between joining him or staying with Jessalyn. The evening ends with Paul taking Jessalyn to dinner at the Rusty Urchin, where a passionate kiss leads them to slip away together to a moonlit cliff overlooking the ocean.

title: RPlog:Psychology 101
summary: Aboard the freighter Black Dragon after Jessalyn's capture by Sabbath and the Empire, Paul Nighman tries to organize the disparate crew into a functioning team. He interviews Amylynn Starr, Tand, and Tacra about their skills, assigning Tand and Tacra to ship maintenance and Shenner to guard the airlock, and meets a frosty Leia Organa Solo and Winter aboard the bridge. A clash erupts between Shenner and Tacra, prompting Paul to mediate; he then follows Shenner into the cargo bay, where she opens up about being a whore's daughter who has had no one since her mother died. The scene ends with an emotional, tender bonding moment between Paul and the young Shenner.

title: RPlog:Punishment
summary: Returning from the Battle of Kashyyyk, Sith forces land aboard a vessel where Admiral Axel Vichten complains about damage to his ship the Boomstick. Furious at the scout Ja'casha (Ash) for repeatedly disobeying orders, Axel confronts her, seizes her by the hair and ear, and discharges his weaponized cybernetic repulse-hand, ripping off part of her ear and scalp and hurling her across the hangar. She survives and is dragged to the medbay, while Baron Sekes, the Mandalorian Cantrell, the Trandoshan Ferrak, the deranged Decrevi, and the Falleen Countess Ssanyu look on; Ssanyu and Decrevi then angle to speak privately with Axel.

title: RPlog:Punishment for the Prodigal
summary: Recaptured by her former Hutt employer's thugs, the former princess Ylsa Estrallas awakens imprisoned on Tatooine and is brutally beaten and sexually assaulted by Ullo's enforcer Mephisto until Ullo intervenes, stopping the assault. Ylsa is healed by a Twi'lek medic and bathed and dressed by a young servant girl, Ilyana, before being summoned to Ullo's court. In a tense audience Ylsa grovels and confesses Mephisto raped her against contract terms; Ullo declares her punishment was a test, warns her against deceit, and pointedly seats her at his feet as a servant rather than at his side, publicly humiliating her.

title: RPlog:Question Answered
summary: At the Library of the Republic on Ord Mantell, former Imperial officer Lynae Cassius meets New Republic pilot Kyrin Sh'vani to ask whether the New Republic will defend independent worlds against an impending Imperial onslaught. Satisfied by Kyrin's assurance, Lynae hands over a datapad containing the last-known assets, ranks and command structure of her former Imperial task force. She warns that the Empire will throw conscripted soldiers from usurped worlds against the New Republic or the CDU. Lynae also confirms Kreldin is dead, killed by the Emperor, while disclaiming any desire for redemption.

title: RPlog:Rage out
summary: At the New Republic military base landing zone on New Alderaan, Ord Mantell, an inexplicable mass brawl erupts among ground crews, the violence linked to a pathogen (GCD-343) that triggers uncontrollable rage. Dr. Lynae Cassius sends her young son to safety, then works with pilot Mark Steele, Captain Rasi Cen, and Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard to subdue the rioters as assault shuttles arrive to stun the crowd. Cassius identifies the rage-inducing pathogen oozing from the afflicted, Ambrosia is injured wrestling a maddened mechanic, and the base is gradually pacified with no fatalities.

title: RPlog:Raid of the Abyssal Ruins
summary: On Coruscant's undercity, the Twi'lek crime boss Tyy'sun Eson assembles a team including the Wookiees Shoburhynn and Kyyiriiwur, plus the spacer Jaxx Morgan, to punish a gang that ignored his order to vacate a city block. They storm a ganger hideout, slaughtering most of the occupants in brutal close combat. Kyyiriiwur is wounded in the eye by blaster fire; Tyy'sun spares two women and one ganger, sending them out as messengers, then has the survivors regroup and tends to the injured Wookiee.

title: RPlog:Raid on Tatooine
summary: Disguised as Vigilance Security Corporation agents using stolen uniforms, a team led by Bailey Sora Laran, including Cade Vaughan, Alistair Al'Dira, and Tal'sin Secura, attacks one of Draga's smaller gangs in a secluded Tatooine cantina to incite fear and unrest. After an attempt to detain the gang leaders fails, a brutal firefight erupts; Tal'sin maims the human co-leader and Vaughan executes a stunned gang member by smashing his skull on the bar, sending a message about threats to the Twi'lek people. Bailey cuts off her unit's insignia patch, noting the work pleases Mr. Eson though not Colonel Virda, and orders a withdrawal.

title: RPlog:Random Act of Unprovoked Kindness
summary: In the brig of the NRSD Reprisal, the blinded Jedi Brandis Finian confronts his former Imperial captor and torturer, Lynae Caiton, who is now a New Republic prisoner. She taunts him about his lost sight and goads him into slapping her, mocking the Jedi's restraint. Despite his fury, Brandis has the Marine Benelek cuff her, then uses the Force to heal her recently broken arm rather than torment her. He leaves, telling her that next time their paths cross he will ensure she is armed and cut her down fairly.

title: RPlog:Raxis At the Medbay
summary: Recovering in the New Republic medbay on Ord Mantell after a bloody fistfight with his mentee Lance Corbet, pilot Raxis L'ygr is visited by Senator Del Marx, who had witnessed the brawl. Raxis insists on taking full responsibility for the fight despite being the one who got beaten. Lieutenant Kesander Beysarus arrives to order Raxis to file a report for Major Sh'vani, confine him to quarters, and assign him to droid maintenance pending a possible court-martial. Del reassures Raxis and offers him civilian work in the government complex should he be discharged.

title: RPlog:Raxis Gets Pinned
summary: On the day of the Winter Fete aboard NRSD Reprisal, newly tested Flight Cadet Raxis L'ygr is summoned by veteran pilots Kesander Beysarus and Sascha 'Spots' Vildosti. Under the guise of chewing him out for being out of uniform, they award him his StarOps pilot's wings and formally welcome him to Ghost Squadron as Ghost 3. Following squadron tradition, Sascha punches the pin-backed wings into Raxis's chest to draw blood, which he endures stoically. Kesander explains the meaning of the wings and the pilots invite him to the lounge for celebratory drinks.

title: RPlog:Raxis Gets Shot Down
summary: A New Republic recon flight led by Raxis L'ygr in an X-wing with two Longprobe Y-wings reverts at Bimmissari, only to find an Imperial Star Destroyer (Nemesis) and Marshal Krieg Inrokana's TIE patrol. Raxis fires first, but Krieg charges him and shoots down his X-wing; Raxis ejects to the planet with his droid Vee-Ten. Both Y-wings are destroyed with all crew killed despite a New Republic relief force of X-wings and a shuttle arriving. The Empire mysteriously withdraws rather than capture Raxis, and smuggler-pilot Askra Sho'bre lands her damaged shuttle to rescue the stranded Raxis.

title: RPlog:Re-Education Begins
