Arissa eventually disables the area's power with a wrist rocket and escapes to her ship, the Kolier, while Korolov, who could have followed, lets her flee and vows they will meet again.

title: RPlog:Seeking a Sponsor
summary: At the Xi Cantina on Charros IV during a trade summit, up-and-coming Zeltron swoop racer Exos Elan angles to make a connection with Presav Crestian Tarasar in hopes of finding a sponsor. They are joined by young Caspian pilot Longinus Van Sen (Elana Tracer's son), and the three trade banter about swoop racing, the Xi Charrians, and charity work. Crestian shows interest in Exos's vocational-outreach charities and offers vague leads on sponsors, while Lon talks up his mother's famous racetrack designs.

title: RPlog:Selene Day's Wookiee Hunt
summary: As part of Selene Day celebrations marking the grand opening of the Empire's new capital city, the Empire stages a hunt with a captured Wookiee as the game, released into Selene's radioactive frozen wastelands. Danik Kreldin partners with sniper Sergeant Sandor Woden and pilot Darenak Alesis to share the prize, while other hunters including the disguised Moff Claven and the casual Xerxes Kherzen pursue separately. The hunters track the wounded Wookiee into the ruined Riverview residential district, where it makes a desperate stand. Kreldin charges and runs his bayonet through the creature, and Sandor delivers the killing sniper shot, winning the hunt and an invitation to meet Moff Marx.

title: RPlog:Selene Day Space Battle Royal
summary: As part of Selene Day celebrations over the Imperial capital, a friendly free-for-all space tournament is held to determine the best pilot, observed by Grand Admiral Kreldin. Jal'Dana Rall in her white TIE Interceptor 'Viper I' disables Adam Shadow's crimson Z-100 Centurion, while Seifer Wolf picks off easier targets. The contest narrows to Rall and her former wingman Wolf, who concedes after being hit, leaving Rall the declared champion.

title: RPlog:Selene Day Space Race
summary: During Selene Day celebrations, an Imperial starfighter race is held over Selene with Danik Kreldin watching from his Super Star Destroyer, the finish line aboard the Malevolence. Imperial pilot Krieg Inrokana races against civilian pilots Talia Dorann and Tyler Damion (racing under the alias Anders Kain), navigating an asteroid field, a minefield, a derelict Star Destroyer hull, a mock space battle, and a recreated Death Star superstructure. Krieg flies cautiously to gauge his rivals but pushes to ludicrous speed inside the Death Star, where his stabilizers shear off and his fighter crashes, requiring rescue. Tyler takes the lead and escapes the simulated reactor fireball, with Talia surviving close behind as they race for the finish.

title: RPlog:Semantics
summary: Held in a makeshift cell, the medic Myiari tends Senator Tokoga's burned leg using a first aid kit pushed to her by the stormtrooper Brek Halsmer. Brek, having shut off the monitoring, conducts a personal interrogation, pressing Myiari on how many stormtroopers she killed and why. The two argue ideology: Brek defends the Empire as honest about its brutality and accuses the New Republic of hypocrisy and civilian deaths at Coruscant, while Myiari condemns the Empire's secret police, COMPNOR, and ISB. Brek ends the debate coldly, wishing the Senator recovery before slamming the cell door shut.

title: RPlog:Senate Assembled
summary: Chief of State Leia Organa Solo convenes the New Republic Senate to review pressing matters of state. Senators report on the Imperial naval buildup near Chandrila threatening the NR garrison, the death of Senator Hastell, the Trandoshan Bloodclaw clan kidnapping thirty thousand Wookiees for Imperial Lord Thel via a CSA front company, cartel spice warfare in Coronet City on Corellia, and Bothawui's reconstruction with nearly a thousand citizens still missing. Senator Dalek Rolynd speaks up urging the Republic to honor its duty to defend Wookiee members, while options for striking the Bloodclaws are debated.

title: RPlog:Senatorial Inquiry
summary: New Republic Senator Lavrish'lin confronts Marine Captain Vengan Draelis and Sergeant Dagon in a briefing room over a controversial operation on Mon Calamari (Dac), where a brain-tissue sample was taken from a dead Quarren during a mission to retake a bacta refinery. The senator warns the act could constitute a war crime implicating the whole unit and pushes for the unvarnished truth on behalf of the Chief of State, while the Marines defiantly insist their report is complete and accurate. The argument grows hostile, with Dagon recording the conversation to guard against slander, and ends with the Marines dismissively rebuffing the senator as a distant explosion shakes the facility.

title: RPlog:Seneal's Funhouse
summary: Following a clue to Ash Seneal's identity, Jedi Jessalyn Valios and her apprentice/lover Orson Tighe investigate the rundown Plaxton City Beachfront Amusement Park on Caspar. Inside the funhouse ride they are ambushed by the bounty hunter Ash Seneal, who fights Jessalyn with a force pike while a blaster-wielding human and a Rodian with a decksweeper attack Orson. The Jedi prevail, killing the Rodian and disarming the others, and Seneal escapes using a flash grenade, vowing to be better prepared next time. Jessalyn and Orson flee the park through a broken section of perimeter fence.

title: RPlog:Sensing Orson
summary: On Caspar, disguised as 'Annalise', Jessalyn Valios realizes that Orson Tighe has tracked her and her companion Simon Sezirok (disguised as 'Shale') to Plaxton City. Fearful and hardening emotionally, Jessalyn discusses with Shale how to slip offworld undetected past the starport and avoid a confrontation with Orson. Shale departs alone to scout the spaceport while the Gorvan Horansi K'tyyri passes through the scene. The conversation reveals Jessalyn's growing bitterness and Simon's foreboding that a clash with Orson is coming.

title: RPlog:Serenella Talks To Her Mother
summary: After being away for over a year, Serenella Jordain visits her estranged mother Lucinda at a seedy Vorzyd V nightclub, bringing her infant daughter Tara. The reunion is tense and accusatory as Serenella airs old grievances about her neglected childhood, but warms as Lucinda admits her failings. Serenella raises the question of her unknown father, and Lucinda recounts a night involving three possible candidates, agreeing to help with a paternity test on the man Dex.

title: RPlog:Serenella and Shael-The Brawl
summary: At the New Alderaan starport, a heavily drugged Serenella Jordain stumbles out of her ship and accosts Shael Winters, who is loading fragile cooling-unit parts. Serenella tries to inspect Shael's cargo, triggering a clumsy fistfight in which Serenella lands one punch despite poor coordination. New Republic marines led by Lieutenant Vengan Draelis arrive; Tarkis Kayl'bre stuns Serenella unconscious and both women are arrested. The video of the brawl was later entered as evidence at Serenella's trial.

title: RPlog:Serenella and Shael-The Trial
summary: In the New Alderaan High Court on Ord Mantell, entertainer Serenella Jordain stands trial for second-degree assault against pilot Shael Winters. Prosecutor Jak M'koy presents Shael's testimony, the arresting Marine Lieutenant Vengan Draelis's security footage, and Serenella's own admission, while Toydarian defense lawyer Tryno argues she was unknowingly drugged and grieving her dead husband. Serenella's emotional outbursts and an inadvertent confession that the woman in the footage is herself undermine her defense. The judge sends the jury (including Raxis L'ygr, Tak Dagon, Gene Malantean, and Wrista Ipex) to deliberate on verdict and sentencing.

title: RPlog:Serenella and Shael-The Verdict
summary: The New Alderaan court reconvenes to deliver the verdict in Serenella Jordain's assault trial. The jury foreman reads a guilty verdict, prompting a weak protest from Serenella while her sister Inanna and juror Raxis L'ygr look on. Citing mitigating factors, Judge Appel sentences Serenella to one year's probation plus a week of counselling and rehabilitation at Remembrance Hospital, with monthly follow-up sessions, and no jail or fine. Her Toydarian lawyer Tryno advises against an appeal as bailiffs escort her to the psych unit.

title: RPlog:Setting Things In Motion
summary: Still reeling from the destruction of Cochran, Kintor tracks down the Imperial defector Sandor Woden on Coruscant via NRI contacts. The two relocate to Kintor's ship, the Champion Glory, for privacy and begin planning a retaliatory strike against an Imperial embassy on Caspar. They discuss recruiting and training a larger team, gathering surveillance and blueprints, minimizing casualties with stun settings, and the option of bombing or kidnapping, agreeing Sandor will recruit while Kintor begins reconnaissance from Caspar.

title: RPlog:Settling In
summary: Hiding out after a rough night that left him drunk and choked by a Dark Jedi, Paul Nighman secludes himself in a quiet corner of the Palanhi City Starport, reading from an old book while Tand works on a computer component nearby. Later Paul explores the city, browses sculptures at Cybot Galactica, finds the Academy locked, and finally checks into the Grand Palanhi Hotel. A bellboy reveals the lavish suite was vacated by a 'Mr. and Mrs. Sky-something' who canceled, and Paul enjoys a long luxurious bath before relaxing to watch the sunset.

title: RPlog:Severed Connections
summary: On Corellia, Jessalyn Valios and Luke Skywalker are relaxing in an old house when both suddenly sense the death of Orson Tighe at the hands of Simon Sezirok through the Force. The shock of the loss causes Luke to briefly descend into grief and rage, lapsing into the dark side before regaining control, while Jessalyn collapses in agony, blaming herself for not being there. Jessalyn senses that Simon himself was nearly mortally wounded in the confrontation. The scene is an emotional aftermath of Orson's murder rather than the killing itself.

title: RPlog:Shape of My Heart
summary: Unable to sleep aboard the Black Dragon's cargo bay after a painful, frustrating evening, Paul Nighman picks up Shenner's guitar and works on finishing a long-abandoned song, singing 'Shape of My Heart.' Shenner wakes and quietly listens, moved by his playing. The two share a tender late-night exchange in which Paul opens up about rediscovering his lost love of music and begins teaching Shenner how to finger-pick the guitar. Shenner confesses she would miss him if he left without her, and after an emotionally charged moment they part to sleep, Paul finally finding peaceful, dreamless rest.

title: RPlog:Shenner Comes to Palanhi
summary: At the windy, sandstorm-blasted Palanhi City Starport, Luke Skywalker and Jessalyn Valios are servicing Luke's X-wing and the freighter Black Dragon when the young spacer Shenner (Shenneret Veery) arrives, brought by her employer Grathix who wants to speak to Luke about Han Solo. Jessalyn gets sand in her eyes and Luke treats them aboard the ship. While Luke checks on R2-D2, Jessalyn confides in Leia Organa Solo about her confusion over Luke having kissed her, leaving Leia surprised. Grathix's interest in finding Solo is established but he does not appear in the scene.

title: RPlog:Shindig on Corellia
summary: Tatooinian Warlord and Jedi Johanna Siri te Danaan hosts a lavish charity gala at the Royale Casino in Coronet City, Corellia, hoping to win goodwill from the new Corellian Confederation government and its Prime Minister Dash Blazer. A glittering crowd of politicians, smugglers, fashion designers, and a flamboyant media host (Thurston Unger) mingle, while the disreputable Zeltron Ezlo crashes the event posing as the 'Zeltron Syndicate,' gorging on shrimp and harassing guests. Johanna frets over Ezlo's presence and considers having Krackor Reincus or Caspian Minister of Justice Sha Dark handle him via warrants, while the Sith Imperator Tyler Damion arrives quietly with Grand Admiral Drayson Honos. The evening proceeds as a social and political networking affair with no overt violence.

title: RPlog:Shootout on Palanhi
summary: Searching Palanhi City for missing companions, Piper and Alexis stumble onto a tense standoff where CSA ExO Sean Dillon confronts an Imperial Stormtrooper squad holding a waitress hostage, while Chewbacca and Khil lie hidden nearby. When Stormtrooper ST-WA1056 backhands Dillon to the ground, a full firefight erupts: Khil, Chewbacca, Jusre, Inoga, Zarcane, and Leamer open fire, downing several troopers and knocking the squad leader unconscious. Dillon's Espos drag him and Piper to safety, and afterward an enraged Dillon furiously tries to reach the Imperial Embassy and Alora while the wounded Chewbacca arranges sentries.

title: RPlog:Shopping, Sightseeing, Fighting off Thugs
summary: On Caspar, Orson Tighe takes his Jedi teacher and lover Jessalyn Valios shopping at the Ride Like the Wind garage, where he secretly orders her an expert repulsorboard for surfing lessons. While walking through the countryside Orson confesses unease about using the Force for profit while spying on the Griffons for Talon Karrde. Detouring past the Casohav Temple, they are ambushed by a Rodian with a vibroblade and a human with a blaster; Orson uses his Force-aided skills to disable the Rodian while Jessalyn deflects blaster fire and drives off the human. They leave the area shaken but unhurt.

title: RPlog:Shopping with Sith
summary: While shopping on Selene to prepare for a meeting with Prex Oppenheimer, newly-minted Moff Elana Tracer runs into Johanna te Danaan (minded by the mutant Wookiee Sentinel), the Sith Archduke Vassily Korolov, and the eccentric scientist Basca Starker. Korolov greets Tracer with morbid curiosity before departing, while Basca's flippant manner provokes Johanna to defend Tracer's new status. The encounter cools when Basca apologizes and introduces himself as the medical R&D head who fought the Sariphage plague on Caspar.

title: RPlog:Showdown Briefing
summary: Prior to Second Fleet's deployment to Cochran, Luke Skywalker summons Ghost Squadron aboard the Jedi cruiser Refrain of Anshalar for a personal briefing. Wearing his StarOps General rankplate and warrior's armor, Luke informs the pilots that the Imperial/Sith task force at Cochran is commanded by Darth Malign, formerly the Ghost pilot Tyler 'Fossil' Damion. He lays out the escort orders, warns them not to deviate to engage Malign personally unless he is taken out, and emphasizes unity and discipline. Major Kyrin Sh'vani, Ghost Leader, observes her pilots' reactions, and Flight Officer Rebecca Varn reports in before the squadron departs.

title: RPlog:Showdown at Cochran
summary: Luke Skywalker leads the New Republic Second Fleet aboard the Jedi cruiser Refrain of Anshalar in an attack on the New Sith Order at the dead world of Cochran, commanded by Captain Antoine Dareus under Darth Malign. After tense hailing exchanges and opening maneuvers, Luke executes the 'Calrissian Maneuver,' feigning retreat to lure the Sith out before the rest of Second Fleet jumps in to overwhelming numbers. Dareus detonates a hidden derillium minefield, creating a massive shockwave, but Luke channels the Force to warn his crews so the New Republic survives with damage but no losses. The vastly outnumbered Sith battle group escapes into hyperspace under cover of the explosion.

title: RPlog:Siege of the Military Base
summary: A combined Imperial and Maffi (Twi'lek criminal) force led by Darth Malign (Tyler Damion) and Tyy'sun Eson assaults the New Republic Military Base on Coruscant with planted explosives. Though the explosives collapse the surrounding platforms, a repulsor field saves the main structure, forcing the attackers into a prolonged grenade and blaster barrage while Maffi incite looting and riots in the streets. New Republic defenders, including Luke Skywalker riding the Horansi Snarl, Tal'sin Secura and Johanna, pour out to resist. The raiders inflict heavy damage and civilian casualties before retreating in speeders, with Eson dragging captive Kyokusha along.

title: RPlog:Sightseeing New Alderaan
summary: On a rare day off, New Republic pilot Raxis L'ygr explores the New Alderaan plaza on Ord Mantell and runs into entertainer Serenella Jordain, a friend of his wingman Lance Corbet. They sit together and chat about Lance, the war, and Raxis's lack of a social life. Serenella teasingly recruits Raxis to guest-star as a male entertainer aboard the cruise ship Rancor, flustering the bashful pilot with her forwardness. She reveals she recently married (keeping her stage name), gives Raxis her card, and they part on friendly terms.

title: RPlog:Simon's Fate
summary: On Corellia's Gold Beaches, Simon Sezirok and Jessalyn Valios attempt a Force-bonding soul-merge, but Simon greedily breaches Jessalyn's hidden mental shields and perceives images suggesting she had been Luke Skywalker's apprentice/lover, becoming convinced the union was a Jedi plot to corrupt him. Overcome with rage and betrayal, Simon physically mutates into a horned Dark Side monster and attacks. Han Solo is knocked unconscious by a Force blow, Orson Tighe is flung aside by Luke, and Luke is wounded in the leg by Simon's claw; Jessalyn severs Simon's right hand with her lightsaber before he flees, leaving his rose-carved staff behind.

title: RPlog:Simon Meets Cort
summary: Fleeing through the darkened alleys of Caspar with his companion Mira Isaria, Simon Sezirok is tracked down by the Dark Jedi apprentice Cort Stasus, who senses Simon's Force potential and tries to recruit him to his Master. Simon refuses, declaring loyalty only to Mira and Markus Lisardis, and Cort reveals he killed the Jedi Ethan, provoking Mira into hurling garbage at him. A lightsaber duel erupts as Cort ignites twin red blades against Simon's green-bladed lightstaff, with Simon steadily losing ground. A New Republic hovercar arrives and whisks Mira to safety while Simon braces to fight a battle he expects to lose.

title: RPlog:Simon Meets Cort, Part 2
summary: Simon Sezirok duels the Dark Jedi Cort Stasus in a Casparian alley, badly outmatched and suffering a broken rib while NRI agents and a sick Mira Isaria watch from a hovercar. Cort toys with Simon, kills an NRI agent with a bolt of dark-side energy, then offers to spare Simon and Mira in exchange for a promise that Simon will seek him out for training. Simon agrees ambiguously, promising only that they will meet again, and Cort departs after telling Simon to find him as 'Etrigan' at the Imperial Palace on Dreven.

title: RPlog:Simon Meets Luke
summary: Aboard the luxury cruiseship Angry Rancor, Markus Lisardis broods over an earlier conversation with Simon about the nature of the Force when a cloaked Luke Skywalker enters seeking the people being hailed as heroes. Simon and Markus realize the lightsaber-bearing stranger is Luke himself, and his friend Feylin Calenik arrives grieving, learning that Luke's apprentice Ethan was the only survivor of some disaster. Luke uses the Force to heal Markus's injured ribs, confirms the Force has guided them all to him, and the scene ends on a cliffhanger as the intelligence officer Bazil McKenzie approaches the group.

title: RPlog:Simon Sezirok Fights CorSec
summary: On Coronet City's Trader's Way, two CorSec guards harass Markus Lisardis over petty trafficking laws and draw blasters, pulling Simon and a bystander named Dracon into the confrontation. Simon ignites his lightstaff to draw fire and deflects the guards' shots while Markus elbows and kicks one guard unconscious; the surviving guard backs down and pretends nothing happened. Simon and Markus then retreat to the Smuggler's Dig cantina, where Markus questions Simon about his unusual weapon and Simon begins to explain the Selas Ritual of Acceptance and its link to the ancient Jedi order.

title: RPlog:Simon Sezirok Meets Markus Lisardis
summary: At Coronet Space Port, Simon Sezirok stands watch like a hunter and meets the Corellian pilot Markus Lisardis and his young ward Mira Isaria after they land. Markus, wary at first, warms to Simon as they talk about Simon's lost homeworld Telgosse, Markus's missing father captured by the Imperials, and his protective bond with the street girl Mira. The two men introduce themselves formally and part on good terms, with Markus offering Simon help and passage, while other spacers (Kacela, Morrison) pass through the busy port.

title: RPlog:Simon and Jessalyn
summary: At Talon Karrde's base on Myrkr, where the Force is dampened by the local ysalamiri, Jessalyn Valios seeks out Simon Sezirok at night to discuss their future relationship before they leave the planet. Simon declares his love and proposes that they unite spiritually and found a new Force order to heal the galaxy. Jessalyn confesses her own love and fear that he'll only see her as a Jedi once they leave. They consummate their romance, disappearing together into the trees. Note: the file's metadata title is 'Simon and Jessalyn' while the infobox titles it 'Orson's Warning'.

title: RPlog:Simon and Karrde
summary: On the newly settled Asteroid Kappa, smuggler chief Talon Karrde seeks out the fugitive Selas Simon Sezirok to repair their strained relationship after two failed meetings. They reconcile, with Simon explaining he is not aligned with Cort Stasus and offering Karrde a cover story (claiming to pursue Cort) to keep the Empire's Emperor Valak at bay. They discuss the search for the hidden Death Star: Simon refuses to mind-probe people but offers to capture and hold prisoners, and suggests Jessalyn Valios might help locate the weapon. Karrde provides a secure office for contact and the two part as allies.

title: RPlog:Simon and Satine
summary: Recovering aboard Satine's ship, the Starfire, the injured Selas zealot Simon Sezirok awakens to find his wounds nearly healed, partly by surgeon Satine's care and partly by his own accelerated regeneration via the True Source. Satine probes Simon's beliefs, questioning his self-destructive crusade to destroy all Jedi and Sith and suggesting he found a school instead to leave a lasting legacy. They discover common ground in their hatred of Palpatine, whom Satine names as pure evil, and Simon resolves to ally even with enemies like Luke Skywalker or Emperor Valak to bring Palpatine down. The conversation ends with Satine kissing Simon's forehead and a fragile mutual trust forming between them.

title: RPlog:Simon the Zealot, Simon the Martyr
summary: In their shared barracks on Myrkr, Simon Sezirok finds Jessalyn Valios crying over her perceived failures and her fear of having endangered Talon Karrde's organization. He comforts her with a rose he carved into his staff and tells her she bears no blame. Simon then reveals his painful decision to leave alone to surrender to Emperor Valak, sacrificing himself to protect Karrde's group, and confesses his love for her. Despite Jessalyn's pleas that the Emperor will turn him to the dark side, they embrace and kiss, and she reluctantly promises not to follow him.

title: RPlog:Simone Drake Meets with Sabbath
summary: Sabbathius Osbourne, an Imperial agent, confronts CSA Prex Simone Drake (Piper) in her office on Etti IV and demands that captive Han Solo be quietly handed over to the Empire. Piper voices concern over the New Republic fleet threatening Etti IV, but Sabbath assures her his unmarked ship can spirit Solo away undetected. They agree to arrange the transfer the following evening.

title: RPlog:Simulated Evacuation
summary: The Caspian Union holds its first wargame exercise in orbit of Charros IV, showcasing new Haor Chall starfighter designs (Vulture droids of Grey Squadron, Yari-piloted Guardian Squadron, plus Apex and Vector Squadrons) against an attacking force led by Star Marshal Axel Vichten and Admiral Lynae Cassius flying TIE Interceptors, a modified Z-95 Headhunter, and three Skipray Blastboats. The scenario simulates defending evacuating civilian transports from marauders; the attackers destroy numerous civilian craft before being 'killed', while spectators watch and a news crew commentates from the CMS Renaissance of Innovation. Axel and Lynae are defeated per the rules but deliver debrief lessons on tactics, declaring the defenders' victory hollow given simulated civilian losses.

title: RPlog:Sinister Stranger
summary: In Fountain Square of Plaxton City on Caspar, Jessalyn Valios is approached at a cafe table by a sinister, impeccably dressed man named Ash Seneal, who reveals he has been tracking her, knows her name, and gives her a tourist map with their hotel circled. He cryptically states he wants something from her, urges patience, and then vanishes among the trees. Orson Tighe arrives afterward, and Jessalyn explains the unsettling encounter; they decide to relocate to a beach hotel for safety while Orson plans to continue work on a lightsaber.

title: RPlog:Sith Convention
summary: With several New Sith Order veterans present on Caspar, Crestian Tarasar hosts a social dinner at the Captain's Table restaurant in Noques Rasala. Axel Vichten arrives with the Falleen mercenary Ssanyu Natrulon, and Salin Fawzy joins them later. Over wine and a multi-course meal they discuss old NSO connections, the failed purge by Thel, the presence of Imperator Malign/Damion on-world, Ssanyu offering her mercenary/torture services, the decline of the Corporate Sector Authority, and the resurgence of their old network. Both Axel and Salin depart for other business, leaving Ssanyu and Crestian to part with the understanding that future collaboration may follow.

title: RPlog:Sith Politics
summary: A tense reunion unfolds at the House of Sabacc on Nar Shaddaa as the exiled-then-reinstated Captain Antoine Dareus is recognized by former Commissar Lanil Jast and confronted by Jedi Johanna Siri te Danaan, who knocks him off his stool. The gathering swells with Imperial Warlord Vassily Korolov, smuggler Axel Vichten, and ultimately Darth Malign (Tyler Damion), devolving into heated debate over the dead traitor Danik Kreldin, the new Emperor Vadim, and the fall of past Empires. Johanna ignites her lightsaber against a drunken, provocative Axel over an insult, and Malign and Korolov trade veiled death threats before Malign defuses the standoff with a toast. Dareus finally intervenes, urging Axel to leave and pay the bar tab, arguing now is not the time or place for bloodshed.

title: RPlog:Sithly Stroll in the Park
summary: Chief of State Leia Organa meets a captured Sith prisoner in Organa Park, Ord Mantell, escorted by Jedi pilot Leo and Marines, to question him about attacks and the pursuit of Direx Lazure. The Sith deflects, hinting a child was the true target, then shatters his Force-suppression and breaks free, killing several Marines and a guard with his chains. Jedi rush in and overwhelm him; when run through, he unleashes a death shockwave that disintegrates both himself and the killing Jedi Knight. Meanwhile K'tyyri's Horansi cub Yadumu conducts a comical hunting lesson nearby, and the cats flee to safety as the battle ends.

title: RPlog:Siths and Stones ...
summary: Grand Inquisitor Darth Venger hunts the fugitive Jedi Leo Corak and Ambassador Delgard's daughter Gabi on the beaches of Orleanon, Caspar, deploying Nek battle dogs, stormtroopers, and probe droids. Leo fires on his pursuers to draw fire away from Gabi, destroying a probe droid and killing two Nek hounds with his lightsaber before Venger arrives on a speeder bike. Gabi flees down the cliff face into the rising tidal pools, evading the stormtrooper's stun bolts and searching for a submerged cave system. Venger confronts Leo in a lightsaber standoff, boasting of having slain Jedi Master Aurejin, but the log ends unfinished as the players paused for sleep.

title: RPlog:Skeezix's Wife
summary: Aboard the New Republic vessel NRV Alderaan, Captain Beaubos 'Skeezix' Calhoun has Jessalyn replay a holo confirming the death of his wife, whose shuttle was pulled into a star; Admiral Jeralic offers to dispatch a rescue ship. Shaken, Jessalyn goes to the MedSuite and obtains a tranquilizer from a medical droid, which she mistakenly swallows in concentrated form, causing her to collapse and stop breathing. Luke, Dillon, Doctor Alvarez and the medic Avalyne perform emergency resuscitation, reviving her after a stimulant overdose and clearing her airway; she recovers, embarrassed, and asks Avy to apologize to Luke.

title: RPlog:Skirmish at Gyndine
summary: Rookie Imperial pilot Jonas Alsten joins the Inquisitor's Razor Squadron for what is briefed as a routine training and long-range patrol run through the Gyndine system's asteroid belt. The patrol is interrupted when a New Republic X-wing squadron jumps in, and the flights break into individual dogfights. Jonas engages a skilled Zabrak X-wing pilot (Ghost 7/8), takes heavy damage from a proton torpedo, and the Republic fighters break contact and withdraw, leaving the Empire with a tense, unsettling first combat encounter and unanswered questions.

title: RPlog:Skirmish at Kashyyyk
summary: The New Sith Order fleet under Admiral Axel Vichten micro-jumps into Kashyyyk space to test New Republic and allied defenses, launching Sith battle droid pods toward the Wookiee homeworld and demanding surrender. Forewarned by the Jedi aspirant Ikihsa Enb'Zik, the Republic scrambles a defense around the Audacity battle group while Lynae Cassius volunteers to command the borrowed gunship Unquenchable Flame. A large fleet battle ensues with capital ships, fighter squadrons, planetary bombardment of Kashyyyk's jungles, and a boarding action in which pirate captain Juran Reinzhiner's crew breaches the Unquenchable Flame and Lynae fights him hand-to-hand. The Sith withdraw to hyperspace having never intended to hold the system; the Republic claims a costly morale victory with Kashyyyk standing, though Lynae is gravely wounded ejecting a satchel charge into space.

title: RPlog:Skirmish at Larni
summary: Imperial and New Republic patrols collide in an asteroid field on the Imperial/New Republic border near the Larni system. A starfighter melee erupts as Commander Seifer Wolf's TIEs and Admiral Jal'Dana Rall's white interceptor engage the New Republic's Ghost Squadron (X-wings flown by Kesander Beysarus, Raxis L'ygr, and Shovadu) escorting the corvette Audacity. Meanwhile the hidden Imperial Marauder corvette Emancipator (crewed by Vextin Mandor and Keline Nelhrn) ambushes the Audacity (XO Rasi Cen, with Amelia Hawthorne and Ohaotrantak Ostivort), but loses its sensors to the Audacity's gunnery and ultimately surrenders as the arrival of the Star Destroyer Vindictive forces the TIEs to withdraw.

title: RPlog:Small Depot Defense
summary: A New Republic strike team led by Lance Corbet attacks a small Imperial border depot to capture a container of fuel, splitting forces between dogfighting the TIE escorts and tractoring the cargo aboard the Marauder cruiser Eternal Vigilance. Imperial flight officer Liza Molokai's bombers and Alex Dante's Razor Squadron defend, but the Imperials lose ground as the NR snatches the fuel container; Liza's copilot is killed by debris unnoticed in the chaos. Krieg Inrokana launches from the HIMS Broadsword and deliberately takes a proton torpedo head-on to shield Liza, disabling his own fighter in a controlled manner to feign destruction. The NR pilots, including Raxis L'ygr who trades taunts with Dante, escape into hyperspace with the captured fuel as the Broadsword arrives too late.

title: RPlog:Smuggler's Folly (Part 1)
summary: Smuggler Jaspar Andromidas receives a holo-transmission aboard his freighter Hirakiis from New Republic Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard. She hires him to run blockade-breaking supply missions past an Imperial blockade of the Caspia system, delivering food, water, medical supplies, and ammunition to its citizens. After negotiating a rate of 45,000 credits plus 3-5k per run, the two strike a deal and Ambrosia transfers a good-faith deposit, with Jaspar agreeing to recruit additional smugglers.

title: RPlog:Smuggler's Folly (Part 2)
summary: Jaspar Andromidas attempts his first blockade run to Caspar aboard the Hirakiis, dropping out of hyperspace into a debris field that disables his weapons. Sneaking through an asteroid belt with white noise to mask his approach, he is detected by the Imperial cruiser Endurance, which deploys TIE fighters and orders him to stand down. After a running firefight in which his shields and engines are battered, the freighter's engines blow out and a tractor beam reels him in. The Imperials, using the ship's former name 'Raven', place him under arrest.

title: RPlog:Snips and Snails
summary: While hiding in a seaside cave on Caspar to evade an intensified Imperial presence, the Jedi Leo and the eleven-year-old fugitive Gabi share a fireside breakfast of snails and crab she scavenged. Leo proposes their escape plan: stealing one of the recently arrived TIE Defenders, which has a hyperdrive, to flee the planet. Gabi, haunted by a vision of her captive mother and fearful of the Empire, steels her resolve and agrees to help steal a fighter so they can summon a rescue party.

title: RPlog:Snowball Fight
summary: In Fountain Square on the snowy planet Caspar, a drunken and depressed Morganna Tazecks, now an ambassador, is accidentally struck by a snowball thrown by an inebriated Troy McTavish. Morganna tackles Troy and flips him into a snowbank, sparking a chaotic brawl-turned-snowball-fight involving Troy's sister Stelita, businessman Hugo Dracolysk, and others. Kaley Recourua drags Morganna aside to scold her for undiplomatic behavior, narrowly preventing her from drawing a vibroblade. Morganna shoves a snowball down Kaley's back as a 'diplomatic' compromise before stumbling off to sleep off the alcohol.

title: RPlog:So It Begins
summary: Aboard the Sith flagship Predator orbiting Tatooine, Sith apprentice Antoine Dareus is confronted in his quarters by a Force-projected doppelganger of Luke Skywalker. Under the guise of conversation and ideological debate, Skywalker is actually conducting reconnaissance, deliberately wrecking the ship's corridors to provoke Dareus's combat droids into revealing their capabilities. Dareus eventually 'captures' the wounded doppelganger, only for it to dissolve into nothingness, revealing Luke was never physically present. The Jedi escapes by hyperspace, marking the opening shots of the war between Sith and Jedi.

title: RPlog:Soft Open
summary: Crestian Tarasar holds the soft opening of his new Prothium Club in the Neon District of Selene's Imperial City, hosting a private party for Sith apprentice Kipran Jawatha and his paramour, Crown Princess Sonja Damion. The party is crashed by flamboyant IGN celebrity reporter Thurston Unger and his camera crew, who film the club and interview the guests. Crestian, Grand Moff Elana Tracer, and Caspian emissary Kasha Tabasuri field the reporter's charm, with Crestian and Kasha both agreeing to future interviews; Moff Etiel te Danaan arrives late. The evening establishes the club as a success and a draw for Imperium high society.

title: RPlog:Sojourn on the Guardian
summary: In the lounge of Orbital Station Guardian, Count Tsaran Joir and the recovering Ambassador Morganna Tazecks share Corellian brandy while both reflect on absent loves and the loneliness imposed by Imperial discipline. Joir relaxes formality, inviting Morganna to call him by his first name while off duty, and a stormtrooper named Mevid is curtly dismissed when he intrudes. Joir inquires about Prime Minister Venus Darkstar, but Morganna knows little beyond that Darkstar was once married to an important Imperial figure and is sympathetic to the Empire. A summons via datapad pulls Joir back to duty, and Morganna plans to travel to Bonadan.

title: RPlog:Some New Help
summary: Aboard the NRCV Audacity over Dac, Caspian Navy doctor Lt. Commander Lynae Cassius arrives in full biohazard gear with her crew (Ven Secura, Sadim Gnik, and the droid HM743) to offer the neutral Caspian Democratic Union's medical expertise against the plague ravaging Mon Calamari. Cassius candidly admits her controversial past as the architect of the Cochran bombing, but Senator Lemos Ackinbrac welcomes her help, prioritizing his people over politics. They agree to set the Reannon Calder down planetside near existing research and quarantine facilities to collect disease samples at various mutation stages while remaining an independent, neutral relief effort. Lemos warns them to keep a low profile around the overzealous Republic military.

title: RPlog:Someone Needs New Duds
summary: As party season on Cloud City, Bespin winds down, Kubaz fashion designer Zubindi Hakoon prepares to depart for Caspar while overseeing cargo loading at Landing Pad 91. He strikes up a conversation with Selko Aronat, a modestly-dressed technician interested in durable but fashionable workwear, recommending Caspian Jullon fabric. Lady Athena (a hyperspace-sick CEO of Dragons of Coruscant) and the haughty Nara Rhen join the conversation, and Zubindi gains potential new customers before departing for a pressing appointment. The scene ends with the women heading off to a hotel bar together.

title: RPlog:Something's Going To Get You
summary: At the Cat's Claw Cantina on Ord Mantell, New Republic Ghost Squadron pilots Raxis L'ygr and Rebecca Varn are investigating rumors of a creature attacking freighters when Salty Jack and Barnacle Bill enter, drunkenly mourning their lost parrot Polly. The pirates dramatically describe the black space monster that destroyed their ship the Freedom Fish. Jack briefly throttles Bill over talk of mutiny and superstition, drawing Rebecca's blaster hand before calm returns. The pilots note the vague coordinates between Ord Mantell and Nar Shaddaa and leave to investigate, with Raxis covertly spitting out the dubious ale toasted in Polly's memory.

title: RPlog:Something Amiss
summary: At the Ord Mantell spaceport, Salty Jack and his squib crewmate Grizz are approached by a ragged young person calling themselves Kitty (Kit), who is seeking cheap lodging. Jack questions the youth's skills and learns they are good with swoops and ships. Amused by the youth's boast of out-drinking the pirates, Jack offers Kit a position on his future crew with food, bed, and ale in lieu of high pay. Kit accepts and shakes on the deal before wandering off to explore the planet.

title: RPlog:Soren Face Lift
summary: On Tatooine, Simon Sezirok recovers from a stun blast just as the ship Sable Seraph escapes with the abducted Lady Mailyn Raines aboard. Enraged and convinced the cowardly Viscount Soren caused Mailyn's capture by misusing the Thunder's Call's weapons, Simon hunts him down, beats him brutally across the tarmac, and pins him to the ground. Declaring his love for Mailyn, Simon uses the Force to hold Soren still and carves the letter 'M' into the man's face with his lightsaber, leaving the Viscount unconscious and feeling only cold curiosity at his own cruelty.

title: RPlog:Sowing the Seeds of Revolution
summary: At the Kreldin Estate on Corellia, the presumed-dead Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin reveals he survived being shot down and convenes a circle of loyal Imperial officers and agents to plot the overthrow of the new alien Emperor Aleister Vadim. Kreldin argues Vadim is an illegitimate, shapeshifting usurper backed by the Sith Darth Malign, and that High Command, COMPNOR, and the military can be rallied to their banner. The group debates assassination tactics, including a surgical strike on Vadim, terror bombings to kill the Sith, and even recruiting Jedi to neutralize the Sith threat. Kreldin calls a recess after securing the commitment of all attendees to the conspiracy.

title: RPlog:Spa Treatment
summary: Aboard the cruise vessel Angry Rancor, Ash (Nitisha Lazure) finally coaxes her Mandalorian friend Cantrell into relaxing at the ship's spa. They soak in the jacuzzi with the Twi'lek Ka'una, are later joined by the cruise manager Nun'ia, and all enjoy massages while bantering about upcoming beast hunts and gladiatorial matches Nun'ia is organizing. Talk turns to weapons training and self-defense for Nun'ia, who has promised Ka'una not to carry a blaster, and the group agrees to continue to dinner at the lounge.

title: RPlog:Speech for the Students
summary: Ambassador K'tyyri Tarashabi is invited to speak at Covenant College on Ord Mantell about Mutanda's turmoil, delivering an impassioned speech on Horansi culture and the CSA/Imperial occupation. When Senator Tokoga takes the podium afterward, a focused explosive detonates and apparently kills him, sending the crowd into chaos while medic Myiari Oerstead and Wookiee cadet Hauwkawrrka respond. In the ambulance, Rasi reveals the assassination was staged: Tokoga is unharmed, and his 'death' is a ruse to lure crime lord Nass into paying the bounty so he can be convicted for placing a death bounty on a public official.

title: RPlog:Spencer RP Test
summary: This is an out-of-character role-play qualification test (dated August 9, 2000) for a player applying with the character Spencer, run by Bazil McKenzie. The scripted scenario has NRI agents Bazil and Spencer infiltrate the Death Star at Dreven disguised as Imperial technicians to steal its plans. Spencer carelessly mutters about being in the rebellion within earshot of a stormtrooper commander, blowing their cover and getting both agents shot dead, followed by an OOC epilogue describing the resulting Imperial victory.

title: RPlog:Spies Scalpels and Soap Operas
summary: Aboard Johanna Siri te Danaan's flagship, the Price of Pleasure, broker Kracen Ecks meets with Dr. Lynae Cassius in the aftermath of a mynock infestation to discuss sourcing replacement parts. The only affordable supplier is on Tatooine and holds a grudge against Johanna, so Lynae insists on accompanying Ecks for protection, revealing her formidable past as former Commodore Cassius, a protege of Ysanne Isard. Galen Rourke interjects to corroborate her dangerousness, and the conversation hints that Ecks, a clone, may be related to Lynae through genetic similarities, leaving a planned Tatooine trip and unspoken intrigue brewing.

title: RPlog:Spiran Rescue
summary: Crestian Tarasar and Elana Tracer lead a five-person Caspian-Imperium strike team, under cover of a family vacation, to rescue two Force-sensitive younglings (Shen and Rahasia) abducted by Trandoshan raiders on Spira. Guided by Kipran Jawatha's Force sensing, the team infiltrates the Trandoshan estate, frees both children, and kills numerous raiders in close-quarters fighting. Both younglings are extracted to Nat Pagle's boat, and Crestian suffers cracked ribs in a final scuffle but the mission succeeds.

title: RPlog:Spycraft - Part 1
summary: The combined crews of the Bright Star and Templar fly to Nar Shaddaa on a covert fact-finding mission to locate slaves recently moved by pirates. Disguised in drab civilian gear, the team meets their NovaCom contact Zalla at the Meltdown Cafe and learns of an upcoming slave auction with a viewing the next day. Zalla agrees to build fake identities, bank accounts, and credentials so the team can pose as buyers, and provides intel on the cartel running the auction.

title: RPlog:Spycraft - Part 1 - Day 2
summary: Druze, Wrexan, and Siarra spend time inside the 7th Heaven warehouse club observing the crowd, acclimating to Nar Shaddaa, and playing darts as cover. The scene is largely banter, with Druze accidentally stabbing himself in the thigh with a dart and the trio discussing battlefield medicine and how to avoid being forcibly conscripted as a doctor on the moon. Siarra wins the dart bets and the group keeps a low profile while gathering ambient intel.

title: RPlog:Spycraft - The Planning
summary: In a private back room of the House of Sabacc on Nar Shaddaa, Colonel Eckhart's Templar/Caspian-aligned team plans a raid to rescue 40-50 slaves being held for auction. They map the casino, plan to commandeer a Gamma-class shuttle, and split into teams: Team A (Siarra and Kelnas) handles stealthy guard elimination, while Team B led by Eckhart provides muscle. Tiaryn will keep the Bright Star ready as an extraction ship, Druze is designated combat medic and kept off the front line, and the plan emphasizes stealth, speed, and no expectation of outside rescue.

title: RPlog:Spycraft - The Viewing
summary: After several days on Nar Shaddaa, the team attends the private VIP viewing of sentient cargo soon to go to auction, posing as buyer Mr. Greene (Wrexan) and his staff. Zalla provides their fake identities and escorts them past tight security into the cavernous slave-holding level beneath the House of Sabacc casino. The team reconnoiters the mesh cages, security cameras, droids, and the cargo lift, confirming the captive count and noting weak points before quietly exiting in pairs.

title: RPlog:Squid Lake: Final Plans
summary: In a secret Quarren-owned safehouse in the Domed City of Aquarius on Dac, ISB Director Korynn Fleming (disguised as stranded spacer HJek Pathon) finalizes Operation Squid Lake with Agent McKenna and newly arrived combat medic Calyx Drogyn. They plan to incite a Quarren-Mon Calamari civil war by exploiting the historical figure Tikkes and the Senator Eeth Mentel, fueling racial tensions to break New Republic control of the planet. The agents devise tactics including tainting bacta supplies, riling outspoken Quarren, and avoiding direct Imperial ties so the New Republic's own citizens take the blame.

title: RPlog:Squid Lake: ISB Briefing
summary: In his quarters aboard the HIMS Inquisitor, ISB Sector Director Korynn Fleming briefs Navy tactician Lt. Commander Vextin Mandor, who devised Operation Squid Lake, before departing for surgery to install his field disguise. Korynn explains he is personally inserting onto Dac to coordinate his moles in the plot to spark a Quarren-Mon Calamari civil war, with Colonel Desson running ISB in his absence. He recruits Mandor as a plain-clothes courier between Dac and the Task Force, coldly instructing him that he must avoid capture and kill himself if compromised, leaving the shaken tactician to volunteer.

title: RPlog:Squid Lake: Infiltrating Aquarius
summary: ISB Director Korynn Fleming, surgically disguised as stranded Near-Human spacer HJek Pathon, infiltrates the Domed City of Aquarius on Dac to begin Operation Squid Lake, the plot to incite a Quarren-Mon Calamari civil war. He meets covert Agent McKenna (disguised as Sarian tourist Antar Evoros), and the two playact as old friends before slipping into an alley where McKenna hands over a datapad of building layouts and prominent Quarren figures. Korynn copies the intel, directs McKenna to surveil a specific Quarren and seek surviving records of the ancient civil war and the figure Tikkes.

title: RPlog:Squid Lake: The Eruption
summary: Undercover ISB agents, directed by Sector Director Korynn Fleming, execute the climax of Operation Squid Lake on the ocean world of Dac: they poison Mon Calamari bacta facilities and the Quarren food supply, killing thousands of Quarren and igniting racial unrest that pushes the planet toward civil war. On Ord Mantell, Chief of State Leia Organa Solo meets with the distraught Quarren and Mon Calamari ambassadors, who plead for an impartial peacekeeping force. After Quarren aide Eeth Mentel and military leaders brief her, the New Republic is granted emergency powers to deploy neutral relief and peacekeepers, though the Quarren warn the situation could still boil over.

title: RPlog:Squid Lake: Whaladon Spark
summary: ISB Sector Director Korynn Fleming, surgically disguised as a stranded near-human spacer named Hjek Pathon, works covertly in the Whaladon Pub in the Domed City of Aquarius on Dac, subtly fueling Quarren racial anger toward the Mon Calamari. A pub riot erupts in which Quarren patrons forcibly bar Mon Calamari customers and declare the pub their own ground. Korynn shares conversation with Twi'lek tourist Twila Virda, masking the bloodlust he feels toward her while steering talk toward anti-Mon Calamari sentiment, advancing Operation Squid Lake's first success.

title: RPlog:Stalh Meets Joir
summary: At the Black Krayt Swoop Arena on Caspar, Count Tsaran Joir takes his assigned seat beside the Republican diplomat Heinrich Stalh, who initially challenges his ticket and mocks Ambassador Morganna Tazecks as 'Cyclops.' The two trade veiled threats and posturing, Stalh claiming arcane knowledge given to him by 'orders' from a powerful master he serves out of expectation rather than command. Joir, a former personal guard of Palpatine, remains unshaken and answers Stalh's implied threats with his own cold defiance as a swoop crashes in the arena below.

title: RPlog:StarOps Promotion Ceremony
summary: General Wedge Antilles visits the NRSD Reprisal to conduct a promotion ceremony for pilots and support staff under his command. He promotes Kyrin Sh'vani, Gene Malantean, Kesander Beysarus, Crystal Keldahoff, Hase Stargazer and others, awarding ranks and pilot wings with humor and personal flourishes. Wing Commander Johmac Mabru is mock-scolded before being elevated to Major and saddled with buying drinks. The ceremony ends with Wedge's earnest praise and the celebrants heading to the lounge.

title: RPlog:Starker Keep's New Gardener
summary: At Starker Keep on Yaeguero Isle, Caspar, Basca Starker finds Jessalyn Valios tending the neglected gardens and brings her drinks. Their banter turns serious as Jessalyn reveals she has two Jedi children (Kiri, 17, and Sabine, 11) left in Johanna's care, and Basca voices concern that Johanna is teaming with a Sith alchemist and attracts violence. Jessalyn confides her deepest fear of falling to the dark side as her former husband Aurejin did, and that Johanna and Malign once saved her son; Basca offers to be trained to fight and to stand with her, urging her to focus on survival.

title: RPlog:Starting a War
summary: At the heavily guarded public spaceport on Corellia, a humiliated Axel Vichten tracks down Darth Malign's X-wing and keys its hull in petty retaliation for being bested at Ego-Fest above Bonadan. Tyler Damion confronts him; the two share a candid exchange about fame, piloting, and being a dying breed of war hawks. Axel then reveals that Danik Kreldin is alive and plotting to assassinate Emperor Vadim and seize the throne; in exchange for the intel, Malign pardons Axel, vows to have COMPNOR seize the Kreldin family's property, and declares war on the Kreldins, leaving Axel free to hunt his old enemy as the CDU breaks relations with the Empire.

title: RPlog:Stating the Obvious
summary: In the showroom of Bodkins Antiquities on Etti IV, Corporate Sector executive Miranda Jabs tries to persuade CEO Geophreigh Smitherbodkins to drop a Direx board vote concerning the new Prex, but he refuses on grounds of honor. Their conversation is interrupted by Lanze Beviin, a Mandalorian customer who buys children's books and quietly probes Smitherbodkins about CSA leadership. After Lanze leaves and a privacy field is raised, Jabs warns Smitherbodkins that the deranged Toydarian Qwynt may be plotting to assassinate him before the meeting, and she departs with a Hutt pen and writing desk intended as a 'gift' for an enemy.

title: RPlog:Station Destruction Training
summary: Commodore Krieg Inrokana runs a live-fire Imperial training exercise around Selene: Razor and Widowmaker squadrons must destroy a decommissioned space station while ISB Agent Dreven Mercurio is inserted to retrieve reactor core data and escape before the station is destroyed. The station turns out to be rigged with hidden defenses, drones, and a tractor beam, forcing the pilots to adapt while Dreven barely escapes via escape pod after the collapsing core strands him. All objectives are met, and in the debrief Krieg praises the crew and discusses signature intimidation maneuvers with Commander Dante.

title: RPlog:Stiff Convoy Defense
summary: A New Republic strike force led by Raxis 'Raptor' L'ygr and Lance 'Wildman' Corbet ambushes an Imperial military convoy carrying rare weaponry near a deep-space border checkpoint. The defending Imperial fighter squadron, led by Krieg Inrokana with Liza Molokai, mounts a stiff defense. Krieg and Liza disable Lance's and Raxis's X-wings respectively, capturing both pilots via tractor beam, though the NR manages to disable and steal one of the two freighters before the Imperials withdraw.

title: RPlog:Storm Front
summary: On the storm-lashed landing pad of Central City, Athaniss, the recently reawakened Sith lord Darth Malus senses a familiar presence and follows the Falleen Ssanyu Natrulon, who proclaims herself 'the Faceless' and the herald of his arrival. After a tense exchange in which Malus grips her arm and recovers fragmentary memories of her, the two retreat aboard his YT-1300 'Revenant' to converse in private. Over caf they probe each other's pasts, Ssanyu revealing she was Director of NSO Intelligence and an experiment for her resistance to Force abilities, while Malus diagnoses her as a deadly but purposeless tool seeking renewed direction. When she questions him too pointedly, Malus ignites his lightsaber suspecting she means to use her Falleen pheromones, but she reveals her offer was merely to provide him cybernetic upgrades.

title: RPlog:Stranded
summary: After bailing out of his A-Wing following the failed Dathomir Raid, New Republic pilot Raxis 'Spider' L'ygr lands by parachute in a foggy forest on Dathomir's night side. Descending from the tree, he is attacked by a pack of red-eyed simian predators (purboles) and fights them off with his Bryar pistol and a flare, escaping by leaping across a river they refuse to cross. He follows a fire to find a crashed, burning X-Wing and frees its trapped pilot 'Hotwire' from the cockpit moments before further destruction. The two pilots build a lean-to shelter, treat Hotwire's leg wound, and settle in to await rescue.

title: RPlog:Stretching the New Leg
summary: Recovering from a terrorist attack on Bespin that cost her a leg (alchemically regrown by her brother Darth Malign), Johanna Siri te Danaan tests the new limb on an outing to a Biscuit Baron fast-food restaurant with Crestian Tarasar. Over breakfast biscuits they discuss the Bespin bombing, the unreliable Falleen Lorda Nasiri, the morality of abolishing slavery, and a Life Day dinner. Crestian briefs Johanna on the administrative and military measures he took in her absence, including investigative leads tracing casino chips to casinos near Caspian space.

title: RPlog:Subtlety
summary: In the corridor of the Imperial Embassy on Caspar, Count Tsaran Joir encounters bounty hunter guildmaster Taggor Bren, who has come in response to Joir's message to make arrangements for one of his hunters. Joir tells him the ambassador is out and questions whether Taggor's hunters can overcome the Starshield Marines protecting their target. Taggor reveals he once worked closely with the 'mark,' Alyndraya, and proposes a quieter approach using his prior closeness to stun or drug her rather than relying on brute force, an idea Joir welcomes.

title: RPlog:Sullustans and Stardust
summary: At the rowdy Beggar's Cove Cantina on Nar Shaddaa, smuggler Jaspar Andromidas notices Sullustan mechanic Jae Ten being stiffed and shoved aside by a pirate captain he had just repaired a ship for. Jaspar invites the wary Sullustan over for a drink and, learning he is a down-on-his-luck mechanic and former delivery pilot, offers him work aboard his freighter in exchange for repairs and passage. The pirate later returns with partial payment to avoid trouble, Jae reveals he hid rotting fish aboard the pirates' ship as petty revenge, and the two toast to a new working partnership and friendship.

title: RPlog:Supplies Check
summary: Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard, with military escort, tours a Corellian resistance weapons warehouse in Coronet City at the invitation of the rebel leader Alder, discussing the Republic's philosophy toward Corellian liberation and her own past as a former Imperial servant. The meeting is interrupted when Imperial stormtroopers launch a missile assault on the warehouse. Alder escorts Ambrosia underground into the sewers while the rebels detonate charges and destroy supplies to cover their retreat. After a tense ambush, Ambrosia and Alder stun a pursuing stormtrooper who falls into the sewer water, and they continue toward an exit in a shopping arcade.

title: RPlog:Surface Scars Cut Deep
summary: Summoned to Count Tsaran Joir's office expecting punishment for her insubordination at a retirement party, Ambassador Morganna Tazecks instead receives an unexpectedly personal speech. Joir explains that the disciplined Empire needs her precisely because she comes from outside its rigid order, and counsels her to master self-control so others cannot manipulate her through her anger. Morganna opens up about her traumatic past as a slave, her abusive father, and the Imperial who once owned her, revealing why she keeps her facial scars. Joir, in turn, lets slip a rare glimpse of his own humanity and absent love before returning to his work.

title: RPlog:Surfing on Caspar
summary: Following a disagreement over what to do about Eva Sargent, Orson Tighe and Jessalyn Valios spend a relaxed day at Hideaway Beach near Plaxton City on Caspar for Jessa's first surfing lesson on repulsorboards. Orson teaches her the basics and demonstrates an advanced wave ride; using the Force, Jessalyn quickly masters catching a wave herself. The romantic outing ends with them planning to return to their hotel room.

title: RPlog:Surgery
summary: At Tarquin Memorial Hospital on Caspar, surgeon Dr. Xar'on Tanner and Bith technician Bodan Akigga perform the dangerous operation to remove the rewired pacemaker leash from Lynae Cassius's heart and the monitor from her wrist. Bodan slices into the device's programming, looping it to a fixed low heartrate so it can be safely extracted, while Tanner uses Thanatizine to drop her heartrate near zero and opens her chest cavity. Both devices are removed, Lynae's heart flatlines, and Tanner restarts it with micro paddles, succeeding only because of prior Force-healed tissue. The surgery concludes with kolcta and chromostring patches applied as Tanner closes her up.

title: RPlog:Surprise! Gastus Went Boom
summary: Aboard the NRSC Deliverance, New Republic leaders hold a tense emergency conference after the planet Gastus is destroyed by a newly revealed, fully operational Death Star commanded by Emperor Valak. Luke Skywalker reports sensing Valak's presence aboard the station, while an NRI officer admits intelligence had no warning and that undercover agents have gone missing. Leia, Han, Chewbacca, General Arands, Captain Howie Darklighter, and others debate how to combat the threat without station plans, secure their borders, and exploit captives (Moff Tazecks and the Sith Morganna held in the brig). The meeting ends without a concrete plan, with everyone dismissed to rest and await field intelligence.

title: RPlog:Sweet Home Corellia
summary: At Coronet City Spaceport on Corellia, gunman Alac is confronted by the masked magnate Smitherbodkins about an assassination Alac carried out at a previous gathering, where Smitherbodkins's 'guest' was killed; pleased rather than angry, Smitherbodkins pays Alac for the indiscreet job. Meanwhile holovid star Wynn Ryder shamelessly woos a four-lekku Twi'lek named Ka'una La and arranges a date. When an Imperial officer overhears talk of the killing, Alac forces him to surrender his blaster and leave. Alac's twin brother Alban emerges from their ship, and the reunited trio of Corellian friends, backed by Smitherbodkins's credits, begin scheming to drive the Imperials off Corellia and seize the planet for themselves.

title: RPlog:Swoop Fight
summary: On a second night of fighting during a revolution on Nar Shaddaa, a makeshift band backing Tyler Damion (Tatooine Bob) gathers at the Side Deck to face swoop gangs hired by Grabba the Hutt. After negotiations with the Dug gang leader Unb'tar fail, the group races out on swoops through the vertical city, battling the Thrashers and then the Slashers led by Ander Dar. Through Molotov cocktails, blades, blaster fire, and reckless stunts, the heroes destroy both gangs, with Darth Malign finally leaping onto Ander Dar's swoop and cutting it down. The defenders win handily despite Kaitlin and Siren's swoops being downed and several injuries.

title: RPlog:Swoop Racing on Theseus
summary: Team Imperial competes in a Galactic Swoop League tournament aboard Theseus/Theseus Station (Titania track). Danik Kreldin posts the leading Grade 3 run, and his old friend Fianar Reanus narrowly beats the Wroonian racer Daana Roon in a brutal heat where both pilots take damage. Off the track, the Noiri swooper Talia Andorn confronts Danik, smelling the scent of another Noiri (Kao Ijuf) on him and probing the mysterious origins of a woman who resembles her own Andorn bloodline. Danik finishes atop the Grade 3 leaderboard and offers to arrange a meeting between Talia and Kao.

title: RPlog:Swoop Racing with Selektah
summary: Simone Drake (Piper) challenges track record-holder Selektah to a friendly swoop race along the beaches of Plaxton City on Caspar. The two race a treacherous beachfront course through dunes, brush, and crashing waves, trading the lead repeatedly. They cross the finish line in a dead-even tie, exchanging respect and agreeing to race again at the real track.

title: RPlog:TCF is Born
summary: Imperial agent Tsaran Joir, posing as a Sienar Fleet Systems sponsor and flanked by bodyguards, visits the Rodian shopkeeper Bochek at his swoop shop on Caspar. After intimidating Bochek, Joir hands over a credit chip of 8000 credits to fund the expansion of Bochek's interests, hinting that his true Imperial interests go far beyond swoops. The deal cements a covert relationship, and both part with a coded exchange in Rodian pledging loyalty to the Empire.

title: RPlog:Tacuba the Hutt's Flying Circus
summary: Tacuba the Hutt's traveling circus lands in Mos Espa on Tatooine, drawing crowds and chaos. Johanna (watching from the mayor's office), Crestian and his daughter Atsvara, the smuggler Axel Vichten with a clawed engineered child, and the couple Kipran Jawatha and Sonja Damion all become entangled in the spectacle. Axel zaps a clown with his cybernetic hand's repulse field and is tackled and arrested by local constabulary, while a circus barker tries to recruit Sonja and Kipran, who menacingly refuses.

title: RPlog:Taking Chances
summary: On Tatooine, smuggler/archaeologist Paul Nighman takes his young companion Shenner out for breakfast at the Dockside Cafe in Mos Eisley, where they chat with the Wookiee mercenary Burrachacca and his crew. Back at their borrowed shuttle, Paul gives Shenner a massage and she haltingly confesses she wants to be with him. As they head to the Twin Suns Hotel to meet the artifact-seeker Grathix, the Mandalorian Dane Noth ambushes Paul; Paul resists and is stunned and captured. He awakens in a hotel suite to learn Grathix's bounty-hunter only meant to bring him in for a talk, and the scene ends with Paul and Shenner sharing a bed for comfort.

title: RPlog:Tal'sin's Interrogation
summary: Captured Twi'lek Staff Sergeant Tal'sin Secura is revived in a New Republic high-security holding facility and led to an interrogation room, where Lieutenant Vengan serves him with a list of charges including five counts of attempted murder of Republic Marines, desertion, and resisting arrest. Vengan offers to reduce a stolen-property charge if Tal'sin surrenders access codes to a captured Gnat called 'Quicksilver'. Defiant and disrespectful throughout, Tal'sin refuses to negotiate, demands a military judge, and is sent back to his cell on combat half-rations with no amenities.

title: RPlog:Tal'sin, the Knight
summary: On Tatooine, Vaughan 'Cade' meets with the human mercenary Tathleach and the Twi'lek Tal'sin aboard his ship the Digit's Bane. After discussing their shared cynicism about the Empire and New Republic, Vaughan recruits both as ground commanders for his organization. They pledge themselves to the Knights of Corellia and agree to seal the deal over drinks.

title: RPlog:Tarroc's Dream
summary: In a Force-vision dream set in a Yavin rainforest, Jessalyn Valios appears to Tarroc D'agor first as an eight-year-old child, leading him to a waterfall and teaching him to sense the Force through a lotus blossom and a memory of flying. She reveals that the Jedi Master (Luke) is missing and that she too will soon disappear, so Tarroc must learn to feel the Force on his own until he finds a Master. The vision is a farewell, with Jessalyn passing him her memories before reluctantly drawing away.

title: RPlog:Tattling in the Temple
summary: In the solarium of the Jedi Temple on New Alderaan, Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard delivers troubling news to Luke Skywalker. She reports that, via Mr. Oppenheimer of Etti Group, she learned Johanna te Da'nan intends to feign turning to the dark side as Lord Vidious' apprentice in a scheme to usurp and slay him, and has asked Oppenheimer to kill her if she fails to return whole. Luke, troubled but calm, weighs the danger to Johanna's Force-sensitive children, while Ambrosia also voices her exhaustion caring for her traumatized daughter Gabi. The scene pauses unresolved.

title: RPlog:Tea for...Three?
summary: As Ambrosia Delgard packs to move her family back to Ord Mantell, Senator Dalek Rolynd of Ivaldi pays an unannounced visit to her Corellian beach home to discuss his fears that Imperial hands are behind local unrest and the death of Senator Hastell. Over tea, he voices concern that the Senate is dangerously disconnected from the Chief of State and Inner Council. The conversation is interrupted when CorSec Director Ewan Dain emerges from her shower wearing only a towel, having been there on business. Ambrosia departs to join her family, leaving her home as conference space for Rolynd and Dain, who then discuss a spice/cartel war ravaging Coronet and a suspected Imperial move on Corellia.

title: RPlog:Tea for Three
summary: Captain Rasi Cen visits Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard at her new on-base housing to check on her recovery after her ordeal on Caspar, sharing tea and bringing a toy for her daughter Gabi. Ambrosia, tinkering with a prosthetic hand brace for her tremoring left hand, presses Rasi about who sabotaged the tainted Imperial humanitarian shipment that framed the Republic and led to her embassy's destruction. The conversation turns deeply personal as Ambrosia reveals to Rasi that she was once an Imperial slave/entertainer, that the imprisoned Dr. Liora Kovani is secretly her firstborn daughter fathered by Moff Tyruni, and that Gabi does not know Kovani is her sister. Ambrosia swears Rasi to secrecy about her origins.

title: RPlog:Templars: Allies versus Pirates - Part 1
summary: The crew of the Templar and their allies identify a band of pirates operating out of an old mining base in an asteroid belt and mount a strike. Flying Hal Seiser's combat shuttle 'Olive Branch' escorted by two X-wings, they fight through Y-TIE uglies and an RX4 patrol craft. Hal bluffs the pirates over comms while the marines destroy the enemy ships, ultimately forcing the asteroid base to surrender.

title: RPlog:Templars: Allies versus Pirates - Part 2
summary: After the space battle, Eckhart's team boards the derelict pirate mining rig to clear it and salvage gear. They find evidence of a mutiny, dead bodies, and a dying Zeltron pirate who reveals the crew abandoned ship. The team rescues a caged Loth-cat and her kittens and loots supplies, only to discover the dying pirate was lying atop a cryoban grenade with a countdown; they evacuate just as the base explodes.

title: RPlog:Temple Spirits
summary: Salty Jack and Barnacle Bill visit the Jedi hangar on Ord Mantell seeking information about a Sith they encountered on Tatooine. They speak with Sullustan Jedi Ikihsa Enb'Zik, who listens with interest while the superstitious Bill frets about angry temple spirits. The pirates describe the Sith as an old human in a black cloak with white-streaked hair, a lightsaber, and a large sword on his back. Enb'Zik cannot identify the figure but notes others (Luke) might, and politely escorts the group out as Jack's crewmates Sally Carol and Grizz arrive.

title: RPlog:Terror on Tatooine
summary: In Beggar's Canyon on Tatooine, Morganna Tazecks and Turk Avid are ambushed by a large savage band of Tusken Raiders and flee into an oncoming sandstorm to escape. They take shelter in a small cave; Avid is wounded by a Tusken youth he kills, and the sand seals them in. Morganna, who was secretly sent to assassinate Avid, raises a knife to kill the unconscious man but cannot bring herself to do it. They survive the night comforting each other, dig out at dawn, and are eventually rescued by a passing speeder driver bound for Mos Eisley.

title: RPlog:Tet Contacted
summary: The Lethan woman Sinya'kor makes covert holo-contact with the young Twi'lek slicer Tetsen'sugazi ('Tet') in a dingy alleyway on Etti IV, on behalf of a shadowy criminal organization (the Maffi). She probes his loyalty, clan background, and willingness to fight, and Tet emphasizes his specialty in virus creation. Sinya agrees to pass his name up the chain for an assignment, warning him that his betrayal would mean her death and stressing that she cannot meet him in person.

title: RPlog:Teyr Probe Pt2
summary: This page is a redirect to 'RPlog:Battle of Teyr, Part 2' and contains no scene content of its own.

title: RPlog:That Damned Stupidly Heroic Corellian
summary: On Palanhi, Jessalyn retrieves a hungover Paul Nighman from the Grand Palanhi Hotel after Luke Skywalker hired him for archaeological work and urged him to leave the planet. As the group heads to the Black Dragon, the menacing Giles Vermillion (aka Khaj) confronts them, drawing a blaster and stabbing Paul with hidden forearm blades; Paul shoots Vermillion in the arm and drives him off. Severely wounded and going into shock, Paul is dragged aboard the ship where Jessalyn and Shenner tend his bleeding, and Luke arrives and uses the Force to ease Paul's pain.

title: RPlog:The Agent
summary: Disguised as a freighter crew on Imperial-held Corellia, Senator Tokoga and Lt. Cdr. Rasi Praddhan Cen meet Twi'lek smuggler Raynn Keel in a shady Coronet City cantina. Cen, seeking contact with militant Corellian revolutionary elements, recruits Raynn under the cover of arranging delivery of 'pyrotechnics' past COMPNOR encryption restrictions. Raynn agrees to the job for a 10% finder's fee, and they set up a contact protocol via the Long Slumber hotel under the name 'Mister Tagon'.

title: RPlog:The Alderaan
summary: Aboard the NRV Alderaan, Major Jessalyn Valios briefs Admiral Jeralic that a Casparian ship has been allowed to board with rancid fuel and that Luke Skywalker brought aboard a young informant named Shenner. Shenner reveals 'his' boss Grathix is searching for General Solo, and that Imperials including a 'Lady' had taken interest in the youth; Jessalyn discloses Luke learned Solo is held on Palanhi by an Imperial Lord named Sabbath. The datacard identifies Lady Alora Antieres, and Jeralic orders NRI to investigate Alora, Sabbath, and Palanhi, while Jessalyn privately frets to Avalyne about her infatuation with Luke.

title: RPlog:The Ambassador's New Clothes
summary: After meeting Lord Aldus Thel's demands aboard the Star Destroyer Nemesis, Ambassador Delgard is granted a pardon and relocated with her newfound daughter Lt. Liora Kovani to a lavish stateroom suite. The two women bond awkwardly while Ambrosia warns Kovani to be ready to follow her lead if the Republic mounts a rescue. Kovani secretly passes Ambrosia a short-range comlink that might patch into the flagship's central communications to send a distress signal. Kovani attempts to search public records for her father Moff Tyruni, but is repeatedly locked out and the terminal is disabled by the Imperial Security Bureau, prompting her to break her hand punching the monitor and requiring an escort to the medical bay.

title: RPlog:The Ambush of Lando Calrissian
summary: Acting on Black Sun intelligence that Lando Calrissian was vulnerable over Nar Shaddaa, Tyy'sun Eson hires the pirate Privateers and assembles a strike team to ambush Lando's yacht, the Lady Luck. The Privateer corvette Harmattan, along with fighters piloted by Danik Kreldin and the Sullustan Zero, batters the Lady Luck until its shields fail and it is disabled. A boarding party storms the crippled yacht, where Lando ambushes them from above, wounding Eson twice with a shotgun. After a fierce close-quarters firefight, Danik downs Lando with a riot gun blast, and the unconscious Calrissian is captured alive.

title: RPlog:The Attempted Arrest of Chewbacca
summary: On Etti IV in Corporate Sector Authority space, C-3PO ventures from the Millennium Falcon to obtain hyperlane codes and encounters Chantinelle Thistleborn, the Horansi Kuxli, and CSA security agent Piper (Simone Drake) in Memorial Park. When Chewbacca arrives, Piper declares there is a warrant for his arrest, and the Wookiee tries to flee with C-3PO. CSA VicePrex Alora Antieres arrives and uses the Force to choke Chewbacca to his knees while a guard dog savages C-3PO; Espo guards swarm to subdue the resisting Wookiee before the scene is cut short by a server crash.

title: RPlog:The Beastie
summary: New Republic Ghost Squadron pilots Raxis L'ygr and Rebecca Varn patrol the space lane between Ord Mantell and Nar Shaddaa, skeptical of the pirates' tale of a space creature. Rebecca theorizes the creature feeds on energy and rigs her X-wing's sensors to appear larger; the invisible beast soon bumps and then grips her ship. When Raxis fires energy weapons, the dark tentacled creature becomes visible and crushes Rebecca's hull. The pilots power down their ships to starve the creature of energy, causing it to release them and drift away, vindicating the pirates' story.

title: RPlog:The Best In The Galaxy
summary: Axel Vichten tests new New Sith Order recruit Seifer Wolf in a one-on-one starfighter duel over Tatooine, both flying near-identical upgraded Headhunter II fighters launched from the Imperial Star Destroyer Predator. Wolf, a former TIE pilot used to no hyperdrive, surprises the cocky Axel with aggressive torpedo and laser tactics, nearly winning before his shields fail and he takes a hull hit. Axel praises Wolf's adaptability, reveals the fighter once belonged to Danik Kreldin, and accepts Wolf as his wingman.

title: RPlog:The Book
summary: On Cloud City, Bespin, xenoarchaeologist Paul Nighman returns to Ylsa Estrallas's apartment to examine a stolen ancient tome over an elaborate breakfast. Inspecting the book with gloves and a carbon dater, Paul determines it is genuine and roughly 7,480 years old, far older than its prior dating. Ylsa unexpectedly offers him the book for free, revealing she is contracted to a Hutt (Ullo) for a million credits and hoped to sell it to buy her freedom. Paul instead proposes an equal-partnership job using her forging and slicing skills to gain Imperial permits for an expedition to Athaniss, which she agrees to consider.

title: RPlog:The Bounty Even Hunters Avoid
summary: In Chalmun's Cantina on Tatooine, a brawl erupts when the pirate Greven Sylar turns on his own thugs and helps defend the Ortolan Frederiko, while Mayre, Wes, and Ai'kani fight off a Trandoshan and an Aqualish. After the thugs are beaten and driven out, the survivors share drinks until two bounty hunters, Nesin and Staus, arrive hunting the Imperial bounty on Barrien Thrask. The hunters ambush the group but are defeated, Staus's leg slashed and both stunned. Greven and Wes decide to haul the unconscious hunters to Corellia for a bounty, while Thrask refuses any part of it.

title: RPlog:The Burial of Gavin Shai
summary: Wanting out of Black Sun and no longer loyal, Gavin Shai is flown by Tyy'sun Eson to a remote dig site on storm-wracked Trandosha. Eson frees Gavin's restraints and offers him a final chance to go with pride; Gavin attacks but is incapacitated by his shock binders. Eson reveals a transparisteel coffin in a 7-foot grave, declaring that the only way out of the Syndicate is through death. Gavin is sealed alive in the air-fed coffin and buried, while a hidden camera and bounty transmission (50,000 credits) are broadcast to draw out a rescuer or terminate him.

title: RPlog:The Capital's Underworld: A Night In the Garden
summary: While Senator Tokoga of Dac enjoys an evening near the Caamasi Gardens on Ord Mantell, he is joined by medic Myiari Oerstead, the Verpine Dravin Xiz, and the Twi'lek Ka'una. A man posing as a friendly drunk turns out to be an assassin who plants an incendiary device under their table and takes the Squib Kithan hostage at knifepoint. Dravin stuns the attacker after Kithan bites free, and the fire is extinguished. A waiter then delivers Tokoga a threatening datapad message warning that worse tools are available to whoever ordered the attack.

title: RPlog:The Capital's Underworld: All In a Days Work
summary: In Chianar Plaza, Tokoga discusses his stalled Incorporation of Crime Act with the Jedi pilot Leo Corak before NRI agent Kalna (Brin Harper) and Dravin Xiz reveal that crime lord Bavon Nass has placed a 7,500-credit bounty on the Senator's head. Dravin proposes faking Tokoga's death publicly to lure Nass into personally paying the bounty and thus implicating himself. Two Quarren who earlier delivered an ultimatum return demanding proof of Tokoga's innocence, and Kalna hands them a data chip of exonerating NRI/Senate evidence, earning the Senator a temporary reprieve.

title: RPlog:The Capital's Underworld: An Unexpected Visit
summary: Crime lord Bavon Nass walks into Senator Tokoga's New Alderaan office under the false identity 'Lorne Rin' to confront the Senator about interference with his operations. Nass frames his extortion racket as legitimate private security filling a gap in Ord Mantell's overstretched policing, while Tokoga rejects him as a thug abusing the law. The meeting is interrupted by medic Myiari Oerstead arriving for Tokoga's follow-up physical, and the Senator invites her opinion as a citizen.

title: RPlog:The Capital's Underworld: An Unexpected Visit, Pt. 2
summary: Continuing the office confrontation, Nass presses Myiari and Tokoga to validate his private-security operation in light of Ord Mantell's strained police force. Myiari concedes private security is acceptable in principle but condemns Nass's methods of threatening clients who can't pay, while Tokoga flatly calls him a gang lord violating the law. Nass leaves with veiled threats, insisting he has never been charged and warning the Senator against further harassment without warrants.

title: RPlog:The Capital's Underworld: Arrest
summary: A New Republic task force led by prosecutor Lathan Vel, with Tokoga, Jedi Leo Corak, and medic Myiari, arrests Bavon Nass in Chianar Plaza on charges of placing a bounty on the Senator, having survived Tokoga's earlier faked death. At the subsequent press conference, a sniper shoots and critically wounds prosecutor Vel in the throat and narrowly misses Nass.
