Myiari heroically stabilizes the dying Vel under chaotic conditions while Tokoga pins Nass to the ground, and Nass is taken to his cell amid a media frenzy.

title: RPlog:The Capital's Underworld: Crooked Roulette, Pt. 2
summary: On the streets of Ord Mantell, Tokoga and medic Myiari play a street roulette game run by a con artist who lets Myiari win small before rigging the wheel against larger bets. Tokoga notices the operator's hidden arm twitch manipulating the ball and obliquely calls out the cheating, prompting the man to turn hostile and rally onlookers. The operator brandishes a chip bearing Bavon Nass's insignia to scatter the crowd and threaten them, marking the Senator's first exposure to Nass's name in the local underworld.

title: RPlog:The Capital's Underworld: Essence of a Politician
summary: At an open-air restaurant on Ord Mantell, Tokoga, medic Myiari, Commander Rasi Praddhan Cen, and the Horansi ambassador K'tyyri Tarashabi meet over conversation. They discuss the stalled Incorporation of Crime Act and the curious opposition it faces, the ongoing Nass situation, and Tokoga's blunt, unpretentious style of Dacan politics. The scene is largely a character-driven exchange on politics and personal life, with Tokoga explaining why Mon Calamari politicians eschew celebrity image-making.

title: RPlog:The Capital's Underworld: Help From Abroad
summary: Tokoga meets CSA Direx Nitisha Lazure of MerrSonn at her Ord Mantell hotel suite to secure an ally less vulnerable to Nass's influence and to address rumors that he sought CSA weapons for personal use. Concerned for her own and the corporation's reputation, Nitisha offers to attach discreet OOAG stealth agents to surveil Nass's suspected operatives and the program director who accused Tokoga of corruption. Tokoga agrees to provide a target list, accepting the risky covert assistance to bolster the hamstrung investigation.

title: RPlog:The Capital's Underworld: Just Visiting
summary: In hiding at the Jedi Temple after faking his own assassination, Senator Tokoga receives a visit from Commander Rasi, medic Myiari Oerstead, and the Wookiee Cadet Hauwka. They discuss the political fallout of his supposed death and his plan to remain hidden until a warrant is issued for crime lord Bavon Nass. Tokoga intends to be present when Nass is arrested, while the others question the risks of the deception.

title: RPlog:The Capital's Underworld: Preponderance of Evidence
summary: The Verpine operative Dravin Xiz visits Tokoga as he relaxes in the Jedi hot tub and delivers a datapad and credit-stick proving Bavon Nass ordered and personally paid for the Senator's assassination. Dravin, who accepted the hit as a sting, offers to testify at Nass's trial and refuses to keep the illegally earned money on moral grounds. Tokoga reassures Dravin he respects legitimate private security and looks forward to dismantling Nass's organization through the Incorporation of Crime Act.

title: RPlog:The Capital's Underworld: Some Help
summary: On the streets of New Alderaan, Tokoga, Rasi, Myiari, the Jedi Leo Corak, and the Verpine Dravin Xiz gather and discuss crime lord Bavon Nass and the attacks against the Senator. Elderly Jedi Master Jorgen Essain arrives to take over Padawan Leo's training and suggests Tokoga rely on independent agents like Dravin rather than the Republic or the Order for protection. Dravin offers to work for Tokoga, and the Senator, despite Myiari's safety warnings, remains stubbornly committed to bringing Nass down without barricading himself.

title: RPlog:The Capital's Underworld: The Constituents
summary: Near the Senate Rotunda in Organa Park, Tokoga meets fellow Senator Ivanil Sandomere about the corruption scandal, then Myiari reveals Nass approached her to pressure the Senator. After Sandomere and others depart, two armored Quarren nationalists ambush Tokoga and Myiari, accusing him of embezzlement and treason against Dac. A wandering Sluissi pilot, Shane Sonax, intervenes; Tokoga calms the standoff and the Quarren give him one week to prove his innocence before vowing to kill him.

title: RPlog:The Capital's Underworld: The Final Meeting
summary: Tokoga and Myiari accept an invitation to visit the imprisoned Bavon Nass at New Alderaan's maximum security prison, where he arrogantly proposes terms for not pursuing Tokoga in court. The meeting is interrupted when bounty hunters in Mandalorian armor breach the prison from orbit using a mining plasma drill, stun the guards, and abduct Nass at gunpoint. Tokoga recognizes the attackers' insignia (linked to Lanze Beviin), declines to reveal it, and lets Nass be taken, suspecting he has earned a worse fate elsewhere.

title: RPlog:The Capital's Underworld: The Ploy
summary: At a symposium at Covenant College, Horansi Ambassador K'tyyri Tarashabi gives a speech about her people's plight under the Empire and CSA before Tokoga takes the podium. A focused explosive device hidden in the podium detonates, apparently killing the Senator, and Myiari rushes in to treat his wounds amid the panic. In the ambulance it is revealed the assassination was an orchestrated fake with prosthetic blood and a flash device, designed by Rasi to bait Nass's bounty into revealing itself, to the surprise and irritation of Myiari, K'tyyri, and Hauwka.

title: RPlog:The Capital's Underworld: The Second Message
summary: Outside the Senate Rotunda, Tokoga and Senator Ivanil Sandomere share a smoke and negotiate political support for the Incorporation of Crime Act in exchange for basing more of the Second Fleet near Ord Mantell. After Sandomere leaves, a parked repulsor-bike rigged with explosives detonates near the group, and Kalna (Brin Harper) shields the Senator while Myiari is pulled to cover. A small messenger droid then arrives broadcasting a threat from Nass, 'There will not be a third time,' which Kalna stuns and destroys before authorities arrive.

title: RPlog:The Capital's Underworld: Waiting
summary: At a Jedi Temple fountain, Tokoga, Myiari, Rasi, and Dravin Xiz wait for Nass's imminent arrest and discuss how the supposedly dead Senator will return to public life. Tokoga plans to reveal the whole story at the same press conference where the prosecutor announces Nass's arrest. They weigh how the public will react to the deception and whether Nass might still exert influence over the courts, with Rasi confident the evidence will keep Nass imprisoned.

title: RPlog:The Capture of Han Solo
summary: While CSA officials Piper (Simone Drake) and Alora Antieres oversee the arrest of Chewbacca and C-3PO in a park on Etti IV, Han Solo arrives disguised as a filthy beggar and provokes a brawl that frees the Wookiee and droid. Chewbacca hauls Han onto his back and flees, but Alora uses the Force to choke Han, forcing Chewbacca to drop him to save his life. Han is captured, fights back fiercely (tackling Alora, taking a blaster bolt to the leg), and is dragged off to a detention cell at the spaceport.

title: RPlog:The Caspian Plague
summary: At a medical facility on Caspar, Morganna Tazecks and Dr. Kadgie Rodo are both dying of the Yavin Plague (the second 'Caspar' strain) while Admiral Morlok Adlerson watches helplessly over a holo transmission. Morganna furiously blames the Empire for delaying the moss-based cure held up on Sullust, accusing Adlerson of murder. Kadgie collapses and nearly dies before being revived by a blood transfusion, and Adlerson tearfully confesses his love for her, begging her to hold on until the cure arrives. Dr. Angalun Faust and his team intervene, ordering Morganna into a bacta tank and treating Kadgie despite her stubborn refusal.

title: RPlog:The Cat and the Mouse
summary: On the rainy world of Lahsbane, New Republic Ghost Squadron pilot Raxis L'ygr recognizes Imperial Admiral Jal'Dana Rall, the pilot who once shot him down, and buys her a drink. Out of uniform and on neutral ground, the two enemies spend the evening in a frank philosophical debate about war, duty, the Empire's destruction of Alderaan, and the justness of their respective causes. Jal'Dana offers Raxis a chance to defect and fly for the Empire, which he ultimately declines, and she departs leaving him to weigh whether to ever contact her about terms.

title: RPlog:The Chef's Special
summary: At the exclusive Captain's Table restaurant in Noques Rasala on Caspar, Axel Vichten hosts a dinner with Dr. Lynae Cassius and the reawakened former emperor Darth Malus (Lorn Rhys). Over whiskey and a tasting menu, Malus probes the pair to recruit them, revealing his identity as a past Emperor entombed for twenty years and stating his motive is revenge. The conversation grows hostile when Malus insults Axel as a boorish coward; Axel, revealing himself as Grand Inquisitor of the Imperium, has his armed staff and patrons surround Malus before standing down and leaving Malus's fate undecided. Left alone with Lynae, Malus argues she revealed her motivations while he gave nothing away, and offers her coordinates to join him within seven days, leaving her intrigued but demanding he prove his capabilities first.

title: RPlog:The Closing Act
summary: On the final day of the New Republic's 20th Anniversary Gala on Ord Mantell, Chief of State Leia Organa-Solo closes a Senate forum and addresses crowds in Chianar Plaza, noting several senators had mysteriously skipped the morning session. During the commemorative holovid, the feed is hijacked to replay Palpatine's declaration of the Empire, then the Jedi Temple is bombed and the Imperial starburst projected above it. In the ensuing chaos, Ambrosia's bodyguards are revealed as Imperial agents who kill the driver, abduct her, and rendezvous with other captured officials at Drosshill. The captives, including a Force-controlled Johanna who helped bomb the Temple, are loaded onto a freighter and spirited off-world as Ambrosia struggles helplessly against parasitic control.

title: RPlog:The Corellia Vote
summary: Senator Tokoga of Mon Calamari presents his case before the New Republic Ruling Council, chaired by Chief of State Leia Organa Solo, advocating a military operation to liberate the Imperial-held Corellia system. He clashes with Krall Dar of Security and Intelligence and a Caamasi councilor who favor the safer target of Gyndine, debating military logic, symbolic value, and humanitarian obligation. The Council deadlocks in a tied vote, and Leia casts the deciding vote in favor of liberating Corellia.

title: RPlog:The Corellian Harvest Festival
summary: Smitherbodkins hosts the Corellian Harvest Festival and opening of the Galactic Swoop League races on Imperial-occupied Corellia, with a parade of competing Imperial and New Republic floats. New Republic sympathizers storm the censored NR float shouting anti-Imperial slogans and throwing fliers caricaturing Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin and Lord Korolov, triggering brawls. Kreldin orders troopers to hold fire and round up the dissidents, confronts Smitherbodkins over the rebel float, and Lando Calrissian (with Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard) narrowly evades arrest. The chaotic scene tangles spies, diplomats, and Imperials amid escalating disorder.

title: RPlog:The Crypts of Ord Trasi
summary: Danik Kreldin leads a stormtrooper team, with the captive Jedi Johanna Siri te Danaan and soldiers Antoine Dareus and Wescal Cantrell, deep into the Sith crypts of Ord Trasi seeking the tomb of his ancestor Davin Keldan and secrets to unlock his holocron. They survive a collapsing floor and reach Davin's tomb, only to find it completely empty. Enraged, Kreldin slaps Johanna and threatens her son Etiel, but a swarm of Terentaks erupts from the ceiling, killing a trooper and forcing the team to flee. The scene leads directly into The Escape from Ord Trasi.

title: RPlog:The Cutting Edge: Nasiri Interview
summary: Flamboyant reporter Thurston Unger brings his program 'The Cutting Edge' to Nar Shaddaa to interview Nasiri Gejalli, a Falleen underworld powerbroker, in his exotic garden. The two spar verbally over slavery, the morality of Hutt space, and galactic hypocrisy, with Nasiri arguing the civilized galaxy creates the slave market and Thurston accusing him of profiting off suffering. The interview ends cordially but pointedly, with Thurston promising an IGN exclusive and Nasiri wondering how it will be spun.

title: RPlog:The Day After
summary: On Mon Calamari the morning after a private dinner, Paul Nighman and Jessalyn Valios wake together on the beach, sharing tender and conflicted intimacy before their groups separate. Jessalyn confesses she 'used' him to forget another man (Luke), and they reconcile uneasily, agreeing the night was not a mistake while masking deeper hurt with playful banter. Later at an outdoor cafe, Paul is needled by Ariana Millikin, who recognizes him from a Tatooine cantina and pointedly warns him about exposing his vulnerabilities, leaving Paul angry and unsettled.

title: RPlog:The Direx Board Faces a Demand
summary: The Corporate Sector Authority's Direx Board convenes an emergency session after Imperial Advisor Tyler Damion (Darth Malign) demands they hand over Colonel Gren Delede for his role in the Second Battle of Nar Shaddaa, with the Empire's warships orbiting Etti IV. Merr-Sonn's CEO Gimel Daleth pushes to strip Delede of rank and surrender him, while Shannon Arands argues for a CSA trial first; a separate move to charge ExO McKnight is tabled. Legal Viceprex Xerxes Kherzen testifies that Delede knowingly ignored counsel to withdraw, swinging the board. Direx votes to strip Delede of all rank and extradite him to Imperial custody, and to release Antoine Dareus.

title: RPlog:The Doctor, the Sith, and the Presav
summary: Aboard Dr. Lynae Cassius's ship Red Sky, the recently revived and carbonite-damaged Sith Lord Darth Malus completes his medical treatment and is introduced to Crestian Tarasar, the Presav of the Caspian Union. Over tea, the three engage in a lengthy political conversation about the Imperium under Malign (formerly Tyler), Vadim, the Caspian Union's mutual defense pact, and the cyclical nature of galactic war. Malus probes for an alliance, offering to break the Caspian Union free of the Imperium or even kill Vadim in exchange for support and resources, but Tarasar and Cassius decline to commit, treating it as a 'job interview' and demanding he prove his intentions. The meeting ends inconclusively with Malus accepting Cassius's offer to freshen up aboard her ship.

title: RPlog:The Draelis Inquiry
summary: At Reef Home City on Dac, a New Republic board of review records a formal inquiry into the combat actions at the Loman Bacta Facility. Senator Del Marx observes while Marine Captain Wrista Ipex questions Captain Vengan Draelis, who commanded the assault. Draelis details how the 224th Battalion, deployed at the local government's request under suspension of posse comitatus, stormed the facility to free 49 hostages held by 23 armed members of the Quarren Survivalist Party. The board finds Draelis acted by the book, condemning the insurgents' methods rather than their cause, and notes a discrepancy in the civilian government's later claim that the action was unauthorized.

title: RPlog:The Empire's Tender Care
summary: Aboard the Imperial vessel Inquisitor, captured New Republic agent Shael Edur (Prisoner C-1125, formerly Jeni Donella) wakes strapped to an interrogation slab under blinding lights. ISB Agent Dreven graphically tortures her, cutting open her arms and implanting electric-shock orbs while demanding she identify who arranged her terrorist action. Shael remains defiant, insulting him and claiming sole responsibility, until Dreven activates the implanted devices and electrocutes her into unconsciousness.

title: RPlog:The Enemy Within
summary: In the Head Quarters Cantina in Coruscant's underworld, the Jedi Ikihsa Enb'Zik, sent by Luke Skywalker, approaches privateer Arissa Kiiko to warn her that her Force sensitivity makes her a target of the Sith and to invite her to seek Jedi protection on Ord Mantell. After verbal sparring (and an aside with the drunken pirate Juran Reinzhiner), Arissa shares her memories of Korolov's attack and, manipulated by a Nightsister force-echo in her mind, draws a blaster and forces Enb'Zik to take her to his ship. Enb'Zik reveals his identity and intentions; secretly planning to poison the Jedi from within at her dark master's bidding, Arissa agrees to accompany him to meet Luke after securing his personal oath of safe return.

title: RPlog:The Escape from Ord Trasi
summary: Continuing from the empty crypt, Danik Kreldin's team flees the swarming Terentaks through the caverns of Ord Trasi, losing many of their twenty-three elite stormtroopers along the way. Cantrell detonates a thermal detonator and Dareus is wounded, while Darth Malign appears, carving through the Sithspawn with his white lightsaber and covering the retreat. Kreldin loses his Sith holocron into the abyss during a final ambush in the Valley of the Damned. Aboard the Whipping Star, Kreldin pledges loyalty to Malign as his Sith apprentice and agrees to return Johanna and her son Etiel to him.

title: RPlog:The Ex
summary: Chanera 'Chana' Thorn arrives at Kichnar Station seeking a replacement motivator for her aging Z-95 Headhunter before returning to her employer Johanna te Danaan. She encounters Zeak Oppenhiemer, who turns out to be Johanna's ex-husband, surrounded by two cyborg companions. Over a stim-caff Chana recounts her past as a clone-wars-era pilot who survived decades in carbon-freeze, and Zeak directs her to a parts dealer named Paleon.

title: RPlog:The Fall of Coreshan
summary: Aboard Kichnar Orbital Station, Morganna Tazecks is contracted by the agent Tabl Moek to lure and capture Coreshan, a man who once saved her life. In the KOS Gardens she holds Coreshan at blasterpoint, but he reveals he has logged her secrets in a file given to a Jedi contact that will expose her if he dies, and confesses he loves her. Coreshan tries to fight free, kicking and fracturing her knee; Morganna and Tabl shoot him down, with Morganna firing a shot of her own out of conflicted honor. Tabl captures the wounded but living Coreshan, while Morganna takes his sketchbook (which contains a drawing of her) and limps away unsettled by the hollow victory.

title: RPlog:The Fate of Sabrina and Johanna
summary: Johanna Siri te Danaan, whose soul has been forced into the body of an innocent spacer named Arenth Dubois by Emperor Aleister Vadim's power, summons Luke Skywalker to a private office at the New Republic base on Coruscant. Terrified, Johanna confesses a newly surfaced memory: while serving the dark side she stole Sabrina from Boba Fett, had her frozen in carbonite, and intended to deliver her to Vadim. As Luke calms her and the Horansi Snal'Fashtalli (Snarl) arrives, Vadim's intruding voice torments Johanna and manipulates her memory until she blurts out that Sabrina is on Nar Shaddaa. Luke telepathically instructs Snarl to relay the location to her husband Zik, while guarding his own plans from Vadim's reach.

title: RPlog:The First Vision
summary: On Yavin 4, the Jedi Jessalyn Valios returns from visiting an old New Republic Support Corps base while Orson Tighe, Mira Isaria and Drew gather at the landing pad. As they discuss travel plans, Jessalyn is struck by a Force vision of an old Republic-era golden ship in space. Comparing notes, the group realizes that Jessalyn, Orson and Mira have all been experiencing the same vision, which they interpret as a summons to find the ancient ship.

title: RPlog:The Force Hurts
summary: In a casino on a space station, the well-dressed Sarian station administrator Ozzle holds court with Jase Millikin and the Twi'lek Swanstee while the scarred mercenary Morganna Tazecks suffers repeated invisible Force attacks from Ozzle, leaving her terrified and gasping. Lando Calrissian briefly enters but quickly leaves to retrieve his sidearm, and Ozzle departs after asking Jase to relay an invitation summoning Lando to his office. Morganna, recovering once Ozzle is gone, is approached by Reveal, who haggles her into agreeing to fly him to Pride-1 in Imperial space for 400 credits. Morganna realizes Ozzle is far more dangerous (Force-capable) than she had thought.

title: RPlog:The General
summary: In a custom Sith meditation chamber aboard the Predator, Darth Malign formally inducts Antoine Dareus and Axel Vichten into his 'brotherhood of darkness' through a ritual of black-uniformed allegiance and a toast to Lord Vadim. Malign reveals his quest to walk dead worlds and recover ancient Sith artifacts and knowledge, beginning with Cochran, while using agents to sow chaos across the galaxy. They plan misdirection campaigns, framing the CDU to provoke war with the Corporate Sector, and discuss exploiting Hutt and New Republic distractions. Malign appoints Dareus to command the Predator in battle.

title: RPlog:The Granny Ensign
summary: Sivytra Nona, a freshly graduated Imperial Academy ensign nicknamed the 'granny ensign,' meets her contact Rainer Aiden Maximilian on Tatooine. Walking through Mos Eisley, Rainer tests her tactical thinking using the local crime-lord rivalry between Ghent and Hutt-aligned Ollin Rel. Satisfied with her answers on securing and assaulting a fortified cafe, he tells her to keep building contacts covertly and await her first mission.

title: RPlog:The Great Escape
summary: Tipped off by Zalla that the captives are already being loaded for transport, the combined crews of the Templar and Bright Star plus a team of NR marines launch their rescue raid on the House of Sabacc slave pens. Three teams silently kill the guards, cut open the mesh cages with Druze hacking the door controls, and fight running battles against cartel buyer-guards through the lower levels to a stolen shuttle. They rescue 40 of the original captives, though roughly ten remain missing, and escape the moon.

title: RPlog:The Gyndine Debriefing
summary: In a conference room aboard the Star Destroyer Inquisitor, Flight Officer Jonas Alsten debriefs Commander Auxin Valerius and Lieutenant Rainier Aiden Maximilian on a skirmish near Gyndine, where a squadron of Rebel X-wings ambushed his TIE Avenger training flight before withdrawing. The officers debate whether the Rebels targeted Gyndine, are linked to the Corellian resistance, or are probing Imperial defenses, with no clear objective established. Valerius decides to split Task Force Inquisitor, keeping the Inquisitor at Corellia, sending the Nemesis and frigates to Gyndine, and positioning the rest between for rapid response.

title: RPlog:The Hoodwinked Baron
summary: The crew of the Fortune Rising runs a con on the Rattataki exiled-Baron Songir Fentrus aboard a Nar Shaddaa skyhook to win back a freighter. Aisaiy (as 'Cieeve') seduces and distracts the Baron, steering him toward a Sabacc table where Sorin (as 'Lothor') plays while Suana cheats via hidden signals. Sorin lures the Baron into betting a freighter against a faked registry tag and wins, but the Baron later detects the forged asset and dispatches his Weequay security chief to ambush the crew at the landing pad.

title: RPlog:The Humble Senator
summary: At a New Alderaan starport, the young and freshly elected Senator Al'Dira is pacing while drafting a speech when combat medic Galatea Demor, a former Imperial defector, stops to check his identification. Their conversation turns into a verbal sparring match in which the cynical, disdainful Galatea accuses Al'Dira of being just another honey-tongued politician as corrupt as those he claims to abhor. Despite Al'Dira's attempts to earn her respect by professing his sincerity and devotion to the Republic, Galatea remains unmoved and walks away, leaving the Senator dejected.

title: RPlog:The Imperator's Coronation
summary: Amid the festival celebrating Darth Malign's coronation as Imperator Damion I on Selene, Crestian Tarasar advises on PR while Tyler discusses war planning and Caspian policy with his admirals. A hungover, disillusioned Elana Tracer is summoned to an open-air luncheon where Malign debates freedom and ideology with her and offers her a job as regional governor over Corporate Sector worlds. Tracer refuses to ask Malign to stop her son's deployment but agrees to review the proposal, securing a two-day delay of Kipran's mission to see him.

title: RPlog:The Infiltration
summary: The New Republic stages a diversionary space battle over Imperial-held Chandrila to cover a covert insertion of a shuttle delivering aid to insurgents and rescuing refugees. The Corellian gunship Lightbringer and Falcon/Ghost starfighters (including Ikihsa Enb'Zik and Evir Yissik) engage Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin's Star Destroyer Conqueror and TIE squadrons. While the dogfight rages, Nynaeve Arthaus pilots the Starkindler and the shuttle Imperial Pain through an incomplete minefield to land planetside undetected. Kreldin sees through the diversion but lets the landing craft go, and the NR forces make a tactical withdrawal into hyperspace.

title: RPlog:The Inquisitor Makes a House Call
summary: Imperial Inquisitor Axel Vichten visits Crestian Tarasar in his pharmaceutical research lab at Twin Suns Hospital on Caspar to discuss the fallout from the prison break that freed Darth Malus (Lorn Rhys) from the Oubliette. Over Ithorian brandy and Whyren's, they assess the threat Malus poses, the absentee Darth Malign's neglect of the Imperium, the loyalty of figures like Korolov, and the danger that Lynae Cassius may be drawn into Malus's schemes. They agree to keep the matter quiet, loop in Johanna, and coordinate via Union channels while investigating who orchestrated the escape.

title: RPlog:The Interrogation of Han Solo
summary: CSA-hired interrogators from Mytus VII attempt to break the captive Han Solo at the Etti IV Port Security Office while Piper (Simone Drake) watches. The brutish 'Scar' fails to extract answers, then the sadistic torturer Singe arrives with a torture device and a drug-filled hypodermic. The interrogation collapses into chaos: Han kicks the needle away, accidentally impaling and killing Singe on his own implement, before being beaten and returned to his cell on Piper's furious orders.

title: RPlog:The Jedi Converge
summary: Drawn together by a shared Force vision, Markus Lisardis (now calling himself Cronos) lands his freighter on the Yavin 4 pad where Jessalyn, Orson and Mira are gathered. The fallen Jedi/Sith Cort Stasus also arrives, briefly manipulating Orson's mind, and delivers a message: he has given the New Republic the Death Star plans and has an offer for Skywalker to permanently remove Lord Valak from power, asking that Skywalker meet him at their usual place. After Cort departs into the jungle, Cronos reunites with Mira and, despite Orson's jealous objections, agrees to join the group and learn from Jessalyn.

title: RPlog:The Knock on the door
summary: Imperial agent Zeak Oppenhiemer visits Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard at her family's Corellian beach home with both bad news and an opportunity: an arms-running operation involving Wookiee labor has been compromised by Agent Rendolen's botched sabotage, and Lord Thel suspects a leak. Zeak proposes Ambrosia help maintain his cover by arranging X-wing strikes against Trigdale Metalurgy mines while he runs a financial scheme shorting Trigdale stock for billions in profit, plus a long-term plan to outlaw slavery in the Corporate Sector Authority by having CEC place Ambrosia on the Direx board. Ambrosia tentatively agrees but needs time and stability for her family. The evening ends abruptly when her daughter Gabi has a terror episode from past trauma involving nek hounds.

title: RPlog:The Last Happy Night
summary: On their first night in Coronet City, Corellia, Jessalyn returns to the Uwannabuyim having secured rooms at a seaside inn, joined by Simon Sezirok. They find Orson prematurely building a lightsaber prototype; Simon, a Selas, inspects it through the Force and warns that Orson's technical knowledge is getting in the way and cautions him about the dark side. Jessalyn and Simon leave together for the inn, while Jessalyn privately frets over the foreboding vision she has been having, a sense that something dark lies ahead.

title: RPlog:The Leviathian of Ord Trasi
summary: On Ord Trasi, Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin and his 501st stormtroopers, alongside their Jedi 'prisoner' Johanna Siri te Danaan and Mandalorian Wescal Cantrell, fight a Sith-alchemy abomination called the Leviathan that guards a Sith temple. The beast devours and soul-drains many troopers before Johanna severs its leg and she and Cantrell coordinate thermal detonators to blow it apart. Throughout, the hidden Sith Darth Malign (Tyler Damion) shadows the group, urged on by the spectre of his ancestor Darth Palladus, testing Kreldin's mastery of his fear. The survivors press on up the pyramid stairs toward the crypts.

title: RPlog:The Lost and Found
summary: Worried that Paul Nighman has vanished, Shenner, Jessalyn, and Lando search the Palanhi City Medical Center and discover he checked in overnight as a John Doe with severe internal bleeding, having collapsed and undergone bacta treatment. Dr. Tantra revives the restrained, agitated Paul, who reunites tearfully with the exhausted Shenner before she passes out and he carries her back to the Black Dragon. Afterward Paul takes a moonlit walk with Jessalyn, who confides her painful, unrequited love for Luke Skywalker, and Paul offers comfort and advice while privately resolving to stay behind on Palanhi to watch over Luke.

title: RPlog:The Making of an apprentice
summary: Aboard the Star Destroyer Inquisitor's zero-gravity stormtrooper training center, Arissa Kiiko returns to Warlord Vassily Korolov to submit to him after having previously rejected his offer. Korolov names his price as her complete self, body and soul, in exchange for his power and aid in her revenge. Despite her Firrerreo heritage rebelling against giving her name and self to another, Arissa pledges herself, calls Korolov master, and is formally taken as his Sith apprentice while a Nightsister chant grows in her mind.

title: RPlog:The Man in Black
summary: On occupied Chandrila, Danik Kreldin meets his old comrade Wescal Cantrell in a confiscated Republic base office, both now serving as agents of the Sith warlord Malign. Kreldin outlines a trap for the New Republic insurgency: a high-ranking rebel defector has been given tracking-equipped stormtrooper armor to lead his comrades into an ambush at the Imperial prison. Cantrell is skeptical of trusting the defector but agrees to investigate the identity of a Jedi 'hero' rumored to have joined the insurgent cause.

title: RPlog:The Mikassa Incident
summary: Admiral Danik Kreldin leads an Imperial task force to attack the Caspian Democratic Union outpost at Mikassa, opening the Imperial Blitzkrieg as a diversionary strike. CDU forces under Captain Axel Vichten refuse to surrender, and a large fleet and starfighter battle erupts amid a minefield, with the Imperials pressing the assault while the CDU evacuates non-essential personnel. The hidden CDU light cruiser Breslau ambushes the Interdictor Oppressor, allowing the transports to escape, while the CDU frigate Thresher makes a kamikaze run that damages the Star Destroyer Nemesis. The Imperials ultimately seize control of the system and prepare to board the naval station, though both sides suffer heavy fighter and ship losses.

title: RPlog:The Mission, the Fracas
summary: On snowy Caspar (Plaxton), Danik Kreldin acts as informant and bait to spring an Imperial Ground Force assault on the Dark Jedi Ezkhil i'Falzin in a town square. Ezkhil deflects blaster fire with his golden lightsaber, rebounding bolts that cripple and crash the Imperial assault skiff, killing much of the crew including the pilot and an NCO. Kreldin snipes from a pub window but is hurled out by the Force; with CDU constabulary sirens closing in, the battered Imperials abort and retreat to LZ Red, detonating the wreck to cover their escape. A Caspian news report afterward tallies 27 dead and blames an unidentified foreign power.

title: RPlog:The Morning After
summary: The morning after the start of a revolution on Nar Shaddaa, Sith warlord Tyler Damion (operating under the alias 'Tatooine Bob'/Darth Malign) and the smuggler Antoine Dareus regroup in the wrecked Meltdown Cafe amid bodies and ongoing street fighting. They take stock of holding the streets while the Hutt crime boss Grubba rallies swoop gangs against them, and discuss plans to assassinate Grubba and seize his palace. Tyler orders the pirate Juran to ready swoops for a rendezvous at the side deck on level 72 in four hours, leaving fuel canisters for the effort. A loose band of Via, Joworral the Wookiee, Ka'una, and Song drift in, treating the war zone as another day's chaos.

title: RPlog:The Musician and the News-Caster-Thingy
summary: On Nar Shaddaa, in a Corellian-themed tourist exhibition, the smuggler Kracen Ecks completes the sale of a stolen Alderaanian vase, then is captivated by a traveling musician named Lily playing a violin-like instrument. He approaches and engages her in eccentric conversation; she compares his formal speech to a news-caster and remarks he smells funny. A business call interrupts him and he departs, hoping to meet her again.

title: RPlog:The Mysterious Ms. Starling
summary: At the Imperial base camp beside Corona House on occupied Corellia, a disheveled and furious woman calling herself Ms. Starling (Sinestra Ataraxis / Lara Grayson) forces her way in to demand all data on a Lambda-class shuttle. Danik Kreldin reveals the ship was stolen years earlier by the escaped Jedi Aurejin, and that the Empire is already hunting it; Sinestra is more interested in Aurejin's companion, the woman Mira Isaria, whom she claims as her own. Using apparent Force-aided control of the computer terminals, Sinestra rapidly sifts CorSec camera feeds and pinpoints the docking bay hiding the shuttle. She orders Aurejin killed on sight and Mira captured alive, then departs, while Kreldin privately resolves to investigate her true identity, which photo records hint connects to high Imperial society.

title: RPlog:The Naom Char Incident
summary: An Imperial recon force aboard a Marauder-class cruiser, led by Commanders Danik Kreldin and Lanil Jast, crash-lands on the jungle world of Naom Char while investigating a missing prison ship. The escaped non-human prisoners, organized under the cyborg Brakath terrorist Verst Dejorn, swarm and slaughter the survivors. Danik leads a desperate retreat to an ancient temple to destroy a planetary shield generator while sniper Sandor Woden fends off the relentless hunter Goruk. The Imperials blow the generator, allowing the Star Destroyer Malignant to land reinforcements and bombard the planet, though Dejorn escapes in a commandeered dropship.

title: RPlog:The New Imperium and the Sector
summary: Aboard the Star Destroyer HIMS Predator over Caspar, Moff Elana Tracer hosts Prex Zeak Oppenheimer of the Corporate Sector Authority to deliver Imperator Damion's demands. Tracer presses for breaking up CSA conglomerates, ending Zeak's profit-skimming, and halting military buildup in the Tingel Arm, but Zeak deflects, noting the Authority is run by a DIREX board and that the Imperium has no formal relationship with it. The tense negotiation ends with Tracer apologizing for her aggressive opening and promising to send an empowered, peaceful delegation to Etti IV.

title: RPlog:The Next Morning, and Dark Conversations
summary: The morning after consummating a deal and a relationship, Jessalyn Valios takes breakfast on the battlements of Basca Starker's keep on Yaeguero Isle, Caspar, attended by the servant Naria. Over flirtation and a beach dance lesson, Basca explains his philosophy of walking the path between light and dark and reveals the true meaning of his upcoming public event: stepping out of the shadows. He warns Jessalyn that the Jedi Johanna and Skywalker will be hard hurdles, then confides his most dangerous theory: that Emperor Vadim has transfigured himself into dark-side energy and may be effectively immortal, growing stronger each time a Sith uses the dark side.

title: RPlog:The Penance of Lynae Cassius
summary: At the New Jedi Temple's Spire of Reconciliation, Luke Skywalker presides over a quasi-trial for Lynae Cassius, a former Imperial naval captain who commanded the orbital bombardment of Cochran and now seeks penance. After Lynae unflinchingly accepts responsibility without remorse, Luke offers the whip to the bloodthirsty senators, none of whom strike, and he himself lets the whip fall to the stone, declaring her forgiven. The scene closes with senators, the Caspian head of state Mahon, and pilot Kyrin Sh'vani debating atonement, with Senator Del Marx extending an offer of friendship and aid.

title: RPlog:The Prex is Dead: Long Live the Prex!
summary: A crashing Victory Star Destroyer, the Corporate Buyout, falls toward Coronet City on Corellia after wrecking a CEC orbital station. The bounty hunter Meissa drags an unconscious, glitterstim-addled Toydarian named Qwynt onto a dropship to escape, pursued by the enraged businessman Smitherbodkins in a shuttle. Aboard the falling dropship Qwynt accidentally arms an AT-AT's cannons and claims to be Smitherbodkins's father before being stabbed; he wounds Smitherbodkins with a hidden axe as the ship explodes on the beach, leaving Qwynt's death ambiguous.

title: RPlog:The Price Of Tea
summary: At Chalmun's Cantina on Tatooine, the Sith apprentice Dareus confronts Lynae Cassius (using the alias Laenira), who flew in to confront him over a Sith agent who had pressed her for Caspian/CDU naval intelligence; he accuses her of betraying their cause to the New Republic while the mercenary Axel Vichten arrives spoiling for a fight. The argument escalates with drawn weapons, an outburst against the mouthy onlooker Cade Vaughan (Atton), and a near-shooting, before Darth Malign sweeps in with droid-like guards and declares everyone in the bar his prisoners. Malign telekinetically slams Dareus into a wall, drains Lynae with Force Vampire when she kicks at him for touching her, and orders the patrons taken to his command ship the Predator. The scene closes aboard Lynae's freighter Red Sky, where Malign delivers a vial of Dareus's blood and bargains with her over her medical experiments and her place under the Sith.

title: RPlog:The Price of Failure
summary: On the bridge of the Nemesis above Caspar, Lord Aldus Thel berates the command staff after a costly battle in the Caspian asteroid belt (the Battle of Broken Teeth) and a Rebel boarding that freed prisoner Ambrosia Delgard. He compels the wounded Lieutenant Commander Tychus Varian to execute the officer, Commander Roosh, who had countermanded Varian's withdrawal order. Varian shoots Roosh dead, is promoted on the spot to fill the vacancy, and is ordered to repair the ship, prepare it for a new captain, and ready a plan of attack on Kichnar's orbital stations.

title: RPlog:The Price of Freedom
summary: Drax Rendolen visits the Falleen crime lord Nasiri Gejalli at the Ol'jeliic Palace on Nar Shaddaa, sharing a rare bottle of Alderaanian Royal Reserve to gather information about the kidnapped Jedi Johanna Siri te Danaan. In exchange for thirty thousand credits, a personal favor, and the holo of Johanna, Nasiri identifies the bounty hunter Nachkt'lyssk and his likely haunts, and warns Drax that someone has placed a 20,000-credit bounty on his head. The conversation hints at a disciplined group abducting thousands of Wookiees, and Drax leaves with new leads and fresh dangers.

title: RPlog:The Prisoner
summary: Aboard the Imperial Star Destroyer Inquisitor over Corellia, Lieutenant Rainer (a Naval Intelligence officer) gathers Commander Auxin Valerius and pilot Jonas Alsten on the observation deck to brief them on a captured CorSec insurgent named Durjan. Rainer reports that an interrogated technician revealed the resistance operates in cells and that Durjan is the only one who knows other members, but he has resisted interrogation. The three officers descend to the prison block and confront the bloodied, defiant Durjan, who curses them as having no true loyalty while they justify his captivity as punishment for the people he has killed.

title: RPlog:The Prodigal Son
summary: Returning to Mon Calamari's Coral City, Paul Nighman finds a newly stylish Shenner busking and walks her back to the New Republic barracks, masking his conflicted feelings for her. At the barracks, General Beaubos 'Skeezix' Calhoun wakes from a nightmare grieving his dead wife Jenny, and a tense argument erupts between Paul and Jessalyn before she slaps him and storms off. Later, in the Briny Deep Tap House, Paul and Lando plan their expedition to Mandalore when a gang of blue aliens seizes Jessalyn; Paul, Lando, Skeezix, and the acrobatic boy Kian fight and kill or subdue them, rescuing a badly wounded Jessalyn. Emotionally shattered by the night's events, Paul walks to his old mentor Dr. Molari Canto's home, where he finally breaks down and weeps before sleeping.

title: RPlog:The Proposal
summary: On the forest moon of Endor, amid the Rebellion's celebration of the Death Star's destruction and the Emperor's death, Han Solo joins Leia Organa beside the festivities. Their tender conversation turns passionate, but Leia hesitates, explaining she must 'save herself' for marriage out of duty as Alderaan's heir. Stunned by the idea of Leia marrying anyone else, Han impulsively proposes; after a moment of disbelief, Leia accepts, and the two share a joyful embrace.

title: RPlog:The Reactivation of Ambassador Delgard
summary: In Organa Park on New Alderaan (Ord Mantell), New Republic Navy Captain Rasi Praddhan Cen approaches semi-retired Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard, who is watching over her daughter Gabi and a crowd of children. Rasi asks her to resume active duty as Ambassador to Caspar, warning that the Empire intends to bring charges against Caspar for aiding the Republic and may extort concessions. Ambrosia, who is recovering from cybernetic joint injuries from an embassy attack, agrees to reestablish contact with the CDU and prepare for a propaganda war and smuggler recruitment. The NR will provide her a fast civilian ship and a top pilot, and she requests a few days to arrange her daughter's schooling and a tutor.

title: RPlog:The Recruitment of Sidina
summary: Having tracked the bounty hunter Sidina Renard for over a week, Tyy'sun Eson approaches her at the Etti IV starport while she struggles to load cargo. Wary and armed, Sidina holds him at blasterpoint but invites him aboard her ship to talk. Eson, presenting himself as a Deputy Viceprex of the Brotherhood of Zhao, offers her protection, advancement and credits in exchange for her loyalty and connections, including her ties to the OOAG. After probing her existing allegiances, Sidina agrees and the two seal a deal.

title: RPlog:The Red Line Express
summary: Aboard the Victory-class Star Destroyer Nemesis, Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard is enduring a prolonged Imperial interrogation, deprived of water for 72 hours and food for nearly 96, suffering severe dehydration and hallucinations. A snotty Imperial agent (serving Lord Thel) has her hauled upright by stormtroopers and resumes questioning, getting her to confirm her occupation and admit details about being sent to Caspar by Captain Cen. Mid-interrogation, Ambrosia collapses from severe dehydration and possible respiratory arrest, forcing the agent to suspend the session and call a medical response.

title: RPlog:The Republic Retreats
summary: During the Battle of Cochran, Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin's Imperial fleet, having already destroyed the Griffon fleet's flagship Gabriel, turns its full strength against the arriving New Republic fleet. Imperial bombers and TIE fighters press an assault on the NR Victory-class Star Destroyer Reprisal, with pilots Krieg Inrokana and Tellain Rockflyer scoring missile hits on its bridge. Kreldin springs a trap by summoning a second Imperial fleet led by the HIMS Predator to envelop the Republic forces. Overwhelmed and taking heavy damage, the Reprisal's captain orders all craft to retreat.

title: RPlog:The Rescue of Lando Calrissian
summary: Days after capturing Lando Calrissian, Tyy'sun Eson runs the freighter Trader's Envy toward Corellia to hand him to the Imperials, taunted by Lando's boasts of rescue. A New Republic capital ship, the Commander of Coins, ambushes and disables the Envy, and a Marine team led by Jedi Johanna Siri te Danaan boards it. A brutal cabin firefight erupts; Eson's crew (Jaxx, Zed, Szaric, Xianna, Jarek, Racra) is steadily cut down while Johanna uses the Force to hurl Eson into a bulkhead. The rescuers free fellow captive Silvin Katrar and Lando, extracting both to safety, leaving Eson laughing amid his shattered crew.

title: RPlog:The Rescue of Lynae
summary: Darth Malign leads an Imperial Storm Commando team, disguised as Corellian refugees aboard a battered shuttle, in an infiltration of the New Republic Star Destroyer Reprisal to rescue captured Captain Lynae Cassius. After being tractored into the hangar, the commandos reveal themselves and storm the cell block via a destroyed turbolift shaft, supported by Danik Kreldin and Davyd Levvis. Luke Skywalker crashes his X-Wing into the hangar and duels Malign while exotic combat droids pour out of the shuttle to create chaos. Malign reaches and frees Lynae, then escapes aboard the commandeered shuttle by collapsing a crane onto the marines, which Skywalker stops with the Force.

title: RPlog:The Right Price
summary: In Chalmun's Cantina on Tatooine, Fondorian naval officer Rasi Praddhan Cen and New Republic Chief of State Leia Organa Solo meet smuggler Krackor Reincus to hire him for a covert reconnaissance mission. They task him with infiltrating the Imperial Kessel Redoubt (the Kessel, Kubindi, and Fvillswing systems) to take detailed scans using a pre-programmed scan crystal Leia provides. After Rasi's lowball offer of 2,500 credits, Leia overrides it and they settle on 10,000 credits, with Krackor demanding 5,000 up front plus expenses.

title: RPlog:The Search Begins
summary: At Mos Eisley Starport on Tatooine, Sith apprentice Antoine Dareus arrives and strikes up a conversation with Jorj Brinaj, a credit-hungry mercenary waiting on Jedi Luke Skywalker and Johanna Siri te Danaan. Dareus pays Brinaj for intelligence and learns the Jedi bought a Twi'lek slave named Azya (suspected NRI) from Draga the Hutt and agreed to hunt down Tyy'sun Eson in exchange. Dareus also commissions Brinaj to locate Gren Delede and his Twi'lek wife Twila, offering 10,000 credits alive per person. The two part as business contacts, with Dareus concealing his true Sith allegiance.

title: RPlog:The Second Battle of Chandrila
summary: Admiral Danik Kreldin leads a massive Imperial fleet, spearheaded by the Super Star Destroyer Malevolence, in a surprise assault on Chandrila after a diversion at Mikassa drew New Republic forces to Caspar. The Imperials surround and batter the NRSD Crusader with the Conqueror and Vindictive while Scimitar bombers (Darksword Squadron) take losses against A-Wings and Mantaray gunships. Admiral Drayson Honos orders the planetary shield knocked down and deploys ground troops, marking the first full Imperial Army landing since Endor. The New Republic fleet, including Home One and Johanna's X-Wing, is driven off and the Empire secures Chandrila.

title: RPlog:The Short Victorious Prex
summary: An emergency meeting of the Corporate Sector Authority's Direx Board is called to decide whether to oust the Toydarian Prex, Qwynt. Smitherbodkins preempts the vote by announcing his resignation from the board, and during a toast the ExO drinks from Smitherbodkins's water glass and dies of poisoning. Chaos erupts: Qwynt shoots Miranda Jabs's Verpine taster, is attacked by Beatrix Mara's direcat, sprays a fortune in credits, and flees down an escape shaft. Jabs takes charge and is nominated as the new ExO.

title: RPlog:The Sin of a Selas
summary: While transporting the comatose, stasis-bound Jessalyn Valios across the galaxy aboard ship, the Selas Simon Sezirok wanders into the medbay and contemplates using the True Source to reach into her mind and awaken her, an act he regards as the greatest possible sin. He twice reaches into her consciousness, glimpsing her memories of figures like Luke Skywalker, Leia, Han, Chewbacca, the Sith Lara and Emperor Valak, finding her mind tightly bottled yet eerily aware. His probing makes contact and stirs confusion in her, but he recoils in anguish, weeping over having violated her.

title: RPlog:The Start of it All
summary: Inside a Corellian gunship's hangar disguised with New Republic regalia, Sith Warlord Vassily Korolov meets TIE pilot Jal'Dana Rall to prepare her for a secret undercover mission to Coruscant. Korolov demands her personal loyalty to him above the Empire itself and pressures her until she pledges it, while keeping the mission details hidden. He tells her she must change her name and appearance and will be molded into a predator to execute his will.

title: RPlog:The Suicide Attempt
summary: Aboard the NRV Hyperon, Chewbacca informs the captured CSA Colonel Xegid Roark (with Jessalyn translating from Wookiee) that the Authority and the Prex have betrayed him, and that he is free to go or stay as a guest. After a bitter philosophical argument about honor versus profit, Roark agrees to leave but instead attempts suicide by electrocuting himself in the Black Dragon's engine room. Chewbacca cuts the power and Jessalyn drags him free, then revives him with rescue breathing after he stops breathing, leaving Roark badly burned but alive as the ship reaches the Hyperon.

title: RPlog:The Third Battle of Coruscant, Part I
summary: Imperial forces launch a massive assault on the New Republic-held Imperial Palace on Coruscant, deploying AT-AT walkers, airborne shuttle assaults led by Camrath Kizuka and Darkholme, and light speeder cavalry against the entrenched defenders. Simon Sezirok wades into the carnage searching for Mira Isaria, who flees into the palace, while the Sith huntress Kacela lands with the assault and seeks out Simon. The two clash in a furious lightstaff-versus-amber-lightsaber duel amid the slaughter, and Kacela hurls a living, wounded NR soldier at Simon, forcing him to cut the man down and feel the death as if it were his own.

title: RPlog:The Third Battle of Coruscant, Part II
summary: During the Imperial reconquest of Coruscant, the Jedi Simon Sezirok duels the corrupted Sith hunter Kacela through the palace grounds and into the former Emperor's throne room while she tries to turn him to the dark side. Vice Admiral Airion Cimber confronts the dying New Republic President Woren Isaal, declaring the New Republic dead and choosing to leave Isaal to die in shame rather than as a martyr. Simon surrenders to protect his apprentice Mira and is sedated and taken captive along with her to be delivered to the Emperor. The Imperials raise the Imperial Ensign over the palace as captured Senators, including Ginger who cries 'Long live the Republic,' are led away.

title: RPlog:The Trandoshan Expedition
summary: Dark Jedi Sinestra Ataraxis (Lara Grayson) leads an Imperial recon expedition to the volcanic swamp world of Trandosha, with Danik Kreldin and pilots Crimson Lionheart and Marie Breya. After a harrowing hovercraft crossing of bubbling sulphuric mud flats and a dangerous climb to a cliffside cave, the team encounters an enormous fire-breathing snake-like creature that maims Lionheart, costing him two fingers. Sinestra drives the beast back with cryobang grenades and Danik's shotgun fire, then aborts the mission, and the group ropes back down to the hovercraft to evacuate.

title: RPlog:The Trip to Ord Trasi
summary: Aboard the stolen YT-2400 Whipping Star, Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin transports his captive Jedi Johanna Siri te Danaan, whose son Etiel he holds hostage, toward the Sith world of Ord Trasi to prove himself worthy to Warlord Malign. Johanna refuses to teach Danik to use her lightsaber and warns repeatedly of the planet's dark dangers. Upon landing under an oppressive grey sky, Danik feels the Dark Side for the first time; Johanna reveals it is Emperor Vadim who pulls everyone's strings. The team sends a scout party led by Ensign Dareus into the jungle, where Johanna senses and cuts down a dark goblin-creature, with more emerging.

title: RPlog:The Trip to Ord Trasi, Part 2
summary: Continuing the Ord Trasi expedition, Imperial troopers under Cantrell, Dareus and Krieg panic and open fire on the dark fear-feeding creatures, which only draws more of them. Johanna instructs Danik to master his fear and stay calm, and as he suppresses his terror through the Force the creatures lose interest and depart without attack. The party advances toward the temple across a treacherous valley path, where Danik reveals his Holocron is guiding him to a Tomb of power. Johanna snatches the Holocron with the Force and dangles it over the chasm to force Danik to rescind a torture order against her son Etiel; Cantrell mediates, the Holocron is returned, and the group presses on.

title: RPlog:The Truth About Lady Alora
summary: At the Palanhi City Starport, Jessalyn finds Luke Skywalker working on R2-D2 and warns him that the Dark Side Force-user Lady Alora is seeking him and intends to meet with Leia. Luke explains Alora has turned to the Dark Side but might still be redeemable, and worries she may have planted a tracking device on Artoo. The conversation turns personal as Jessalyn apologizes for her feelings toward Luke and he gently explains he cannot allow himself to reciprocate to keep them both safe. Jessalyn offers to examine R2-D2 for tampering.

title: RPlog:The Truth Comes Out
summary: On New Alderaan (Ord Mantell), Rainer approaches the mercenary Brek and the medic Myiari with a Trandoshan named Lessan, attempting to recruit them for criminal work, but both decline. Later, Rainer breaks into Brek's hotel room and reveals himself to be an Imperial intelligence Lieutenant, exposing Brek as an undercover Imperial stormtrooper. Rainer blackmails Brek into spying on Myiari and the Senator, claiming Myiari was involved in killing stormtroopers, and Brek pledges loyalty to the Empire.

title: RPlog:The Vichten Estate
summary: Darth Malign pays a house call to Axel Vichten's estate on Caspar (with Dareus and Tal'sin lurking nearby) to recruit him as a Sith agent of chaos, offering ten thousand credits per high-profile landmark destroyed in neutral space, with attacks to be blamed on criminal syndicates or a fabricated liberation front. Axel demands respect in his home and probes Malign's motives, ultimately agreeing only if Caspar is spared and refusing credits in favor of something more useful. Malign exposes Axel's guilt over the Bothan slaughter and his late wife Eyrie, gives him 24 hours to name his price in a handwritten letter; Axel responds by writing in his own blood that he wants STRENGTH and asks to be taught the ways of the Sith.

title: RPlog:The Wargames Begin
summary: The opposing 'Imperial' force jumps into the Ord Mantell system to begin the Second Fleet's space wargames, fielding mock Star Destroyers, Strike Cruisers and A-wing 'TIE' analogues. The NRCV Audacity, commanded by Rasi Praddhan Cen, leads a corvette squadron and Ghost Squadron starfighters against a Loromar Strike Cruiser and its Black Hammer A-wing squadron. In the dogfighting, Lance 'Wildman' Corbet and Ikihsa Enb'Zik down enemy fighters, and Corbet ultimately torpedoes the Strike Cruiser's engines and weapons to cripple it, securing the kill for the Audacity.

title: RPlog:The Weak Point
summary: In a suite at the Plaxton Grand on Caspar, Orson Tighe meditates while grinding the second crystal needed to complete his lightsaber, haunted by memories of his unfaithful ex-wife Marina. He confesses to Jessalyn that he is afraid of loving her because she is his weak point, fearing he will break or be tempted to the Dark Side if she is ever hurt. Jessalyn tells him she cannot make him stronger, that only he can, by trusting in the Force and remaining true to himself. They reaffirm their love, and Orson, finding peace, returns to finish cutting the gem, which is finally ready.

title: RPlog:The Wookiee Leaks
summary: At a military base spaceport on New Alderaan, Rendili security technician Hale Bristol meets Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard to expose the mistreatment of Wookiee indentured servants being brought to Rendili in droves. Nervous and conflicted, Hale agrees to spy for the Republic, looking for transaction records tied to a cover company called Bonadan Labor Solutions and rising Trandoshan power-players. Ambrosia, warning of the diplomatic risk to the Republic, provides a private comm contact and a 15,000-credit good-faith deposit via an encrypted account. The two part as wary allies united against the Wookiee enslavement.

title: RPlog:Theft on Etti IV
summary: A masked crew stages a heist on the Zoiby Auction House on Etti IV, using a nearby explosion at Hydian Park to draw off the ESPO security force. Twila Virda takes an ESPO lieutenant (secretly Graden Transal playing along) hostage and forces the building into lockdown while gunmen plant EMP grenades to fry the security systems and grab ancient artifacts. The plan unravels when the ESPOs counterattack: Cubitt kills a gunman with a sword, Twila is wounded and dragged to the getaway speeder, and Gren Delede fights from the dais. The robbers escape with the artifacts, and Gren detonates a hidden explosive afterward.

title: RPlog:Third Battle of Kessel
summary: A small Imperial fleet under Rear Admiral Danik Kreldin is conducting battle drills over the prison world Kessel when a New Republic task force jumps in, led by the Republic-class Star Destroyer Crusader (commanded by Lt. Mat Cypher) with Corellian gunships, an A-wing, and Scimitar bombers. The Imperial Interdictor Oppressor pins the NR ships with its gravity well while the Star Destroyers Tormentor and Renegade pummel the Crusader. Despite the NR fighters and bombers stripping the Crusader's hull shields, the Republic fleet is forced to retreat, the Crusader jumping to hyperspace heavily damaged while a lone Corellian gunship escapes the gravity well. The Imperials hold Kessel, suffering only damage to the Oppressor.

title: RPlog:Third Battle of Mon Calamari - Opening Moves
summary: Marshal Krieg Inrokana's Imperial Task Force Inquisitor jumps into the Mon Calamari system under the pretext of delivering 'humanitarian aid' to the Quarren Survivalist Party, and Admiral Ackbar's New Republic fleet engages once the Imperials press forward. Aboard the NRCV Audacity, Rasi Praddhan Cen and Chief of State Leia Organa Solo coordinate the defense while Luke Skywalker's cloaked Jedi cruiser Refrain of Anshalar and Jedi Ikihsa Enb'Zik blind the Imperial rear-guard sensors to open a hole for hidden NR reinforcements, fireships, and a minefield. The Imperials punch a corridor down to the planet to deploy ground forces, aided by QSP submersible torpedo barrages, then withdraw to the system's edge with reinforcement of additional Star Destroyers; the battle ends inconclusively as round one.

title: RPlog:This Means War
summary: After Jaxx Morgan shot a Privateer in a random act of violence, the pirates Racra, Kintor and their commodore Dylan corner and gun him down in the Subterranean Bazaar of Corusca city, Tyy'sun Eson's claimed domain. Arriving late, Eson boldly steps between Jaxx and the pirates, demanding respect for his territory and that future grievances be brought to him first. Dylan refuses to take orders, and as the Privateers depart they detonate hidden droids, killing civilians in an act of open provocation. Enraged, Eson rams his air-speeder into the crowd toward Dylan, gravely wounding the commodore and igniting war between the two factions.

title: RPlog:Thrask at the Cantina
summary: After escaping Caspar, rogue New Republic agent Sandor Woden enters a seedy cantina on Imperial-controlled Corellia, shadowed discreetly by Danik Kreldin disguised as the armored mercenary Alois acting as his bodyguard. Sandor encounters Barrien Thrask, a Quarren from his past, and the two talk warily over caf. Sandor reveals he is no longer a Marine and intends to bring his war directly to Imperial bureaucratic targets, particularly through CorSec. Thrask, sympathetic but distrustful, warns him about Corellia's bounty hunters and crime syndicates before parting as 'the enemy of my enemy.'

title: RPlog:Three's a Crowd
summary: Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard moves into a new high-rise residence on New Alderaan with her daughter Gabi and the recently released former Imperial officer Liora (Kovani). While sweeping the apartment for surveillance, Ambrosia discovers a hidden listening device in the caf machine, confirming NRI is watching them. Tension simmers over Liora's NRI clearance, her forced Jedi mind-probe, and Gabi having punched a senator's son, as Ambrosia tries to hold the strained family together and plans a trip to Corellia.

title: RPlog:Three Point Landing
summary: In the wake of the Dathomir Raid, a damaged New Republic marine shuttle crash-lands in a forest, throwing the crew about but leaving them mostly intact. Wrista Ipex organizes the survivors, frees Vengan Draelis from a vine that had snared him by the ankle, and has Sergeant Wilks strip the shuttle for sensors and communications while finding it won't explode. An X-Wing crashes nearby up the hill, and Wrista takes Leyanne Zion to scout it, navigating around territorial purbole primates using mimicked calls. They find the crashed pilot 'Hotwire' sheltered by Raxis L'ygr and prepare to bring them back to camp.

title: RPlog:Thumbs
summary: Aboard the Imperial Star Destroyer Inquisitor, Darth Malign interrogates captured Maffi crime boss Tyy'sun Eson and his slicer Jingle. Malign hands smuggler Axel Vichten a blade and invites him to take revenge for Eson burning a club and souring a ship deal; Axel ultimately severs both of Eson's thumbs while Grand Inquisitor Korolov looks on and goads them. Jingle finally surrenders the ship's passcode (ICAICC) to spare himself the same fate. Eson, defiant and spiteful throughout, vows future vengeance on Axel.

title: RPlog:Tidepool Adventure
summary: Left briefly unwatched while the Jedi Leo makes a daytime outing, the ambassador's daughter Gabi sneaks down a cliff to the tide pools on a beach. She forages, washes, and harvests venomous urchin spines from a sea urchin, then crafts a rudimentary spear from driftwood and seaweed. Returning to the cave hideaway before Leo's return, she listens to her mother's recorded holo-lullaby and message urging her to obey the Jedi.

title: RPlog:To Corellia
summary: The Imperial Star Destroyer Inquisitor jumps to hyperspace under sealed orders, and freshly transferred XO Commander Auxin Valerius comes to the observation deck to reveal the destination to the crew. He finds stormtrooper Brek Halsmer reading a Corellian philosophy text and pilot Jonas Alsten playing solitaire sabacc, with Lieutenant Rainer also present. Valerius announces the ship is being deployed to Corellian space to address the situation there, then promotes Brek Halsmer to Trooper, Senior Grade for prior field service.

title: RPlog:To Fake A Death
summary: In a Coruscant hospital, Sith Senator Viktor Faust uses Force mind manipulation to make a doctor and nurse declare his wounded aide Phair Kreiss (Jal'Dana Rall) terminally ill so he can stage her death. Faust reveals the plan: her faked martyrdom will be used to convince the public that safety matters more than freedom, fueling the collapse of the New Republic. Phair takes a gelled capsule that flatlines her vitals, and the staged death is completed so her 'body' can be transferred to Faust's ship.

title: RPlog:To Hire a Smuggler
summary: Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard contacts smuggler Jaspar Andromidas over SmugglerNet to recruit him for running humanitarian supplies through the Imperial blockade of the Caspia system. They negotiate terms: a good-faith deposit and per-run reimbursements of 3-5k credits for cargo including food, water, medical supplies, and possibly ammunition. They settle on 45,000 credits for Jaspar, with a recruitment incentive for additional runners, and Ambrosia transfers the funds. She warns him she may become an assassination target and provides backup contacts including Captain Rasi Praddhan Cen.

title: RPlog:To Hire a Smuggler: Part three
summary: Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard holocoms the bleary, hungover pirate Captain Shiari Vane to finalize their privateering agreement for the Caspar blockade. The Republic pardons Vane's prior 'misunderstanding' over a ship and agrees to exchange her current vessel for a newer model, with an open privateering contract that forbids slave/illegal-substance transport in Republic space and betrayal. They also agree to compensate Vane 10% of the value of intercepted Imperial supplies delivered as aid. The vessel exchange will occur on Tatooine, and both women toast the deal with drinks.

title: RPlog:To Hire a Smuggler: Part two
summary: Following word spread by Jaspar Andromidas, pirate Captain Shiari Vane, a flamboyant Rattataki, contacts Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard via a holo bounced across multiple systems to offer her blockade-running services for Caspar. Ambrosia explains the humanitarian situation and offers 35,000 credits up front plus 3-5k per run. Vane, citing the risk of running an Imperial blockade, demands double the per-run rate, and Ambrosia agrees to take it to her Naval contacts. The negotiation ends with Vane promising to be in touch.

title: RPlog:To Kill A Karrde Part 1
summary: On the streets of Nar Shaddaa, Black Sun crimelord Tyy'sun Eson ambushes smuggler chief Talon Karrde, intent on killing him for cutting into Black Sun's Outer Rim profits. After Karrde fires, wounding Tyy'sun in the gut, the two grapple savagely; Tyy'sun, fueled by the dark side, beats Karrde unconscious with his own blaster despite his grievous wound. Tyy'sun then calls Black Sun henchmen to extract them both, claiming his prize while badly bleeding. The act marks the beginning of Tyy'sun's downfall within Black Sun.

title: RPlog:To Kill A Karrde Part 2
summary: Twenty-four hours later aboard the ship Trader's Triumph, a recovered Tyy'sun confronts the caged Talon Karrde, demanding details of his Outer Rim operations before execution. Vigo Lyle Derfill voices dissent over the reckless public attack, warning it exposes Black Sun, while Karrde tries to bargain and reason. Karrde breaks free and fights with a smashed bottle but is stunned; Tyy'sun reveals his Ryloth slave-past as motivation. A distress call from Ryloth (from Sarhavian Eson) diverts Tyy'sun, who orders Karrde bound for interrogation and later execution.

title: RPlog:To Kill A Mockingbird
summary: Aboard the Security Deck of the V2SD Nemesis, Lord Aldus Thel briefs ISB Agent Kelbris Cooper and Stormtrooper Lt. Loreck Hawkins on the CDU's secret arming of the Rebellion in breach of their treaty of nonaggression. Thel explains the Caspians value their neutrality and that hard proof of their deception is needed to break their resolve, not a mere paper trail. He orders Cooper and Hawkins to base out of the Imperial Embassy on Caspar and covertly infiltrate the warehouse or vessel holding the weapons, stressing absolute discretion and forbidding murder. The two plan a repair-technician cover to infiltrate the facility.

title: RPlog:To Walk the Plank
summary: In Trandosha space aboard Tyy'sun's ship, Tyy'sun torments his bound prisoners and brawls hand-to-hand with the blue Twi'lek Alistair Al'Dira, using raw Force reflexes to defeat him. He then has the prisoners forced into spacesuits and ejected into the void: Alistair first, then the Jedi Ai'kani Za'netra, despite her drawing the Force to humiliate and unbalance him. Lando Calrissian and Silvin Katrar verbally rage at Tyy'sun, who keeps them aboard for further entertainment after beating Lando unconscious. The scene ties to an exchange with Luke Skywalker for a Jedi holocron.

title: RPlog:To the Sith
summary: Aboard the Super Star Destroyer Malevolence, a content Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin is visited by his Sith master Darth Malign (Tyler Damion). Malign lectures him that the Galactic Civil War and the New Order are ultimately insignificant compared to the eternal war between light and dark, urging Kreldin to cast off mundane political concerns and embrace hatred as the fuel of the dark side. Malign demonstrates dark power, plunging the office into darkness, and demands Kreldin declare his loyalty. Kreldin reluctantly swears his allegiance to the Sith and to Malign and Master Vadim, beginning his formal training as an apprentice.

title: RPlog:Toil and Trouble
summary: Paul Nighman arrives at Ylsa Estrallas's Cloud City apartment for a planned evening together and finds the place ransacked, with a Rodian still searching it and Ylsa beaten and unconscious on the bedroom floor. Paul knocks out and stuns the Rodian, then tends to Ylsa, who has cracked ribs but refuses medical aid because her family's distinctive blood would expose her to Imperial scanners. He stuns her to bind her ribs painlessly, carries her to his ship the Wing, and treats her. Ylsa reveals she has withheld something of value from her employer Ullo, hinting the intruders sought a book she gave Paul; Paul vows she will not return to Ullo, and afterward secretly copies the artifact book's contents in case he must give it up.

title: RPlog:Tonight there's gonna be a jailbreak
summary: A mercenary crew assaults the Oubliette (Spacestation 1138 in the Karthakk System), an Imperium maximum-security carbonite prison, to extract the entombed former Emperor Darth Malus. The Sith Mitra, the chaotic Twi'lek crime lord Skawn Kairn and his depraved Smooth Talker crew, and the pragmatic killer Vix infiltrate the station after sabotaging its systems, slaughtering droids and guards. Skawn frees and thaws Malus from carbonite, while Vix keeps her blaster trained on the disoriented Sith as a precaution. A furious Malus regains his feet, learns he has been frozen for roughly twenty to twenty-one years, asks after Vassily, and the crew withdraws with their prize.

title: RPlog:Torin Vorl
summary: Aboard the ISC Broadsword orbiting Selene, a cybernetic terrorist named Torin Vorl, a former Imperial pilot believed killed at Endor and now seeking revenge on Commissar Lanil Jast, seizes remote control of the ship from the auxiliary bridge. He cuts power and life support, forces Captain Lynae Caiton and Jast to execute crewmen on camera to discredit them, and sets the Broadsword on a self-destructing crash course for Selene. The bridge crew improvise a full system reset using a power cell while Krieg's War Shrike fighters and the corvette Prowler disable the engines, ultimately regaining control, cancelling the self-destruct, and ending Torin's grip as stormtroopers prepare to hunt him down.

title: RPlog:Torments and Temptations
summary: On Mon Calamari, Paul Nighman negotiates an archaeology contract with Lando Calrissian to recover possible Force-activated Jedi artifacts from the Mandalorian Grathix, warning that a dangerous red-haired man called Vermilion (Khaj Greengrass) may interfere. An emotionally charged conversation with Jessalyn Valios about loneliness and her abandoned marriage is interrupted by Shenner. At a tavern (where Lando regales New Republic crowds with war stories and meets Admiral Jace Starr and Amylynn Starr), Paul drinks heavily and dances with a stranger; a jealous Shenner kisses him and storms off. Paul follows, kisses her back, then recoils on realizing she is seventeen; Jessalyn intervenes, and Paul resolves to leave the barracks to work at the academy, leaving a contact card with Jessalyn.

title: RPlog:Touch of the Dark Side
summary: At the Smuggler's Dig Cantina on Corellia, a hungover Antoine Dareus drinks alongside a mix of Imperials, the Jedi Johanna Siri te Danaan, and crime figures. Dareus repeatedly needles and philosophically baits Johanna about the Sith and her brother Tyler/Darth Malign, daring her to act. Johanna's temper finally breaks: she ignites her lightsaber, scorches his jacket, then uses a Force-choke to throttle him unconscious. Witnessing her slip into dark-side power, Warlord Vassily Korolov strikes a bargain to wipe the memory in exchange for a dark-arts scroll Johanna stole from the Ord Trasi temple.

title: RPlog:Touchdown
summary: Jedi pilot Leo Corak, flying a captured TIE Avenger (Avenger One) with Gabi Delgard aboard, and Lieutenant Amaya Halos, piloting the stolen Imperial shuttle Ticonderoga carrying the rescued Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard and defecting Imperial medic Liora Kovani, escape the Imperial blockade around the Star Destroyer Nemesis. Leo bluffs as Darth Venger before his ruse fails, then destroys two pursuing TIE fighters and feeds Halos hyperspace coordinates while the Nemesis fires on them. Both ships jump to safety and land at the New Republic military base on New Alderaan, Ord Mantell. On the tarmac, Ambrosia is violently ill but reunites tearfully with Gabi, and realizes with horror that the Empire had been in her daughter's room.

title: RPlog:Training Day
summary: On Ord Mantell, New Republic Ghost Squadron pilot 2nd Lieutenant Raxis L'ygr is assigned to train Cadet Rebecca Varn, a former CorSec pilot trainee from Corellia. He puts her through an X-wing flight simulator mission against TIE fighters, which she clears at the entry level with confident, skilled flying. Afterward Raxis explains the difficulty will increase, gently corrects her cocky attitude, and welcomes her to the Ghost 'family.'

title: RPlog:Traitor
summary: On occupied Chandrila, Imperial Captain Danik Kreldin meets with Fenn Khor, a high-ranking member of the local insurgency who wishes to defect to the Empire out of admiration for its strength. Fenn offers to lead an insurgent prison-break team into an Imperial trap, requesting Stormtrooper armor that the Empire secretly plants with tracking devices. The next day Fenn returns to report that Jedi Luke Skywalker has joined the insurgents and intends to participate in the prison strike, making him a prized target. Kreldin and Fenn discuss countermeasures including hostages, and Kreldin sends Fenn back to lead his doomed comrades into the ambush.

title: RPlog:Traitor's Redemption
summary: Aboard the I2SD Inquisitor's hangar deck, the Empire stages the televised execution of confessed traitor Sandor Woden before assembled CompForce, Stormtroopers, Royal Guard, Navy, and SAGed students, broadcast by IGN correspondent Timo Droja. ISB Agent Dreven Mercurio reads the charges of desertion and treason; Sandor pleads guilty, reflecting on his betrayal for the love of the dead Ai'kani. Mercurio executes Sandor with a single antique ballistic round to the head, after which the body is bagged and hurriedly removed by a COMPNOR shuttle. The scene closes with the various Imperial attendees reacting, and the agent pressing the spent casing into SAGed student Ashden Keldrona's hand.

title: RPlog:Transfer of Command
summary: Aboard the I2SD Inquisitor, Line Captain Jal'Dana Rall assembles the Imperial Task Force on the hangar deck to announce a change of command. She declares that Moff Bailey Sora Laran has been named Executive Officer and Captain of the Inquisitor as the Empire's diplomatic 'open hand', while Rall herself becomes the 'closed fist' and transfers the fleet's command component to the Vindictive. Laran delivers her own speech promising more training, R&R, and morale initiatives, privately doubted by Rall, before Rall dismisses the formation.

title: RPlog:Trapped in Trinumvira
summary: After the costly defense of Trinumvira Base, Webb's Marines detain Shenneret Veery, who fought in stolen Gunnery Sergeant Sung armor and was wounded in the arm. Rather than punishing her, Webb embraces her and grants her the brevet rank of Private First Class in the Caspar Democratic Union Marine Corps. Inside the muster room, medic Whitney treats Shenner's shrapnel wound while the sadistic former Imperial agent Heinrich Stalh menaces the captive Imperial pilot Azya and taunts Webb and Shenner, dropping a meaningful coin as a threat before Shenner is escorted off to rest.

title: RPlog:Trial by Fire
summary: In the Outer Rim, Commodore Krieg 'Banger' Inrokana and guest instructor Line Captain Jal'Dana 'Vapor' Rall stage a surprise combat exercise against Razor Squadron pilots Alex 'Chance' Dante and Liza 'Slush' Molokai. Rall, disguised in an X-wing, ambushes the patrol, and she and Inrokana use coordinated tag-team tactics to dominate and school the younger Imperial pilots, repeatedly punishing their attempts to run. Dante's fighter is ultimately disabled and Molokai's badly damaged, but the veterans call a stand-down, judging that the two rookies have learned hard lessons and passed their trial by fire.

title: RPlog:Triangle
summary: The day after Orson Tighe was wounded by a vornskr on Myrkr at Talon Karrde's base, he drags equipment into the clearing where Simon Sezirok is practicing staff forms. Orson thanks Simon for saving his life, but Simon grows visibly jealous at Jessalyn's casual physical affection toward the mechanic. Orson, sensing the tension, privately assures Jessalyn he values her friendship over getting between her and Simon, then retreats. Simon ultimately confronts Jessalyn, his jealousy softening into a confession; she tells him she loves him and they kiss.

title: RPlog:Triumphant Return or Maybe Not
summary: Having stolen the experimental Imperial Victory-class Star Destroyer 'Wings of Justice', the malnourished Chyleni pilot Kyrin Sh'vani jumps it out of the Deep Core, where she is found by her Jedi lover Brandis Finian in his ship the Rising Phoenix. Together they bring the captured Star Destroyer back toward Coruscant, where the NRSD Reprisal scrambles fighter squadrons (Ghost, Falcon, Dagger, Krakana) and a Marine boarding party to escort and secure it. Meanwhile aboard the Imperial Star Cruiser Broadsword, Captain Lynae Caiton, learning the defector Kyrin and the Jedi Brandis are aboard, orders her ships and Black Squadron under Commander Seifer Wolf to destroy the prototype rather than let the Rebels keep it.

title: RPlog:Trouble on Cloud City, Part One
summary: On Bespin's Cloud City, Basca Starker accompanies Jessalyn to Johanna Siri te Danaan's club, still under renovation a week before its grand reopening. Johanna, deeply suspicious of the dark presence she senses within the CSA man Basca, maintains a polite but cold facade while serving drinks and catching up with her best friend Jessalyn. Tension spikes when Basca suggests Jessalyn's children visit his Keep on Caspar, recalling a grim prophecy that Johanna's loved ones will be devoured; Johanna quietly insists they will not. The Zeltron performer Quinne arrives and breaks the tension with an enthusiastic greeting before introducing herself to Basca.

title: RPlog:Trouble on Cloud City, Part Two -- Malign's Court
summary: Darth Malign (the Imperator) arrives at Bespin's Cloud City with an enormous Imperium fleet and his Sith acolytes, the Circle of Irluuk, to investigate whether Basca Starker is a puppet of the immortal Sith Lord Vadim.
