Under the guise of a state dinner hosted by Grand Moff Johanna te Danaan, Basca and the Jedi Jessalyn Valios are intercepted while trying to flee, and during the meal a Sith spawn (Sov'Stayn) inside Basca is exposed, revealing he caused the Sariphage plague that killed billions on Caspar at Vadim's command. As Johanna probes his mind and Vadim's presence manifests, Crestian Tarasar draws a blaster demanding the spawn's death while acolyte Sigil Rexton is brutally subdued by the Wookiee Sentinel. Johanna, as the law of Bespin, rules that the spawn be purged from Basca by Malign and his witches rather than killing him, and Basca bids Jessalyn a final farewell.

title: RPlog:Trouble on Palanhi
summary: Aboard the YT-1300 Black Dragon at Palanhi, Paul Nighman wakes beside Shenner in the cargo hold, leading to an awkward moment, before the crew learns Jessalyn has been abducted by the Imperial Sabbath and Han Solo is missing. The crew argues at length over who should leave the locked-down ship to search, with Leia insisting on finding Han while Lando, Paul, Tand, and Tacra debate the risks. Luke Skywalker returns, refuses all offers of help, and departs alone in his X-Wing to pursue Sabbath's ship in orbit and rescue Jessalyn. Lando takes command, deciding the Black Dragon will return to the fleet rendezvous at Yavin to wait for Luke.

title: RPlog:Troublesome Female Jedi
summary: On Corellia's Ocean Bluffs, the Padawan Ai'kani Za'netra is nearly run over by Danik Kreldin's speeder outside his family estate, and he attempts to detain her as a Jedi, calling for Imperial backup. The recently dark-fallen Johanna Siri te Danaan arrives, mocking Kreldin and revealing her turn to the dark side to a stunned Ai'kani. As the confrontation escalates, Johanna uses a telekinetic choke on Kreldin while the Sullustan Adam Zero and the off-duty Imperial Ryder become entangled. Kreldin throws a flash grenade, Ai'kani tackles Johanna to break her hold, and Johanna lets Kreldin live before departing; Ai'kani and Zero flee for the spaceport as Imperial reinforcements arrive.

title: RPlog:Troublesome Ozzle
summary: At the SandBar on Caspar, Imperial Ambassador Morganna Tazecks is in tense conversation with the powerful and temperamental Sarian Ozzle Olumpari when Tsaran Joir arrives and inadvertently interrupts them, causing Ozzle to storm off. Joir and Morganna retreat to the Imperial Embassy where she explains her fearful, fraught relationship with Ozzle, who can stop a heart with a thought. Joir counsels her to maintain respect without servitude and to stay alert, noting they can take action if Ozzle becomes too great a threat.

title: RPlog:Troy and Joir
summary: At the Black Krayt Swoop Arena on Caspar, Imperial agent Tsaran Joir (posing as a swoop sponsor) approaches racer Troy McTavish, who reveals he has heard military scuttlebutt that Caspar is on alert and bracing for a possible civil war and attack from a renegade Imperial faction. Troy withholds his proof, saving it to sell to an Admiral, which visibly unsettles Joir. They retire to Troy's repair shop, meet his assistant Azya and the new racer Ellie Tracer with her brother Dak, and wager a bottle of whiskey on the next race between their teams.

title: RPlog:Trust & Decay
summary: A narrative summary recounting the Nagai woman Nitisha (operating as 'Ash') joining the criminal operation of Tritus Vaticus on Tatooine and Ord Mantell, where she becomes his right hand under the Hutt Draga. After Tritus is seemingly killed when Barrien Thrask destroys the Gundark Industrial facility, he is revealed alive but changed and increasingly violent, and Ash grows disillusioned. A climactic confrontation erupts when Darth Malign exposes the Imperial agent Anatoli Black, leading to a duel and orbital bombardment of Mos Eisley; Ash is buried in rubble, rescued by Sekes, and ultimately swept into the orbit of Darth Malign and Grand Admiral Fel.

title: RPlog:Trust a Dishonest Man
summary: At the Corellia space port, pirate captain Arissa Kiiko, repairing her corvette the Kolier, encounters the flamboyant, rum-scented pirate captain Jalek Helion after her tossed tool nearly hits him. The two captains engage in a witty, flirtatious verbal duel, fencing over crew, ships, smuggling lanes, and the 'extras' the Kolier offers paying clients while both deflect probing questions. Jalek proposes a sabacc game with the stakes of joining each other's ship, but Arissa declines and parts amused, certain they will meet again and that Jalek is trouble.

title: RPlog:Turning Solo Over to the Empire
summary: Piper (Simone Drake) escorts Sabbathius Osbourne to the Etti IV Port Security Office to complete the handover of Han Solo to the Empire. Han attempts to ambush Sabbath in the cell but is overpowered, choked, and sedated with a drug-filled vial. Sabbath carries the unconscious Solo to his shuttle Crazy Diamond and departs for Imperial space. As Piper returns home, a disguised Shenneret Veery secretly observes her from a bench, shaken to be so close to her.

title: RPlog:Twenty Years Hard Labor
summary: Freighter pilot Shas Krutz launches from Etti IV and is immediately intercepted by Centurion fighters and the Star Destroyer CSAV Litigator on the pretext that he is smuggling. Krutz is detained aboard ship and confronted by Captain Gren Delede, who claims unregistered Bi-Polar carbines were found in his cargo and threatens twenty years hard labor and crippling fines. Using the threat as leverage, Delede coerces Krutz into joining his clandestine organization (the Brotherhood of Zhao) as a smuggler and informant. Delede agrees to alter the records and 'deal with' the crewmen, recruiting Krutz under implicit threat of bounty hunters.

title: RPlog:Two-Night
summary: Diverted from Tatooine to Bespin while searching for the Twi'lek forger Elomin, Paul Nighman frequents Cloud City's Sky Bar over two nights and becomes entangled with a mysterious, elegant woman who knows his name and academic title. Over drinks, a chess game, and verbal sparring in her suite, she reveals herself as Ylsa Estrallas, a negotiator who tries to hire him to retrieve an object from Mandalorian space, baiting him with an ancient Corellian tome for sale. Paul, angered at being manipulated and lied to (she fabricates a Mandalorian-Corellian heritage story before confessing), nearly walks out but agrees only to inspect the tome the next morning at 10 o'clock.

title: RPlog:Two for Tea
summary: In Lynae and Yoseph Caiton's quarters aboard the ICC Dauntless, ISB Senior Agent Lanil Jast confesses over a pot of Dantooine tea that he has long had feelings for Dr. Lynae Cassius. Lynae explains that her husband Yoseph has become disenchanted with the Empire and absent, and that her feelings for Lanil are complicated; she offers deep friendship and trust but cannot promise more while still married. They commiserate as an 'older breed' who remember life before the Empire, and Lynae invites Lanil to stay, taking the couch, given his emotional stress and the awkwardness of junior officers' gossip.

title: RPlog:Tyy'sun Hunt
summary: Months after a first encounter, the smuggler/operative Ash (Nitisha Lazure) is tracked through the New Alderaan starport on Ord Mantell by the Twi'lek crimelord Tyy'sun Eson and his Maffi network, who demand she help right the Hutt-led persecution of Twi'leks and turn over agents tied to Tritus. Ash stalls and calls for aid; a tense standoff erupts at a cafe as Cantrell (Mandalorian), Axel Vichten (Sith), Thrask, A'estshy, and a disguised Bothan spy Besk all converge. After mutual threats and a near-detonation, no blood is shed: Eson orders Axel off his streets and demands justice or war, and the Maffi withdraw with Thrask and A'estshy.

title: RPlog:Uncaging the Canary
summary: Lt. Amaya 'Halo' Halos leads a volunteer squad of New Republic 244th Raiders Marines, disguised in Imperial uniforms aboard the shuttle Ticonderoga, to rescue captive Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard from the Victory II Star Destroyer Nemesis in orbit of Caspar. They infiltrate the docking bay under cover of a deliberately set TIE fire, neutralize escorts, and reach Delgard and Imperial defector Lt. Liora Kovani in the staterooms. After a chaotic firefight and the Ticonderoga shooting up the hangar bay with cannon fire, the team extracts both women aboard the shuttle amid venting gases and debris, escaping the Nemesis battered but successful.

title: RPlog:Uncomfortable Traffic
summary: New Republic Ghost Squadron pilots Lt. Kesander Beysarus (Sandman) and Raxis L'ygr (Raptor) launch from Ord Mantell to investigate reported pirate activity on the rimward side of the system. They find two Z-95 Headhunter pirates attacking a YT-1300 freighter, the Teseract, and execute a flanking pincer ambush. Both pirate craft are destroyed and the grateful freighter crew is safely escorted in to New Alderaan.

title: RPlog:Unexpected Arrival
summary: During the Ord Mantell wargames, a Caspian Union battlegroup arrives at the edge of the Bright Jewel system and is given operational command of a simulated Imperial attack under Cadet Lynae Cassius. Cassius leads the 'attacking' fleet of corvettes (Audace, Astute, Breslau, Lansdowne) and fighters under Tyler 'Fossil' Damion against the New Republic defenders centered on the MC-80 Valiant, the corvette Audacity (Rasi Cen), and Ghost Squadron (Kyrin Sh'vani, Ikihsa Enb'Zik). Using aggressive Imperial-style tactics, baiting maneuvers, and a coordinated wedge assault, Cassius's force punches through and scores a direct hit on the MC-80, capturing the prize, while Ghost One (Kyrin) is 'disabled' and recovered.

title: RPlog:Unexpected Arrivals
summary: On rain-soaked New Alderaan (Ord Mantell), exiled former Imperial doctor Lynae Cassius, now under New Republic protection, encounters Jedi Senator Ikihsa Enb'Zik and his Horansi wife Snal'fashtalli, to whom she reveals she has handed the NR a strength and threat assessment of the Imperial taskforce. Enb'Zik senses danger and tries to spirit Lynae away just as Antoine Dareus and Axel Vichten arrive with combat droids, followed by the Sith Lord Darth Malign, all seeking to recruit her. Lynae sends her NR escort away and willingly leaves with the trio. Aboard her ship the Red Sky she is flown to the black-painted Star Destroyer Predator, where Dareus and Axel offer her command of a capital ship (the Embrace) in Malign's renegade Sith battle group; she withholds her decision but accepts a stateroom and asks that her late husband Yoseph's remains be cremated.

title: RPlog:Unexpected Conversations
summary: At the Sandbar on Caspar, ex-Imperial doctor Lynae Cassius confronts the self-destructing Keifan (Antoine Dareus) about his drinking and a dangerous new venture, then suffers a heart attack triggered by an implanted punishment device that monitors her stress. Jedi pilot Johanna Siri te Danaan arrives and presses Lynae to admit her guilt over torturing Brandis Finian, offering to broker the surgeon's help and a new life away from the Empire. The scene escalates as Darth Malign (Tyler Damion) enters and taunts Lynae as a coward and traitor, until President Thomas Mahon declares him persona non grata. Brandis Finian finally arrives, extracts an oath of a future favor, and uses the Force to heal Lynae's heart enough to buy time before surgery to remove the device.

title: RPlog:Unexpected Treasure
summary: At the University of Corellia, Paul Nighman is reunited with his friend the Horansi Jedi Sinjon Teague, who introduces the smuggler-captain Nerik Dreshkar carrying an ancient scroll. Paul, fluent in ancient Corellian, authenticates the scroll as a genuine treasure map linked to the famed Corellian pirate Darius Nul, and by folding it reveals a hidden star chart. The trio deciphers the destination as the Imperial-held planet Athaniss, with the treasure submerged in its north sea, and they agree to acquire diving gear via Nerik's contacts on Caspar before mounting the expedition together.

title: RPlog:Unfortunate Escort
summary: Gren Delede, flying an illegal transponderless Z-95 Headhunter, scouts a lightly trafficked Imperial system (Renaal) to gather sensor data on a shipping lane and convoy. Imperial Flight Officer Liza Molokai and her wingman in TIE Interceptors break off to investigate the unidentified blip. Gren opens fire without warning, quickly destroys the wingman (Delta 3), and cripples Liza's fighter. He spares her, urging her to eject, which she does before her Interceptor explodes; he then jumps to hyperspace with his scan data and two more 'kill markers.'

title: RPlog:Unusual Courtesy
summary: After Shael Winters's freighter Camerata Ostile is disabled trying to run the Imperial blockade at Coruscant, the ship is brought aboard the ISC Broadsword and Lieutenant Krieg Inrokana boards alone to detain its lone pilot. Rather than brutalize her, Krieg treats the frightened young blockade-runner with unexpected courtesy, questioning her cover story while confiscating her ID, credits, and cargo. Captain Lynae Caiton oversees the stripping of the freighter, and in the end Shael is released alive but the gutted, barely-functional ship is tractor-launched on a one-way collision course toward Coruscant.

title: RPlog:Vacation
summary: Paul Nighman blindfolds Ylsa Estrallas and drives her to a secluded private beach cove he rented for two weeks as a vacation 'payment' he owed her, after their difficult flight from Bespin and Caspar. They swim, undress, and Paul indulges Ylsa's royal fantasy, playing the role of body servant who feeds her fruit, wine, and seafood as she reclines on a chaise. The scene is an intimate romantic interlude exploring her former life as a deposed princess and their deepening relationship.

title: RPlog:Vendetta: Swoops & Sources
summary: At a swoop racing tournament on Nar Shaddaa, the spacefaring Ithorian information broker Rixt seeks out a mysterious cybernetic-spined human, Elias Corentin, on the trail of a lead. Elias proposes a mutually beneficial arrangement: he will supply rare Ithorian Karobba flowers (grown hydroponically for research into a Jedi-disabling toxin) and other exotic flora in exchange for Rixt acting as an information gatherer on retainer. They agree to a trial run, and Elias tasks Rixt with gathering all information on Moff Jacob Festus's current activities within one week to earn the flower.

title: RPlog:Very Interesting...
summary: At a rainy sidewalk cafe in Fountain Square on Caspar, smuggler Axel Vichten meets exiled former Imperials Antoine Dareus and his doctor Lynae Cassius (Caiton), who have an Imperial-implanted pacemaker rigged to kill her if removed. Axel offers them medical supplies, transport, and favors in exchange for future services. Darth Malign (Tyler Damion) arrives, warns Dareus the Sith now consider him an enemy, and telekinetically hurls Axel into the fountain after Axel angrily confronts him about Danik Kreldin. A spice-fueled Axel then draws a slugthrower and fires wildly, knocking himself unconscious with falling marble; he is arrested and hauled off by Caspian authorities.

title: RPlog:Victorious Return
summary: Following a costly ground campaign on Dathomir, an Imperial rescue fleet led by the CR90 Relentless extracts the surviving stranded Imperial forces and recovers the dead. The wounded Marshal Krieg Inrokana, who had given his rations to his troops for a week, is carried aboard but rises to deliver a victory address to a cheering hangar deck aboard the I2SD Inquisitor. The scene ends lightheartedly as Krieg orders an open bar and the stormtroopers gleefully hose down the grimy returning pilots, including Commander Dante and Liza 'Slush' Molokai.

title: RPlog:Visitation Hour
summary: Days after her rescue, Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard recovers in the New Alderaan Military Base med bay alongside her daughter Gabi and the Imperial defector Lt. Kovani. New Republic Captain Rasi Praddhan Cen visits, hoping to get her signature on documents and arrange a propaganda film exposing the Empire's coerced false confession. A traumatized, hostile Ambrosia refuses to cooperate fully, demanding restored quarters, Kovani's release into her custody rather than a cell, and to be left in peace, while Rasi presses for ongoing counseling and security oversight.

title: RPlog:Visitations from Obi-Wan
summary: In Obi-Wan Kenobi's old hut on Tatooine, Luke Skywalker begins Jessalyn Valios's Jedi training, telling her she must construct her own lightsaber crystal using an oven and an old instructional book. As Jessalyn studies the manual, Luke is visited by the Force ghost of Obi-Wan Kenobi, who counsels him through his fear of failing as a teacher. Reassured by Obi-Wan's words about the power of the Light and acting in the present, Luke affirms his readiness; Jessalyn senses but cannot fully see the presence.

title: RPlog:Visiting Roark
summary: On the New Republic vessel Hyperon, the flight tech Jessalyn Valios visits the captive Xegid Roark in his quarters, finding him badly hung over, and brings him a potted rose plant to cheer him. Tasked by Chewbacca to gain the prisoner's trust, she befriends Roark, who confides about his estranged eight-year-old daughter Melisan on Corellia and a court ruling him an unfit father. Councilor Antra Silverthorn and Chewbacca arrive to question Roark about negotiations, and Jessalyn quietly suggests to Chewbacca that Corellia might help recover Roark's daughter in exchange for ensuring Han Solo is returned to the New Republic. In a later emotional scene, Jessalyn and Roark bond over shared regrets and resolve to make fresh starts.

title: RPlog:Volunteering
summary: Now permanently cut off from the Imperial Navy, Lynae Cassius petitions Admiral Camrath Kizuka in his Trinumvira office on Caspar to enlist in the CDU Navy. She insists on serving in the fighting arm, citing ten years of combat and command experience, but Kizuka argues her thin fleet-command record and the CDU's neutral, anti-bloodshed ethos make a medical posting the better fit. They settle on her entering at captain's rank in the medical branch, contingent on security vetting, Caspianisation training, and escape-and-evasion training under Captain Kimelea, with the door open to later command training.

title: RPlog:Vornskr Attack
summary: At Talon Karrde's base on Myrkr, Jessalyn Valios and the Selas warrior Simon Sezirok walk a forest path gathering flowers when they hear the mechanic Orson Tighe screaming, cornered by a wild vornskr. They rush to his aid alongside Drew Carvallo and a stranger named Toby, fighting the beast despite the Force-dampening bubbles of Myrkr that hamper Jessalyn's and Simon's abilities. Simon pole-vaults into the creature to knock it off Orson, Drew drags the wounded mechanic clear, and Jessalyn severs the vornskr's poisonous barbed tail with her lightsaber. The injured beast flees back into the forest, and the group regroups to tend to Orson's wounds.

title: RPlog:Waking Up
summary: Senator Tokoga and the medic Myiari awake from sedation to find themselves imprisoned in a run-down holding cell on New Alderaan, watched by the Imperial intelligence officer Rainer and the undercover stormtrooper Brek. Rainer demands Tokoga's Defence Council mainframe access codes, and when the Senator refuses, has Brek beat Myiari and tortures her with a slaver's stun device. Myiari fights back fiercely but, to spare Tokoga from being flayed with a blaster, finally offers to slice into the Chief of State's systems herself; Rainer knocks Tokoga out and has him moved to the computer room as leverage.

title: RPlog:War Council
summary: As the coronation celebrations wind down, Imperator Damion convenes an ad-hoc war council in the Grand Moff's office on Selene to coordinate task forces and shipyard production ahead of deploying to Sullust. The Falleen black-marketeer Nasiri Gejalli, representing Nal Hutta, requests military-grade ships and offers financial services, but Malign refuses to give material aid in advance and insults him over empty offers. Johanna brokers a partial compromise of three Skipray Blastboats, but Nasiri declines to commit, leaving the offers standing as the council adjourns to the fleet.

title: RPlog:Wargame Pregame
summary: Ahead of the Caspian 4th Fleet's departure to Charros IV for wargames, Crestian Tarasar hosts a reception at The Mission's headquarters in Trinumvira. Guests mingle, including the newly recommissioned Admiral Lynae Cassius and her cadet son Andrev, Axel Vichten leading a delegation of Sarian Noques Rasala priests, the venture capitalist Malif Tal-Tahn, and Nara Rhen. Conversation is light and social, covering uniform designs, ranks, and Andrev's ambition to join the starfighter corps.

title: RPlog:Wartime Wedding
summary: On the bridge of the CSAV Emendation, on the eve of a battle against the Sith, Colonel Gren Delede and First Lieutenant Twila Virda are married by the ship's new chaplain. The chaplain questions whether they marry from love or fear, then proceeds with vows after they affirm their commitment. Lacking a ring, Gren gives Twila his father's engraved flask; the couple is pronounced married and kiss as the bridge crew witnesses the ceremony.

title: RPlog:We Are All, All of Us, Dust
summary: The Greater Javin Medical Society's annual conference at the luxurious Yarith Bespin hotel on Cloud City is disrupted when a nondescript man seals the lobby doors and reveals a bomb-rigged coat while chanting 'We are all, all of us, dust.' Technician Selko stuns him and Vance Jaxx tackles his hand, but the man dies from an apparent implanted failsafe and a secondary device begins beeping toward detonation. Selko blasts a hole in the transparisteel window while Vance and Druze haul the body out, ejecting the bomb into the open air where it detonates harmlessly outside. Quinne Stardust Rose coordinates security and cleanup, Crestian Tarasar calls in his fleet for backup, and Lynae unfuses the locked doors so emergency services can enter.

title: RPlog:Welcome Back to Caspar
summary: Jessalyn Valios returns to Caspar with the Fallen Selas Simon Sezirok (Rocklin), who attempts brutal 'confidence training' sparring to force her out of her despair and recruit her to his anti-Jedi cause. When CDU Marine Captain Tarrin Stardiver and the hoverchair-bound Ubi Sunt intervene, suspecting abuse, Rocklin assaults Tarrin with his training rod and uses the Force to choke Jessalyn. Jessalyn ultimately uses the Force to disarm and defend, then the pair make an impossible leap, cut into a manhole, and escape into the Plaxton sewers pursued by marines.

title: RPlog:Welcome To NR
summary: After a Maffi operation on Nar Shaddaa goes awry, Antoine Dareus is held in the New Republic military brig on Ord Mantell. Senator Del Marx visits and trades barbs with him before Admiral Doril Farnsworth arrives, dismisses her, and hauls Dareus to an interrogation room. Farnsworth pressures Dareus to confess his Maffi ties and carry a warning to the crime syndicate, dangling intel that Axel Vichten plans to bomb the Maffi compound. When Dareus refuses to cooperate, Farnsworth violently beats him, breaks his nose, frames the assault on camera, and has marines continue the beating as he leaves.

title: RPlog:What We Become
summary: In Chalmun's Cantina on Tatooine, the fledgling Sith Antoine Dareus meets his former Imperial comrade Lynae Cassius, who once mentored him. Over drinks they argue bitterly about whether each abandoned the other after their shared treason under Kreldin, with Dareus having pledged himself to Darth Malign and Lynae having refused that path to serve the neutral Caspians. They trade accusations, threats, and confessions of a familial love, with Lynae detailing how she could kill him with an undetectable pathogen. They part as enemies who still care for one another, each warning the other not to interfere with the other's chosen cause.

title: RPlog:What the...
summary: Smitherbodkins receives a late-night holocall from the deposed former Prex Qwynt, now styling himself an Admiral and leader of the Prex Liberation Army. Qwynt proposes burying their feud and a scheme to borrow CEC warships to stir up galactic chaos in exchange for a cut of his future tribute. Smitherbodkins declines, and after Qwynt thinks he has ended the call, he accidentally leaves the connection open, revealing he is plotting a surprise attack.

title: RPlog:When Caspians Attack: Part 1
summary: The Empire exploits growing anti-foreigner unrest in Plaxton City on Caspar, manipulating a mob into rioting against the New Republic Embassy while disguised Storm Commandos under Commander Calyx Drogyn snipe the marines and grapple onto the roof. As the embassy defenses collapse, the Jedi Leo Corak evacuates Ambrosia's daughter Gabi out a washroom window toward the forest. Ambrosia stays behind, broadcasting the assault live across the city and Navy networks to expose the manipulation, then arms herself and orders her marines to fall back as the protesters and commandos overrun the building.

title: RPlog:When Caspians Attack: Part 2
summary: Continuing the assault on the New Republic Embassy on Caspar, Imperial Storm Commandos breach the building and slaughter the remaining marines in a one-sided firefight. Ambrosia barricades herself in her quarters, records a final broadcast demanding the Republic recover her daughter and the Jedi, and ambushes the breaching commandos, killing one before being struck down by a stun bolt. An aristocratic-voiced commander orders that the captured naval prisoners be executed so there are 'no survivors,' and the commandos extract the unconscious Ambassador as their captured 'package.'

title: RPlog:When Corellians Meet
summary: In the Cat's Claw Cantina on New Alderaan, the sullen fighter pilot Chana (a former Old Republic-era pilot recently thawed from 43 years of carbon freeze) shares drinks with Argon Brand, a New Republic FleetOps officer and fellow Corellian. They bond over Corellian whiskey and ships, discussing Argon's command of the gunship Lightbringer and his record bounty from downing a Grand Admiral at Bothawui. Chana wrestles aloud with her divided loyalties between the Old Republic she swore to, the Empire, and the New Republic, while concealing her fear of being hunted by the Empire.

title: RPlog:When It Rains, It Pours
summary: Salty Jack and Barnacle Bill shop for a replacement ship among Chadra-Fan selling junk freighters at the Ord Mantell starport, with Jack denting one clunker in disgust. Twi'lek agent Sayla'kor of the New Kala'uun Twi'leks (Maffi/Zhao crime organization) approaches on a swoop, warning him off the poachers and offering better ships at her compound. At the lavish Zhao compound Sayla'kor reveals the ships come not for credits but for service piloting and dealings for her organization, while new thug Ehlias Cross watches menacingly with a vibroblade. Jack, wary of working for an unseen boss, noncommittally promises to consider the offer and departs.

title: RPlog:When It Rains, It Pours - Part 2
summary: Returning from the Zhao compound, Salty Jack finds Barnacle Bill napping at the Ord Mantell starport and reunites with the newly recruited youth Kit, who has been sleeping in a scrap pile. Jack sends Kit to the inn in town on his name and tab, then relates to Bill the Twi'lek's offer of a ship in exchange for working under an unknown boss. The pirates tally their growing crew and weigh the rival New Republic privateer deal against the Twi'lek offer. Intrigued by the prospect of adventure and firefights, Jack and Bill decide to secretly scout the Zhao compound for more information.

title: RPlog:When the Moon Hits Your Eye
summary: At the hidden Crime Moon bar on Nar Shaddaa, Darth Malus meets with the Twi'lek crime lord Skawn Kairn to plan their next moves following Malus's escape from the Oubliette. They discuss how to keep the Imperium off balance and serve Skawn's mistress (Mitra/Malign's faction), reviewing the political fallout of the prison break. Malus proposes two schemes: traveling to riot-torn Chandrila to be publicly sighted and force an Imperium reaction, and potentially exposing Axel Vichten's piracy to drive a wedge between the CSA and the Imperium. They agree to proceed with the Chandrila plan, with Malus having procured a cover ship and Skawn eager for violence.

title: RPlog:White Death Dies
summary: The Marauder corvette CSAV Emendation is ambushed and dragged out of hyperspace by the White Death pirates, who use an asteroid to disable it and then board through the hangar bay. Captain Gren Delede, Sergeant Jim T. Case and his squad, the merc droid AD-01, and CMO Xar'on Tanner fight wave after wave of pirates in a bloody hangar firefight. The pirate leader (in a white flightsuit, who once took Gren's eye) arrives but the ESPOs are eventually overwhelmed and forced to retreat into the corridor. Gren seals the bulkhead and orders the hangar's magnetic shielding dropped, killing the boarders and the pirate leader via explosive decompression.

title: RPlog:Who's Sane Now?
summary: At Coronet City Spaceport on Corellia, ex-Imperial Antoine Dareus encounters the Jedi Johanna Siri te Danaan and watches her use a Force mind-trick on ISB officer Korynn Fleming to free a Sullustan prisoner. Dareus covertly tips off CorSec, gets the garrison to stand down, and shields Johanna's escape despite his fear of execution if Korynn recovers his memory. Later, at the abandoned spaceport, Dareus confronts Johanna, begging to know whether she altered his mind; she insists she did not and tells him his deteriorating mental state stems from Imperial conditioning and his own guilt. They part with Dareus accepting he must look elsewhere for answers.

title: RPlog:Who's to Blame?
summary: Geophreigh Smitherbodkins IV barges unannounced into Miranda Jabs's FoxTech Industries office on Etti IV to report that an associate of an enemy has escalated their feud, sabotaging Etti IV's climate control with an artificial snowstorm and remotely hijacking Smitherbodkins's speeder to send it careening through the city. He stresses the conflict now threatens regional commerce, not just himself, and reveals the saboteur is a highly skilled Verpine whom security (via Dibble) is attempting to trace. The tense exchange ends with Smitherbodkins implicitly probing whether Jabs is connected to the Verpine instigator.

title: RPlog:Who dare refuse a Sith
summary: During Selene Day celebrations, reconnaissance commander Jal'Dana Rall is working alone in a crowded restaurant when Sith Warlord Vassily Korolov joins her uninvited. He offers her a coffee and quizzes her on her patrols before proposing a dangerous, highly secret operation in the heart of the Republic that she may accept or refuse. Rall, knowing she cannot truly say no, stalls her answer until the night of the Ball, while Korolov departs with a Force-borne warning not to choose incorrectly.

title: RPlog:Winter Returns to NRS Alderaan
summary: During the Etti IV crisis, Winter Retrac (codename 'Targeter-one') sends a distress call to the NRV Alderaan after fleeing in a stolen shuttle with two stunned guards and a stunned CSA captive. Leia, accompanied by Jessalyn, rushes to meet her in the docking bay as the Imperial presence intensifies and the New Republic prepares to withdraw. Winter, ragged and injured, asks after General Solo (still missing) before collapsing from exhaustion, cracked ribs, and a concussion. The medical team carries her to the MedSuite and places her in a bacta tank to recover, with Leia worriedly watching over her.

title: RPlog:Women's Underwear
summary: At the Ord Mantell spaceport, pirate captain Salty Jack and his first mate Barnacle Bill meet their newly hired ship technician, a fussy Givin named Winthrop, while their crewmate Sally Carol looks on. Winthrop is distressed to learn the crew has no ship yet (their last one was destroyed near Nar), and a luggage droid spills his trunks, revealing fine Corellian silk and a bright red undergarment used to pack delicate machine parts. The crew negotiates Winthrop's contract at 5,000 credits a week plus an advance, which Bill pays from a dirty sock full of pooled credits, and Jack assures everyone the deal for a new ship is all but done.

title: RPlog:Work Makes for Strange Company
summary: While doing archaeological research on Corellian artifacts in the dining room of a Palanhi hotel, smuggler Paul Nighman is approached by Vermillion, a privateer who introduces himself as Khaj Greengrass. Vermillion tries to recruit Paul as a researcher for his own creature-profit work, but Paul deflects by identifying himself as being in 'shipping and transportation.' They exchange names and Vermillion departs, leaving Paul wary of the red-headed privateer's intentions.

title: RPlog:Work Makes for Strange Company II
summary: Still researching after over 24 hours in the Palanhi hotel dining room, Paul Nighman makes a breakthrough on a Corellian artifact when Grathix Stur'ttrakath, a Mandalorian VP and Foreign Sales Representative for MandalMotors, approaches with interest in his work on ancient Corellian lore and the 'True Ones.' They discuss archaeology, the Clone Wars era, Jedi artifacts, and troublesome red-headed women. Grathix reveals he is a Mandalorian and hints he can offer historical insight before leaving for an appointment with Luke Skywalker.

title: RPlog:Yavin 4's Trap
summary: Sensing that his new Force-sensitive student Jessalyn Valios is in danger, Luke Skywalker travels to Yavin 4 and finds her unconscious on the amphitheater floor, gripping a carved wooden sphere that has ensnared her mind in a dark trap. Luke uses the Force to guide her out of the mental snare, prying the orb from her hand and helping her regain consciousness. They discuss the mysterious artifact and Luke's parallel concern about events on Tatooine before leading her safely back into the rainforest.

title: RPlog:You Wouldn't Like Me When I'm Angry
summary: In the slums of Tatooine, Barrien Thrask hears a scream and arrives too late to stop Danik Kreldin from abducting the crippled Kyokusha Gackt via jetpack. Enraged, Thrask battles Kreldin's left-behind goons Sandor Woden and Sethas, taking a blaster wound to the leg and neck but cutting Sethas down with his sword. Kreldin returns aboard his ship the Vendetta/Telgas and uses its tractor beam to hurl a crate of debris at Thrask, knocking him out. Thrask fails to rescue Kyokusha, who is taken away in stun cuffs.

title: RPlog:Zeebok's Great Escape
summary: Smuggler Jaspar Andromidas is hired by Zeak Oppenhiemer and the B'omarr Monk Hugo on Theseus Station to transport an escaped Nikto slave named Zeebok to freedom on Ord Mantell. Along the way Jaspar makes a side delivery of medical aid supplies and a forged CSA identity document to New Republic operative Drax Rendolen at a hidden asteroid rendezvous, collecting payment. He then delivers Zeebok to Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard at the New Alderaan starport on Ord Mantell, completing the underground passage and getting paid.

title: RPlog:Zik and Joh Talk p1
summary: Aboard the OS Paladin at the REC Shipyards, overworked Colonel Ikihsa Enb'Zik takes a break atop his starfighter when his old friend and former CO Johanna Siri te Danaan finds him. They catch up over caf, and Zik seeks her advice on his Firecats squadron's upcoming first mission, which involves investigating ancient stone artifacts found by archaeologist Kyle Senesca. Johanna reacts with alarm, warning him to stay out of affairs of the Dark Side, and presses him on who ordered the mission, suspecting a connection to the dark power Vadim and prior incidents on Tatooine and Kashyyyk.

title: RPlog:Zik and Joh Talk p2
summary: Continuing their talk aboard the OS Paladin, Enb'Zik and Johanna debate whether his Firecats should undertake the mission to Orpenhalz III. Johanna insists the stones themselves are the danger and should be handled by no one, but relaxes once Zik explains the mission's true objectives are reconnaissance and checking on Senesca's family, not extracting the artifacts. The conversation shifts to more casual topics until Johanna spots a lightsaber Zik has been secretly tinkering with in his cockpit, mortifying him; he reveals its focusing crystal was a gift to his parents before the Old Republic fell.

title: RPlog:Zik and Joh Talk p3
summary: Old friends Ikihsa Enb'Zik and Johanna Siri te Danaan sit on the wing of his fighter in the REC Shipyards aboard the OS Paladin, talking about the Force and philosophy. Johanna lets the Sullustan handle and ignite her lightsaber for the first time, and confides her self-doubt about having been a good commanding officer in Rogue Squadron. Zik reassures her she was an excellent CO and reflects that the war has cast them both into roles as defenders, and Johanna shares a calming Force image with him before they part.
